第一流剑手的先决条件，就是永远保留一只眼睛看自己。
A prerequisite for becoming a top swordmaster is to always keep one eye on oneself.
一身转战三千里，一剑曾当百万师。
The soldier marched alone for three thousand miles, his blade besting a million warriors along his path.
请携天子剑，斫下旄头星。
Please take up the Sword of the Emperor and carve your path to greatness.
藿藿在尾巴大爷建议下做了些准备，随后你们如期赶往金人巷赴约……
Following Mr. Tail's advice, Huohuo made some preparations, and then you head to Aurum Alley as promised...
时间回到三月七与斯科特立下赌约之后。\n三月七需严格按照日程练习剑术，十五日内通过三次试剑……
Time rewinds to when March 7th made the bet with Skott.\nMarch 7th needs to practice swordplay strictly according to schedule and pass three trials in fifteen days...
三月七信守赌约，承认了自己剑艺不精。
March 7th honored the bet and admitted her swordplay was lacking.
虽然她心有不甘，但美少女即便输掉了剑斗不服气的样子也很可爱。
Though unwilling to accept it, the young heroine still looked undeniably adorable in her defiance after losing the duel.
小老板娘，这——不对吧？我早就听说仙舟茶文化底蕴深厚，有待客之道。奇了怪了，我不是客人吗？我到底是不是客人啊？
Hey, this is... not how it's supposed to be, right? The Xianzhou is known for its tea culture and hospitality, but you're not treating me like a guest at all! Seriously, am I not a guest?
不要叫我客人，你的眼里根本就没有我这个客人。我要「不烫也不凉，口感刚刚好」的茶水，结果你上的茶要么凉了，要么烫嘴，你们仙舟真是太会待客啦！

Stop, don't call me a "guest." You're not even treating me as one. I want my tea just right, not too hot, not too cold, but the tea you served was either freezing or scalding! Is this how you treat your guests on the Xianzhou? How fantastic!
再加上你们这茶跟泥水一样，还敢向我收钱，你不是欺负老实人吗？！
Your tea tastes like slop, and you even have the nerve to charge me for it! Are you trying to scam honest folks!?
你这也别叫什么「不夜侯」了，怪难记的。回头我给你们送一块匾过来，上面写四个大字「仙舟下水」，你们必须给我挂起来。
And that name, "The Sleepless Earl," it's so hard to remember. How about we give you a new plaque that says "Xianzhou Slop?" It suits this place better, don't you think?
(Let's just give him a good beating.)
住手！你这有些欺人太甚了！
哎哟哟，这次又是哪位大侠啊？
Oh, who's that trying to be a hero?
是我，你姑奶奶我！啊不对，感觉姑奶奶好像不太帅气…{NICKNAME}，你说！
It's me! March 7th! Cause more trouble and I'll show you who your mommy is... Wait, that sounded lame... Hey, {NICKNAME}, say something for me!
她是星穹列车剑首三月七！
She's March 7th, the Sword Champion of the Astral Express!
没错，我就是我家那边的剑首……
That's right, I'm the Sword Champion...
没听说过，请你哪里来的滚哪里去。
Never heard of you. Now scurry back to wherever you crawled out from.
斯科特先生，我是云骑骁卫彦卿，之前见过面的。希望您能注意言行，别在街头惹事生非。
Mr. Skott, I'm Yanqing, a Cloud Knight Lieutenant. We've met before, and I suggest you stop causing trouble.
哈——？！我只是作为一名普通消费者，向小老板娘抱怨这茶水不行，你们云骑军连这都要管，以后全银河的游客还有谁敢来你们仙舟喝茶了呀？

Trouble? Hah! I'm just giving some feedback as a regular customer. The tea here is terrible, and now the Cloud Knights want to stop me from complaining about it? At this rate, who would want to ever come here for tea in the future?
就你这样，真是仙舟游客？
那你说，我不是游客，我是什么，仙舟的囚犯吗？
Yeah, what else would I be? The Xianzhou's prisoner?
总之，你要想当着我的面欺负小老板娘，最好问问我手里的家伙答不答应！
Anyway, if you're trying to bully this young lady, you'd better watch out for the weapon in my hand!
哈——？！噢，真是吓死我了！大侠您莫不是想用这对小铁片子来取我性命吧？
Huh...? Oh, that really scares me! Come on, you're not seriously trying to take my life with that piece of... scrap metal, are you?
小铁片子？这可是宝剑！我拿它是为了学习仙舟剑术！
Scrap metal? This is my sword! I'm here to learn Xianzhou swordplay!
噢，原来是学习剑术？怪不得穿得像表演节目一样。我看你也不是仙舟本地人，干嘛非得学剑呐，你要是没有安全感，我可以把公司的机甲卖给你。

Swordplay? Oh, I get it now. It's just another kind of play, right? That explains why you're dressed like you're in a show. You're not even from the Xianzhou, so why bother learning their swordplay? If you're feeling unsafe, I can sell you an IPC mech.
呸呸呸，谁稀罕你那破机甲！
Pfft! As if anyone wants your junkyard scrap mechs!
你们公司的机甲只会搞团建。
Your mechs are only good for show.
我看你们是完全不懂哦。
Looks like you guys are totally clueless.
三月七一剑就能击碎你的机甲！
March 7th can cut through your mechs with a single slash!
天呐，那你能给我表演一下吗？
Oh! How marvelous! How about you show me, then?
来人，给乡下人亮亮家伙。
Well, guess it's time to show these bumpkins something serious.
几台公司的机甲应声出现在不夜侯附近，围观的仙舟路人也越来越多。
A few IPC mechs respond and appear near the Sleepless Earl, and more and more Xianzhou passers-by stop to watch.
我必须再提醒一次，公司的诸位，在罗浮仙舟不可当街械斗。
Just a reminder, IPC members. Street fighting on the Xianzhou Luofu is prohibited.
公司的，你要是动手，就别怪我砸了那些废铁。
Make any funny moves, and I'll smash those hunks of scrap metal.
嘿嘿嘿，别紧张嘛，我是懂规矩的。这几位都是我的下属，他们因为运输船的事被迫滞留仙舟，多少有些压不住火气了…说到底，这都要怪你们仙舟呀。

Hey, hey, relax. I know the rules. These are my subordinates. They got stuck here because of the transport ship incident, and they need to vent their frustration... In the end, it's all the Xianzhou's fault.
茶馆的事，我可以既往不咎。不过嘛，你们质疑我司的安保能力，我不可能装作听不见，毕竟当着这么多客户的面，我这托运的生意还做不做了？

Well, I can overlook the terrible tea, but now that you're questioning my security, I can't let it slide. After all, I have a courier business to run, and with so many clients watching, that just wouldn't look too good now, would it?
再说了，你就算学一辈子花拳绣腿，还不如早点花钱投资买下我司的民用型机甲，不出几日，你就能把你师父打得下跪求饶。
Instead of wasting your life learning useless swordplay, why not invest in our civilian mechs? You'll have your master kneeling and begging for mercy in no time.
本姑娘不允许你这么污蔑仙舟剑术，有本事你让机甲跟我过上两招！
Stop! Don't you dare insult Xianzhou swordplay like that! If you have the guts, I'll show your mechs what I can do!
哈——？！她说要过上两招？哈哈哈哈哈哈。既然三月七小姐发起了挑战，我必须接受呀！
Huh...!? A fight, you say? Hahahahaha! Now that you've thrown down the gauntlet, March 7th, I feel I'm obliged to accept your challenge!
也许在开打前你的嘴比剑还硬，但等你领教了机甲的厉害，就会迫不及待地向公司掏钱了。
Say whatever you want, but once you've seen what our mechs can do, you'll be practically begging us for them.
别着急呀，我怎么可能会忘了打赌这种事呢？
Oh, come on, how could I say no to a bet?
我听说三月七小姐还没拜师学艺，那我也不欺负人。你回去跟你的师父学剑，随便学，十五天后我会登门拜帖，诚邀三月七小姐与我司的机甲切磋一番。
So, I can see you're no master yet, March, but I'll play fair. You go back and learn swordplay from your teachers here, and in fifteen days, I'll come find you and challenge you with my mechs.
你要是输了，你不仅要当众学狗叫，还要大声说「仙舟剑法，狗都不学」，就站在金人巷街口，给每个路过的人讲一遍。
And if you lose, you'll have to bark like a dog in public and shout, "Xianzhou swordplay is a total joke!" You'll stand at the entrance of Aurum Alley and say it to everyone passing by.
啊，对了，你也别拜师了，就来拜我吧，我来教你开机甲！
Oh, and if that's the case, just forget about your master and become my apprentice instead! I'll teach you how to pilot a mech!
Nah, I don't think so. I don't like you.
…这样吧，我也当众学狗…学猪叫，还要大声说「公司机甲，猪头才要」，然后在运输船上的每台机甲上都印上这句话，怎么样？
...Okay, how about this? If I lose, I'll squeal like a pig in public and say, "IPC mechs are a total joke!" And I'll even print that on every mech on the transport ship. Deal?
把狗改成猪就算新剧情了吗？
So, he just changed "barking" into "squealing" and that's supposed to be a different story?
这剧情既视感也太强了…
Feel like this has happened before...
感觉每次赌约都不太成熟…
Your bets always sound so childish...
你光是学猪叫还不够！你还必须向不夜侯的小老板娘道歉，你还必须向仙舟剑术道歉！
Squealing isn't enough! You also need to apologize to the owner of the Sleepless Earl, and take back what you said about Xianzhou swordplay!
这都没问题，但前提得是你用那小铁片真能打赢才行。
Fine, fine, I get it. But you've got to actually beat me with that little scrap of metal first.
大家都听到了，我们十五日后见！哈哈哈哈哈，我们走！
You all heard it, right? We'll meet again in fifteen days! Hahaha, let's go!
没事，感谢几位及时相助。不过，小店遭化外游客非难不过是小事一桩，三月小姐要与他踢馆竞技可不是小事…梦茗于心有愧，是小店给三月小姐添麻烦了。

Yes, thank you all for your timely help. The shop facing a bit of flak from visitors is a minor issue, but Miss March's decision to challenge him is serious... I feel responsible, as if the shop has inconvenienced you.
没事没事，无论有没有本事，遇到不平事，咱都得管一管的，实在见不得他仗势欺人。
Don't worry! I can't stand by and watch someone be bullied. I have to stand up against injustice, no matter what!
三月小姐不仅说话像幻戏和小说里的大侠，连善良之心也和大侠一样，梦茗完全被你给迷住了。
Not only do you speak like a hero from an immersia, but you also have a kind heart. Your charisma has completely won me over, Miss March.
啊哈哈哈…我可不算什么大侠呀。
Ahahaha... I'm not quite a hero yet.
我知道几位本来是来不夜侯敬拜师茶的，几位要是不嫌弃的话，里边请吧。
I know you're here for the tea ceremony. Please come inside.
不了不了，现在我一心只想回去抓紧学剑！二位小师父，我们改日再敬茶吧。
Thanks for the invitation, but right now, I just want to focus on practicing swordplay. Masters, let's save the tea for later.
敬茶一事自然可以闲置不谈，不过彦卿想问一下三月小姐，刚才的赌约…有几分信心？
Sure, the tea can wait for now. However, I have a question, Miss March... How confident are you about the bet you just made?
我猜三月你根本没考虑过…
I don't think March has given it any thought at all...
Come on, how could I possibly lose?
看来确实是什么也没有考虑。
You're right. It seems she really hasn't considered anything.
我猜三月心里根本就没底。
I don't think March is confident enough.
…我、我怎么没底了，我能做到吧，二位师父？
C—Come on! How could I possibly lack confidence! You believe in me, right, masters?
What do you think, Master Yanqing?
I think you already know the answer, Master Yunli.
我看没有什么不妥的，就让三月试试呗，只要她用心练，打个公司废铁应该是没问题的。
I don't see any issue with it. Let March give it a shot. As long as she trains diligently, I believe she can easily deal with that hunk of IPC scrap metal.
二位小师父，我现在可是斗志满满，一定会好好学剑，再狠狠地教训一下那家伙！
I'm now filled with determination, masters! I'll learn swordplay well and teach that guy a lesson!
{NICKNAME}，我可是最信任你了，你得来当我的助教，监督我好好学剑。
{NICKNAME}, you're my most trusted friend. You'll be my assistant teacher and make sure I learn swordplay properly.
这要是还学不好，就只能怪咱自己了。
If I can't learn swordplay well, I'll have no one to blame but myself.
Do I get paid as an assistant teacher?
我什么时候亏待过你啊？
Hey, when have I ever treated you poorly?
二位师父，{NICKNAME}，走吧走吧，我们现在就回去学剑。
Masters, {NICKNAME}, let's go back and start the training now.
我还是比较担心小老板娘的情况，我们去看看吧。
I'm still worried about the owner. Let's go check on her.
仙舟和公司签署了互贸协议，这些人不敢随便造次，可这赌约倒是意料之外……
The Xianzhou and IPC signed a trade agreement, so those IPC people won't dare to cause any trouble. But I mean... a bet like this is quite unexpected...
公司的人就是想找个软柿子捏，好卖他们的废铁，没劲。
Those IPC guys just want to pick on an easy target so they can promote their scrap metal. So typical.
公司那家伙会在<color=#dbc291ff>十五天</color>之后登门踢馆，本姑娘必须在这些日子里练成剑术大师！
That IPC guy will show up in <color=#dbc291ff>fifteen days</color>. I've got to become a swordmaster by then!
想在十五天内练成大师还是有点难。
Becoming a swordmaster in a mere fifteen days is quite challenging.
云璃师父，咱们气势可不能弱下去啊！
But we can't lose our momentum, Master Yunli!
靠着气势，你只能努力三天。靠着严格的计划，你才能坚持下去。
Momentum alone will only keep you going for about three days. If you really want to stick with it, you need a solid plan.
放心，我已经找到了专业的助教{NICKNAME}帮我安排课程，肯定没有问题的！
No worries! I've found my professional teaching assistant, {NICKNAME}, to help me organize the lessons. So, there won't be any problems!
我会好好安排三月的课程的。
I'll be sure to arrange lessons for March.
二位小师父请放心，你们可以不信我，但也要相信{F#她}{M#他}，我的好搭档！
Rest assured, masters, if not in me, at least place your faith in {F#her}{M#him}, my trusty sidekick!
你怎么就断言我肯定没问题…
How can you be so sure about me...?
我对你很放心的！二位小师父可以不信我，但也要信你啊！
Because I trust you! Even if my masters have doubts, they'll trust your judgment!
三月小姐学剑热情高涨，再加之，你还得到了一个具体的目标，这都是意外收获。
Miss March is really passionate about learning swordplay, and now she has a clear goal in mind. That's a good thing for her.
战胜一群恶徒的方法有很多，不过你若想成为「英雄大侠」，除了提升自己没有任何捷径可以走——彦卿希望三月小姐能记住这一点。
There are many ways to defeat villains, but if you want to become a true hero, you have to focus on self-improvement. I hope you will always remember this, Miss March.
Got it, it's all etched into my memory.
既然记住了，那为师就该给你提些要求了！
Since you've got that in mind, it's time for me to set some targets for you!
这<color=#dbc291ff>十五天内会有三次阶段性的考试</color>，只要你能通过我们的测试，公司那些废铁根本不足为惧。相反，如果你不能通过——
We'll have <color=#dbc291ff>three exams during these fifteen days</color>. If you pass our tests, those pieces of IPC scrap won't stand a chance. But if you fail...
那只能说明是云璃教导无方，希望三月小姐能及时放弃，不要强行应战。
That would mean Yunli is a terrible teacher. And if that's the case, I hope you won't force yourself to take on the challenge, Miss March.
在「教导无方」前面给我换上你的名字啊！
Hey, YOU are the terrible teacher here!
我懂！幻戏里徒弟与师父那是一荣俱荣一损俱损。徒弟落败，丢的是师父的脸。
I understand! In the immersia, the disciple and the master share both honor and disgrace. If the apprentice fails, the master loses face, too.
仙舟没有这么多江湖规矩，主要还是怕你受伤。
Well, there aren't that many customs on the Xianzhou. I'm just worried about you getting hurt.
但是只要你用心学剑，通过考试，我们自然放心你前去应战。
But as long as you practice diligently and pass the tests, we'll feel confident about your duel.
最后，我想回到今天最初的话题——想必三月小姐已经找到「挥剑的理由」了吧？
Now, let's go back to the first question I asked you. I'm sure you've found a reason to wield your sword, right, Miss March?
嗯嗯！我为成为大侠而挥剑！我想路见不平拔刀相助，让那些宵小之辈见着本姑娘就吓得两腿打颤，连滚带爬地立刻滚开！
Absolutely! I wield my sword to become a hero! I want to fight for justice, punish the wicked, and make them quiver in fear and run away when they see me!
那你就谨记于心，好好学剑吧。
Then keep that fire burning and learn with all your heart.
正式学剑之前，{NICKNAME}，我看你没怎么说话，你有什么建议吗？
You haven't said much, {NICKNAME}. Any suggestions before we officially start training?
Mastery of the sword trumps all.
我也喜欢人狠话不多的王道路线！
Exactly! I prefer the cool, calm and ruthless way of doing things – that's my kind of style!
出门靠朋友，总会有奇遇。
Friends on the road bring twists of the fate.
剑侠小说里的奇遇吗，可是我能遇到什么呢……
Twists? Like the ones in those swordmaster novels? But I wonder what kind of unexpected twists I'll encounter...
It'd be pretty awesome if that actually happened.
就聊到这吧，{NICKNAME}你要记得要好好监督我学剑哦！
That's enough chit-chat for now. Don't forget to keep an eye on my swordplay practice, {NICKNAME}!
今天是第一次考试的日子，考试的主题是「基本功」。
Today, you'll face your first test. It's all about the basics.
我知道，就是那个「练得硬桥硬马，方能稳扎稳打」对吧？
Oh, I know! It's that "float like a butterfly, sting like a bee," right?
你说的那是拳法…不过，理解得也没错。
That's boxing... but close enough, I guess.
若是没有基础的身体素质，正确的发力方式，那些复杂的招式更是无处入手。三月小姐，每日的挥剑训练就是基本功的一部分：刺要迅猛，点要干脆，带要锋利……
Grasping the basics is crucial to mastering swordplay, Miss March. Focus on wielding your sword properly, making your thrusts swift and strikes brisk...
And parries should be fluid and nimble! Got it.
你看，连三月七也嫌你唠叨。
See? Even March is getting bored of your rambling.
啊…我可没有嫌师父唠叨啊。
Ah... but I'm actually not bored at all.
我念三月小姐是初学剑术，强调口诀有助于加深理解。纵是像云璃姑娘这般天赋异禀，怠慢了基本功，充其量也只是些花拳绣腿。

Miss March is still a novice, so I'm giving her some tips on the basics to help her better understand them. Neglecting the basics will only make you vulnerable in a fight, even for an extraordinary swordmaster like you, Yunli.
教学就教学，扯我干什么？
Just focus on your teaching. Why bring me into this?
怎么，难道怀炎将军没有提点过你吗？
What? Didn't General Huaiyan offer you any guidance?
我看你家将军也没教会你，战斗的时候别像只麻雀般乱蹦啊！
Heh, looks like your general hasn't told you to stop hopping around like a sparrow in a fight, huh?
教学研讨留在考试之后进行吧…
Guys, let's save the seminar for later...
两位师父，我们还是先考试吧。
Let's focus on the test, masters.
这几日，三月小姐也学了不少基本功，现在就是考核的时候了。
Miss March has been learning the basics of swordplay, and now it's time to put her knowledge to the test.
三月七，取出双剑，好好应战吧！
Unsheathe your swords and show me what you've got, March!
看来我是顺利通过了考试？是不是？
Looks like I passed the test, right?
Yeah, well done! You passed with flying colors.
Great! Hey, {NICKNAME}, hurry up and congratulate me!
嘿嘿，这都是要多亏了二位小师父和{NICKNAME}你呀。
Hehe, I couldn't have done it without my masters and you, {NICKNAME}.
还有两次考试，你要戒骄戒躁。
Don't get too cocky. You still have two more tests to go.
简直就是仙舟式家长！不行，你又不是我的家长，我现在就要你来夸夸我。
Jeez, you sound just like those parents on the Xianzhou! Can't I get some praise now?
三月好棒！通过了基本功考试！
You're amazing, March! You've mastered the basics!
嘿嘿，这都是要多亏了二位小师父和{NICKNAME}你呀。
Hehe, I couldn't have done it without my masters and you, {NICKNAME}.
那我现在去找公司那家伙，我有几分胜算呢？
So, if I were to take on that IPC guy now, what would you say are my chances?
三月小姐本身就有武学底子，也有过许多实战的经验，再加上有我和云璃指导剑艺，此时若是去挑战公司的安保机甲，想必——
You already have a martial arts background and plenty of real combat experience. With swordplay guidance from me and Yunli, if you were to challenge the IPC's security mechs now, I believe—
一点胜算都没有？二位小师父，你们是不是想打击我的信心。我可先说好啊，本姑娘是那种越表扬成绩越好的类型。
No chance? Hey, are you trying to crush my confidence? I'm the kind of girl who performs better when I'm showered with praise, just so you know.
你拿上弓箭的话，应该有胜算。
Maybe you'd stand a chance if you used your bow.
你这不是变着法说我的剑法练得还不够吗？
Wait, are you saying my swordplay still isn't good enough?
你休息的时候，机甲却在锻炼。
When you're taking a break, the mechs are still training.
你别为了劝学，什么瞎话都往外编啊…真是的。
Oh, come on... you're just talking nonsense to keep me motivated.
我们家三月让着一只手也能打！
Our March can totally crush those mechs, even with one hand tied behind her back!
我也没有自信到那种程度…谢谢您捧场了。
I'm not that confident... but thank you for believing in me.
本来以为教导三月小姐，不过是个兴趣爱好速成班。我现在算是品出些传徒授艺的成就感来了。
I thought teaching March was just something of a hobby, but now, actually seeing her progress gives me a sense of accomplishment.
是吗？云璃师父是现在才发现吗？三月小姐，别担心，彦卿是一直认真传授的。
Oh, really? So now you finally acknowledge her talent, Master Yunli? Don't worry, Miss March, I've been serious about teaching you from the start.
少来挑拨离间，我教给三月七的每一招每一式都是朱明剑艺中千锤百炼的技法。
Don't try to cause a rift between us. Every move and technique I taught March is straight from the Zhuming art of swordplay.
三月小姐，这十五日学剑实在太过短暂，无论本场考试你通过与否，我都希望你能将基本功练习坚持下去，这样做的话，你才会有少许胜算。
Fifteen days of training is short, Miss March. Whether you pass or fail this test, I hope you'll continue with the basics, because that's your best shot at winning.
将军在每次剑术考试之后都会带彦卿去工造司做剑器保养。三月小姐，走吧，今天我来效仿将军的做法，也是对三月小姐这一阶段的认可。

After every test, the general would take me to the Artisanship Commission for sword maintenance. Let's go, Miss March. Today, I'll follow the general's example as a way of acknowledging your progress.
过了不久，罗浮之上某个阴暗的角落里……
Moments later, in a dark corner on the Luofu...
So, have you found any information about her?
查清楚了，那个姑娘也是星穹列车上的无名客，实力不可小觑。斯科特专员，您看这赌约是不是有些风险？
Yeah, that girl is one of the Nameless on the Astral Express. She's no pushover. Don't you think this bet's a bit too risky?
有风险怕什么？你见过战略投资部里那些大人物吗，你看他们谁会做稳赚不赔的买卖！
Yeah, it is. So what? Have you seen those big shots in the Strategic Investment Department? Do they ever make safe bets?
敢当着我的面扮猪吃老虎是吧。你，去把附近最好的机甲给我调过来！
She thinks she can fool me by flying under the radar? You there! Get me the most powerful mech we've got!
我倒要看看，你们这些「十五天速成班」教出来的徒弟，到底能有多大的本事！
Now I'm curious to see what this "<unbreak>15</unbreak>-day crash course" apprentice is really capable of!
今天是第二次考试的日子，这次的考官是我，考验你「奇招克敌」的本事。
Time for your second test. I'll be your examiner this time, and I'll be testing your ability to defeat enemies with unconventional moves.
爷爷说过，剑无定型。这大千世界，无处不是剑，无处不是剑招。要想短时间里掌握克敌制胜的本事，你需要练会一门「绝活」。

Grandpa always said that everything can be a sword, and that there are endless possibilities for learning swordplay in this vast world. If you want to defeat your opponent, you'll need your own secret move.
哼哼，说到「绝活」，我已经准备好了烈焰浓茶。
Hmhm! Speaking of secret moves, I've prepared some Flaming Potent Tea.
欸？金人巷里那个烈焰浓茶吗？
Huh? Is that Flaming Potent Tea from Aurum Alley?
没错，我看过一部幻戏，大侠喝下了烈焰浓茶之后身体摇晃、步履不稳，大侠靠着摇摇晃晃、稀里糊涂的醉剑功夫就将杀父仇人击败了。

You got it! I saw this immersia where the hero drank the Flaming Potent Tea and started stumbling and shaking all over the place. But then he managed to defeat his father's murderer with his drunken swordplay.
你这个例子举得不错，你会醉剑吗？
Good example. Do you know how to do the drunken swordplay?
…我不会，不是喝了这个烈焰浓茶就能会吗？
...No, I figured I could just learn it by drinking Flaming Potent Tea.
三月小姐，幻戏和现实是不一样的。
That's not how it works in real life, Miss March.
三月，你还有些其他的本事吧？
Do you have any other tricks up your sleeve, March?
你说的对，我在江湖上可是学了不少！
Absolutely! I've learned a lot from my adventures!
两位师父，我们还是先考试吧。
Let's focus on the test, masters.
就算不会「醉剑」，我也学了些其他的本事！
Even if I don't know drunken swordplay, I've got other tricks up my sleeve!
我听说三月小姐最近游历了不少，至于其中有多少能化为剑招，只能拭目以待了。
I've heard you've traveled a lot, Miss March. I'm excited to see how you incorporate your experiences into your swordplay moves.
三月七，这次的对手与公司机甲相近，你取出双剑，好好应战吧！
Your opponent this time is similar to the IPC mechs. Unsheathe your swords and give it everything you've got!
真是一些奇奇怪怪的本事，不过能如此自然地将它们运用在剑招之中，这足以被称为三月小姐自己的独门绝技了。
Those moves were pretty unconventional, but the way you blended them into your swordplay was impressive. It's like you've developed your own unique style, Miss March.
本以为三月小姐在云璃的鼓动下四处游玩是浪费时间，看来也不全是浪费。
So, I thought you were just wasting your time traveling around with Yunli's encouragement, but it seems like it's paid off.
怎么有的师父还在嘴硬？
Well, well, looks like someone's finally seeing sense.
谢谢二位小师父的指点，那我是顺利通过了考试？是不是？
Thank you both for your guidance. So, did I pass the test?
Without a doubt, you aced it.
好耶！{NICKNAME}，你是不是该夸夸咱了……
Awesome! Hey, {NICKNAME}, isn't it about time you showered me with praise...
嘿嘿，这次我就不谦虚了，我真是进步了不少！
Hehe, I won't be modest this time. My skills have improved by leaps and bounds!
要是下次考试通过，我就表扬。
I'll save the praise for when you pass the next test.
下次表扬下次的，这次表扬这次的，不许赊账。
No saving allowed! Let's keep it relevant: This time's for now, next time's for later. No IOUs on praise!
三月好棒！掌握了独门绝技！
You're amazing, March! You learned your own secret move!
嘿嘿，这次我就不谦虚了，我真是进步了不少！
Hehe, I won't be modest this time. My skills have improved by leaps and bounds!
将军之前也同我说过，让我学剑的时候，不能挑剔老师。不止是云骑教习，还包括各种江湖艺人，异邦友人……
General Jing Yuan once told me that everyone has the potential to be my master, not just Cloud Knight instructors, but also artists and outsiders...
实不相瞒，彦卿就曾被桂乃芬小姐吞过宝剑，那确实是剑术练习中学不到的本事。
Actually, I was once convinced by Guinaifen into swallowing a sword. That's definitely not something you learn from regular practice.
现在，三月觉得自己有几分胜算了？
So, what do you think your odds are, March?
Maybe around thirty... or forty percent?
这次你好像没有上次那么自信？
You don't seem as confident as last time. What's up?
这说明我的剑术理解加深了，已经会估算实力了。
Well, I've gained a deeper understanding of swordplay, and I'm more aware of my own strengths now.
顺带一提，幻戏里大侠在开战之前都会隐藏实力的。
By the way, in those immersia stories, the swordmasters always hide their true strength before a decisive battle.
毕竟一般说「会赢的」都输了。
Yep, those who boast "they'd win" usually end up losing.
Yeah, that's usually how it goes.
那你刚才是不是随便说的胜算。
So, did you just randomly throw out a number for your odds?
那你能赶上约定之日的决斗吗？
Will you be ready for the final showdown?
Hope for the best, and prepare for the worst.
怎么了嘛，三月七也可以说一些故作高深的话！
Hey, even I can say things that sound profound and mysterious!
你不会真以为我傻了吧唧的吧！
You don't really think I'm dumb, do you?
Is that another line from an immersia?
从刚才的考试能看得出来，你离融汇贯通还需要一些时间。不过能做到现在这样已经很棒了，今天我来请你们喝奶茶！
From the test, I can tell that you still need some time to master your swordplay, but you did pretty well. Milk tea is on me today!
过了不久，罗浮之上某个阴暗的角落里……
Moments later, in a dark corner on the Luofu...
无名客学剑的进度汇报完毕。斯科特专员，现在没有什么别的工作要做了吗？
The progress report on the Nameless girl's sword training is complete. What should I do now, Specialist Skott?
Huh...!? Are you being sarcastic or something?
我是说，我没有别的工作安排了吗？我一直监视别人小姑娘学剑，感觉有些浪费时间，心里有些过意不去……
I mean, don't I have other important tasks to do? It feels like a bit of a waste of time to keep tabs on some random girl's swordplay training...
你那是浪费时间吗？你是在保障星际和平公司的信誉，琥珀王的荣耀！
A waste of time? No, this is about safeguarding the reputation of the IPC and the honor of the Amber Lord!
你是说那个三月七已经能用剑击倒工造司的金人了？啧啧啧，区区仙舟金人，哪里比得上公司的机甲！
Are you saying that March 7th can actually take down an aurumaton from the Artisanship Commission with a sword? Come on, an aurumaton is no match for our state-of-the-art mechs!
你去把现有的机甲加厚加固，我不相信那小铁片子真的能碰瓷我们的尖端科技！
Go and strengthen our mechs even further! I refuse to believe that little sliver of metal can actually challenge our cutting-edge technology!
But the armor is already pretty thick.
不够，继续给我加！丢我的脸就相当于丢公司的脸，丢琥珀王的脸，你们丢得起吗？
No, it's not enough! Reinforce it more! If I lose face, it's like losing face for the IPC and the Amber Lord! Can we afford to let that happen?
在考试之前，有一件事我要告诉你，三月小姐，我收到了斯科特的战帖。
Before we start the test, there's something I need to tell you, Miss March. I've received a challenge letter from Skott.
他做得很周全，早早联系了地衡司，提交了「武术交流活动」的审批…还将比斗地点选在金人巷，看来那里与他也算是颇有渊源吧。

He's made thorough preparations, contacting the Realm-Keeping Commission and getting approval for a "martial arts exchange event"... He even chose Aurum Alley as the venue. Seems like he has some connections there.
不过按照规矩，收到战帖的人仍然可以拒不接受挑战。
However, according to the rules, the person receiving the challenge letter has the right to decline the challenge.
那不就是承认自己会输嘛，我肯定接受啊！
Declining would be like admitting defeat! Of course I'll accept it!
在那之前，三月小姐还有最后一次考试——也就是「出师试」。
But before that, you need to pass the final test, the graduation exam.
三月，你这么快就出师了？
彦卿师父，你是不想教了？
Is it that you don't want to teach her anymore, Master Yanqing?
不会吧，彦卿师父对我可好了。
No way. Master Yanqing has been great to me.
这倒也不是真正的出师，只不过这一次考试的对手，是你的师父——彦卿。
Well, it's not really graduation. It's just that the opponent for this exam is your master, Yanqing.
将军教我学习剑术，每到关键的节点，他便会亲自下场与我对练，测试我水平如何。
When General Jing Yuan was teaching me swordplay, he used to personally spar with me during crucial moments to assess my skills.
按理来说，师父最明白弟子有什么做得好、又有什么不足。
After all, the master should be the one who is most aware of their student's strengths and weaknesses.
彦卿师父，和你交手…我真的能打赢吗？
But Master Yanqing, facing you in a duel... do I really stand a chance?
不试试怎么知道呢？难道说，对手是我，三月小姐就怕了吗？
How will we ever find out if you don't even try? Are you only scared because I'm your opponent, Miss March?
三月小姐，取出双剑，摆好架势，要开始了！
Unsheathe your swords and get ready, Miss March! The duel starts now!
不错，三月小姐撑到了现在，你通过了。
Not bad! You've made it this far, Miss March. You've passed the exam.
嘿嘿，我说过，我是越夸越会优秀的类型嘛。
Hehe, I told you compliments make me better.
考试结束，真正的考验才开始。
The tests are all over, but the real trial is just about to begin.
虽然你说的挺有道理的，但这可不是糊弄我的时候，快夸夸我。
I get your point, but this isn't the time for deflections — quickly, say something nice about me!
恭喜三月加入战胜彦卿俱乐部。
Congrats! You're now officially a member of the "Bested Yanqing" club!
实际上，我并没有战胜彦卿师父……
Actually, I didn't defeat Master Yanqing...
这句话听多了，我都会唱了。
Oh, I've heard that line so many times before!
三月，凭你眼下的剑术，即便面对公司的机甲，也能稳操胜券。
With your swordplay skills, you can effortlessly take down IPC mechs, March.
但你现在再回头看看，是不是有了比「剑术」更重要的收获？
But looking back, haven't you learned something more important than just swordplay?
这段时间，咱不仅向两位老师学了剑，还认识了很多人和事，得到很多宝贵的体验。
Yeah, I've not only learned swordplay from masters, but I've also met a bunch of people and gained a lot of insights from my experiences.
这些都将成为你剑术的「养分」。就像是你的云璃师父说过的，「这大千世界，无处不是剑，无处不是剑招」。
Those experiences will nourish your sword skills. It's just like Master Yunli said, "Everything can be a sword, and there are endless possibilities for learning swordplay in the vast world."
现在，关于如何击败斯科特，我想听听你的看法。
Now, I'd love to hear your suggestions on how to defeat Skott.
堂堂正正，用剑术一决胜负。
Defeat him fair and square with your sword.
嗯，没错，就让斯科特见识见识他瞧不起的仙舟剑术！
Yeah! I'll show Skott the power of the Xianzhou swordplay that he despises!
也许，我们还有别的致胜法…
Maybe there's another method we can use...
我明白了，就这样做吧！想要击败他，何必非要剑术呢？
I see, let's give it a shot! Who says we have to rely purely on swordplay to beat him?
嘿嘿，就这样做，我已经有想法了。
Hehe, let's do it. I already have an idea.
我记得当时彦卿说过「战胜一群恶徒的方法有很多，不过你若想成为『英雄大侠』，除了提升自己没有任何捷径可以走。」
I remember Yanqing once said, "There are many ways to defeat villains, but if you want to become a true hero, you have to focus on self-improvement."
三月七，现在你觉得自己离你理想的「英雄大侠」更接近了吗？
Do you feel any closer to becoming the great hero you've always dreamed of?
当然！我心里的「英雄大侠」会这样做的！
Yes, absolutely! The great hero within me is definitely up to the task!
瞧瞧，这不是我们的女侠三月七吗？
Well, well, if it isn't our hero, March 7th!
哼，本姑娘没有躲没有藏，你下了战帖，我自会前来应战。
Hmph, I'm not hiding or backing down. You challenged me, and I'm here to accept it.
…不过咱就是问一下，你干嘛非得选在金人巷里？这里游人还挺多的，要是有人被误伤到了也不好。
...But I'm curious, why pick Aurum Alley of all places? It's packed with tourists around, and it'd be bad if someone got hurt.
为什么是金人巷？你身边这位{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}最清楚不过了。
Why Aurum Alley? Well, your buddy knows the answer to that.
毕竟，这是你学狗叫的地方。
Well, this is the place you lost a bet and barked like a dog, after all.
我无法否认，我始终忘不掉那一天的事情。
I can't deny it. That fateful day left a mark on me.
你在这里遭遇了事业的挫折。
Because you took a hit to your career that day.
没错，从那天起，我被抽调出分部的核心业务。
Exactly. On that fateful day, I was reassigned, dismissed from my department's core operations.
我特意选在金人巷，那是因为我得让当初那些嘲笑我的父老乡亲们前来围观。
That's why I chose this place. I want to show all those people who laughed at me that I can stand on my own two feet again.
他们会惊讶「啊——？！当初那个斯科特怎么又回来了？这次他又要做什么？」
They'll be like, "What...!? That Skott is back again? What's he got up to this time?"
他们会看到，当初被当众羞辱的斯科特重新回到了金人巷一雪前耻。
They'll see that I, Skott, who was once shamed in front of everyone, is back in Aurum Alley to restore his honor!
我得让父老乡亲们听个明白，今天在这里学小畜生的，不会是我，而是你——！
They'll see that it won't be me squealing like a pig today, but YOU!
Seems kinda petty, don't you think?
是啊，要是幻戏里的反派就这点追求，我肯定是要退票的。
Yeah, if that's all a villain did in an immersia, I'd definitely be asking for a refund.
是不是找错复仇对象了？
Are you even seeking revenge on the right person?
错，我要复仇的是整个金人巷！
Right person? No, I want to enact revenge on the entirety of Aurum Alley!
…可是你复仇金人巷，与欺负不夜侯的小老板娘有什么关系？
...But then wait, where does bullying the owner of the Sleepless Earl fit in with all of this?
我有自己的原则，我不想一辈子都陷在金人巷的阴影里！你以为我是公司臭要饭的？
Look, I have my principles. I refuse to spend my life haunted by what happened in Aurum Alley! Do you think I'm just some sort of IPC small fry?
我忍了这么久，就是想等一个机会！我要争一口气，不是要证明我有多了不起，我是要告诉金人巷里的所有人，我失去的东西，我一定要拿回来！
I've been patient for so long, just waiting for the right moment! I don't care about proving my greatness — it's about showing everyone in Aurum Alley that I will reclaim what was taken from me!
少废话，你失去的拿不回去了！
Spare me the lecture! You're not getting back what you lost!
你应该堂堂正正拿回你的尊严！
You should reclaim your dignity in a more respectable way!
而不是用这种肮脏的手段！
Instead of resorting to such despicable methods!
我调查过了，你不过是学剑才十五天的菜鸟，就这还想打败我无敌的机甲？痴人说梦！
I've been keeping an eye on you. Seriously, do you really believe that you, a rookie who's only been learning swordplay for fifteen days, can defeat my invincible mechs? Dream on!
客套话就到此为止了！兄弟们，给我上！
Enough with the talk! Let's get down to business, boys!
哼，等你输了以后，你就知道本姑娘到底有什么本事了！
Hah! Once you bite the dust, you'll know what I'm capable of!
啊啊啊啊——你们这些好吃懒做的废物！你们怎么、怎么就输给了那个菜鸟了呢？！
Ahhhhhhhh! You pathetic losers! How... how did you all lose to that rookie!?
你别赖别人，你不也被我打败了吗？
Hey, stop blaming others! Didn't you lose to me, too?
难道说，我又要…我不！我不我不我不！凭什么，仙舟的小铁片子就能击败公司的无敌机甲！肯、肯定是你们作弊了，这一场不算，我要求重来！

So, does that mean... I... I have to...? No way! This can't be happening! How could a tiny piece of scrap metal defeat the IPC's mechs!? You guys must have cheated! This doesn't count! I demand a rematch!
小铁片子、小铁片子…真正决定胜利的可从来不是什么武器，是人！
Scrap metal, huh?... The key to victory is never the weapon. It's the person wielding it!
But let's not forget about our bet...
Yeah, let's not forget our bet!
金人巷的父老乡亲都看着呢。
Everyone in Aurum Alley is watching.
就是就是，都是老熟人了。
Right! I bet you're quite familiar with them, too.
我其实很佩服你愿赌服输。
Actually, I respect that you're willing to honor the bet.
你要是说到做到，咱也佩服你。
I'll respect you too if you keep your word.
够了——也不是第一次了，我道歉！
Enough...! Fine, I've done this before anyway! I apologize!
我要向不夜侯的小老板娘道歉，是我惹事生非、故意找事，全都怪我！
I want to apologize to the owner of the Sleepless Earl! It's my fault for causing trouble and making a scene on purpose!
What about the "squealing like a pig" part?
你刚才怎么说的，学猪叫呢？
Hey, remember what you said? What about squealing like a pig?
Make him squeal, make him squeal!
Hold on a sec, I wanna get this on video.
此时此刻，恰如彼时彼刻…在学猪叫之前，我还有一句话要说！
It's happening all over again... Alright! But before I squeal like a pig, there's something else I want to say!
IPC mechs are a total joke...!
斯科特专员垂头丧气地离开了码头。
Skott leaves the dock with his head hanging low.
一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.
我在给星穹列车写信。出来这么久了，也该报个平安才对。仙舟不是有首诗嘛！「烽火连三月，家书抵万金」！

I'm writing a letter to the Astral Express. It's been a while, and I thought I should let them know that I'm safe and sound here. You know that poem from the Xianzhou, right? "We like March. Her shoes are purple, she is new and high..."
你这个引用疑似是有点不吉利了……
March, I don't think that poem is about you...
姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?
Help March 7th with her sword training.
I am going to rest for a while, farewell.
在下听闻阁下已经为剑斗做足了准备，祝阁下宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜！
I hear that you have already made sufficient battle preparations. May thy blade split and sever, and may victory find you!
三月七小姐、{NICKNAME}，听说斯科特已经送来了战帖，我们想着能不能做点什么，帮助三月小姐战胜斯科特。
March, {NICKNAME}, we heard that Skott sent you a challenge, so we were wondering if there's anything we can do to help you defeat him.
谢谢藿藿，你愿意教咱学会摆弄除魔道具，就已经帮了我很多了！多亏了各位相助，本姑娘虽然学剑没有多长时间，但击败公司的机甲我还是有信心的。

Thanks, Huohuo! You've already been a huge help by teaching me how to use the exorcising tools! Even though I've only been learning swordplay for a short time, I'm confident I can take down the IPC mechs.
哪里哪里，是我要多感谢三月七小姐才是。
Don't mention it. It's actually me who should be thanking you, March.
我记得那个斯科特不是被{NICKNAME}教训过一次了吗？怎么还敢回来？人类是学不会吸取教训嘛？
But seriously, didn't {NICKNAME} kick Skott's butt already? So why's he back again? Don't humans ever learn from their mistakes?
尾巴大爷此言差矣，有句话叫「君子报仇十年不晚」。但是斯科特是个小人，我猜他连隔夜仇都忍不了，现在可让他逮着机会了。
No, no, Mr. Tail. There's a saying, "Revenge is a dish best served cold," but Skott hardly has any patience. He couldn't resist the temptation to get back at us.
不过嘛，要是就这样击败他…总觉得有一些…不够痛快！
Still, if that's how I beat him... it'd be a little less... satisfying.
狠狠击败斯科特也不够痛快？
Giving Skott a good beating isn't satisfying enough for you?
唔…说不出来，就是感觉不够痛快。
Hmm... I can't quite put my finger on it, but it just wouldn't be satisfying enough.
怎么样才算是足够痛快呢？
So, what would be your ideal way of teaching him a lesson?
我明白。这种学不会吸取教训的家伙，就算毒打他千遍万遍，也还是不会吸取任何教训。他是不会发自内心被你打服的。
I get it. Some people never learn, no matter how many times you knock them down. They'll never admit defeat or learn anything.
那…有什么办法，能让他输得心服口服？
So... how do we get him to admit defeat?
尾巴大爷有什么好办法？
Do you have any ideas, Mr. Tail?
不是本大爷说你呀，你太顺着那个斯科特的思路走了。
Listen kid, I'm not trying to rag on you, but you're always playing into Skott's hands with your approach.
他订下规则用机甲与你手中三尺剑比斗，你就同意了。他说赢了怎样、输了怎样，你也同意了…这整个儿就是一场斯科特组织的运动会啊，赢了也没劲！

He set up these rules for a fight between his mechs and your sword, and you agreed. Then he laid out what to do if you win or lose, and you agreed again... It's basically just another one of Skott's organized sports events, and it's not even fun if you win!
Rules are made to be broken!
{F#小姑娘}{M#你小子}，别动不动耍帅。这样的机会要好好留给本大爷。
Hey, cut it out kid, just leave the cool catchphrases to me!
What do you think, Mr. Tail?
Hmm, looks like you've come to the right person.
咱是岁阳，你要是信得过我的话，大爷我有些岁阳的本事！藿藿，揭开封印吧……
I'm a heliobus, and I've got a few tricks up my sleeve! Just remove my seal, Huohuo...
Is it really okay to remove your seal?
能有什么关系？只要你不给女鬼判官打小报告就行。
What's the harm? As long as you don't go snitching to that Ghosty, we won't run into any trouble.
Are you planning to possess Skott?
嘿嘿嘿，只是附身可是不够的，我要深入他的内心。
Heh, just possessing him won't be enough. I'm going to get inside his head.
你们等着瞧吧，本大爷会让斯科特洗心革面，诚心诚意地认输，你说这痛快不痛快！
Just wait and see. I'll make Skott change his mind and admit defeat wholeheartedly. What do you say?
I'll leave it to you then, Mr. Tail!
Just a moment. I have something else to do.
斯科特专员！斯科特专员！你怎么了？
Specialist Skott! Specialist Skott! What's the matter?
斯科特专员，刚才三月七一挥剑，就有一个绿色的东西冲进了你身体里…然后你就站在那里，嘴上念念有词…你还好吗？
Specialist Skott, March 7th swung her sword, and something green entered your body... Then you froze and started muttering something... Are you okay?
喂！三月七，你们到底对斯科特专员做了些什么！
Hey! March 7th! What did you do to Specialist Skott!?
我？我什么也没做啊，可别怪到我身上。
Me? I didn't do anything, seriously.
尾巴大爷，你…你对斯科特做了什么？
Mr. Tail, what... what did you do to Skott?
你不会把他的情绪吸干了吧？
You didn't drain all of his emotions, did you?
你不会是把他给夺舍了吧？
You didn't possess him, did you?
想什么呢？本大爷只是抢走他内心最扭曲的欲望而已，你们就瞧好吧，哈哈！
Come on, what are you thinking? I just stripped away his most twisted desire! Watch what's about to happen, haha!
斯科特的样子看起来怪怪的…尾巴大爷，你真让他洗心革面了？
Skott seems weird... Did you really make him change his ways, Mr. Tail?
老子也是第一次尝试，还不知道效果如何。
Well, this is my first time doing something like this, so I'm not sure how things will turn out.
能让这种家伙洗心革面，尾巴大爷，你可真不简单啊。
You've managed to make a guy like him turn over a new leaf. You're amazing, Mr. Tail!
嘿嘿，本大爷比你们想的更不简单。快看，开始了——
Heh, I'm even more amazing than you think. Look, it's kicking in now...
Specialist Skott, what's wrong with you!?
斯科特专员，你清醒一点啊！
Specialist Skott, snap out of it!
尾巴，你到底把他怎么了？
What have you done to him, Mr. Tail?
没有了那扭曲的欲望——他是真心诚意地想成为一匹「孤狼」了。
I removed his twisted desires, and now he's genuinely trying to become a "lone wolf."
那自然厉害，老子可是抢走了他扭曲的内心！
Of course I am. I've stolen his twisted heart!
Good thing you're on our side.
那你可记好了，千万不要与藿藿为敌哦。
Yeah, you'd ought to remember it's best not to make an enemy out of Huohuo.
Is this what you call "changing his ways?"
怎么不算呢？野生动物不是比这家伙善良多了？
What would you call it, then? Even a feral wolf is better than what he was, right?
啊！斯科特专员，你别咬我！
Ah! Don't bite me, Specialist Skott!
快跑啊！斯科特专员发狂咬人了！
Run for your life! Specialist Skott has gone insane!
几个公司员工拔腿就跑，斯科特专员在身后手脚并用、穷追不舍。真是残酷的动物世界。
Several IPC workers take off immediately, and Skott pursues them on all fours.
我还以为尾巴大爷会附在我身上，引导我展现出超凡绝伦的岁阳剑法呢……
I thought Mr. Tail would possess me and teach me some super cool heliobus swordplay...
都说了，本大爷不是那么暴力的岁阳！
Nah, I told you I'm not really one for violence!
一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.
三月小姐…你在写什么呢？
What are you writing... Miss March?
我在给星穹列车写信。出来这么久了，也该报个平安才对。
I'm writing a letter to the Astral Express. It's been a while, and I thought I should let them know that I'm safe and sound here.
哇，你的字好好看啊！那个…能不能抽空也教教尾巴大爷？
Wow, your handwriting is so beautiful! Can you... teach Mr. Tail sometime?
嘿！这小东西的胆子是越来越大了，敢讽刺你尾巴大爷了是吧？
Hey! This little one is getting cheeky! Now you're being sarcastic with me, huh?
姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?
你们等着瞧吧，本大爷会让斯科特洗心革面，诚心诚意地认输，你说这痛快不痛快！
Just wait and see. I'll make Skott change his mind and admit defeat wholeheartedly. What do you say?
I'll leave it to you then, Mr. Tail!
Just a moment. I have something else to do.
Long time no see, {NICKNAME} and Miss March 7th!
好久不见，最近捉鬼还忙吗？

跟岁阳相关的事务没之前那么多了，可是别的事情又开始忙起来了……

藿藿，快救救被附身的三月七！
Huohuo, hurry up and save the possessed March 7th!
啊、啊啊啊！三月小姐坚持住，我这就把灵符拿出来…！
Ah, ahhhh! Hang in there Miss March, I'll get the talisman out right now...!
别担心藿藿，我没有被附身，{F#她}{M#他}在逗你呢。
Don't worry Huohuo, I'm not possessed, {F#she's}{M#he's} just pulling your leg.
好久不见！你在这里做什么呢？

看来十王司的判官压力也很大呀。

也很大…？三月七小姐最近遇上了什么压力很大的事情了吗？
Too...? Have you run into something that's been weighing heavily on your mind, Miss March 7th?
最近我开始学习仙舟剑法了，有了一些学业压力，以及…社会压力。
I've started picking up Xianzhou swordplay, so there's been some academic stress, and... social stress.
你将三月七与公司的好事之徒约战的事细细道来。
You elaborate on the matter of the upcoming duel between March 7th and that IPC busybody.
事、事情我大概明白了，想要在短时间内掌握一门剑术并不容易，三月七小姐有压力也不奇怪。我、我会一些驱邪的剑术，如果你有需要的话……

I—I think I get the gist of it. It's not easy trying to master a school's swordplay in such a short time, no wonder Miss March 7th is stressed out. I know some evil-warding swordplay, so if you need some help...
算了吧，你连剑都握不稳，就这水平还想帮别人？
Hah, you can't even hold your sword steady. Don't you think you're overestimating your skills?

...S—Sure, I can't hold it steady. But I'm better than you — you don't even have hands!
哎哟…小怂包还敢顶嘴了。要是老子附在你身上，你登上演武仪典的擂台，绝对不会输给神策府里那个黄毛小子！
Ooh... The timid fry's got a sharp tongue. If you were in the Wardance ring and I possessed you, you'd have to try really hard to lose to that brat from the Seat of Divine Foresight!
彦卿师父他真的很厉害，尾巴大爷不会是吹牛吧？
Master Yanqing is really powerful. You sure you aren't just blowing smoke, Mr. Tail?
哼，老子只要附身过剑技高超之人，汲取那人的记忆与情绪，本大爷就能掌握相同的剑技！你要是想学那个黄毛小子的剑法，这不是最快的？

Hmph, as long as I possess someone of extraordinary caliber and absorb that person's memories and emotions, I can master the exact same technique! Isn't that the fastest way to do it if you want to learn that brat's swordplay?
不行不行，我是不会解开封印的！
No no no, I won't undo the seal!
啧啧啧，看来你想帮朋友的心意也不过如此嘛？
Tsk tsk, I guess your desire to help your friend is only worth this much, eh?
二位的心意谢过了。{NICKNAME}，我想听听你对「走捷径」的看法？

时间很紧，借个存档倒不错。

存、存档？这么一说确实很像是问某个高端玩家借了存档。不过嘛，等尾巴大爷一走，我这边还不是一无所获嘛。
S—Save file? When you put it this way, it does sound like asking to borrow a hardcore player's save file. But once Mr. Tail leaves, I'd still be left empty-handed.
There are no shortcuts when it comes to learning!
不愧是咱的助教，你说的不错，要是尾巴大爷一走，我一无所获，这可就违背了学剑的初衷了。

三月小姐也觉得这样不好，对吧？
You also think it's a bad idea, right Miss March?
呸呸呸，好心当成了驴肝肺，你想要，老子还不愿帮呢！
