…啊！刚刚寒鸦大人发来了一例「僵尸」的案情，看来休息时间结束了。三月小姐，我们下次再见吧！
...Ah! Madam Hanya just sent over a zombie case, looks like break time's over. We'll talk again, Miss March!
Huohuo scuttles off in a hurry...
仔细想了想，尾巴大爷的提议倒也不是没有可取之处。<color=#dbc291ff>下次遇见藿藿时，再向她和尾巴大爷请教一番好了。</color>
After giving it some thought, I think there's something to be gleaned from Mr. Tail's suggestion. When I <color=#dbc291ff>see Huohuo again, I should ask for advice from both her and Mr. Tail.</color>
Ah... It's {NICKNAME}, and Miss March 7th too!
藿藿，怎么没有精神的样子？
Huohuo, why do you look so dazed?
嗯，最近我们在绥园附近发现了两具「僵尸」。说是「僵尸」也不太对…受害者身上似乎没有岁阳留存，也没有明显的外伤，但却会重复做出某些奇怪的行为。

Mm, we found two zombies near Fyxestroll Garden recently. Well, "zombie" might not be the right word... The victims had no heliobus traces on them, nor obvious external injuries, but they kept repeating some strange behavior.
三月七小姐，就别挖苦我了。
Miss March 7th, please don't patronize me...
肯定是惊吓过度的反应。
Must be a side effect from being scared silly.
…也许有可能！不过，我有没有做过像这样的奇怪行为呢？
...That's entirely possible! But have I ever acted so strangely?
你跑得老快了，这事应该没这么简单。
You run super fast. This matter's probably not that simple.
这只能说明那是赛博僵尸。
That could only mean that it's a cyber-zombie.
不是所有东西前面加上「赛博」两个字就会合理的。
Not everything will suddenly make sense just because you tack the word "cyber" in front of it.
毕竟人还活着，说是「僵尸」有点太不礼貌了。
The person's still alive, so it's not very nice to call them a zombie.
就像你和{NICKNAME}组成「捉鬼小队」时那样，我们一起来分析一下吧！下面有请藿专家介绍案情。
Just like when you and {NICKNAME} formed the ghost-hunting squad, let's analyze this together! Next up, let's have resident expert Huohuo introduce the case.
好、好，跟大家一起商量一下，可能更容易打开思路！
Okay, okay. Something might click if we put our brains together!
第一位受害者，是演武仪典的报名选手。被发现的时候肌肉僵硬，双手前举，嘴里念念有词各种功法口诀。

The first victim is a Wardance combat registrant. Their muscles were rigid when they were discovered, their arms were stretched out in front of them, and they were muttering all sorts of exercise rhymes.
第二位受害者，他也是演武仪典的报名选手。受害人是前云骑军成员，擅使长枪，被发现时正拿长枪练习撑杆跳。
The second victim is also a Wardance combat registrant. He is a former Cloud Knight proficient at the spear. He was discovered practicing pole-vaulting with his spear.
唔，受害者有一个共通点——他们都是演武仪典的选手。看起来凶手专挑演武仪典的选手作为目标！
Mm, the victims have something in common — they're both Wardance contestants. It appears the culprit is expressly choosing Wardance contestants as their targets!
三月七，你也是参赛选手。
所以呢？本姑娘会成为下一个目标吗？
So? I'll be the next target then?
在受害者身上找共通点是误区。
It's a mistake to look for similarities on the victims.
没错，受害者太少了，这共通点没有说服力。
That's right, we have too few victims. This similarity isn't convincing enough.
你就别费力一通分析了，让咱们把情况说全乎些。
You should give the analysis a rest first and let us finish talking.
除去都是参赛选手外，这两个受害人还有一个共同的特征——他们都是看了罗浮杂俎上的流言，跑到绥园附近瞎逛的傻瓜。

Besides the fact that they were participants, they also had a similar characteristic — they're both fools who went to Fyxestroll Garden to poke around after reading the messages on the Luofu's Ghostly Grove.
这两名受害者相信绥园凌厉肃杀的阴气能磨砺他们的招式，于是趁着开赛前在这儿练功，想要吸取天地之气为己用——都什么年代了怎么还有人信这？

These victims believed that Fyxestroll Garden's vengeful gloom would temper their skills, and decided to train here before their matches started, in some attempt to harness the worldly energies absorbed here... People still believe this mumbo-jumbo in this day and age?
最后，此二人都被值勤的十王司冥差「九叔」劝返回家，于次日发作异常。
Finally, these two were shooed home by the Ten-Lords Commission spiritfarer-on-duty, Uncle Jiu. They started acting funny the following day.
Mystery solved! Uncle Jiu is the murderer!
九叔是咱们的工作人员…
He's a member of our staff...
Mystery solved! It must be a heliobus!
我猜八成也是逃逸的岁阳搞的鬼。
I'm also guessing it's an escaped heliobus that's up to no good.
好像在仙舟幻戏里看过相同的故事！这位九叔是不是有两个徒弟，一个徒弟被僵尸咬了，还有一个徒弟被女鬼给迷住了……
I think I've seen a similar story in a Xianzhou immersia! Does this Uncle Jiu have two disciples, and one of them got bitten by a zombie, and the other got charmed by a female ghost...
咱们这位九叔…没有徒弟。
Our Uncle Jiu... has no disciples.
你少看点幻戏，多接触点现实吧！
Cut down on your immersia addiction and touch some grass!
不过三月七小姐既然要参加演武仪典，一定要千万小心，发生什么事记得联系我哦！
But since you want to join the Wardance, you must be careful! Don't forget to contact me if anything happens!
加油藿藿，早点将犯人捉拿归案！
Good luck, Huohuo! Hope you catch the culprit and close the case soon!
Huohuo scuttles off in a hurry...
如果那只岁阳专挑演武仪典的选手做目标…{NICKNAME}，咱们不如在有空的时候去绥园碰碰运气，也许能帮到藿藿也说不定呢？
If that heliobus targets Wardance contenders on purpose... {NICKNAME}, how about we try our luck at Fyxestroll Garden when we've got time? We might be able to help Huohuo.
哇，不得了不得了，你有道灵光从天灵盖喷出来。你年纪轻轻就有一身横练的筋骨，简直是百年一见的练武奇才啊！

Woah! This is amazing, you've got a spiritual light gushing out of your crown. To have the physique of a martial prodigy at such a young age, you're a martial genius who only appears once in a century!
嗯，本姑娘小心提防着呢！
Okay, I'm on high alert right now!
你别再夸三月七了，她真会信。
You should stop lavishing your praises on March 7th, she might actually believe you.
什么意思嘛，我本来就是练武的奇才。
What'd you mean, huh? I'm a born martial genius.
只要让我沾着你的身子，便立时能打通你的任督二脉，让你凭空增长百年功力。在演武仪典上获胜也不过是小菜一碟！
As long as you let me attach on to you, your core meridians will be instantly activated, allowing you to attain a century's worth of effort in no time. Victory at the Wardance will be a cakewalk!
嘿嘿，想利用本姑娘的胜负心是吧？那可不行！藏头露尾的家伙，快给我出来！
Heh-heh, trying to appeal to my competitive spirit? No can do! Stop cowering in the shadows and show yourself!
好啦，被你发现了。说真的，我精通天下各门各派的武艺，让我摸摸你的脑袋，一眨眼就可以全数传授给你喔。
Fine, you got me. Honestly though, I'm a master of all the martial arts across all schools. Just let me touch your head, and I'll be able to impart all my skills to you in the blink of an eye.
代价是什么呢？该不会是变成僵尸，只能口吐歪比巴比之类的胡话吧？算了，我不想学。
At what price? I don't suppose it's becoming a zombie and sputtering gibberish, is it? Forget it, I'm not learning any of that.
不想学？…那可由不得你了！我免费授课，你不学也得学！
You don't want to?... I'm afraid that's not up to you! I give my lessons free of charge, you have no choice but to learn them!
三月七只觉眼前一黑，数不尽的拳脚功夫在一瞬间涌入脑海。
All March 7th can see before her is darkness, countless martial arts of myriad unarmed styles all surging into her mind.
可惜，其中没有一招和剑术有关。
Unfortunately, though, not a single move is related to swordplay.
Fear not, Miss March! Here I come!
多亏了藿藿，刚才那个好为人师的岁阳已经被吸收走了吗？
Thank goodness you were here, Huohuo. Has that overly enthusiastic heliobus been subdued?
嗯嗯，我已经将流窜的岁阳收进藏月瓠里了。
Yes, I've subdued that vagrant heliobus in the Lunaumbra Gourd.
可恶，手脚突然动弹不得……
Ugh, I suddenly can't move my arms and legs...
我给你贴上符纸，你再好好休息一会……
I'll apply a talisman on you, and then you need to have a good rest...
看来，现在我已经彻底理解「僵尸」之谜了——这岁阳专门利用参赛选手的好胜心理，将什么武艺口诀一股脑地灌进了人的思维之中。
I think I've gotten to the bottom of this zombie mystery. This heliobus preyed on the competitive will of contenders to channel all its martial mantras into their minds.
如何抬手、如何抬脚，如何移动身体，无限制的信息不断涌入脑海之中…可惜人和岁阳不一样，海量的信息只会让人大脑过载而呆立原地、动弹不得。

How to raise your arms and legs, how to move your body, infinite information surging into your mind non-stop... A pity we're not like heliobi — such a massive magnitude of information will only overload our minds and render us immobile.
身体已经跟不上脑子了！
The body can't keep up with the mind!
虽然时间很短暂，我好像感觉什么都能看到，什么都能听到，却什么也做不到。
While it was just for a short time, I felt like I could see everything, hear everything, but I couldn't do a single thing.
原来这就是身体跟不上脑子了吗？
So this is what it means when the body can't keep up with the mind?
学习并不是一个单向过程。
The path of learning isn't a one-way street.
我已经切身体会到了，刚才那只能算是精神冲击，根本就不是学习。
I've personally learned that painful lesson. What happened was not learning at all, it was nothing more than sheer mind shock.
既然三月七小姐恢复得差不多了，我也该回去封印岁阳了，两位，我们下次再见！
Now that you've recovered, I should be getting back to seal this heliobus. We'll meet again!
Huohuo scuttles off in a hurry...
今天本来是想和藿藿一起打发点时间的，不过她有自己的事要办，还是等下次见面再说吧。
I was thinking about spending some time with Huohuo today, but she's got stuff to do. Let's chat again next time.
被岁阳一附身就好累啊，{NICKNAME}，咱们去吃点好吃的吧。
It's draining being possessed by a heliobus, {NICKNAME}. Let's go grab something tasty to eat.
为了帮助藿藿解决「僵尸谜案」，你与三月七来到夜半的绥园之中。
To help Huohuo resolve the "zombie case," you and March 7th arrived in Fyxestroll Garden in the middle of the night.
岁阳专挑演武仪典的选手袭击，不出意外，你们遇上了不速之客……
The heliobus is focused specifically on attacking Wardance contestants. As expected, you encountered an undesired guest...
十王司已经封印了那个好为人师的岁阳，它已经再也没有办法四处害人了。而之前受到它影响的演武仪典参赛选手也逐渐恢复了意识。

The Ten-Lords Commission has sealed away that heliobus who's always eager to act as a tutor. It won't be harming anyone anymore. The Wardance participants who fell to its antics are also slowly recovering their senses.
这次小小的岁阳之乱也算是平息了。这都多亏了三月七小姐，还有{NICKNAME}。
It's all thanks to you and {NICKNAME} that this mini Heliobi Wars has been quelled.
也要多亏了藿藿，不愧是十王司的判官。
Thanks to you too, Huohuo. No wonder you're a Ten-Lords Commission Judge.
上次三月七小姐说有话要说……
You had something you wished to say last time...
其实之前我听说尾巴大爷说，能够将「学剑」的记忆直接灌输给我的时候，我必须承认，我当时有那么一点点心动，当然也只是一点点而已——
It's about when Mr. Tail said that the memories of swordplay practice could be channeled into me — I have to admit that I was the teeniest bit tempted. Just a tiny bit!
老子提出的建议不错吧。
当时我想要让尾巴大爷帮忙，让我学个一招半式的，不过嘛，有些难以启齿……
I wanted to have Mr. Tail help me out then, to at least learn a move or two. But I was too embarrassed to admit it...
没人能抵挡「走捷径」的诱惑。
No one can withstand the temptation of a shortcut.
你这么说不太对，毕竟我最后应该算是抵挡住了诱惑。
That's not really true. I mean, I still resisted it in the end.
你还是拒绝了「工业化学剑」。
你要是能少创造一些这类耳目一新的词语就好了。
It'd be great if you could stop coming up with such fresh new terms.
幸好藿藿比较忙，没让你得逞。
Luckily Huohuo was too busy to let you have your way.
你其实可以将这句话换成「三月七的定力远超常人」的。
You can rephrase that to "March 7th's willpower far surpasses ordinary people."
要不是遇上了上次的岁阳，我不会意识到「拥有剑法的知识」和「掌握剑法」之间还是隔了太多太多，那不是学习剑法的捷径。
If I hadn't run into that heliobus, I wouldn't have understood the sheer distance between my knowledge and mastery of swordplay. That's not a shortcut to learning swordplay at all.
这一点我很赞同三月七小姐。
I very much agree with Miss March 7th on this.
不过，老子听说忆庭使者有着比咱们岁阳更加柔和、更加安全的手段，将原本不存在的「剑法记忆」塞入脑海中…如果是这样，你还会拒绝吗？
Though I've heard of a much milder and safer method that the Garden's messengers have, that can shove non-existent swordplay memories into your mind... In that case, would you still refuse?
I might still have to decline.
我想，只有用自己的脑子去思考、用自己的身体去体会，才能把「彦卿师父的剑」、「云璃师父的剑」最后变成「三月七的剑」。
I think that I have to put my own thought into it, and experience it myself to eventually turn "Master Yanqing's Sword" and "Master Yunli's Sword" into "March 7th's Sword."
老子承认你说的有点道理。
You make a good point there, girlie.
如果这个过程变成了复制粘贴，我永远都超越不了两位小师父。
If my journey was nothing more than a copy-and-paste process, I'd never be able to surpass the two masters.
感觉你这一趟确实领悟了不少。
Sounds like you've had quite the epiphany.
通常来说，我讲出「富含哲理的话」，就应该代表着我的剑术造诣又提升了吧？
For me to be waxing philosophical pearls of wisdom, that should mean I've attained new heights with my swordplay, am I right?
会说几句鸡汤就算提升了？既然你想得这么通透，那你就好好练你的剑吧！
Spouting passages from a self-help book makes you all enlightened now? If you really think you're all that, you should be training even harder on your swordplay!
学习的捷径是有的，不在这里。
There is a shortcut to learning, but it's not here.
没错没错，能够提升学习效率的方法多的是，本姑娘可聪明了。
That's right! There are many ways to increase learning efficiency. I'm super smart!
这件事忙完之后，我有了一段空闲的时间，如果三月七小姐为了对付斯科特而需要帮助的话，请随时来找藿藿，我和尾巴大爷一定会帮你的。
I've got a block of free time after attending to this matter. Miss March 7th, if you need help taking on Skott, come see me anytime. Mr. Tail and I will definitely help you out.
嗯嗯，谢谢藿藿，谢谢尾巴大爷。
Sure, thanks Huohuo and Mr. Tail!
呜…我输了…连这样的训练都没办法应对，我肯定打不过斯科特……
I've lost... If I can't even handle this kind of training, there's no way I'll beat Skott...
看来十五天确实太短了，很难练出些名堂。
Looks like fifteen days are too short to master swordplay.
…唉，看来只能低下头来，请斯科特放弃比武了。
...Well, looks like we'll have to swallow our pride and ask Skott to abandon the duel.
如果再给我一次机会，我一定努力练剑，不会再输了！
If I get another chance, I'll practice even harder and won't ever lose again!
胜败乃兵家常事，请女侠重新来过。
Winning and losing are all part of the game, I encourage you to try again young hero.
Skott, you won't get away with this.
A deal is a deal! You think I'm scared of your threats?
都怪我学剑太不用功了！
It's all my fault! I didn't train enough!
彦卿师父、云璃师父，对不起…我输了……
I'm sorry, Master Yanqing, Master Yunli... I lost...
你不过是个只练过十五天剑术的外行罢了。能和他们战斗到这种地步，已经很了不起了。
Well, you've only been practicing swordplay for fifteen days. To even reach this point is already impressive.
哈哈哈，看这小妮子自信满满的样子，我还以为能有多强呢！结果还不是被我们轻松拿捏～
Hahaha, and to think she was so full of herself. I thought she'd be a tough opponent, but we handled her with ease.
欺负个小姑娘，值得你这么得意吗？
Do you feel proud of yourself, bullying a young girl like this?
彦卿、{NICKNAME}，我们仨打到他们忘掉约定为止吧。
Hey, Yanqing and {NICKNAME}, what do you say we give them a harsh beating until they forget about that stupid bet?
终于到我擅长的环节了。
这…违反《仙舟治安管理条例》了吧？
It's probably... against the Xianzhou Public Order Regulations.
连弟子都不愿保护，你算什么师父？
You won't even stand up for your own apprentice? What kind of master are you?
喂！你们仨要干什么，玩不起就别玩啊！
Hey! What's the deal with you three? If you can't play fair, then don't play!
彦卿师父、云璃师父！别这样！既然我输了比武，那就要承担起相应的责任。我好歹也是个无名客，可不能留下愿赌不服输的名声。
Please stop, Master Yanqing and Master Yunli! I lost the duel, and now I have to accept the result. As a Nameless, I don't want to be known as a sore loser.
哈哈哈哈，真是痛快啊！真是痛快啊！哈哈哈哈哈哈！
Hahaha! This is so satisfying! So satisfying! Hahahahaha!
金人巷，我斯科特的尊严，又回来了！
Aurum Alley! I, Skott, have returned!
之后，斯科特信守承诺，教三月七学习驾驶机甲。
And true to his word, Skott teaches March 7th how to pilot a mech.
就这样，三月七成为了银河首屈一指的机甲战斗专家。
And just like that, March 7th became one of the best mech pilots in the entire Cosmos.
如果再给我一次机会，我一定努力练剑，不会再输了！
If I get another chance, I'll practice even harder and won't ever lose again!
胜败乃兵家常事，请女侠重新来过。
Winning and losing are all part of the game, I encourage you to try again young hero.
瞧瞧，这不是我们女侠三月七吗？
Well, well, if it isn't our hero March 7th!
哼，本姑娘没有躲没有藏，你下了战帖，我就前来应战。
Hmph, I'm not hiding or backing down. You challenged me, and I'm here to accept it.
你们这些人是不是有毛病啊？比武就比武，还给我写恐吓信，吓唬谁呢？
We're here to fight. What's wrong with you people? Sending me a threatening letter? Who are you trying to scare?
A threatening letter? What are you even talking about?
少装傻，这不是你们偷偷塞我口袋里的吗？
Oh, stop playing dumb! Didn't you slip this into my pocket?
「恃强凌弱、傲慢无礼的大罪人，斯科特先生。」
"Mr. Skott, a great sinner of arrogance and insolence."
「你将扭曲的权力欲望施加在无辜的店主身上，并对拥有历史与传承的仙舟剑术出言不逊。」
"You have inflicted your twisted lust for power upon that innocent shop owner and insulted the extraordinary art of Xianzhou swordplay."
「我们决定，让你亲口坦白你的一切罪行，你那扭曲的欲望，将由我们取走。」
"We have decided to make you confess all your crimes in person. The time for change is now, your twisted desires will be stripped away by us."
这字也太难看了…你刚才要没给我读一遍，我都没认出来写的是什么。
The writing is terrible... I wouldn't have understood it if you hadn't just read it to me.
What the heck did you just say!?
没…谁都没说话！你听错了！
No... no one said anything! You must have imagined it!
好了，废话少说，三月七，准备好学狗……
Well, enough for chit-chat. March 7th, I'm going to make you bark...
我甚至没看到她拔剑，时间好像静止一般，而我只看到一道绿色火光闪过。
I didn't even see her draw her sword. Time seemed to freeze, and all I saw was a flash of green fire.
刹那间我回想起，儿时我曾在海边凝望彼方，看到浓雾背后有一盏绿灯若隐若现。后来我才知道，那是那个女孩——拉克什米家的房子。
In an instant, I remembered staring out at the sea as a child, glimpsing a faint green light through the thick fog, which turned out to be the home of that girl — Rakshmi.
什么人会在家里点绿灯啊？他们家真的蛮不正常的。
Seriously, who lights a green lantern in their house? Those guys must be nuts.
啊…为什么会突然想起这些事？这是走马灯吗？我是不是…已经死了……
Ah... why am I suddenly remembering these things? Is my life flashing before my eyes? Am I... dead...?
看起来这就是斯科特的内心世界了，老子得找找他最扭曲的欲望是哪里。
Looks like this is Skott's mind. I'd better find where his most twisted desires are lurking.
斯科特！你赶紧给我滚过来！！！
Skott! Get your butt over here!!!
啊，这好像是他爹。他们人类好像经常「要用一生治愈童年」，斯科特可能也不例外？
Oh, this guy looks just like his old man. Humans spend decades trying to heal their childhood traumas, and Skott might be no different.
爸，大周末的喊什么喊？我正睡懒觉呢！
What's with all the yelling on a weekend, Dad? I was sleeping!
懒鬼，还睡懒觉…跟你说了多少次，信用点会睡懒觉吗？自由市场会睡懒觉吗？看不见的手会睡懒觉吗？算了，这个一会儿再说。
Sleeping... Heh, how many times do I have to tell you? Do credits sleep? Does the free market sleep? Does the invisible hand sleep? Forget it, we'll discuss this later.
刚才佩法那的父母来家里了。听说佩法那打飞棍球时被撞断了腿，还是你背他去的医院…一定要来拜访一下「儿子挚友的父亲」。

Pephana's parents came by earlier. They heard about Pephana breaking his leg while playing skydart, and they found out that you carried him to the hospital... so they decided to visit the "father of their son's best friend."
原来斯科特小时候是如此心地善良。
So, Skott was kind-hearted as a kid.
你这混账！你和佩法那不是争夺飞棍球队队长之位的竞争关系吗？你和自己的竞争对手玩什么朋友游戏？还背他去医院…你还挺会关心人的啊？

You idiot! Aren't you and Pephana competing for the captain position on the skydart team? Why are you befriending your own rival? And you even carried him to the hospital...? Heh, you're such a caring guy, aren't you?
跟你说了多少次，林登•斯科特，我们斯科特家的家徽是「孤狼」，家训是「没有敌人、没有朋友、只有猎物」。你会背你的猎物去医院吗？
Lyndon Skott! How many times have I told you that our Skott family crest is the "Lone Wolf," and our family motto is "No enemies. No friends. Only prey." Would you carry your prey to the hospital?
哎…生在这样的家庭里，该说不说，这小斯科特还真可怜。
Well... little Skott was pretty unfortunate to be born into such a family.
可是…爸爸，他的腿就是我故意撞断的，我若是不送他去医院，别人该怀疑我了……
But... Dad, I broke his leg on purpose. If I hadn't taken him to the hospital, others would have suspected me...
啊，原来是这样…对不起，斯科特，是爸爸不分青红皂白就骂了你。爸爸向你道歉。
Ah, so that's how it is... I'm so sorry, Skott. I shouldn't have scolded you. I apologize.
没关系的，因为我最喜欢爸爸了～
It's okay Dad, because you're the best.
呃…真是犬父无虎子。看来这里没有「最扭曲的欲望」。
Umm... I guess the apple doesn't fall far from the tree. It seems his most twisted desires aren't here.
老斯科特，你涉嫌收受巨额贿赂，跟我们走一趟吧。
Skott Sr., you're suspected of accepting a huge bribe. Now, come with us.
啊，这老东西被抓了。哈哈。
Ah! The old guy got caught. Haha.
常在河边走，哪有不湿鞋，哈哈哈。我只有一个问题，长官，谁出卖了我？
Hahaha, I knew this day would eventually come. I only have one question, Captain: Who sold me out?
这是内部检举，恕我们保密。
An internal tip-off. We're not allowed to disclose any details.
内部检举…这件事涉及的大部分人，要么没动机，要么没证据…会是谁呢？
An internal tip-off... Most of those involved have neither the motive nor the evidence... Who could it be?
爸爸，是我做的。我出卖了你。
It was me, Dad. I turned you in.
你…斯科特，你竟然出卖了我！
You... Skott! You're the one who turned me in!
真是父慈子孝啊！老子要看哭了。
Oh my, how moving. I think I might just cry...
踩着我爬到更高的地方吧！斯科特，你是斯科特家的骄傲，是一匹合格的「孤狼」，爸爸以你为傲。
Use me as a stepping stone to reach greater heights! Lyndon Skott, you are the pride of the Skott family, a true lone wolf, and your dad is so proud of you.
I'll do as you've taught me, Father.
感觉这人的童年已经没救了…他「最扭曲的欲望」根本不在这里。
Jeez, this guy is simply hopeless... His most twisted desires aren't here at all.
斯科特，我最好的朋友，我要被调职到塔塔里昂了，下班后一起喝杯酒吧。
Hey, Skott, my best buddy, I'm getting transferred to the Tartarion. Let's grab a drink after work.
这人竟然还有朋友…搞不好这里能找到些让他洗心革面的关键要素。
This guy actually has friends... Maybe I can find something here that will make him change his ways.
塔塔里昂？那是边境要塞舰啊，你这段时间的工作也没出什么差错啊？
The Tartarion? That's the frontier fortification vessel, isn't it? You haven't slipped up at work lately, have you?
哈哈，就是你从中作梗，让我被调职的吧？咱们组可没别人有这样的手段了。
Haha, so it was you who meddled and got me transferred, right? No one else on our team has the skill to pull something like this off.
笑死，我怎么一点都不意外呢。
Haha, come on! Why am I not surprised at all?
…没办法。你那个职位实在太令人垂涎了，我只能这样做。
...It couldn't be helped. Your position was so desirable. I had to make a move.
不只是为了职位吧？还有…拉克什米。以后没人会再和你争抢了。
It's not just about the position, is it? There's also Rakshmi... no one will ever compete with you for her again.
拉克什米…？「浓雾背后有一盏绿灯若隐若现」…难道她是斯科特心心念念的爱人？
Rakshmi...? "Glimpsing a faint green light through the thick fog..." Could it be that Rakshmi is the love of Skott's life?
请向我保证，你会好好对待她。
Please promise me that you'll treat her well.
当然了，阿沙瓦特，你就放心地去塔塔里昂赴任吧。我会替你照顾好拉克什米的。
Of course, Ashavat. Go to the Tartarion without worries. I'll take care of her while you're away.
看来「最扭曲的欲望」也不在这里。
Seems like his most twisted desires are not here, either.
斯科特，我们认识多久了？
How long have we known each other, Skott?
Around seven or eight years? Why?
我们一起工作了这么多年，竟然才发现老家离得那么近，哈哈，你说离谱不离谱。
We've been working together for so long, and I just realized our hometowns are so close to each other. Haha, talk about a coincidence.
我们平时在公司也没机会聊这些嘛。
Yeah, we never get a chance to talk about this stuff at the office.
没想到斯科特还是个纯情的人渣。
Oh, I didn't realize Skott was actually a scumbag with a pure heart.
这些年，有句话我一直憋在心里，不敢对你说。
All these years, there's something I've been keeping to myself, too afraid to tell you.
Wh—Why are you being so blunt?
喔～很不错嘛斯科特，很直球！老子很欣赏你。
Oh! Well done, Skott! I like your straightforward style!
嗯…斯科特，我想和你成为恋人。
Yeah... I want to be your girlfriend, Skott.
斯科特，终于让老子找到了，这就是你的软肋！
Hahaha! Gotcha, Skott! I've found your weakness!
哈哈哈哈哈！终于让我抓住了你的软肋！
Hahaha! Gotcha! Caught you off guard!
你刚才说的话，我已经全部录音了！咱们部门可是明令禁止办公室恋情的，只要我将这段录音发出去，你就再也没机会和我竞争专员的职位了，哈哈哈哈哈！

I recorded everything! You know office romances are strictly forbidden in our department. Once I make this recording public, you'll never be able to compete with me for the Specialist position! Hahaha!
这…哈哈哈，斯科特，我喜欢的正是这样的你。
Well... Hahaha, alright, that's exactly what I love about you, Skott.
我明白了，我会给你让路。但等到有一天，我像这样战胜你的时候，请你接受我的心意。
I'll step aside for you. But when the day comes that I surpass you in the same manner, I hope you'll acknowledge my intentions.
这就不了吧，因为我啊，是一匹「孤狼」啊。
Thanks, but no thanks. I'm a lone wolf, remember?
你小子真是油盐不进啊。
那是一只狼？不对，那是斯科特自己。
Is that a wolf? Wait, no, that must be Skott himself.
它身后的王冠，一定就是「最扭曲的欲望」了！
The crown behind him must be his most twisted desire!
终于深入到灵魂深处了，你这人真是无药可救，老子会带走你那扭曲的欲望。
Finally, I've found the depths of your hopeless soul. I'll strip away your twisted desires.
你是谁？这是我的私人领地，你是怎么进来的？
Who are you? This is my place. How did you get in here?
本大爷想来就来，想走就走，还需要你同意？
I can come and go as I please. Do I need your permission?
让本大爷好好说你两句啊…你说说你，为了上位，你是一点拟人的事都不干啊！
Well, let me tell you something... In your quest to reach the top, you've trampled over everything that's decent!
这一切都是为了成功。我是斯科特家的骄傲，是一匹合格的「孤狼」，为了走上人生巅峰，我什么都做得出来。
It's all about success. I'm the pride of the Skott family, a certified "lone wolf." I'll do whatever it takes to reach the pinnacle of life.
可你真的快乐吗？你牺牲了亲情、友情、爱情，只为了那些虚无缥缈的信用点…你好好扪心自问一下，你真的快乐吗？
But are you truly happy? You've sacrificed your family, your friends, and your love, all for those meaningless credits... Ask yourself: Are you truly happy?
我快乐吗…我…我真的快乐吗…我……
Am I happy...? Am I... truly happy... I...
我真的太快乐了！我的快乐你根本想象不到！
Oh! I'm so happy! I'm ecstatic! You couldn't even begin to imagine how happy I am!
「牺牲感情」？天真！「感情」有什么用？「感情」能变成我餐盘里的火腿吗？能变成我酒杯里的红酒吗？能变成我开的星舰、住的豪宅吗？
Sacrificing my emotions? Hah, what a joke! What good do my emotions do me? Can they turn into a delicious meal or a glass of wine? Can they pilot a starship or buy me a mansion?
「感情」能换几个信用点？啊？你倒是回答我看看啊？但是信用点可以换感情啊，只要信用点足够多，我想让谁做我的朋友，谁就能做我的朋友！
So, answer me this! Do you think anyone would pay credits for my "emotions"? No way! But I can trade my credits for emotions! With enough credits, I can make anyone my friend!
啊…这人确实没救了。也许要换个思路对付他。
Ah... this man is truly hopeless. Maybe I need to try a different approach this time.
但我才不会把钱花到「感情」这种毫无意义的事情上！因为我是一匹「孤狼」，一匹斯科特家的「孤狼」！没有敌人、没有朋友、只有猎物！
But I'm not about to spend my hard-earned credits on something as pointless as emotions! I'm a lone wolf! A lone wolf from the Skott family! With no enemies or friends, only prey!
来吧，「孤狼」斯科特，瞧瞧本大爷的厉害吧！
Bring it on, Skott the lone wolf! I'll show you what I'm made of!
三月七凭剑术获胜之后，斯科特愿赌服输，道歉认错并离开了金人巷。
After March 7th achieves victory via her swordsmanship, Skott admits defeat, apologizes, and leaves Aurum Alley.
一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.
藿藿将尾巴的封印解除，让他深入斯科特内心，被夺取了扭曲欲望的斯科特改头换面。
Unsealing Tail, Huohuo makes him enter Skott's inner world. After Skott is relieved of his twisted desire, he turns over a new leaf.
一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.
哎…马上就要和斯科特决战了，我怎么觉得自己的武艺还没什么决定性的进步呢！这样真的能打败斯科特吗？担忧！
...I'm about to duel with Skott, but I always feel like my fighting skills haven't improved enough! Can I really defeat Skott? I'm starting to worry!
难道没有那种，可以在短时间内打通经脉、提升修为、强身健体的仙丹吗？就是那种，只要吃一颗，立刻能成为绝世邪剑仙的丹药！

I mean, don't you have some miracle pills that can instantly unlock my meridians, boost my cultivation, and make me a super strong hero? You know, the kind where you just pop one and instantly become an invincible swordmaster!
Are you a disciple of Sanctus Medicus or something?
唉唉唉！当着这几位医士的面可不敢这么乱说，我怕被扭送地衡司！
Hey! Don't say something like that in front of these healers! I don't want to end up in some Realm-Keeping Commission court!
虽然这个想法很危险，但三月小姐终于学会不择手段赢得胜利了，我心甚慰。
Well, even though it's a risky idea, I'm glad you're finally willing to do whatever it takes to win, Miss March.
这夸奖我听了一点也不开心！
Hey, that's actually a compliment I don't want to hear!
怎么可能会有那种丹药啦！
Come on, do you really think there's a magical pill like that?
怎么不可能？西衍先生的《开拓豪侠传》里不是就有吗？吃下那个「九转升天丹」能暴打幻胧，暴打个斯科特不过分吧？

I mean why not? Haven't you heard the stories in Mr. Xiyan's Legend of the Trailblazer? The hero took the Elixir of Dragon Oil and gave Phantylia a good beating! Why can't I just do the same to Skott?
《开拓豪侠传》写得靠不靠谱，难道你自己不知道吗？
Do you even realize how much those legends get exaggerated?
仙舟上可没有那么方便的药物啦。不过如果只是为了在赛前让自己的体力短暂提升，那也不是做不到。
We don't have any convenient pills like that, but if you just need a temporary boost for the duel, we might be able to figure something out.
三月小姐，我给你熬了一碗「松茸龙眼山白竹雀汤」，又滋养又大补，吃完以后保准你浑身都是劲儿。
I've made a bowl of Matsutake Longan White Bamboo Sparrow Soup for you, Miss March. It's nourishing and will give you a good energy boost.
I want some too! I want some too!
去去去，你别凑热闹！这药膳是大补之物，若稍后没有大运动量消耗，反而对身体有害。
Hey now! This tonic is very potent, if you don't engage in any intense physical activity, it might do more harm than good.
赛前灌个水饱真的好吗？
Is it really a good idea to drink a lot of liquid before a fight?
放心吧，身体会提醒你速战速决的～
Ah don't worry, your body will remind you to finish the fight quickly.
那我能不能先喝一半，剩下一半？万一被斯科特打败了，拿来补身体……
Can I drink half now and save the other half for later? Just in case Skott beats me, I can use it to recover...
三月小姐这么缺乏自信吗？唔…我本来还等着给公司的人治伤看诊，收三倍诊金呢。
Are you really that lacking in confidence, March? Hmm... I was actually looking forward to tripling the fee when the IPC guys came in for treatment.
小神医你是不知道，那公司的机甲，打起人来可疼了！
You don't know the half of it! Those IPC mechs pack a huge punch!
只是怕疼，妾身倒是有办法……
If it's just pain you're afraid of, I might have a solution...
此药名唤「押不芦」，只消吃上三钱，就能屏蔽人体感官，让人不觉疼痛。
Here, this medicine is named "Yabruh." A tiny dose can numb the body's senses and alleviate any sensation of pain.
云骑军某些丹药中也有微量此成分。战阵之上，人人都难免因疼痛而怯懦，所以只要屏蔽疼痛，那自然胜券在握。

Actually, some of the Cloud Knights use pellets which contain trace amounts of this ingredient. When you block pain on the battlefield, you have a better chance of beating your opponent and surviving.
哇～还有这种神药！但…不会有什么副作用吧？
Whoa! Sounds incredible! But... are there any side effects?
那不会。丹鼎司做手术都用它，能有什么副作用？只不过……
No, not at all. We use it for surgeries in the Alchemy Commission, so what kind of side effects could it possibly have? It's just...
只不过，痛觉是人体的警告信号，无视痛觉，一意孤行战斗下去…那很有可能，受了致命伤却不自知啊。
Well, the thing is, pain is your body's way of warning you something is wrong. If you ignore it and push through... you might end up with some serious injuries without even realizing it.
妾身曾接诊过一名患者，此人与人决斗前服用该药，打完了架才发现…他已经只剩下上半身了……
I had a patient who took some before a fight, only to realize that afterwards... his lower body was missing...
噫！快别说了，我不吃了，疼就疼吧！
Whew! Okay, enough! I'm not taking any medicine. I'll just tough it out!
我们都在出主意想办法，怎么只有椒丘大夫一直都不说话？
We're all brainstorming ideas, why are you so quiet, Doctor Jiaoqiu?
椒丘大夫，椒丘！三月小姐马上就要去和斯科特决战了，你在干什么呢！
Doctor Jiaoqiu? Jiaoqiu! March is about to face off with Skott! What are you doing?
啊，不好意思。刚听闻三月小姐准备靠「丹药」解决斯科特，就稍微做了些安排。
Oh, sorry! I heard March was planning to use some medicine against Skott, so I made some preparations.
唉，诸位的医道理论仍然不尽完善啊。战斗能力提升是个相对概念，其实只要敌弱我强就行，请诸位将思路打开。
Well, it seems you're struggling to think outside the box. Sometimes, weakening your opponent is just as effective as improving your own combat skills. It's all about innovation.
莫非曜青的医术里有什么秘方能助我一臂之力？
Wait, could it be that the Yaoqing people have some secret formula that could help me?
没错，这是曜青「染指派」医食同源之术的秘中之秘！若不是为三月小姐出战，我是绝不外传的。
Exactly! This is the closely guarded secret of the Yaoqing's Ranzhi School. If it weren't for Miss March's upcoming battle, I would never divulge it.
你…难道你准备给斯科特下泻药？？？
Wait... do you plan on slipping Skott a laxative?
…你是怎么知道的？哼，鄙人的城府还是不够深啊。
...How did you figure that out? Hmph, looks like I'm too predictable.
Praise be to the Xianzhou medicine.
别把这家伙和我们相提并论。
Seriously, don't even compare this guy to us.
你们称之为「卑鄙」，而我称之为「高效」。
那个…椒丘大夫，这是不是不太好？我们是不是应该堂堂正正一点…要不还是别这么做了吧？
Well... Doctor Jiaoqiu? Are we really doing this? Shouldn't we defeat him in a more honorable way...? Maybe we should just completely forget about this idea.
啊？你不同意啊？可是现在已经晚了，貊泽已经把事情办妥了。
Huh? You don't agree with my methods? Hmm, but it's already too late. Moze has already taken care of things.
难道你刚才低头玩手机就是在安排貊泽…你们曜青人行动力都这么强的吗！
Wait, so while you seemed to be playing with your phone, you were actually arranging things with Moze? Are all Yaoqing people as quick as you?
诶呀，已经到决战的时间了，快去和斯科特先生决一死战吧！我还有事，先走一步。
Alright, it's time for the duel! Just go fight that Skott guy! I've got something else to do, so I'll be off.
他跑了！啊这这这，这怎么办……
He ran away! Ah... Wh—What should I do now...
木已成舟，三月小姐，只能上了。
What's done is done, March. We just have to keep moving forward.
别担心，我们会抢救斯科特的。希望人没事。
Rest assured, we will come to Skott's aid if needed. Let's hope he's alright.
三月七，你终于来了！你都不知道吧，你在这金人巷已经非常不得人心了！
Ah, March 7th, you've finally decided to show up! Bet you don't know how incredibly unpopular you are here in Aurum Alley!
不得人心？你说什么呢，这金人巷里谁不喜欢我活泼可爱的小三月？
Unpopular? What are you talking about? Who in Aurum Alley wouldn't like a cheerful and adorable young lady like me?
哈哈，我都听人说了，他们只是慑于彦卿和云璃的淫威，敢怒不敢言罢了！
Oh, I've caught wind of the gossip. They're just scared of Yanqing and Yunli's power, so they don't have the guts to speak up!
我告诉你，刚才有一位勇士偷偷找到我，鼓励我勇敢战胜你，为金人巷的乡亲们狠狠出一口恶气。
Guess what? A brave soul approached me in secret earlier, encouraging me to defeat you and seek revenge for all the people in Aurum Alley!
不仅如此，他还送了我和兄弟们一大锅药膳汤，让我们喝完药膳，再精神百倍地对付你。
And you know what else? He gave me and the guys a big pot of this special medicinal soup to drink so we can come at you with triple the energy.
哈哈，那还真是…古道热肠的勇士啊……
Haha, well... they do sound like... a brave soul...
So, did you guys take it all?
当然喝完了。那药膳汤真是美味极了！没想到在人心冷漠的罗浮，还能喝到这样滚热肠胃的汤，真是出人意料啊。
Of course we did! That soup was surprisingly delicious. Who'd have thought, in a cold and indifferent place like the Luofu, we'd find something so heartwarming?
There was a laxative in that soup.
你当我不知道吗？你说这话就是想分化瓦解我们和金人巷有识之士之间因共同利益和阶级感情所结成的攻守同盟并以此达成击败我的目的。

You think I'm an idiot? Your statement aims to dismantle and fragment the coalition established on the basis of shared interests and class affinities between ourselves and the erudite individuals dwelling in Aurum Alley, with the ultimate goal of defeating me.
你这长难句我愣是没听懂。
Um... I didn't understand a word of what you just said.
行了，废话说够多了。兄弟们，上吧！让百姓们悉心烹饪的药膳汤带给我们更多力量！绝不能输！
Alright, enough talking! Let's go, boys! That delicious medicinal soup will give us the strength to win!
你们几个别太逞强啊！撑不住了就赶紧撤！
Don't push yourself too hard! Just leave if you can't handle it!
我输了。我输了。三月七，你太卑鄙了。
I lost. I am defeated... You fight too dirty, March 7th. You are truly despicable.
You'd better go to the bathroom...
No... I don't need to go to the bathroom anymore.
Let's just forget about that part. He's already in such a sorry state.
I guess we did fight a bit too dirty.
…但内心深处有点痛快。这是不是堕入黑暗面的开始？
...But deep down, it feels kinda good. Is this what slipping into the dark side feels like?
三月七…我还有最后一句话。
I have one last thing to say... March 7th.
你要是想骂我的话就骂吧！这一招我也觉得有点过分……
Fine, give me a piece of your mind if you want! I admit it. I was kinda out of line...
三月七，你是我认识的第一个，和我一样卑鄙无耻、残酷无情、不择手段的人。这一次，是你更卑鄙无耻、更残酷无情，更不择手段！我输得心服口服！

March 7th, you're the first person I've ever known who's just as despicable, cruel, and as heartless as me. But this time, you outdid yourself, being even more vile, more ruthless, and more unscrupulous than ever! I accept my defeat!
也许有一天，我们会成为真正的朋友。如果你想来公司工作，我也一定会为你写推荐信。
Maybe we'll actually become real friends someday. If you want to come and work for the IPC, I'll gladly write you a recommendation letter.
听你夸奖完，我真的好生气。{NICKNAME}，我可以趁他站不起来，再打他一顿吗？
Your compliments make me so mad. Can I give him another beating while he's down, {NICKNAME}?
动手吧，毕竟，我已经没有还手之力了。
Go for it. I don't have the strength to fight back anyway.
一滴冰冷的泪珠，终于裹挟着强忍不住的悲伤，从男人的眼角，滑落。
A single drop of icy tear, finally succumbing to uncontainable sorrow, escapes from the corner of the man's eye.
算了，我不会乘人之危的。
Forget it, I don't kick people when they're down, even if they annoy me.
放过我吧。毕竟，我已经没有还手之力了。
Spare me, please. I don't have the strength to fight back.
一滴冰冷的泪珠，终于裹挟着强忍不住的悲伤，从男人的眼角，滑落。
A single drop of icy tear, finally succumbing to uncontainable sorrow, escapes from the corner of the man's eye.
不行，不能放过。因为我很卑鄙。
No way, I won't let him off the hook, because I'm despicable, remember?
弟兄们！弟兄们！还有能动的弟兄吗！快来救我！
Guys! Fellas! Anyone else who can still move! Help me!
几个尚能活动的公司员工冲进人群，七手八脚地抬走了斯科特专员。
Several IPC workers who can still move rush into the crowd and carry off Skott.
三月小姐…下次还是用些堂堂正正的办法吧。
Miss March... maybe we should try something more honorable next time.
不是我的主意！是那个粉毛狐狸自作主张的！我这最多只能算是…算是…无限制剑斗流？
It wasn't my idea! It was all that pink-haired fox acting on his own! All I did was... well... kind of... engage in free-form sword fighting?
一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.
嗯？三月小姐这是在写信吗？
Hmm? Are you writing a letter, Miss March?
是呀～出来这么久了，也该给星穹列车报个平安才对。
Yeah, it's been a while, and I thought I should let the Express know that I'm safe and sound here.
那你可要好好写写咱们这次辉煌的胜利！
You should also tell them about our glorious victory!
呃啊…这个，还是不要告诉他们了吧，哈哈哈。
Well... maybe it's better not to mention it... Haha.
姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?
椒丘派遣貊泽给斯科特一行人猛下泻药，你们不费吹灰之力取得了剑斗的胜利。
Jiaoqiu dispatches Moze to administer a strong laxative to Skott and his group, allowing you to effortlessly secure victory in the sword duel.
一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.
呃啊…肚子好疼…怎么回事…
Uhhh... my stomach hurts... What's happening...?
我…我肚子也疼，难道那碗药膳真的有问题？
M—Mine hurts too! Could it be that... something was wrong with that soup?
总之，坚持一下！先打倒这个小妮子再说！
Just hold on, boys! Let's defeat this little brat first!
不行了，我感觉自己昨天的晚餐要离我而去！
Not good. I think last night's dinner is about to make a grand exit!
I... gotta go to the bathroom! See you!
Stop there! Don't you dare run away!
对不起！我也撑不住了，真的要、要、要…
Sorry, but I can't hold it any longer! I really... really...
好了不要再说下去了！快滚！滚啊！
Spare me the details! Just get out of here!
星穹列车正在向外…奔跑…
The Astral Express is... racing away...
可恶啊！可恶的星穹列车！不许发车！
Cursed Astral Express! You're not allowed to leave!
马上就要和斯科特对决了，真是紧张。
I'm going up against Skott soon. I'm so nervous.
紧张什么？对付几个公司的杂鱼，很简单的。
Nervous about what? Dealing with a few IPC minions is just a walk in the park.
可是，到了比武的时候，斯科特肯定会用上他们公司的机甲。那东西怎么想也不是能用两把剑解决掉的吧！
But Skott will definitely use the IPC's mechs. There's no way I can take them down with just a couple of swords, right?
It wouldn't be a problem for Yanqing or Yunli.
师父们肯定可以啊！但和他们比，是不是太为难我人见人欺的小三月了？
Masters could handle them for sure! But isn't it asking too much of a poor little rookie like me?
The mechs' armor is too thick.
对吧？就算彦卿师父说这剑器里暗藏有助于切割的机关…但它真的能切开敌人的机甲吗？
Right? Even if Master Yanqing says there's a mechanism in this sword that helps with cutting... can it really slice through a mech?
为什么要执着于物理破坏呢？对黑客来说，最理想的战斗是从内部攻破对手。
Why focus on piercing the armor? For hackers, the ideal way to win is to infiltrate the opponent's system.
没人知道银狼到底对三月七的剑做了什么。
No one has any idea what Silver Wolf did to March 7th's sword.
Alright, you've been enhanced. Go for it.
等到比武的时候你们就明白了。
You'll understand once the duel begins.
Don't you need to enhance the other sword too?
编程讲究少即是多，做太多事反而容易出纰漏。
No, when it comes to programming, less is more. Overdoing it increases the chance of creating errors.
这样…就可以打败斯科特了？
So... I can defeat him just like that?
哼哼～很喜欢仙舟人的一句俗语：「知己知彼，对手狗殆。」
Yeah, there's a Xianzhou proverb for such an occasion: "Know yourself and know your enemy, and you'll never have to sleep in the doghouse."
后半句是你自己乱编的吧……
You made up the second half, didn't you...?
你懂什么，这叫狗尾续…这叫继往开来！好了，现在不是讨论仙舟俗语的时候，快去让斯科特尝尝你的厉害吧。
What do you know? Just let sleeping dogs lie! Anyway, now's not the time for discussing Xianzhou sayings. You've got bigger fish to fry. Go and show Skott what you're made of.
三月七，你来晚了。我还以为你不敢来了，正发愁该怎么找你算账呢～
March 7th, you're late. Here I was thinking you were too chicken to show your face. I was thinking I might have to track you down and settle the score~
我那是不敢来吗？我那是给你一个反悔的机会！没想到你不但没逃走，竟然还敢在这里叫嚣！
Too chicken? I was giving you the chance to back out! But you're actually insulting me now, you cheeky...
We ride a train everywhere, delays are to be expected every once in a while.
能把迟到说得这么理直气壮，要是在我手底下干活，我一定扒你一层皮。
Making excuses for being late like it's no big deal? If you worked under me, I'd personally make you regret it.
那么着急比武，活不到明天了？
What's the rush? You only got one day left to live or something?
呵，希望你们手上的功夫和嘴上的功夫一样强。
Heh, I hope your actions are as strong as that mouth of yours.
也不知道银狼到底在我的剑上动了什么手脚，真能赢过斯科特吗？
I wonder what Silver Wolf did to my sword. Can I really defeat Skott?
嘿，尊敬的三月七小姐，请放心，会赢赢的。
Don't worry, dear Miss March! Rest assured, we will win.
尊敬的三月七小姐，我是战术人工智能普罗米括弧{RUBY_B#未付费破解版}学习版{RUBY_E#}括弧，我将协助您战胜敌人。
Greetings, Miss March 7th. I am the Tactical AI, Prome, *parenthesis* {RUBY_B#Unpaid Cracked Version}Learning Edition{RUBY_E#} *close parenthesis*. My purpose is to aid you in overcoming adversaries.
不能，恰恰相反，在将我接入您的武器时，银狼粗糙的焊接技能使得剑体的抗冲击性能下降了百分之十二。
Quite the opposite, actually. When Silver Wolf installed me into your sword, her terrible welding skills reduced the sword's impact resistance by <unbreak>12</unbreak> percent.
但是，请别担心，我能帮助您获得胜利。
But please do not worry. I'll help you secure victory.
银狼一点也不厉害，在将我接入您的武器时，银狼粗糙的焊接技能使得剑体的抗冲击性能下降了百分之十二。
No, Silver Wolf is not amazing at all. When Silver Wolf installed me into your sword, her terrible welding skills actually reduced the sword's impact resistance by <unbreak>12</unbreak> percent.
但是，请别担心，我能帮助您获得胜利，因为我更厉害。
But please don't worry. I'll help you secure the victory because I actually am amazing.
呃…你准备怎么打败他们？
Uh... how exactly are you going to defeat him?
银狼给我的要求是：「知己知彼，对手狗殆。」
Silver Wolf has told me: "Know yourself and know your enemy, and you'll never have to sleep in the doghouse."
我会在剑尖接触机甲的瞬间，将一个小小的病毒加载到对方的操作系统中。去吧，向对手出剑吧。
The moment your sword touches the enemy mechs, I will upload a small virus onto their operating systems. So go ahead. Strike your opponents with your sword.
我是不是听到她的剑在说话？是幻觉吗？
Did I just hear her sword talking? Are my ears playing tricks on me?
好嘞，看剑！这样就行了吗？
Hey, take this! Did it work?
控制系统…重启…侦测到程序故障。
Operating system... rebooting... Program failure detected.
怎么回事？我的机甲…三月七，你对我的机甲做了什么？
What's happening? My mech... What did you do to my mech, March?
识别到更高权限指令，进入备战模式——
Higher authority command recognized. Entering combat mode...
尊敬的三月七小姐，现在，开战吧。
Now, it is time to fight, dear Miss March.
不好！兄弟们，机甲被他们控制了，快准备应战！！！
Oh, no! Boys, they've taken control of our mechs! Get ready for battle!!!
没等三月七摆好持剑架势，她手中的「战术人工智能」普罗米已经飞了出去，就像是巡航导弹一样找到公司机甲，插中了要害。

Before March 7th could even assume her sword stance, Prome, the tactical AI in her hand, has already flown out — homing in on the IPC mech like a cruise missile — and lodged itself into the vital point.
斯科特专员，我们的机甲被控制了，根本没办法打败他们！
Specialist Skott, they're controlling our mechs! There's no way we can defeat them!
呵…如果堂堂正正打一架，那或许可以算是武术交流活动。可惜啊可惜，三月七，你的所作所为已经越过了法治的最后一条界限！
Heh... if we fought fair and square, you might call this a sparring session, but March 7th, your actions today have blatantly crossed the last line of the law!
你向公司的机甲注入病毒，篡夺控制权，这是侵犯公司知识产权与生产资料！
You injected a virus into the IPC mechs and took control! That's an infringement of the IPC's intellectual property and assets!
你现在更应该关心的是你自己，不要把私人的数据放在公家的电脑里嘛，斯科特。
I'd be more concerned about yourself, Skott. Why were you storing your private data on an IPC computer?
私人的数据？我、我听不懂你在说什么。
Private data? I—I have no idea what you're talking about.
这怎么还能不记得呢？我瞧见你花大价钱买了「临终删除数据」服务，所以猜你存放在电脑里的东西一定很值得一看。
No idea, huh? I noticed you paid a hefty sum for the "end-of-life data deletion" service, so I'm guessing there must be something worth seeing.
你你你你你你你别看！那是我的个人隐私！谁允许你私自窥探的，快不许看了！
Y—You... you... you... stop! Stop right there! That's private! Who told you you could invade my privacy? Just stop it!
三月七，我们的条件是什么来着？
What were the terms again, March?
斯科特，你要立刻向不夜侯的小老板娘道歉，大声说「公司机甲，猪头才要」，然后在运输船上的每台机甲上都印上这句话，还要学猪叫！

Skott, you need to immediately apologize to the owner of the Sleepless Earl. You'll need to shout "IPC mechs are a total joke!" and print that on every mech on your transport ship! Oh yeah, almost forgot — you have to squeal like a pig!
学猪叫和学狗叫有什么本质区别吗？他又不是没叫过，玩家都听腻了。还是来点新花样吧…比如，用猪叫唱苏乐达广告歌？

That's pretty much the same as barking like a dog, right? He's already barked like a dog, players are bored of it. Let's come up with something new... How about singing the SoulGlad jingle, but with a pig's squeal?
哦，我是说「大家」。玩游戏玩的，说溜嘴了。
Oops, I meant "all of us." Sometimes I get carried away playing games — just a slip of the tongue.
How much did SoulGlad pay you?
萨姆从匹诺康尼回来以后天天哼这破歌，都给我洗脑了。
Sam has been humming that blasted song every day since coming back from Penacony, it's all I can hear.
好好好，你厉害…我要向不夜侯的小老板娘道歉，是我惹事生非、故意找事，全都怪我！
Fine, you've got me... I want to apologize to the owner of the Sleepless Earl! It's my fault for causing trouble and making a scene on purpose!
然后…你们等我酝酿一下…那破歌怎么唱的来着？想起来了。
And then... Just wait a second... How did that stupid song go? Oh, right.
公司机甲，猪头才要！哼哧哼哧哼哧哧，哼哧哼哧哼哧哧！哼哧哼哧哼哧哧，哼哧哼哧哼哧哧！
IPC mechs are a total joke! Oink, oink, oink, oink, oink, oink, oink! Oink, oink, oink, oink, oink! Oink, oink, oink, oink, oink, oink, oink! Oink, oink, oink, oink, oink!
竟然还唱了两遍。真有服务精神。
He actually sang it twice. Talk about being committed to providing a service.
斯科特专员！我查到了！这个女人…这个女人是星核猎手！
Specialist Skott! I've found something! This woman... she's a Stellaron Hunter!
什么？怪不得这么轻易就侵入了公司的系统……
What? No wonder she was able to effortlessly hack into our systems...
糟糕，被你发现了。既然你知道了我的身份，那就只好用社会性死亡来灭口了。
Oops, you caught me. Since my cover's blown, it looks like I'll have to resort to social obliteration to keep you quiet.
《霸道机甲爱上我》、《无机帝国罗曼史》…噫，你的审美象限真的好怪哦。
The Overbearing Mechs Falls in Love with Me... Romance of the Inorganic Empire... Wow, your taste in entertainment is really unique.
对不起，打扰了，我这就离开。
I'm sorry. I'll be on my way.
可是老大，不趁这机会抓了这个女人领赏吗……
But Boss, why don't we take this chance to catch her and claim the reward...?
别可是了！快走吧，再不走你们自个儿的秘密也保不住了——
Why? Because if you don't leave now, you'll be socially obliterated, too!
稍等，走之前再奉劝你一件事。
Hold on a sec. Before you leave, let me give you a piece of advice.
You should have faith in cloud technology.
你不会明白的！相信瞬息万变的网络，人类是不会有安全感的！
You just don't get it! Humanity will never feel secure by putting all their faith in an ever-changing network!
斯科特专员带着手下们仓惶逃离了金人巷。
Skott leaves Aurum Alley with his subordinates in a panic.
这场胜利，和「剑术」没有半毛钱关系，是科技的力量。
This victory has nothing to do with swordplay, and everything to do with the power of technology.
我又学了句仙舟俗语，这叫做：「手中无剑，心中有剑」！
I've learned another Xianzhou saying: "Though my hands are empty, my heart wields a blade!"
一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.
三月七，你怎么在写信啊？
Why are you writing a letter, March?
我在给星穹列车写信。出来这么久了，也该报个平安才对。
I'm writing a letter to the Astral Express. It's been a while, and I thought I should let them know that I'm safe and sound here.
啊？写信报平安？你没有手机的吗？
Huh? Writing a letter just to let the Crew know you're doing alright? Do you guys not have phones?
那多没仪式感啊！我不但要写信，还要手写！这样别人才知道我真的在仙舟～
That lacks a sense of propriety! I'm not just writing a letter. I'm writing a handwritten letter! I've gotta show them I'm really on the Xianzhou!
姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?
三月七使用银狼改装的剑具直接控制了公司机甲，以其人之道还施彼身获得胜利。
March 7th uses the sword modified by Silver Wolf to directly control the IPC Mech, turning the tables and achieving victory.
一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.
三月七，算我求你一次，这机甲不便宜，你别给我玩坏了！
Miss March, I'm begging you! These mechs aren't cheap. Please don't break them!
当然，只要你们不还手，机甲就会毫发无损。
Sure thing. Provided you do not fight back, the mechs will remain undamaged.
好家伙，这是什么赛博剑法……
Whew, this cyber swordplay is amazing...
嘻嘻，「知己知彼，对手狗殆。」
Hehe. "Know yourself and know your enemy, and you'll never have to sleep in the doghouse."
马上就要和斯科特对决了，青雀，你知道我为什么来找你吗？
I'm going up against Skott soon. Do you know why I'm visiting you, Qingque?
这里有你，有我，有{NICKNAME}，这不显而易见了吗？
Yeah, with you, me, and {NICKNAME} here, the answer is pretty obvious.
一起商量击败斯科特的办法。
We can brainstorm ways to defeat Skott together.
我可不会什么剑斗啊，如果不是打牌的话，我好像没有什么能够帮你的。
But I know nothing about swordplay or duels. Now, if you're talking about playing Celestial Jade, that's something I might be able to help with.
当然是帝垣琼玉牌三缺一！
Of course, we're here to play "Celestial Jade!"
对啊，我看三月你就是比斗前紧张了，打两圈牌正好放松放松。
Yeah, you just have pre-fight jitters, March. Let's play a couple of rounds to help you relax.
等等！最近我不是经常和你一起玩吗，其实我有了不少心得体会。比如，最近我一直在思考，仅仅用剑击败斯科特是不够的——

Wait a minute! I've been playing with you a lot lately, right? I've actually picked up a few insights. For example, I've been thinking lately that just defeating Skott with my swords might not be enough...
…对啊。你不会真的以为我傻了吧唧的吧！
...Yeah. You don't really think I'm dumb, do you?
能不能分享一下你的思考成果。
你们看，虽然斯科特会道歉，但他是真心实意地感到愧疚吗？
Well, here's the thing. Even if Skott apologizes, do you think he'd actually feel sorry for what he did?
那只是愿赌服输吧——道歉也好，学猪叫也好，估计他都不是心甘情愿的。
Nah, it's more he's just honoring a bet. Whether it's apologizing or squealing like a pig, I doubt he'd do it willingly.
他之前的狗叫也不是真的道歉。
Remember when he barked like a dog? He definitely wasn't sorry then.
没错，他就是想扬眉吐气才把比斗的地点选在金人巷。
Exactly! He just wants to show off, which is why he picked Aurum Alley as the venue.
但是这样击败他非常解气！
But defeating him like this would feel pretty satisfying!
幻戏里真正的大侠可不会只追求「解气」！
True heroes in Immersia don't merely settle for "satisfying!"
…有点道理。虽然我没有那么想凑热闹啦，我就帮你参考一下吧。
...You're right. Even though I'm not a fan, I'll help you figure something out.
{NICKNAME}，你也可以讲讲之前金人巷的事。
{NICKNAME}, why don't you fill her in on what happened at Aurum Alley earlier?
青雀饶有兴致地听起斯科特事件相关的始末。
Qingque listens to the whole story of Skott's incident with great interest.
等到你们讲完时，你注意到青雀的脸上好像有些怒气。
By the time you finish speaking, you notice that there seems to be a hint of anger on Qingque's face.
如果喜欢工作是一种病，那这位斯科特简直应该待在重症监护室里躺着！只是喜欢就算了，还要出来危害社会，这可不行！
If being a workaholic were a disease, Skott would be in the ICU! It's okay to enjoy your work, but causing trouble in society is another story!
So, any suggestions on what to do?
我没有什么建议，只有评价，我的评价是「上班上的」。
I don't have suggestions, only an opinion, and that is "He's a hopeless workaholic."
斯科特必须向我这样的平凡人道歉。
Skott really needs to apologize to regular people like me.
走吧，三月，我们去会会他！
Come on, March! Let's go find him!
瞧瞧，这不是我们的女侠三月七吗？你身边的，这是……
Well, well, if it isn't our hero March 7th! And who do we have here with you...?
在你们正式开始比斗之前，我必须要跟你聊几句。
Before you start the fight, I have a few words for you.
哈——？！你又是谁啊，怎么，你们仙舟的人都这么喜欢不请自来吗？
Huh...!? Who do you think you are? Is it like a Xianzhou thing to just show up uninvited?
你不认识我没有关系，{NICKNAME}，介绍一下。
It's okay if you don't know who I am. Introduce me to him, {NICKNAME}.
这是我们帝玉集团的青总！
This is the CEO of the Dynasty Corp, Miss Qingque!
你别吓着他了，我平时主要担任太卜司的掌门工作。
Don't freak him out. I work as the head of the Divination Commission most of the time.
这是太卜司的著名卜者青雀！
This is Qingque, a renowned diviner from the Divination Commission.
没错，你可以去太卜司里打听打听我的名号。
Yep, you're welcome to check out my credentials in the Divination Commission.
太卜司的卜者而已，有什么了不起吗，我还是星际和平公司的专员呢！你就说说吧，你是手下比我多，还是你挣的信用点比我多，你有什么了不起的。

Heh, what's so special about being a diviner from the Divination Commission? I'm a specialist at the Interastral Peace Corporation! Tell me, what makes you think you're so great? Do you have more minions than me? Or do you earn more credits?
你这人年纪不小，但是<color=#dbc291ff>精神状态还是刚走进职场的小白一样</color>——将几乎全部的时间用在了工作之上，美其名曰「热爱工作」。
You may not be young, but <color=#dbc291ff>your mindset is still that of a fresh-faced newbie</color> who spends all their time on work, while proudly proclaiming to "love their job."
我猜你喜欢将自己代入乐子人的身份，到处口出狂言，为的就是假装客观，以便在任何时候做出事不关己的姿态。
In my opinion, you enjoy playing the role of a joker, spouting off outrageous opinions just to seem objective and indifferent whenever you feel like it.
够、够了——！你闭嘴，你又怎么会理解我！别说的自己好像什么都清楚一样！
E—Enough! Shut up! What do you know about me!? Don't act like you know everything!
精彩，第一次看到斯科特才说三两句话就被激怒了。
Wow, you really got under Skott's skin with just a few words.
差点就被你给绕进去了。今天本来是…是来决斗的，不是来和你辩经的。
Well, you almost got me. I'm here to... have a duel, not to debate with you.
Skott got hit where it hurts.
Yeah, Skott couldn't come up with a comeback.
太卜司的卜者恐怖如斯。
Diviners are indeed not to be trifled with.
我以后都不敢惹太卜司了。
I'd better not mess with the Divination Commission anymore.
这真的是人畜无害的小麻雀吗？
Is this really the same harmless little sparrow we all know? More like one ferocious eagle.
I guess not! Eagle sounds about right.
就是这个气势，现在正是趁热打铁的时候！
That's the spirit! Strike while the iron is hot!
我倒是有说服斯科特的经验…
Well, I know a thing or two about convincing Skott...
交给我吧！我是谈判专家！
Leave it to me! I'm an expert negotiator!
Let me ask you something. Do you consider the IPC to be your family?
公司当然是我家，公、公司里有我这么多的好兄弟…！你知道公司的架构吗？「人才激励部」的同事让公司比家还温暖！
Of course I do! I... I have so many amazing colleagues there...! Have you seen our structure? The Talent Motivation Department makes everything feel even better than family!
Ask Skott to do some serious soul-searching!
你再好好想想，你把公司当作家，公司有把你当作家人吗？你爱公司，那公司爱你吗？
Think about it. You consider the IPC your family, but does the IPC consider you a family member? You love the IPC, but does the IPC love you back?
公司，爱不爱我…公司又不是人，它不用爱我！
Does the IPC love me back... the IPC is not a person! It doesn't have to love me at all!
所以，公司就不是你家！别再骗自己了。
Then the IPC isn't your family! Stop lying to yourself.
Tell Skott to ask his underlings!
问问你带来的好兄弟们，他们是不是能挺胸抬头说公司是家？你把好兄弟当作家人，好兄弟把你当作家人吗？
Ask your underlings if they honestly feel like the IPC is their family. You consider them your family, but do they feel the same way?
…我在斯科特先生手下当孙子。
...Mr. Skott bosses me around as if he owns me.
...I own you, and that's what makes us a family, right?
瞧瞧，斯科特，你兄弟们看得比你透彻。
See, Skott? Looks like your bros have different ideas of what "family" means.
Discuss his contributions and what he gets in return.
我听说有人十七轮面试，最后成为了P<unbreak>13</unbreak>的基层员工，你又付出了多少？
I heard someone went through <unbreak>17</unbreak> rounds of interviews just to become a basic P<unbreak>13</unbreak> employee. What about your own efforts?
十七轮？！那也有点太恐怖了！要不是我已经进了公司……
Seventeen rounds? That's insane! If I hadn't joined the IPC already...
你想想，你家的门有这么难进吗？
Think about it, is the entrance to your own home that hard to get through?
询问人才激励部的福利。
Ask about the Talent Motivation Department's perks.
你说大饼规划部让大家感到温暖，到底有多温暖？

这我可太熟了！带薪撸宠，支持跨星际办公，定期组织星际旅游…想不到吧！
Oh, now you're asking the right person! We're talking getting paid to play with pets, remote work across the cosmos, and regular interstellar trips... You wouldn't believe it!
(Hey! That's not the right thing to say...)
我听说庇尔波因特最低职级的员工，只要一想起公司的科技与财富，也会不由自主地挺起胸膛…但是你仔细想想，公司的一切成就和财富跟你有任何关系吗？
I heard even the lowest-ranking Pier Point folks feel proud of the IPC's success and wealth... But when you really think about it, how much does the IPC's success and wealth have to do with you?
O—Of course it has something to do with me...!
那你说说看，公司迄今为止哪一项成就与你有关？
Then tell me, which of the IPC's achievements can you personally take credit for?
当初金人巷的业务我有参与…眼下这批公司运输船也是我在负责…虽然这些事情好像也不大，但是少了我这些事情就办不成！
I was involved in the Aurum Alley investment project... and right now, I'm in charge of these transport ships... They may not seem like big things, but they can't be done without me!
质疑斯科特的不可取代。
当初你离开后，金人巷业务推进得更好了。而你现在负责的运输船，真的没了你就不行吗？

金、金人巷那是意外，要是听我的，公司早就拿下了！再说了，这运、运输船肯定离了我不行！
I... I just got unlucky with that project. If the IPC had listened to me, it would've been a massive success! And the shipping and transportation stuff... i—it's just impossible without me!
我听说公司每年入职的人和离开公司的人，比热夜之都的总人口还多…你不做，有的是斯科特能做。
I've heard that the IPC's annual turnover is even higher than the total population of the Capital of Passion... Even without you, they'd find other "Skotts" to get the job done.
想象斯科特离开了公司。
你这么在乎公司给你的自信，有没有想过你一旦离开了公司，你就什么也不是了吗？

我…我斯科特是，前星际和平公司员工！

你自己听听，像话吗？你的名字就只是公司的后缀吗？

询问斯科特的个人生活。
你即便和人吵架也不忘顺带宣传公司的机甲产品，确实敬业。但是，你真的拥有属于自己的生活吗？
Even in the middle of an argument, you don't miss the chance to plug the IPC's mech products — you're truly dedicated. But do you really have a life of your own?
怎、怎么了？我这是从工作中体会生活的乐趣，我的生活…非常充实！

你连喝个茶都要找茬，我觉得你根本没有生活，就更别提生活质量了！

质疑运输船安保的重要性。

你说你负责公司运输船，这运输船很重要吗？
You claim to be in charge of IPC's transport ships, but are they really that important?
废话！你知道我们这趟货运的可是博识学会的尖端技术！每一箱货光是造价就高到你们无法想象！这还不重要？
Of course they are! We're transporting the top-of-the-line tech from the Intelligentsia Guild, and each container is worth a fortune! How can they not be important?
（喂喂！你说错了吧…怎么意外激起了这家伙的自豪感？）
(Hey! That's not the right thing to say... You managed to stir up this guy's sense of pride)
你是不是觉得凌晨的手机很好玩？你是不是觉得早上的觉真的很好睡？你是不是成天赚着窝囊费，还要听着领导说着你干啥都多余……

Do you find it hard to fall asleep without scrolling through your phone? Do you hit the snooze button every morning? Do you feel useless at work, hearing your bosses complaining about your incompetence...?
你试着想想你上班之外的生活，是不是脑海里只能浮现两个字？
When you actually think about your life outside of work, only one word pops into your head, doesn't it?
按照我的工作哲学，我其实也不想说「你不重要」，相反我会说「你很重要」。打工人，你要为自己好好生活而骄傲，而不是其他的任何事情。

You know, based on my work philosophy, I don't want to say "You're not important." In fact, I'd say "You are important." As an employee, you should take pride in living a good life for yourself, not just work.
我、我根本没有自己的生活！
But I... I don't have a life of my own...
你沉默不语，流露出哀伤的眼神。如果说眼神有温度，那么你的爱怜可以孵化小鸡。
In your silence, your eyes betraying your sadness. The heat of the sympathy in your gaze could hatch a chick.
求求你了，说两句吧，不要让我觉得自己很可怜。
Come on, just say something. Don't make me feel so miserable about myself.
没有自己的生活，你真的很可怜。
But you are miserable, because you don't have a life of your own...
Convince Skott to quit his job.
该死的公司都干了什么，让一个活生生的人变成了机器。斯科特，听我一句劝，早点离开星际和平公司吧。
What has the cursed IPC done? They've turned a living, breathing human into a heartless machine! Skott, take my advice and leave the IPC.
But... but I don't have a choice.
斯科特，选择权就在你手上。
Yes, Skott. You do have a choice.
斯科特，你有没有想过你其实也可以慢下来，从茶叶、茶水、茶文化开始了解，那时你将得到一个新的爱好，体会一种全新的生活方式。
Skott, have you ever thought about slowing down and exploring things like tea and tea culture? It could be a new hobby and a whole new way of life for you.
But I... I'm not interested in tea.
兴趣是可以培养的，学会如何品味生活的乐趣很重要啊。
It's important to learn to enjoy the simple pleasures in life. You might discover a new interest if you just give it a try.
其实我也没有自己的生活，我能理解你。
I get how you feel. Honestly, I don't have much of a life outside of work either.
求求你别理解我，你在星穹列车上做自由职业，你和我比不了。
No, you don't get it. You're a freelancer on the Astral Express. You're nothing like me.
(Hey! That's not the right thing to say...)
你默契地看向了唇枪舌剑的攻坚主力——青雀，她立刻明白了你的意思。
You cast a knowing glance at Qingque, the main force in this war of words, who immediately caught your drift.
刚才这个话题就到这吧，没意思，赶紧开始下一个话题吧。
Let's move on, this topic's getting boring. Time for the next one.
你默契地看向了煽风点火的最佳辅助——三月七，她立刻明白了你的意思。
You cast a knowing glance at March 7th, the main instigator in this war of words, who immediately caught your drift.
刚才说的都不算啊，现在重来！准备，三、二、一，开始——
Hey, none of that counted just now. Let's start over! Ready? Three, two, one... Go!
你不知为何，什么也没想，就这样盯着斯科特，这让他感觉到非常不适。
Without knowing why, you absentmindedly stare at Skott, leaving him deeply unsettled.
你有话就说，盯着我算怎么回事。
If you have something to say, just say it. Why are you staring at me like that?
你自命不凡，蔑视他人，没有时间投入生活，缺乏共情能力，害怕没得到尊重，妄图靠着公司给的身份建立自信，你甘心吗——

You consider yourself superior to others, you have no time for your own life. You lack empathy, you're always worried about being looked down upon, and your self-esteem stems from the status the IPC gives you. Do you really want to live like this forever...?
呜啊啊啊啊——也不用说的这么过分吧，我也是很努力地在生活了，我也是一个平凡人，你讲这些，难道自己的心就不会痛吗？
Wahhhh... That's so mean! I'm just an ordinary person struggling, trying to survive. Don't you feel a twinge of guilt saying nasty stuff like that?
我当然会痛，因为我也是一个平凡人。现在，斯科特，欢迎你回到平凡人的世界。
Of course I do, because I'm just an ordinary person too. Now, Skott, welcome back to the world of ordinary people.
{NICKNAME}，你先不要说话了，说服不行，看来还得靠剑斗啊。
{NICKNAME}, it looks like talking sense isn't working. Looks like it's time to settle this with a good old-fashioned sword fight.
Hmph, you almost had me there.
{NICKNAME}说话确实笨了一些，但是我们并不是想用辩论战胜你，那和用剑击败你有什么区别呢？
{NICKNAME} might not be the best at talking, but we're not here to defeat you in a debate. That'd be no different than beating you with a sword, right?
我们不需要击败你，我们都是打工人，打工人何必为难打工人呢？
We're not out to get you. We're all in the same boat, just grinding away. Why do we have to make things hard for each other?
现在，你听明白我们的话了吗？

不夜侯的小老板娘梦茗，她辛苦地备好茶水，安排好桌椅，就是为了让你我这样身不由己的打工人能够适当休息，找回属于自己的生活！
Mengming, the owner of the Sleepless Earl, went to great efforts to set up her shop, all so that workers like us can catch a break and find some joy in our lives!
梦茗小姑娘不也是你吗？你辛辛苦苦做好自己的事，被没事找事的领导推翻桌子，打碎茶杯，还说你没有给他「五彩斑斓的黑」，你能受得了吗？

我们本想用剑斗的方式让你去给她道歉，但这是不够的。

算了吧，斯科特已经在反思了。

从明天起，做一个幸福的人，喝茶看报，漫游宇宙。
Starting tomorrow, I'm going to be happy. I'll have some tea, read the paper, and explore the universe.
不说了，我要去向小老板娘道歉了。谢谢你们，让我思考了不少…这破公司的工作，哎，我得花些时间好好想想。
Okay, without further ado, I'm going to apologize to the owner. Thanks, you've given me a lot to think about... As for this lousy job at the IPC, well, it's time for some serious contemplation.
斯科特带着他的好兄弟们离开了金人巷，向不夜侯的店主梦茗道了歉。
Skott leaves Aurum Alley with his bros and apologizes to the shopkeeper of the Sleepless Earl, Mengming.
哎，好累，我好久都没有这么累了。三月，你们得请我吃点好的。
Ah, I'm so tired... haven't felt this exhausted in ages. You guys better treat me to something nice, March.
当然当然，多谢青雀大师。
Of course. Thank you, Master Qingque.
一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.
What are you writing, Miss March?
我在给星穹列车写信。出来这么久了，也该报个平安才对。
I'm writing a letter to the Astral Express. It's been a while, and I thought I should let them know that I'm safe and sound here.
我特意翘班出来，可不是来陪你写文章的，快点一起去打牌啦～快快快！搞快点！
I didn't skip work to watch you write a letter! Come on, let's play Celestial Jade together! Hurry up! Hurry up!
稍等我一下！我写完就和你打牌去。
Just give me a sec! I'll play with you once I'm done.
姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?
青雀当面批驳了斯科特小人得志的想法，并让他重新认识到劳动者应为自己创造价值。
Qingque directly refutes Skott's idea of petty success and re-acquaint him with the idea that laborers should create value for themselves.
一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.
那里围着好多人呀，难道发生什么事了吗？
What's with all the people gathered around? What happened?
降低挑战难度，重新挑战强敌。
Lower the difficulty and challenge the formidable foe again.
放弃挑战并结束本次习剑流程。
Quit challenge and end this sword training program.
三月七决心堂堂正正，用十五日习得的剑术与斯科特一决胜负。
March 7th is determined to use the sword skills she has learned over the past fifteen days to face Skott fair and square in battle.
而面对如此挑战，斯科特求之不得，决战一触即发——
Faced with this challenge, Skott greatly welcomed the opportunity. The decisive battle was about to begin...
让时间回到三月七刚通过最终试剑的时候……
Turning back the clock to when March 7th just passed the final sword trial...
你们二位就是星穹列车的客人吧，能在此地偶遇，幸甚至哉。鄙人椒丘，是曜青仙舟的医士，请问二位如何称呼？

You two are guests from the Astral Express, I assume. It is a blessed fate to have met you here. May I humbly introduce myself? I am Jiaoqiu, a healer from the Xianzhou Yaoqing. How may I address you?
本姑娘叫三月七，至于这位嘛…{F#她}{M#他}每次自我介绍都有新花样，还是让{F#她}{M#他}自己说吧……
I'm March 7th, and as for this one... {F#She's}{M#He's} always coming up with something new. Might as well let {F#her}{M#him} do the self-introduction...
...*sigh* You're suddenly all proper this time.
幸会，银河球棒侠正是在下。
A pleasure. The Galactic Baseballer stands before you.
见外了，我是隔壁床的病友。
Why so formal? I'm your neighbor from the same ward.
人家说了他是医士，不是患者。再说了，你也没有住院啊！
He already said he's a healer, not a patient. And you're not hospitalized!
哈哈哈哈，我早就听闻星穹列车的无名客行事多荒诞不经，既然这位小姐是三月七，另一位肯定就是{NICKNAME}了。
Hahahaha, I have long heard of the many shenanigans of the Astral Express's Nameless. If the lady is March 7th, this must be {NICKNAME}.
这真的需要排除法吗？我比{F#她}{M#他}可正经多了！
Was the process of elimination even necessary? I'm much more respectable than {F#she}{M#he} is!
看来是鄙人失礼了…那么，请问正经的三月小姐在行医市集做些什么呢？
It appears I have made a faux pas... Now then, may I ask what the respectable Miss March is doing in the Healer's Market?
咳，仙舟的医术名传天外，我想着能不能在这里找到什么仙舟话本小说与幻戏故事里的「灵丹妙药」。
Ahem, Xianzhou's medical skills have long been renowned across the galaxy. I was wondering if I could find any Xianzhou stories and immersia on the miracle elixir?
哼哼，容我提醒三月小姐。想求如此神异丹药，多半会招来「药王秘传」这类别有用心之人。
Heh heh, if I may remind you Miss March... Those who seek this Elixir of Life will usually likely attract the sinister likes of those such as the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.
你将三月七与公司的好事之徒约战的事细细道来。
You elaborate on the matter of the upcoming duel between March 7th and that IPC busybody.
原来是这样，哈哈，鄙人明白了。十五日之约确实紧促了一些，三月小姐有这样寻药的想法也不难理解……
So that's the case, haha, I understand. A fight in fifteen days is a rather tight schedule. It's no wonder Miss March seeks the medicine...
既然你们撞上了我，就不必再另寻他处了。
Since you have run into me, you shall not have to look any further.
难道椒丘先生知道哪里有「灵丹妙药」吗？
Could you know where there could be a miracle elixir, Mr. Jiaoqiu?
我听说朱明仙舟有一位武人，自出生之日起，母亲以神奇药水为他浑身洗净，让他的身躯坚实如铁，挨打再也不觉得疼了！
I have heard tell of a martial artist on the Xianzhou Zhuming whose mother bathed him in the miracle medicine since his birth. His body was rendered hard as steel, feeling no pain to all blows!
假的害我听得这么认真！那么…有没有更柔和一些的方法呢？
False!? I was listening so intently too! Then... are there gentler ways?
我听说朱明仙舟上有一座高塔，塔上住着一位猫猫模样的仙人。剑士们只需吃下一粒它所种植的蚕豆，不仅可从极度疲惫中立刻恢复至最佳状态，还可在十天之内不再饥饿。

I heard of a tower on the Xianzhou Zhuming, where a feline-looking celestial dwelled atop. Swordmasters only had to consume a silkworm bean that it planted — they could instantly recover from their most exhausted states, and even go without food for ten days.
你是特地来消遣三月的吧？
You here to make a mockery of March or something?
你到底是不是医士哇？我来求药，怎么你在我这儿净编些段子来消遣我了？
Are you really a healer? I came to seek a prescription, and you're here spinning tall tales to taunt me!
你其实不知道什么灵丹妙药吧？
You don't really know of any miracle elixir, do you?
就是就是，本姑娘可不是好欺负的哦。
Yeah! I'm not the type of girl who's easily pushed around, you know.
别急嘛，我只是在试探三月小姐「求药是否心诚」。毕竟，这灵丹妙药的食品保质期很短的，要是我辛苦做出来你又不敢一试，可不就是浪费吗？

Please understand, I was merely testing your earnestness in seeking the medicine. This miracle elixir's shelf life is short after all — what if you didn't dare try it after I went through all the hard work to make it? Wouldn't that be a waste?
食品保质期…你做的到底是药还是食物呀？
Shelf life... Are you making medicine or food?
在咱们「染指派」的医术理论中，药就是食，食就是药。人如其食，故而对症进食便能疗疾愈患。
In our Ranzhi School's medical theory, medicine is food, and vice versa. We are what we eat, so the right food for the right ailments would naturally cure us.
唔，既然三月小姐有心求药，下次见面的时候，我会带来你想要的「灵丹妙药」，你可千万不能拒绝呀。
Mm, since you're earnest in finding the right medicine, the next time we meet, I shall bring you the miracle elixir you want. You'd better not reject me then.
拒绝…？你放心，椒丘先生辛苦做出来的药，我绝不会浪费！
Reject...? Don't worry, I'll never waste the medicine that you worked so hard to make!
今日之事不可告诉你的二位师父。如果三月小姐同意，鄙人便收集药材去了，告辞。
You can't tell your masters about what transpired today. If you agree, I shall get right to collecting the ingredients. Farewell.
椒丘真的会做「灵丹妙药」吗？<color=#dbc291ff>下次遇见椒丘时，再向他问清楚好了。</color>
Can Jiaoqiu really make this miracle elixir? <color=#dbc291ff>We should clarify this the next time we meet him.</color>
来了来了，您要的「灵丹妙药」，我装在保温盒里给你们带来了。
Here it is, the miracle elixir you wanted. I've stored it in this thermal box for you.
...What kind of medicine is stored in this box?
今天走得急，做得比较少…这有凉拌千年人参、黑玉龟苓膏、手撕冰山雪莲。
I had to leave in a hurry today, so I didn't make much... There's Millennial Ginseng With Sauce, Obsidian Herbal Jelly, and Hand-Shredded Icy Lotus.
…完了，我的食品安全雷达正在铮铮作响。
...Uh-oh, my food safety radar is blaring.
将人参从泡菜坛中取出，切成薄片，辅以醋、姜、蒜、红油酱料做成。
I extracted the ginseng from the kimchi pot, julienned it, and used vinegar, ginger, garlic, and chili oil as condiments.
那怎么就能叫「千年人参」呢？
这道菜谱…我是说药方传承历史可有千年之久。当不得「千年」二字吗？
This recipe... I mean, this prescription's been passed down for a thousand years. Is "millennial" not appropriate?
将「黑玉断续膏」煮沸过滤，加入阿胶，最后再加入鹰栗粉晾凉凝固。
I boiled and filtered obsidian ground paste, then added donkey-hide gelatin, and finally added corn starch to congeal it.
这「黑玉」二字作何解释啊？该不会是真的往里加了玉屑吧？
How do you explain the "obsidian" then? You didn't really add rocks to it, did you?
这道菜的色泽之所以如黑冰墨玉，是我怕你入不了口，多加了黑糖。
This dish's color is black as ink and ebony jade, so I added rock sugar in case you got grossed out.
五花肉切片煸炒出油，再加入雪莲、姜葱蒜炒出香味，加入酱油调味，再大火快炒将雪莲变软，加盐出锅。

Stir-fry the belly meat till the fat renders, then add snow lotus, onion, and garlic and fry till fragrant. Add soy sauce to taste, and finally stir-fry the snow lotus on high heat till it softens, add salt, and voilà.
莫非是三千年一开花，吃了能让人头发由白转黑，返老还童的雪莲？
Could it be the snow lotus that blooms once every three thousand years? The snow lotus that can turn one's hair from white to black and restore one's youth?
倒也没那么惊奇。这雪莲是用温室大棚种植，三十日一开花。
It's nothing so grandiose. This snow lotus is grown in a greenhouse and blooms every thirty days.
话说…这些药材还蛮贵的吧？
So... aren't these herbs pretty expensive?
不贵——也就刚好下一顿馆子的成本吧。来来来，三月小姐，请不要客气……
It's not too expensive — just about the price of a meal at a restaurant. Come on, Miss March, please help yourself...
恕我直言，这些菜有些过于创新了……
If you don't mind me saying, these dishes seem a little too... creative...
不要——！不要不要不要不要绝对不要！
No—! No no no no definitely no!
咱们上次见面时约好的，鄙人会带来你想要的药，你可千万不能拒绝呀……
We agreed in our previous meeting that I would bring you the medicine you requested, please do not refuse...
Um... Okay, I will try it...
你和三月七忐忑地饱餐了一顿，体会到「染指派」的真髓。
You and March 7th have an uneasy meal, experiencing the real meaning behind the Ranzhi School.
好好吃啊！椒丘先生果然是个厨子吧。
It's so delicious! Mr. Jiaoqiu, you must really be a master chef!
是医士！不想当医士的厨子算不上好的将军幕僚…我给你解释这些干嘛呢？
I'm a healer! Chefs who don't want to be doctors aren't fit to be a general's loyal retainer... Wait, why am I even explaining this to you?
…那我吃下这些就能提升剑术功力了吗？
...Then will my swordplay improve if I eat all of this?
三月小姐，鄙人选用的药材固然珍异，终究还是能随处买到的凡品，充其量是能强身健体、补充营养…换句话说，对你的剑术功力帮助不大。

Miss March, though the herbs I have selected are valuable beyond measure, they are still readily available for sale anywhere. At best, they can strengthen your constitution and replenish your nutrients... In other words, they won't help your swordplay much.
这和说好的需求不一样啊？
This is different from the request!
从药材角度看，它们已经足够「灵丹妙药」了。
Basing off the herbs, they are enough to create the miracle elixir.
我背包里有些加暴击的东西。

谁知道那是从哪个垃圾桶里翻出来的……
Who knows which trashcan you rummaged through to get these...
有没有买不到的药材呢？
Are there herbs that can't be bought?
二位求药心切，我这边也有些新的菜品想要试试药，于是一拍即合…鄙人可没有许诺过「吃下就能增长功力」哦。
You two are sincere in your medicinal search, and I've got new dishes that I wish to test, so it was a mutually beneficial situation... I never promised that your skills would grow if you ate them.
I feel like I got cheated.
不过嘛…我听说罗浮仙舟有一张药方，但这药方不是给人开的，而是给「深山密林中的蛇」开的。
But... I hear that there is a prescription aboard the Xianzhou Luofu that isn't given to the public, only to the snake in the deep woods.
没错，这药方是饲喂灵蛇的法子。据说那条蛇最初通体灰黑，持续服用灵芝、参茸等珍奇药物之后二十年后，已经是通体发红。

That's right, it's a remedy used to feed spirit snakes. It's said that the snake used to be coated in gray-black, but with continued consumption of spirit fungi, ginseng, deer antlers, and other rare herbs for two decades, its entire body eventually turned red.
The black snake turned into a ... Crimson Dragon?
不错，「玄蛇」餐灵草而成「赤龙」。这便是千金难买的药材。
That's right. The Ebony Snake consumed spirit herbs and became a Crimson Dragon. Now that's a priceless herb.
据说吮吸赤龙之血，便能令人脱胎换骨，功力倍增。话已经说到这里了，我再向你透个底吧——罗浮丹鼎司内就藏着一条这样的赤龙……

It's said that by imbibing the blood of a Crimson Dragon, one can be born anew with boosted strength. Since I've already revealed this much, I'll give you all another tidbit — such a Crimson Dragon is stashed within the Alchemy Commission...
据说「赤龙呕血，命殁归阴」，这药材可是秘中之秘，恐怕只有丹鼎司的司鼎大人才晓得个中细节。鄙人就言尽于此了。

It is said that "when dragons spew blood, life is returned to the shadows." This herb is a secret among secrets. Only the Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission is privy to its details. That is all I will say.
服食珍奇药物的赤龙？<color=#dbc291ff>下次再来丹鼎司里问问吧。</color>
A Crimson Dragon that has been fed rare herbs? <color=#dbc291ff>Let's ask around at the Alchemy Commission next time.</color>
哦，这不是{NICKNAME}吗，三月七小姐也在这里，你俩还真是形影不离。
Oh, isn't this {NICKNAME}. Miss March! You're here too. You two really are inseparable.
对哦，这里是丹鼎司，灵砂大人就任的地方。
Oh, yeah. This is Alchemy Commission where Lady Lingsha works.
我看二位此时来到行医市集，是有想要买的药材？
I noticed the two of you walking about the Healer's Market, is there something you wish to buy?
实不相瞒，上次我俩来丹鼎司时，曜青的椒丘先生提到了丹鼎司中藏有一条「赤龙」。
Truth be told, when we came by the Alchemy Commission, Mr. Jiaoqiu of the Yaoqing mentioned that a Crimson Dragon was hidden in the Alchemy Commission.
…赤龙？嚯，请两位给妾身仔细讲讲吧。
...Crimson Dragon? Ho, please spare no details.
你将三月与斯科特约战、与椒丘相遇的过程告诉了灵砂。灵砂似乎已经有了眉目。
You tell Lingsha about the appointed battle between March and Skott, and the encounter with Jiaoqiu. Lingsha seems to have gotten the gist.
呵呵，增长功力的灵丹妙药？椒丘这家伙……
Heh-heh, a miracle elixir that can boost your skills? That rascal Jiaoqiu...
三月小姐，若「赤龙血」真的存在，你当真敢喝下它吗？
Miss March, if the Crimson Dragon Blood really existed, would you really dare drink it?
Mm, umm... I mean, would you dare, {NICKNAME}?
那有什么不敢，旁边就是医馆。
There's nothing to be afraid of. The apothecary's just right beside us.
不愧是{NICKNAME}，轻易就做到了我做不到的事。
That's {NICKNAME} for you, a brave soul who dares venture where I do not.
这种故事信不得，我就不喝了。
This tale is simply unbelievable. I'm not drinking anything.
你要是不喝，我也不喝了——我们俩是一条心。
If you're not drinking it, neither am I. We're on the same page.
三月小姐的反应还挺可爱的，告诉你也无妨，椒丘先生所说的「赤龙」确实存在。
Miss March's reaction is quite adorable, so I'll be frank: The Crimson Dragon that Mr. Jiaoqiu mentioned does indeed exist.
…那么灵砂大人，「赤龙」在哪里呢？
...Soooo, where is this Crimson Dragon, Master Lingsha?
「赤龙」不过是椒丘设下哑谜，如果妾身没猜错，你们所寻之物远在天边，近在眼前。
The Crimson Dragon is nothing more than a guessing game concocted by Jiaoqiu. If I'm not wrong, the item you seek far and wide, is right before you.
灵砂大人就是那条「赤龙」？！
作为哑谜的谜底还算合适吧？
Appropriate as an answer to a guessing game, no?
难道灵砂大人之前…通体发黑？

妾身虽并非蝮蛇，倒是有使人通体发黑的药丸，{NICKNAME}想试试吗？
I'm not some viper, but I do have pills that will cause people's skins to darken. Would you like to try one, {NICKNAME}?
所以…椒丘先生要我找的是——灵砂大人的…血？
So... what Mr. Jiaoqiu wanted me to find was... Lady Lingsha's... blood?
妾身行医试药，服用各类珍奇药材早就超过了百年，倒也符合「赤龙」标准。若是三月小姐*真心*想要的话，我完全可以给你哦～

I have practiced my skills across the universe and consumed myriad medicines for over a century, so I do fit the description of a "Crimson Dragon." If you really want to, I can absolutely give some to you, Miss March...
不过嘛「药者，毒也」，三月小姐可不能只盯着药的好处，却忽略了毒的危险。「赤龙血」就在我这里，三月小姐你可得考虑清楚——

But the dose is what makes medicine poisonous. You can't just be focused on the advantages of the medicine and ignore the dangers of its poison. The Crimson Dragon Blood is right here with me, so you'll have to contemplate this carefully, Miss March...
三月七一脸慌张地迅速看向了你，并期望你给出建议。
March 7th quickly throws you a glance with anxiety, hoping you will throw out some suggestions.
别问我，我的大脑已经宕机了…
Don't ask me, my brain's already got BSODed...
我、我也宕机了！像是高速运转的机器进入到脑子里。
I—I've BSODed too! Like some high-speed whirring machine has entered my brain.
三月，你可不是什么吸血鬼哦！
March, you're not some blood-sucking vampire!
没错，本姑娘已经发下毒誓，决心以后要过上只喝奶茶的寡淡人生。
That's right, I've sworn an oath that I'll only live a bland life of drinking milk tea, and nothing more.
三月，灵砂大人已经同意你了…
March, Master Lingsha has already agreed to your request...
可是，我从来没有想到过「赤龙」就是灵砂大人啊……
But I never thought that Master Lingsha would be the Crimson Dragon...
之前椒丘先生还说过「赤龙呕血，命殁归阴」，灵砂大人犯不上冒这么大的险……
Mr. Jiaoqiu even said before that "when the Crimson Dragon spits blood, its life will return to the gloom." Master Lingsha does not have to take such a huge risk...
那倒不必担心，不过是几滴血而已，不会要了妾身的命。
Worry not, it's just a few drops. It won't cost me my life.
我看你这样纠结也暂时不会有结果…这样吧，下次见面的时候你再把决定告诉我吧。
I see you struggling to make a decision... How about this: You can tell me your choice the next time we meet.
顺便一提，妾身会让那个{RUBY_B#椒丘}出馊点子的人{RUBY_E#}来当面给我个解释的。
And I will summon that {RUBY_B#Jiaoqiu}dork who came up with this rotten idea{RUBY_E#} to come forward and explain himself to me.
我真的…需要「赤龙血」吗？<color=#dbc291ff>下次再来丹鼎司时，也许我的心里会有答案吧。</color>
Do I really... need the Crimson Dragon Blood? <color=#dbc291ff>I may have an answer ready the next time I come to the Alchemy Commission.</color>
喂——！椒丘，你知道你说的「赤龙」是什么吗？
Heyyyy! Jiaoqiu, you know what the Crimson Dragon you said is?
灵砂小姐已经找过鄙人了，事情大概经过我也已经知道了。
Lady Lingsha has already sought me out. I also know how the matter roughly went.
都怪你满嘴跑火车，灵砂大人肯定已经狠狠地批评过你了吧！
It's your fault for spewing all that nonsense. I bet Master Lingsha reprimanded you harshly!
哎～这都怪我！不过批评归批评…最后灵砂大人还是问了我是否需要「赤龙血」……
Oh dear, it's all my fault! But reprimanding aside... Master Lingsha still asked me if you wanted the Crimson Dragon Blood in the end...
我先说好，我已经想清楚了——不需要！
Let me say it first, I've already thought it through — I don't need it!
…可是我说「三月小姐练功要紧、肯定需要」，于是她就让我带了一瓶给你。
...But I said that Miss March is training, she'll definitely need it, so she had me bring a bottle for you.
椒丘向你们晃了晃玻璃瓶，瓶内大概装着<unbreak>500</unbreak>毫升「赤龙血」。
Jiaoqiu shakes the glass bottle in front of you, within it containing about five hundred milliliters of Crimson Dragon Blood.
啊？这么多？！灵砂小姐不会休克了吧？
Wha—? That much!? Is Miss Lingsha alright up there?
I really, really don't need it!
既然来都来了，那你喝吗？{NICKNAME}。
Since you're here, are you going to drink it, {NICKNAME}?
在场就没人质疑过卫生问题吗？
Is there no one here who's questioning the hygiene issue?
我查过了，血液中含有大量的病菌和病毒！
I checked, the blood is filled with germs and viruses!
哎，既然你俩都不喝，鄙人就勉为其难地喝下吧。
*sigh* Since the both of you won't drink it, I shall drink it with great reluctance.
椒丘当着你们的面，将瓶中的「赤龙血」一饮而尽。
Jiaoqiu drinks the Crimson Dragon Blood in one swig in front of both of you.
我又不练剑，还是让三月喝吧。
I'm not the one training to be a swordsman, let March drink it instead.
啊？！我们还是把它还给灵砂小姐吧！
Ah!? We better return it to Miss Lingsha then!
哎，既然你俩都不喝，鄙人就勉为其难地喝下吧。
*sigh* Since the both of you won't drink it, I shall drink it with great reluctance.
椒丘当着你们的面，将瓶中的「赤龙血」一饮而尽。
Jiaoqiu drinks the Crimson Dragon Blood in one swig in front of both of you.
我不做人了！椒椒！让我喝吧！
I shall cast off my human shell then! Jiaojiao! Let me drink it!
{NICKNAME}，难道你要成为超越人类的存在？
{NICKNAME}, do you want to surpass human limits?
你当着椒丘和三月七的面，将瓶中的「赤龙血」一饮而尽。
You drink the Crimson Dragon Blood in one swig in front of Jiaoqiu and March 7th.
柔滑浓稠，果香清甜中透着恰到好处的微酸，伴着沙瓤口感顺喉而下。
Smooth and thick, the sweet fruit aroma carries a hint of just the right amount of acidity, accompanied by a grainy texture that goes down smoothly.
椒丘，你就别逗他们俩了，你这瓶子里装着的是夕红果汁吧。
Jiaoqiu, stop teasing the both of them. This bottle just contains Redsunset juice, doesn't it?
灵砂大人的鼻子太灵了。
Master Lingsha has such a strong sense of smell.
我算是看明白了，这不会是你们俩为了讲什么道理而设计的考验吧？
I see it now, is this some test that you two came up with to teach me some kind of lesson?
这可真是误会了，我只是想看看三月小姐会做出怎样可爱的反应。
You misunderstood us. I merely wished to see what adorable reaction you would have.
…那我岂不是什么都没有得到？
怎么可能呢三月小姐，请仔细回想那些你吃下的药膳——你得到了均衡的饮食，规律的作息，还有每日的锻炼！最后，你收获了健康的身体！
How could you say that, Miss March! Think about the herbal cuisine you ate — you received a well-balanced meal, a regular routine, and daily exercise! Finally, you achieved a healthy body!
营养均衡的膳食和锻炼，可比来路不明的灵丹妙药有用多了。
A well-balanced diet and exercise are more effective than some unknown miracle elixir.
在幻戏里，灵丹妙药、变异、以及绝世神功…其实没有本质区别。它们都是创作者的惯常偷懒技巧，是「不劳而获」的一种包装方式，千万不可以当真哟。

In the immersia, the miracle elixir, mutations, and unparalleled martial arts mastery... they are not so different at all. Just lazy tricks by the creators, to package a way to reap what one has not sown. Please do not fall for such parlor tricks.
不过…世界上真的没有那种灵丹妙药吗？
But... is there really no miracle elixir in this world?
呵呵，你们记得「寿瘟祸祖留下长生果实」的传说吧？世间是有灵丹妙药的，它们早已暗中标好价格，恐怕我们谁也偿还不起……

Hee-hee, do you remember the legend of the Plagues Author leaving behind the Fruit of Longevity? There are miracle elixirs in this world, and they've long had price tags on them, but I'm afraid we will never be able to afford them...
我记住了。不过，我还有一个问题——椒丘先生只是想请我们吃药膳的话，为什么不让我告诉二位师父呢？
I will remember this. But Mr. Jiaoqiu, I have a question — if you simply wanted to treat us to a herbal feast, why couldn't I tell the two masters about it?
这个只是一点心理暗示罢了…我如此说了之后，三月小姐是不是感觉药膳更有效了？
This was simply a psychological suggestion... Did you feel that the medicine was more effective after what I said, Miss March?
您这医士懂的诈骗技巧太多了…

地衡司里应该有很多类似的受骗案例，鄙人不过是取其精华，去其糟粕罢了。

三月小姐请不必担心，如果您为了对付斯科特而需要帮助的话，请随时到丹鼎司来找鄙人，鄙人一定会帮上你的。
Please do not worry, Miss March. If you need help defeating Skott, please feel free to look for me at the Alchemy Commission. I will definitely help you out.
要是那个时候三月小姐也需要我的帮助，我会来帮忙的……
When the time comes, if you also require my help, I shall do so, Miss March...
嗯嗯，谢谢椒丘先生，谢谢灵砂大人。
Yes, yes, thank you both, Mr. Jiaoqiu, Master Lingsha.
哟，{NICKNAME}，还有那个…三月七，是叫这个名字吧？
Hey, {NICKNAME}! And what's-her-name again... March 7th? Am I right?
星核猎手？你出现在这儿，该不会意味着仙舟又要……
A Stellaron Hunter? The fact that you're here, does that mean the Xianzhou is again...
别大惊小怪的，好像我是到处入侵的病毒。现在是我的私人时间，没有「剧本」也没有任务。我建议你就当没见过我。
