Luka, you are absolutely radiating with newsworthiness. I've decided to follow you and report on your progress throughout the competition.
如果事情都像开头那么顺利就好了……
If only everything were as smooth as when it started...
How many matches have you participated in?
这几天如果参加了比赛，我就不会那么焦虑了……
If I had participated in the competition these past few days, I wouldn't be so anxious right now...
你在叩关赛被淘汰了吗？
Did you fail in the knockout stage?
真要是那样…那我也算是问心无愧了……
If that was the case... I'd have nothing to feel bad about...
我登记参赛后这么多天，还一场比赛都没打过呢——今天是我的第一个比赛日。
It's been days since I've registered, but I haven't participated in a single match yet. Today's my first one.
但是别说打比赛了，我感觉自己现在正常生活都有困难！已经半只脚踏入生活不能自理的领域了……
But forget about competing, I feel like I'm struggling with just normal everyday life! I'm already halfway into the realm of needing help with daily activities...
为什么大家都不收冬城盾呢？用个宝石挂饰刷一下，就把钱付掉了？
Why don't people accept shields? You can pay for things just by swiping a gemstone trinket?
为什么大家长得都看不出年龄啊？我找一个尖耳朵小姑娘问路，叫了一声「小妹妹」，结果人家生气了，说自己已经三百四十多岁了…搞得我现在都不敢和人说话了。

Why doesn't anyone look their age? I approached this girl with pointy ears to ask for directions and I called her "little girl" and she got mad! She said she's over three hundred and forty years old... So now I'm even afraid to talk to people.
哦对，还有吃饭…仙舟上的食物真的吃不惯。我昨天的晚餐是一碗红油乱斩牛杂，今天一直躲在厕所里「坐火箭」……

Oh and, meals... I'm really not used to the food on the Xianzhou. Yesterday, I ate a bowl of chili oil beef offal stew for dinner, and today... I've been blowing up the toilet with my flaming rockets...
我理解你，卢卡选手，我也吃不惯仙舟的食物。
I feel you, Luka. I also can't get used to the food on the Xianzhou.
卡美丽小姐也是不习惯味道吗？
Miss Carmella, you can't get used to the food, either?
那倒不是，因为我是智械。
Well, not exactly. It's because I'm an Intellitron.
总之，我第一次觉得自己这么没用，连出门问路这样的小事都做不好……
Anyways, this is the first time in my life I've felt so useless. I can't even do something as trivial as asking for directions...
第一次出球，难免不适应。
It's your first time away from home, so it must be hard to get used to things.
It's an alien civilization after all...
谢谢安慰…唉，其实我早有心理准备。第一次见世面，难免会遇到文化冲击，只是没想到这冲击实在太大，我站不稳了。
Thank you for comforting me... Actually, I did do some mental preparations. It's my first time going out into the world, but I didn't expect it to be so overwhelming that I can't keep my footing.
你那些贝洛伯格的同伴都在哪里？
玲可去考古了，她想通过那块宝石挂坠了解伊戈尔回雅利洛-Ⅵ前的历史。史瓦罗大佬带着虎克去别处玩了——他真的蛮会带孩子的。

Lynx went on an archaeological escapade: She wants to try to learn about Igor's history before he returned to Jarilo-VI with that gemmed pendant. Svarog took Hook out to play — he's really good with kids.
我心烦意乱，现在马上就要开始第一场比赛了，状态却前所未有地差。
I'm so irate and I'm about to start my first match, I'm in worse shape than ever.
接下来的对手是几个云骑…啊，就是这里的银鬃…不对，我跟你解释这个干什么，你肯定比我懂…只有我什么都不懂。

The next opponents are several Cloud Knights... Ah, they're like the Silvermane here... No, why am I explaining this to you? You should know better than me... I'm the only one who doesn't know anything.
趁着比赛还没开始，去看看你第一场比赛的对手吧。枯坐在这里只会越想越焦虑。
Why not check out who your first opponent is before the competition starts? It's better than wallowing here, as it'll just make you more anxious.
谢谢你们陪我说话，排解苦闷。行啊，那我就去会会我第一场比赛的对手！
Thanks for talking to me and cheering me up. Sure, I'll head off to meet my first opponent!
卢卡选手重振了精神！满血复活！好耶！
Luka has regained his energy! Full health revive! Oh yeah!
看，那几位就是我第一场比赛的对手。
Look, those are my opponents for my first match.
{NICKNAME}! Are you here to watch our match?
这位是咱们接下来的对手，卢卡选手。
This is our next opponent, Luka.
你们好，我叫卢卡，来自贝洛伯格。接下来会在擂台上和各位过招，也希望能借此机会以武会友。
Hello everyone, I'm Luka and I come from Belobog. I'll be exchanging fists with you guys in the ring. I hope we'll be able to take this chance to become friends.
贝洛伯格…喔！好像听小桂子提起过，但没啥印象了！那是什么地方啊？
Belobog... Oh! I think Lil Gui mentioned it before, but I can't seem to remember. What kind of place is it?
一个被冰雪覆盖的城市。
哇喔…没法想象。抱歉，曜青仙舟没什么人造雪景呢。
Oh wow... I can't imagine that. I'm sorry, the Xianzhou Yaoqing doesn't have much artificial snow.
是一个英雄辈出的城邦。
It's a city full of heroes.
喔～我最喜欢英雄的故事了，有空给我仔细讲讲。
Oh, I love hero stories! Tell me more when you have time!
没听说过也没关系。接下来我会用自己的实力，让全银河都记住「贝洛伯格」的名字。
It's okay if you haven't heard of us. I'll make sure the whole cosmos remembers Belobog's name with my fists!
In that case, I'll keep my eyes peeled!
我是跟踪报道卢卡选手的记者。没事，你们正常对话就好，不用管我。我在拍摄素材。
I'm the journalist who's reporting on Luka. It's fine. J—Just chat like you always do and ignore me. I'm just snapping shots for material.
{NICKNAME}，你是来和卢卡先生一起参加比赛的吗？
{NICKNAME}, are you here to join the tournament with Mr. Luka?
难不成，卢卡选手就是你训练的战士？
Could Luka be the fighter that you've been training?
怕、怕你个鬼啦。让我瞧瞧，不对，选手报名表中没你名字啊。你该不会是卢卡选手的教练吧？
Wh—Who's afraid! Lemme see... Your name isn't on the list. Are you Luka's coach then?
红发兄台的这条镔铁胳膊，看上去实在威猛，绝对一拳一个小朋友。
The iron arm on this red-haired boy looks like it's got power, definitely capable of taking down a kid with one punch at a time.
咱们可不是小朋友哦！云骑军的战术讲究的是相互配合、以多欺少！
But we're not kids! The Cloud Knights' tactical creed is to complement one another and overwhelm with numbers!
That's called a united front, got it!?
我的战术…呃。对不起，这是我第一次登上演武仪典的擂台，我们队就我一个人，我也不知该用什么战术。
My strategy... Uh, sorry. It's my first time participating in the Wardance. I'm the only one in my team, so I don't have any strategy to speak of.
看来这位外星朋友需要一些点拨啊。这样吧，半个时辰后就要开赛了，我在擂台上给你一些实际的战术指点吧！
It appears our otherworldly friend requires some enlightenment. How about this — the match is starting in an hour. I'll give you some real-life tactical pointers in the ring!
李大枕头，过分了吧！哥几个请你来当教练指点战术，你怎么跑去给咱们对手站台了？
Sleepy Sushang, that's over the line! You were supposed to be our coach when we invited you here. How could you run off to the opponent's corner?
这不是…异邦友人需要些帮助吗。咱们云骑军平日里巡逻看到异邦朋友，不也得认真给人帮扶指路来着？
It's just... our friend from afar requires some assistance, that's all. Don't we Cloud Knights also earnestly help out and provide direction to the travelers we encounter on our daily patrols?
Bah, it'll be your fault if we lose.
别贫了！抓紧时间准备去！
Enough chit-chat! Get back to your prep!
那就谢谢这位不知年龄的热心小姐姐了…我们先回休息室了。
I appreciate it. Thank you, new friend whose age I won't try to estimate... We're heading back to the lounge.
所以…我第一场比赛对手的教练，要在赛场上给我指导战术？我还是对仙舟人的热情难以置信。
So... the coach of my opponent for my first match, is going to give me tactical advice in the ring? I am bewildered by the Xianzhou people's hospitality.
真是个热心肠的好人啊……
你看，仙舟没那么可怕吧？
See? Xianzhou's not that scary, is it?
You're right. There are many good people here.
这是卢卡选手的第一场比赛，你一定会出师大捷！
This is your first match, Luka. You're bound to win!
（呼～卢卡，你没问题的。你可是贝洛伯格拳王。）
(Phew, Luka, you're gonna be fine. You're the boxing champion of Belobog.)
（云骑军…不就是银鬃铁卫？银鬃铁卫里除了杰帕德先生，我还真没怕过谁。）
(The Cloud Knights... Aren't they just the Silvermane Guards? I'm pretty confident of my odds against them, except Mr. Gepard.)
（卢卡，你是最棒的！你不会输！加油！）
(Luka, you're the best! You're not gonna lose! Go get 'em!)
卢卡，准备好开始你的第一场比赛了吗？
Luka, ready for your first match?
我觉得我大概也许可能是准备好了！
I think, I, more or less, maybe, perhaps I'm ready!
Luka, have more confidence in yourself!
不管各位的世界有没有昼夜的概念，总之先祝你早上中午晚上好！ 我是你们的好朋友——叽米！
And whether or not your world has a day-night cycle — good morning, good afternoon, and good evening! I'm your good buddy Owlbert!
欢迎，欢迎各位来到演武仪典叩关赛现场。
Welcome! Welcome everyone, to the Wardance's knockout stage brought to you live!
本次比赛的两方分别是，来自罗浮云骑军的——「桂宝应援会」！嗯？这什么名字……
Presenting the two corners of this match, we have from the Luofu's Cloud Knights — Lil Gui's Support Association! Uh? What kind of name is this...
以及来自贝洛伯格代表队的——「铁臂」卢卡！
And representing the city of Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!
这两组选手，究竟谁会赢得最终的胜利呢？让我们拭目以待！
Between these two groups of contenders, who will emerge victorious? We wait with bated breath!
来吧，卢卡先生！我的队员们会让你见识一下云骑阵法的厉害！
Come at us, Mr. Luka! My team will show you the prowess of the Cloud Knights' formation!
我不上，自己打架多疼啊。还是当教练简单，嘿嘿。
Nope, I'm not about to suffer in pain. It's much easier being a coach, hehe.
教练在比赛时要做什么？
What does a coach do during a match?
很简单的，教练只要站在场边，及时向选手进行战术指示就够了。
Simple: You just gotta stand at the byline and give your team tactical instructions.
当然了，最简单的还是当观众。小桂子此时此刻就在观众席上，居高临下地看着我们拼死拼活，她太坏了。
Of course, being a spectator is the easiest. Lil Gui's up there in the stands right now, watching us duke it out from her vantage point. She's such a baddie.
听到了吗，各位？现在在观众席的某处，小桂子正在看着我们。弟兄们，不能让小桂子失望！
Hear that, everyone? Lil Gui is somewhere in the audience watching us. Brothers, we mustn't disappoint our Lil Gui!
嘿！为了小桂子，我们一定要取胜！
Hoo! For Lil Gui, we will emerge victorious!
如果我输了，也有重要的人会失望。看来我们都必须全力以赴了。
If I lose, those people dear to me will be disappointed too. Looks like we have to give it our all.
如果云骑失败，会让小桂子失望。如果云骑获胜，会让贝洛伯格的朋友们失望。总而言之这世上一定会有人失望的！欢迎来到，残酷的输赢世界！

If the Cloud Knights fail, Lil Gui will be disappointed. If the Cloud Knights win, our friends from Belobog will be disappointed. No matter the ending, disappointment inevitably awaits one party. Welcome to the cruel world of competition!
没想到卢卡选手初出茅庐就获得了胜利，但他能在这条道路上走多远呢？让我们，拭目以待！
Who'd have thought a rookie challenger like Luka would win? But how much further will he make it? Let us stay tuned!
{NICKNAME}，我感到很不对劲…我到底是怎么了？
{NICKNAME}, something feels off... What is happening to me?
我的状态…有些奇怪。刚才我看到那些云骑士兵突然变得张牙舞爪，和一群妖怪似的。
I feel... a little strange. I just saw those Cloud Knights grow fangs and claws, like they were demons.
喂，你这人有没有武德？怎么赢了还骂人呢？
Hey, show a little sportsmanship! You've already won, so what's with the insults?
抱歉，我不是那个意思！我感觉自己眼前的一切都像是幻觉……
Sorry, I didn't mean it that way! I just feel like everything I'm seeing is a hallucination...
该不会是压力太大了吧？我小时候每次到考试前夕，也会觉得书上的字变得张牙舞爪，和一群妖怪似的！
Are you too stressed out? When I was younger, every time before the day of exams, it also seemed like my textbooks grew fangs and talons, as if they were demons!
如果是压力太大的话…不如喝一瓶好梦气泡饮吧！这是苏乐达的仙舟版，还有安神助眠的功效～「喝下美梦气泡水，嘴里甜来心里美！」

If you're too stressed out... How about a bottle of Sweet Dreams Soda! This is the Xianzhou version of SoulGlad, and it helps you sleep better too! "Grab some Sweet Dreams Soda, a sweetness that's bound to last!"
What's with the sudden product placement?
我在第六个实习期里确实负责过苏乐达的广告外包…唉，可能留下了些机械记忆吧。
I was in charge of outsourcing SoulGlad's ads during my sixth internship period...  Some of it might have turned into a mechanical reflex.
Can this stuff even pass a urine test?
放心好了，智械和公司机甲都能参赛，仙舟的演武仪典早就是科技局了。
Don't worry. Even Intellitrons and IPC mechs can participate — The Xianzhou's Wardance has essentially become a tech fair.
卢卡将好梦气泡饮一饮而尽，脸色渐渐恢复了红润。
Luka finishes the Sweet Dreams Soda in one gulp, his face gradually becomes a bright red again.
我好多了…很抱歉刚才说了些不得体的话。但我确实觉得几位云骑朋友的水平非同一般。
I feel much better... I'm very sorry if I said anything rude just now. I really think those Cloud Knights are a cut above the rest.
过度谦虚可就有些虚伪了，兄弟？咱们几个就是普普通通的大兵罢了。
Excessive compliments can seem disingenuous if overdone, pal. We're just your typical rank and file.
单论格斗技巧，银鬃铁卫的精锐小队也就无非是这个水平了。
In terms of martial prowess, the average Cloud Knight appears to match even the most elite Silvermane squads.
你夸得我都心虚了…难道说，我们真的很厉害？
Your praise is making me all confused now... Wait, could it be that... we're actually pretty strong?
那几个云骑竟然说自己是普通士兵。这些棘手的敌人，竟然只是罗浮最普通的战士……
Those Cloud Knights said they were just ordinary soldiers... They were tough as heck, and yet they are just the Luofu's most ordinary fighters...
雅利洛-Ⅵ脱离银河太久了，我对大家觉得习以为常的事情反而一无所知。
Jarilo-VI has been isolated from the cosmos for so long that I'm clueless about things everyone else takes for granted.
且不论战力，认知的差距不是短时间内能被抹平的。
Forget strength... even the gap in everyday knowledge isn't something I can get past overnight.
不过就算差距再大，我也必须挥拳、必须战斗、必须胜利！
But no matter how wide that gap is, I must... wield my fists... I must fight, and I must win!
此时此刻，布洛妮娅大人、奥列格师父，还有希儿…留在贝洛伯格的人们正在兢兢业业地维持她的运转。
Right now, Lady Bronya, Master Oleg, and Seele... all the people who stayed in Belobog are working day and night to keep it up and running.
杰帕德先生如此信任我，将代表贝洛伯格出战的机会交给了我。我不能辜负这些人。我要将胜利献给他们！
Mr. Gepard placed his faith in me... entrusted me with the chance to represent Belobog. I cannot disappoint him. Any of them! I must offer nothing less than victory!
所以…{NICKNAME}，我想正式请求你做我的教练！
So... {NICKNAME}, I would like to officially ask you to be my coach!
话题怎么突然拐到我身上了？
Wuh? When did I come into the picture?
我没做过教练，为什么找我？
I've never done this before. Why me?
因为，你很强，还认识很多厉害的人…在刚才那场你冒充我教练的比赛中，你也真的为我提供了很大的帮助。
Because you're strong, and you know plenty of strong people... When you were pretending to be my coach in the last match, you were a great help!
我想抹平自己与这个世界的差距…{NICKNAME}，能请你帮助我吗？
I want to bridge the gap between myself and this world... {NICKNAME}, will you help me?
Don't blame me if you lose.
谢谢你！教练！我一定会全力以赴，认真训练的！
Thank you, Coach! I'll do my best to keep up and train seriously!
呜呜呜…炽烈的友情啊。你们不要这样好不好，我的镜头…进水了，画面…模糊了…呜呜呜……
Such a burning friendship. Don't do this to me, guys. My camera... it's getting wet, and the shot... it's getting blurry... Oh...
卢卡选手，我也会尽全力帮助你们的！你们会成为最传奇的教练和格斗家，而我将会做出足以令我转正的专题报道！
Luka, I'll do everything I can to assist you! You'll both become the most legendary coach and fighter team there is, and I'll create a special feature that will finally bag me that permanent role!
呃…卡美丽小姐，为什么你的梦想如此令人同情……
Oh man... Miss Carmella, why is your dream making me tear up too...
还是别谈我的事啦！我先给你们介绍一下比赛的规则。
Enough about me! I'll brief you on the rules for the next match first.
（打了这么多场叩关赛，分数似乎已经够了。去竞锋舰的积分板上确认一下吧。）
(After fighting in so many knockout stages, I think our points should be enough. Time to head to the Skysplitter's leaderboard to confirm our ranking.)
看起来积分已经足够了。怎么样，{NICKNAME}教练，咱们准备挑战接下来的强敌吧！
Looks like I've got enough points. How about it, Coach {NICKNAME}? Let's get ready to challenge some powerful opponents!
嗯，回休息室准备比赛吧！
All right. Back to the lounge to prep for the match!
好！是时候燃起来了！咱们快回休息室吧！
Okay! Time to get fired up! Let's head back to the lounge!
Let's spend a bit more time recuperating.
That works too. You're the coach after all.
不知不觉已经打了好几场比赛了呢！卢卡选手，有没有稍微习惯一些？
Already a few matches have gone by in the blink of an eye! Have you gotten used to the situation, Luka?
哈哈，习惯是习惯了。但是「幻觉」似乎越来越严重了…我的身体不会真的出了什么毛病吧？
Haha, yes, yes, I have. But the hallucinations are getting stronger... Could there actually be something wrong with me?
Could this be what they call a "culture shock"?
「文化冲击」会造成这么严重的幻觉吗？
Can culture shock really cause such strong hallucinations?
有可能哦！有个博识学会的学者千辛万苦想觐见「智识」，但在亲眼见到博识尊的一瞬间，他疯了。有机生物的大脑是很脆弱的。

It's possible! There was a scholar from the Intelligentsia Guild who wished for an audience with the Erudition no matter the cost, but he went mad the instant he laid eyes on Nous. The minds of organic lifeforms are very fragile.
我可是拳击手啊！不是每天都会撞到头吗？
I'm a boxer! My head gets hit every other day!
那你可要注意哦，很多运动员晚年都会受脑部疾病的困扰。有机生物的大脑是很脆弱的。
You should be more careful then. Many athletes suffer from brain complications in their later years. The minds of organic lifeforms are very fragile.
你越说我越害怕了，还有大好的青春年华等着我燃烧呢，我不能倒下！
You're starting to scare me now... Good thing I've got plenty of youth left to burn! I can't falter now!
接下来这场比赛是关键比赛，而且这位对手…算是老相识。
The next match is gonna be crucial, and my opponent is... I guess you can call her an old acquaintance.
其实没亲眼见过。但贝洛伯格应该没有人不知道她吧？
Never met her in the flesh. But who in Belobog wouldn't know of her?
I guess you can say she's an old friend of his from back home.
停停停，我可高攀不上这种「故知」啊！
Yup. Me and the IPC brass. Super "old friends."
托帕小姐，「石心十人」中最可爱的一位，我很喜欢她。
Miss Topaz is the cutest among the Ten Stonehearts. I like her.
无意冒犯，卡美丽小姐，我不喜欢公司。他们差一点就把我的故乡变成了可以打包贩卖的资产。
No offense, Miss Carmella, but I'm not keen on the IPC. They nearly turned my home into an asset that could be bundled and sold.
卢卡先生，公司是个庞大的群体。给人们贴上标签很简单，但说到底，我们接触的每一个人都是有血有肉的生命。我也是公司产业中的一员，您难道也讨厌我吗？
Mr. Luka, the IPC is a megacorp. It's easy to pin labels on people, but at the end of it, everyone we meet is living flesh and bones with feelings. I'm also an IPC staff member. Do you hate me too?
是我口不择言了。请原谅我的鲁莽，卡美丽小姐。
I spoke out of turn. Please forgive my rudeness, Miss Carmella.
你说的不错…托帕是什么样的人，我应该亲自确认。
You're right ... You're right... I should find out what kind of person Topaz is for myself.
（托帕…公司参赛的代表。其实我谈不上讨厌她。听说就是这位托帕小姐给予了宽限…也许她并不是什么坏人。）
(Topaz... the IPC's participating representative. Honestly, I don't really hate her. I heard she was the one who granted the time extension... Maybe she's not so bad after all.)
（但我对公司里那些有手腕的高层有一种本能的畏惧。不行，不能让恐惧压倒我！）
(But I have a certain instinctive wariness of those bigwigs from the IPC... No, I can't let that fear control me!)
（既然成了对手，我一定要让她见识我们的厉害…不能输给她！）
(If she's my opponent, I will let her witness our strength... I can't lose to her!)
Luka, are you ready to fight?
I'm also ready to record some footage!
接下来对阵的两方，可谓是早有积怨！还未开战，擂台上就已经火药味十足了！
Next in the ring, two competitors with a deep-seated rivalry! The atmosphere is already charged with tension before the first punch has even been thrown! You can feel the fireworks about to explode!
蓝方是来自贝洛伯格代表队的——「铁臂」卢卡！
In the blue corner, representing Team Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!
红方则是星际和平公司的债务清算专家——「催讨黄玉」托帕！
In the red corner, it's the Liquidation Specialist of the Interastral Peace Corporation — Topaz, the Debt Retriever!
没想到雅利洛-Ⅵ的人竟然开始活跃在银河里，能在这场演武仪典中见到你我很高兴。
Who would have thought the people of Jarilo-VI would start making waves in the cosmos? It's a pleasure to see you here at the Wardance.
我也很期待这场比赛，托帕小姐！这是向你展示我们贝城人尊严的好机会。
I'm really looking forward to this match too, Miss Topaz! This is a great opportunity for us to showcase our Belobogian pride to you.
好久不见，{NICKNAME}。我也没想到会在这里见到你。
Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. I wasn't expecting to see you here.
你怎么来参加演武仪典了？
Why did you come to participate in the Wardance?
这可是几个琥珀纪才举办一次的盛事。公司作为仙舟联盟的友邦，当然要出席咯。
This is a momentous event that only happens once every few Amber Eras. The IPC regards the Xianzhou Alliance as a close friend. Of course we have to attend.
听说你成了贝洛伯格代表队的教练，我还真是吃了一惊。
I hear you're Team Belobog's coach, which really surprised me.
星穹列车，你们之前帮贝洛伯格斡旋债务问题，现在又帮他们参加演武仪典…哈哈，孩子年纪不小了，也该学着自己走路了吧。

The Astral Express helped mediate Belobog's debt previously, and now you're assisting them in the Wardance... Haha. When a child is growing up, they need to learn to find their own footing in the world.
贝洛伯格人一直生活在艰难的环境里，我们这些孩子早就学会了走自己的路。
The Belobogians have always lived under difficult conditions. We children already knew our path forward long ago.
哼，豪言壮语。我对贝洛伯格并无恶意。我只是希望确认一下，在躲过了那次债务危机后，贝城人是不是真的有能力自己站起来。
Hmph, a lofty proclamation. I harbor no ill will towards Belobog. I merely wish to see if, after evading that debt crisis, the people of Belobog can truly stand on their own.
如果只靠着大人物发发善心让自己渡过难关，那人就永远都不会成为真正的自由人，而只会成为被赋予了自由权的奴隶。
If we rely too much on the charity of major influences to help us overcome hardships, they will never truly become free, but rather remain a servant under the illusion of freedom.
…贝洛伯格的人，从来不是奴隶！
...The people of Belobog have never been servants!
抱歉，只是说说心里话，火药味有些太重了。上场吧，贝洛伯格的卢卡。
I apologize, just speaking my mind. It appears I've ruffled some feathers. Time to get on the stage, Luka of Belobog.
贝洛伯格代表队用自己的实力，捍卫了自己的尊严！多么激动人心啊！
Team Belobog has proven its superiority and defended its honor! What a roller-coaster of emotions!
真受不了。这雪鸮不是公司的员工吗？怎么这么真情实感？
Ugh, unbelievable. Isn't that snowy owl an IPC employee? Why's he getting so sentimental?
卢卡，你打得不错。是你赢了。
Luka, you fought well. Victory is yours.
你没有尽全力吧，托帕小姐。你就这么轻视我吗？
You pulled your punches, Miss Topaz. Do you think so little of me?
呃，你别误会…对「石心十人」来说，所谓「尽全力」是以命相搏时才会做的事。小小的比试切磋而已，最好不要出人命，连受伤都不要有，不然公司的护具可推销不出去了。

Uhm, you're mistaken... For the Ten Stonehearts, going all out is something we only do in life-and-death situations. This is nothing but a casual spar — best that everyone emerges unscathed without a scratch. We don't want the IPC's protective gear sales to take a hit now, do we?
你胜出了——自信一点，这是堂堂正正的胜利。
You took the win — have more faith in yourself. This was a hard-earned victory.
而且…恕我直言，是你轻视我吧？
And... with all due respect, it was you who underestimated me, right?
怎么会，我哪来的资格看不起公司的大人物啊？
Of course not. I wouldn't dare look down on one of the IPC's legendary employees.
你把所有带着公司头衔的人都看作公司的走狗。你觉得咱们是把灵魂卖给金钱的奴隶。不必否认，我见惯了这种眼神。
You peg everyone with an IPC job title as one of their lapdogs. You think we've sold our souls and become servants to profit. Don't deny that. I know that look all too well.
公司不需要灵魂这种虚无缥缈的货品。它想要的只有利润。
The IPC doesn't need fleeting intangible goods like souls. They only want profit.
我的家乡和贝洛伯格并无不同。我们都是在这个残酷的宇宙中挣扎着，渴望活下去获得幸福的人。而琥珀王的使者们向我展示了机会，正如我代表公司给了你们同样的机会。

My home and Belobog aren't so different. We are all struggling to eke out an existence in this merciless universe, hell-bent on living long enough to touch happiness. And the messengers of the Amber Lord gave me that chance. Just as I, on behalf of the IPC, am giving you that exact same chance.
所以，你明白了吧，你和我的相似之处远比不同来得更多。卢卡，我希望贝城能靠自己的力量复兴。
So, you understand now? We have much, much more in common than you think, Luka. I hope that Belobog can find the strength within to lift itself up.
如今你们走出家园，想让整个银河看到你们，这当然很好。不过，在这片不怀好意的银河里，你们是否做好了应对更大危机的准备呢？无论有没有，我都祝你得偿所愿。

Now you've left your city in hopes of getting the cosmos to notice you, and that's certainly admirable. But, in this cosmos full of selfishness and malice, are you truly prepared to face even greater crises? Whether you are or not, I wish you the best of luck.
加油吧，多赢几场。既然尽兴了，我也该走了。在罗浮上我还有不少生意要磋商呢。
Keep it up and keep winning matches. I've had my fill, so I should be leaving. I have a lot of negotiations to attend back on the Luofu.
我并没有瞧不起您的意思。我明白，努力活下去的人，都很了不起。
It wasn't my intent to look down on you. I believe anyone striving to survive is truly remarkable.
别放在心上。赛前互相人身攻击，不是格斗比赛的传统吗？
Don't take it to heart. Isn't it a tradition to trash-talk each other before a match starts?
我的幻觉越来越严重了，刚才和托帕作战的时候…你们知道我看到谁了吗？
My hallucinations are getting worse. When I was fighting Topaz... Do you know who I saw?
我看到可可利亚大人，站在擂台的对面，对我召唤出刀子似的冰锥……
I saw Madam Cocolia, standing at the other end of the ring, summoning blades of ice aimed at me...
这听起来确实有些严重。
It sounds like your problem is getting serious.
我也觉得。这已经不是「文化冲击」能解释的问题了……
I guess so. I don't think this is just some simple "culture shock" issue...
可能是大守护者来保佑你了。
Maybe the Supreme Guardian is watching over you.
她那是保佑我吗！那冷冷的冰雨在我脸上胡乱地拍，可疼了！
How's that watching over me!? Raining down a hail of ice on my face, that really hurt!
喔！虎克知道！一定是公司的坏蛋故意穿得像大守护者，让你不敢对她动手！
Ooh! I know! It's gotta be some IPC baddie dressed up as the Supreme Guardian so you would hesitate to attack Topaz!
接下来一段时间是休赛期，暂时没有安排。卢卡选手正好趁这个机会好好休息一下吧。
There's a break coming up, so there won't be any fights. Luka, you can use this chance to rest and recuperate.
嗯，是该休息一下了，我毕竟不是铁人。说到铁人…漆黑的虎克大人，你怎么一个人在这里？史瓦罗大佬去哪了？
Mm, I do need a break. I'm not actually an iron man or anything. Speaking of which... Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, what are you doing here on your own? Where'd Svarog go?
史瓦罗说，他要进行一些数据采样。让虎克在这里等他，不许打扰卢卡哥哥比赛！虎克很乖，一直一个人在这儿！
Svarog said he needed to do some data sampling. He asked Hook to wait for him here and not disturb Luka. Hook has been a goodie and waiting here alone!
数据采样？算了，这不是我该操心的问题……
Data sampling? Forget it. It's not something I should be worrying about...
{NICKNAME}，我觉得我的症状不该拖下去了。可是，在仙舟该怎么去看病呢？
{NICKNAME}, I think I need to get my symptoms looked at. But, where can I see a doctor on the Xianzhou?
Let's go to the Alchemy Commission. I know someone there.
拜托了，希望他们的医术和娜塔莎一样高明。
Please, if you don't mind. I hope they are as good as Natasha.
这太卜司又是做什么的地方……
What does the Divination Commission do again...
简单解释一下，就是仙舟上负责信息技术的部门，平时主要负责预测未来。
A simple explanation would be that they are the information technology department on the Xianzhou. They are mainly responsible for predicting the future.
预测…未来？这么高大上的部门！我原本以为她是不擅长社交，看来只是不喜欢社交。
Predicting... the future? I guess they're kind of a big deal! At first I thought she was a little awkward, but I guess she just doesn't like socializing.
咱们接下来该干什么呢…先去看病还是先去太卜司？
What should we do first... See a doctor, or go to the Divination Commission?
看病要紧，先去丹鼎司吧。
It's more important to see a doctor. Let's go to the Alchemy Commission first.
我也这么认为。如果幻觉太严重，还是早点去看病比较好。
I agree. If the hallucinations are getting bad, we should see a doctor sooner rather than later.
别让玲可等太久，去太卜司吧。
We don't want to keep Lynx waiting too long. Let's go to the Divination Commission.
确实，不知道看病要花多久。还是先去太卜司和玲可汇合吧。
Actually, I'm not too sure how long it takes to see a doctor. Let's meet up with Lynx at the Divination Commission first.
I wanna go too! I wanna go too!
史瓦罗先生不是说了吗？漆黑的虎克大人不可以打扰卢卡选手哦！
What did Svarog say? Pitch-Dark Hook the Great isn't allowed to disturb Luka!
可是，这个休息室太无聊了，又小又没劲…在这种小地方，虎克根本没办法大展拳脚嘛！
But, this lounge is so small and boring... I can't show off my moves in a tiny place like this!
那漆黑的虎克大人，我带你去金人巷吃好吃的，怎么样？你吃过咬一口会吱吱叫的鸣藕糕吗？
Then, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, shall I take you to Aurum Alley to eat yummy food? Have you ever eaten a songlotus cake that chirps?
没有哎，那是什么？如果虎克大人能吃到这个魔偶糕，我就，我就册封你为…鼹鼠党美食探索大队长！
I've never eaten it before. What's that! If I can taste this sun-gloters cake. I'll... I'll make you The Moles' Grand Captain of Gourmet Discovery!
感谢您，漆黑的虎克大人！那咱们现在就出发吧。
Thank you, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! Let's set off right now!
卡美丽小姐真是个温柔的人…那么快就能和虎克玩到一块。
Miss Carmella is such a kind person... She could get along with Hook so quickly.
Okay, {NICKNAME}, we should get going too.
看，玲可在那里。我们快点去找她吧。
Look, Lynx is over there. Quick, let's go see her.
真是奇遇，我在一个广场上看别人玩牌，结果认识了一个热心肠的姑娘。她说可以帮我修复我们带来的玉兆。
I had a strange encounter. I was at the plaza, watching people play Celestial Jade when I met a kind-hearted girl. She said she could help us repair the jade abacus we brought.
但是刚才她被其他几个卜者喊走了，到现在还没回来。
But she was just called away by a few diviners and still hasn't returned.
她就把你一个人留下了？
I know who you're talking about...
对啊，这姑娘是不是有点过分？
Yeah, isn't this girl a bit much?
I'll go call her back over.
能拜托你去吗…那边不认识的人太多了。
Could you? There are too many unfamiliar people over there.
Ok then, I'll go call her back over.
Thank you. You're a huge help.
那个姑娘应该就在那边，和其他几个卜者在玩什么「游戏」。
The girl should be just over there, playing some game with other diviners.
这太卜司真的好壮观啊…怎么天上还飘着那么大的机器？不会掉下来吗？
This Divination Commission is so majestic... Why is that device floating in midair? Won't it fall?
她应该就在那边，和其他几个卜者在玩什么「游戏」。
She should be just over there, playing some game with other diviners.
青总，你这水平越来越高了啊！平时不好好上班净琢磨游戏了吧？
President Qing, you're getting better and better! You're probably slacking off at work, playing this game, right?
你一个在太卜司里摆残局的人，也好意思说我？
You're one to talk, setting up endless scenarios in the Divination Commission!
{NICKNAME}？不好意思，玩得有点入迷，没看时间。
{NICKNAME}? I'm sorry, I was too engrossed playing, I didn't notice the time.
哎！这不是{NICKNAME}吗？你在我们圈子里可有名了。
Ah! Isn't this {NICKNAME}? You're super popular in our circle.
我以为我在圈外也很有名。
I thought I was famous even outside your circle.
那不一样。我们「寻圈」肯定比圈外人还欣赏你！
That's not the same. We "Pathfinder" fans definitely admire you more than others outside the circle!
我们「寻圈」每个人都认识你！
就是…「寻径指津」爱好者的圈子。
我们听说你仅靠「寻径指津」就镇服了附身在太卜大人身上的岁阳，这简直是「寻径指津」诞生三百年来从未有过的高光时刻！

We heard that you relied solely on the "Pathfinder" to overcome the heliobus possessing the master diviner! That's definitely the highlight of the "Pathfinder" since its conception three hundred years ago!
那次主要是青雀的功劳。
That was all thanks to Qingque.
但我们青总可说，那次都是你的功劳！
But our President Qing said it was all down to your hard work!
那件事的真相应该没被报道啊！
The truth of that incident probably wasn't reported!
嗐，我们这不少卜者可都是当事人…瞒不住的。
Many of the diviners here were there... you can't hide it from us.
好啦，我和{NICKNAME}还有事要办，先走了。下次再找你玩。
Okay, {NICKNAME} and I have some things to take care of. Play with you next time!
Gosh you scared me. What do you want...
好不容易见到了「寻圈」的传奇人物，可不能就这么放你走了。
It's not every day we meet a "Pathfinder" legend! We can't let you leave that easily.
{NICKNAME}，你得跟我玩一局「寻径指津」！不然我是不会让你带走青总的！
{NICKNAME}, you have to play a round of "Pathfinder" with me, or I won't let you take President Qing away!
嘿嘿，为了和你对局，我可什么事都做得出来。
Heh-heh, I'll do anything it takes just to have a match with you.
那这个青雀我不要了，送你。
I don't want this Qingque then. You can have her.
How many Qingques do you have???
唉，就陪她玩一局吧。我估摸着她不会放过这个在圈子里吹牛的机会。
Just play a round with her — I doubt she'll let go of this chance to boast about it.
陪她玩一局吧，速战速决。毕竟已经让玲可等了我很久了……
Play one round with her, and make it quick. I've made Lynx wait for me too long...
你准备好和我对局了吗？
You ready to have a match with me?
I have to prepare a little.
真不愧是传说中的{NICKNAME}！竟然这么快就解开了我留下的谜题！
They don't call you a legend for nothing, {NICKNAME}! You solved my riddle in a flash!
「寻径指津」啊！一玩起来就发狠了，忘情了，没命了！我们在太卜司里，玩了一局多么壮阔、多么豪放、多么火烈的游戏哇——「寻径指津」！
"Pathfinder" — Once you play, you'll forget about hatred, love, and life itself! In the Divination Commission, we play such a magnificent, bold, and fiery game!
满意了吧？那我们走啦，明天要是没事再来找你玩。
Satisfied now? Then we'll be off. We'll come find you tomorrow if we're free.
稍等，{NICKNAME}。其实近期，我们「寻圈」借着演武仪典的东风，也在办一场大型活动。
Hold on, {NICKNAME}. Recently, our "Pathfinder" circle has also been organizing a major event, taking advantage of the momentum from the Wardance.
不止罗浮，还来了不少其他仙舟的我道中人。
Not just for those on the Luofu, plenty of our like-minded brethren on other Xianzhou ships have also come.
你可能已经在报纸上看到我们的广告了。有兴趣的话，可以参与一下。
You may have seen our ad we put out in the papers. You should join if you're interested.
如果能有你参与，那我们这第一次大型活动可就算是圆满成功了！
If you join up, our first major event will be considered a wild success!
I'll participate if I have time.
没关系，你心中的「寻圈」魂终究会破茧而出！
That's fine too. The Pathfinder soul within you will come round eventually!
哈哈，没想到吧？你在一个莫名其妙的圈子里红得一塌糊涂。
Haha, who would've thought? That you'd be so immensely popular in some weird circle.
我们在报纸上刊登了广告，你之后可以注意一下～
We put out an ad in the newspaper, you should look out for it!
这位朋友就是你说的卢卡吧？久仰久仰，最近总能在新闻上看到你～我叫青雀，是太卜司的卜者。
Is this the friend that you mentioned? Luka? Pleased to finally meet you. I keep seeing you in the news! My name is Qingque, a diviner from the Divination Commission.
玲可小姐都跟我说了。她还说了自己手头有个稀罕的古董，想让我给她看看能不能修好。
Miss Lynx has told me everything. She also said she found some rare antique that she hopes I can fix.
我一看，这不是玉兆嘛…还是好几百年前的旧型号。出于好奇心，我就包揽了复原数据的活儿。
At first glance, I knew it was a jade abacus... and an old model from centuries ago too. Out of curiosity, I accepted the job to restore the data inside it.
You actually accepted a job without resistance?
That's not like you at all, Qingque!
唉…也瞒不过你。太卜大人不是回玉阙老家办事了吗？临走前塞给我一大堆数据、表格、数据、表格、数据、表格…眼睛都快看瞎了！

...Nothing gets past you. You know that the master diviner has returned to the Yuque on business? Before she departed, she left me with a mountain of data, spreadsheets, and even more data and spreadsheets... My eyes were seeing stars!
现在有机会摆在眼前，能修复重要的历史文献…这差事严格来说不算摸鱼，还能看到点新鲜故事，何乐而不为呢？

Now that such an opportunity has fallen into my lap to restore an important historical document... Strictly speaking, taking this job doesn't count as slacking off, and I might even get to unveil a fascinating tale. Why wouldn't I take the job?
其实我已经修复好一部分资料了。但玲可说，一定要让你第一个看，因为这枚玉兆的主人是你的人生偶像。
And I've actually already restored part of the information. But Lynx said that you have to be the first one to look at it, because the owner of this jade abacus is your idol.
她说的没错。谢谢你，玲可。
那就让我们开始播放吧。
气氛好沉重，大家都不说话。
This is sad, nobody's saying anything.
I don't know what to say.
真是个…比预想中要沉重的故事啊……
This story... got much heavier than anticipated...
伊戈尔在反物质军团入侵前离开了母星，此后在银河各处参加拳赛时，他会在获胜后向观众演讲，希望引起人们对反物质军团的警觉并拯救自己的家园。

Igor left his home planet before the Antimatter Legion invaded. When he participated in all the fighting tournaments across the cosmos, he would address the audience with a speech after he won, hoping that would raise awareness about the Antimatter Legion and save his planet.
He... really was an extraordinary person.
可惜银河太大了，一颗星球的呼救声又太小了…抱歉，我刚才不该用那么轻佻的口吻说什么「新鲜故事」。
Alas, the cosmos is infinitely vast, easily drowning out one planet's meek cry for help... Sorry, I shouldn't have spoken so flippantly about a "fascinating tale" earlier.
没事啦，再怎么样这也已经成为历史故事了。
It's all right. This is a chapter in history that's already happened anyway.
不管怎么说，时隔七百年，竟然还能听到伊戈尔本人的声音，我已经很开心了。
Regardless, to be able to hear Igor's actual voice after seven centuries... Makes me more than happy.
这段信息完全没提到仙舟联盟…也不知道他最后是怎么一路打到罗浮的。
This section of information doesn't mention the Xianzhou Alliance at all... I wonder how he fought his way to the Luofu.
总之现在已经修复出来的内容就是这些了。我应该还能抢救出一些信息，不过需要几天时间。
Anyway, this is all the content that's been restored so far. I should be able to salvage some data, but I'll need a couple of days.
也许那些信息能告诉你们，他为什么到了仙舟。如果有了新进展，我们会再通知你们的。
Perhaps the subsequent data will be able to tell us why he arrived on the Xianzhou. We'll contact you if there are any new findings.
我这段时间会先留在太卜司，因为修复玉兆还有些事需要我帮忙。
I'll stay at the Divination Commission for now. There are some other matters I have to handle besides restoring the jade abacus.
我会尽可能修复玉兆里的信息，不过需要一点时间。
I'll try my best to restore the data in the jade abacus, but it'll take some time.
头有些晕…咱们赶快去看病吧。
I feel dizzy... Let's hurry up and see a doctor.
你先回去吧，我想一个人再上街逛逛。
You go back first. I'm going to take a stroll along the streets.
Boohoo, you don't like me anymore!
刚才在丹鼎司就应该给你也开点药。
Looks like the Alchemy Commission should've given you a prescription as well.
那位医生让我在城里走走，多见见世面。
That doctor advised me to walk around the town, and see more of the sights.
如果多像这样独自在街上逛几次，也许还能克服自己对大都会的恐惧…前几天刚到罗浮的时候，实在是把我给吓到了。
If I can walk along the streets alone a few more times, I might be able to conquer my fear of the big city... This place scared the heck out of me when I first got here.
唉…毕竟往后我也要像伊戈尔一样，为了贝洛伯格在银河各处打比赛。
...After all, in the future... I'll have to be like Igor, competing all over the cosmos for Belobog.
可不能每次都被吓到出现幻觉啊！哈哈哈哈！
I can't keep getting spooked and hallucinating all the time! Hahaha!
哇！这就是丹鼎司？这一整块地方都是医院吗？也太大了吧？
Woah! This is the Alchemy Commission? This whole place is a hospital? Can it get any bigger than this?
这不算医院，其实是科研机构。
This isn't really a hospital, but a research institute.
这是个医学研究所一类的地方？直接带我来这里看病，你可真厉害啊！
Wow! Cutting edge medicine. You must really be something to bring me straight here to get treated!
这甚至是地位最低的司部。
And this is just the lowest-ranking department.
这是所有部门里最小的一个？这、这真是难以想象……
This is the smallest of all departments? This... This is just unbelievable...
这几贴膏药应该就可以了。
A few patches should do the trick.
哎！那不是素裳小姐吗？她怎么也在？
Oh! Isn't that Miss Sushang? What's she doing here?
素裳小姐，好巧啊！你也有病啊？
Miss Sushang, what a coincidence! I guess you have a problem too?
What sort of greeting is that!? You're the one with the problem!
抱歉抱歉，我是说…你也来看病啊？
Fine! Sorry, I mean... Are you here to see a doctor too?
不是，我来给那几位云骑弟兄开点跌打损伤药。
No, I came here to help my Cloud Knight coworkers get medication for their bruises and swelling.
...Sorry, I went too hard on them.
公平竞赛，怨不得人。倒不如说要感谢卢卡朋友，他们对你的实力大加赞赏，表示要努力练习。
It was a fair match, so no one's to blame. Actually, we should be grateful to you — they were so impressed by your abilities that they said they want to train harder.
{NICKNAME}，我们又见面了。你身边这位是？
{NICKNAME}, we meet again. Who is this beside you?
The thug who beat up the kind Cloud Knights.
我们那是比武！公平公正，我可绝对没做违反道义的事！
It was a martial contest! Open and fair! I swear I didn't do anything unjust!
你好，我叫卢卡，是{NICKNAME}的朋友。我来自贝洛伯格，是这次演武仪典的参赛选手！
Hello, I'm Luka, a friend of {NICKNAME}'s. I'm from Belobog, and a contestant in the current Wardance!
贝洛伯格…抱歉，恕妾身孤陋寡闻了。不过，欢迎你来到罗浮。卢卡先生想问诊？
Belobog... Apologies, I'm not familiar with the name. Regardless, welcome to the Luofu. Mr. Luka, are you here for a consultation?
卢卡详细阐述了自己来到罗浮后产生幻觉的症状。
Luka details the hallucinations he experienced upon arriving in Luofu.
有趣。…嗯，先做个造影检查吧，确认一下脑部有没有器质性问题。格斗家嘛，总难免会出一些类似的问题。
Interesting... Mm, let's run an imaging test first to confirm that your brain has no organic issues. A fighter's bound to run into such problems.
嗯？怎么还和「气质」有关系？气质不好也算有病吗？
Huh? What's it got to do with anything organic? I thought mechanical parts were fine in the tournament.
是「器质性问题」！意思就是…怎么给你解释呢？其实就是脑子坏掉了。
Not that organic! It means... How do I explain this? It means that the brain is broken.
放心吧，既然你来到了丹鼎司，我会尽力想办法的。
Don't worry. Now that you're at the Alchemy Commission, I'll do my best to find a solution.
Hold still and don't move... Three, two, one...
司鼎大人，您看出什么了吗？我还有救吗？
Cauldron Master, what do you see? Is there any hope for me?
他的脑部有个非常巨大的阴影…难道说……
There's a huge shadow in his brain... Could it be...
我、我还年轻，医生，我还不想死……
I—I'm too young to die, Doc...
没事卢卡，咱们积极治疗。
Don't worry, Luka. Let's stay positive and focus on the treatment.
我一定积极治疗，战胜病魔。
I'll do it, I'll stay positive and defeat the demons of this illness.
啊…那片阴影长得好像我的手啊。
Ah... That shadow looks a lot like my hand.
你看，还在比「耶」呢！都说了这不是合影。
Look, you're still making the "V" sign! I told you it's not a photo!
从造影结果来看，你的脑袋似乎没有任何问题。卢卡先生，你最近吃了什么特别的东西吗？
From the exam results, it looks like there's nothing wrong with your brain. Mr. Luka, have you been eating anything unusual lately?
我想想…刚到仙舟的时候吃了些特产——鸣藕糕、红油乱斩牛杂、鳞渊冰泉、苏打豆汁、辣子鸡丁、蒜苗五花肉……
Let me think... I ate some of the local delights when I got here — Songlotus cake, chili oil beef offal stew, Scalegorge spring water, mung bean soda, spicy diced chicken, garlic-infused pork...
等比赛正式开始之后，我的食谱就很固定了——糙米、玉米、荞麦、水煮鸡胸肉、水煮牛腿肉、水煮鱼肉、水煮虾肉……
After the tournament officially started, my diet has been pretty much the same — brown rice, corn, buckwheat, boiled chicken breast, boiled beef shank, poached fish, boiled prawns...
Uh... Are we feeding livestock here?
卢卡先生，你大胆告诉我，{NICKNAME}是不是在虐待你？我会给你做主的！
Mr. Luka, don't be afraid to tell me: Is {NICKNAME} mistreating you!? I will make sure you get justice!
没有啊！现在是比赛期间，我要控制饮食，可不敢乱吃东西。
Of course not! I have to watch what I eat during a match. I can't be stuffing myself with junk.
虽然食量惊人，倒也没什么会吃坏脑子的东西啊。
Your appetite astounds me, but it seems you didn't eat anything that might affect your brain.
哦对了！和素裳小姐打完比赛之后，我喝了一瓶「好梦气泡饮」！但那之前我已经开始出现幻觉了啊？
Oh right! After the match against Miss Sushang, I drank a bottle of Sweet Dreams Soda! But I think I was already hallucinating before that?
妾身大概明白是怎么回事了。你身在异乡，难免有些神经紧张。这种紊乱不安的精神状态，在你饮下好梦气泡饮后被激化了。
I think I understand what's going on. It's not unusual to be anxious when you're far away from home. When your nerves were thrown into disarray, the Sweet Dreams Soda you drank intensified it.
那种饮料里添加了不少忆质，原本是用于活跃睡梦，让人好梦连连。但不知为什么，却导致了你的不安感放大了，最终引发了严重的幻觉。
That drink has a fair amount of memoria in it, intended to make dreams more vivid and pleasant, but instead it caused your anxiety to be amplified, eventually triggering serious hallucinations.
对不起，刚才的话我一句都没听懂……
Sorry, I didn't understand a word you just said...
听不懂也没关系。这种症状无药可医。
It's all right. There's no cure for such a symptom.
我的意思是，不必吃药。你在罗浮上多逛逛，接受新鲜事物的冲击，还有，不要再喝好梦气泡饮了。用不了多少天，你的症状就会逐渐消失。

What I mean is that you don't require medication. Just stroll around the Luofu more and take in the barrage of new sights and sounds. Just stop drinking Sweet Dreams Soda and your symptoms will disappear in a few days.
多在罗浮上逛逛…不要喝好梦气泡饮…好的医生，医嘱我记下了。
Stroll around the Luofu more... Don't drink Sweet Dreams Soda... Ok, I've got it memorized.
妾身突然想起来，还有个小东西能帮你缓解症状…请稍等片刻。
I'm suddenly reminded of something that might help alleviate your symptoms... Please wait a moment.
能帮我缓解症状的小东西？
Something that can help alleviate my symptoms?
灵砂大人说，这几帖药是起效最快的…不过明天就要继续打比赛了，能行吗？
Lady Lingsha said that these medical patches are very effective... But we're fighting again tomorrow, will it be enough?
I thought you guys were eliminated?
是被淘汰了啊，但是现在又复活了。
We were, but we've been revived.
你们不知道吗？演武仪典有「人气复活」的机制。被淘汰的选手或队伍，只要在网络投票里获得足够的人气，就能参加复活赛重返赛场～

You guys didn't know? The Wardance has a "popularity revival" rule. If eliminated contenders or teams garner enough popularity votes in online polls, they can participate in the repechage and re-enter the ring!
原来素裳小姐的队伍人气那么高？
So Miss Sushang's team is really popular then?
哼哼，主要还是因为我有个好闺蜜！我们家小桂子在网络上振臂一呼，人气投票立刻山盟海誓般地涌来！
Heheh, it's all mainly thanks to my good friend, Lil Gui! All she has to do is tap a finger on the internet, and our popularity votes will blast through the roof like a comet!
真的吗？我文化低，可真的会信哦！
Are you sure? I'm not well-read, so I might really believe you!
反正就是在小桂子的努力下，我素裳又回来啦！
Anyway, it's all thanks to Lil Gui's hard work that I, Sushang, am back in the fight!
哈哈，真不错！有个值得依靠的朋友，真是世界上最幸福的事了。
Haha, not bad at all! A friend that you can rely on is the most blissful thing in the world.
卢卡先生，快来看看，这是我为你准备的「梦貘疗法」。
Mr. Luka, come take a look. This is the tuskpir treatment that I've prepared for you.
我的天啊…这是什么？摸一下！我的天啊…这是什么？摸一下！
Whoa... What is it? Touch it! Touch it!
哦哦…太可爱了，宝宝你是一个草莓大馒头～么么，宝宝，么么～
Ooh... It's too cute! You're just like a strawberry bun! Little sweetie!
Please come back to your senses, Sushang.
面对如此萌物，我理智不了一点！
Never! I can't stay rational in the face of such cuteness!
面对如此萌物，我矜持不了一点！
Never! I can't stay calm in the face of such cuteness!
这是朱明仙舟的梦貘，性温、味甘、不可食用喔。
This is a Tuskpir of the Xianzhou Zhuming: Warm, sweet, not for consumption.
可爱是可爱，但，它能帮我治病？
It's pretty cute, but how can it make me better?
梦貘是靠吞食忆质生存的生物。抱着它入睡可以提高睡眠质量、治疗失眠多梦、缓解焦虑抑郁。
The tuskpir is a creature that subsists on memoria. Hugging it while you fall asleep can raise your sleep quality, treat insomnia, and relieve anxiety and depression.
而且，梦貘还偏爱那些「重口味」的忆质，你越是焦虑，它吃得越开心。对不对呀，小家伙？
And, the tuskpir loves "strong" memoria: The more depressed you are, the more happy it'll be. Isn't that right, little fella?
听起来好神奇啊！那价格？
不必担心。这只梦貘，是妾身私人豢养的小宠物，我可以把它作为医疗道具借给你。只是你要好好爱护它。
Don't worry. This tuskpir is a personal pet of mine. I can lend it to you for this treatment, but you have to take good care of it for me.
真的太感谢了。这一路来受了联盟不少恩惠…我一定会回报各位的。
I can't thank you enough. All throughout my journey, I've received so much help from the Alliance. I will definitely repay everyone.
那个！你们俩！一会儿还有别的事要办吧？扛着这只宝宝一定很不方便吧！对吧对吧？！
Oh! Oh! You two! You guys have something important to attend to later, right? It must be awfully tiring lugging this cutie-pie around, right? Right? Right!?
不要用那种警惕的眼神看着我啦！
Stop staring at me with those wary eyes!
Are you trying to take our tuskpir?
What, can't I touch it just a little?
你们先去忙你们的事情，我正要回竞锋舰给队员们送药…我呢，身为云骑，急人所急，日行一善，这只梦貘，我可以帮你们抱回休息室！我就抱一抱，绝对不会据为己有的！

You all go take care of your stuff. I'm about to head back to the Skysplitter to deliver some meds to the team... As a Cloud Knight, I always help out and do at least one good deed a day. I can take this tuskpir to the lounge for you! I'll just hold it for a bit, I swear I won't steal it!
当然可以啦，素裳小姐。你也可以随时来找它玩～
That's fine by me, Miss Sushang. You can also come play with it anytime you want~
Aw yeah! Thank you, Mr. Luka!
过来吧，宝宝，嘿嘿嘿～你这样的小梦貘，生来就是要被裳裳姐姐吃掉的哟～嘿嘿嘿～
Come here, cutie, hehe~ Adorable little tusky, you're so cute. I could just gobble you right up, hehe~
Mehr? Mehr! Mehr mehr mehr mehr!
素裳将梦貘抱在怀里，露出了甜梦中才有的笑容，离开了你们的视野。
Sushang holds the tuskpir in her arms smiling, and then walks out of sight
她这样子，和希儿第一次见到活的冰原熊时一模一样……
She's acting just like Seele did the first time she saw a real plains bear...
看来梦貘不仅能让人恢复理性，还能让人丧失理性。倒也算是个有趣的研究课题。
Looks like the tuskpir not only regenerates rationality, it also destroys it. Now that'd make for an interesting research topic.
两位没有其他需要的话，妾身就先走一步了。
If there's nothing else I can do for the both of you, I'll be on my way.
感谢您的梦貘，我一定会好好爱护它。
Thank you for the tuskpir. I will treasure it and shower it with love.
我们在丹鼎司耽搁了不少时间，希望没有让玲可和太卜司的人等得太久。
We were delayed at the Alchemy Commission. Hope we didn't keep Lynx and the Master Diviner waiting too long.
你先回去吧，我想一个人再上街逛逛。
You go back first. I'm going to take a stroll along the streets.
Boohoo, you don't like me anymore!
刚才在丹鼎司就应该给你也开点药。
Looks like the Alchemy Commission should've given you a prescription as well.
那位医生让我在城里走走，多见见世面。
That doctor advised me to walk around the town, and see more of the sights.
如果多像这样独自在街上逛几次，也许还能克服自己对大都会的恐惧。毕竟往后我也要像伊戈尔一样，为了贝洛伯格在银河各处打比赛。

If I can walk along the streets alone for a few more times, I might be able to conquer my fears of the big city. After all, I'll have to be like Igor, competing all over the cosmos for Belobog in the future.
可不能每次都被吓到出现幻觉啊，哈哈！
I can't keep getting spooked and hallucinating all the time! Haha!
（卢卡回来了吗？去休息室看看吧。）
(Is Luka back yet? Let's head back to the lounge and take a look.)
（唉…又迷路了。这大城市的每条街都长得一模一样，我想喝杯茶都那么困难……）
(*sigh* ...I'm lost again. The streets in this big city all look the same. I just want to enjoy a cup of tea. Why is it so difficult...)
（卢卡，凡事得往好处想！这不正好能锻炼我问路的能力吗？就问问旁边这个小哥吧。）
(Isn't this a great opportunity to practice asking for directions? Let's ask this guy.)
这位…小哥…呃…不知您多大年纪，我可以叫您「小哥」吗？
Excuse me... little bro... Uh... I'm not sure how old you are. Can I call you "little bro"?
嗯？问我吗？如果你不是长生种，那我猜咱们的年纪差不多大。请问有什么事吗？
Hmm? Are you talking to me? If you're not one of the long-life species, then I guess we're around the same age. Is there something you need?
小哥，我想问一下，去「不夜侯」该怎么走？
I'd like to ask, how can I get to the Sleepless Earl?
从前面走到宣夜大道，再沿着道路右边一直往前走，路上会看到一个说评书的人在演出。那里就是不夜侯了。
Go straight until Starwatcher Avenue, keep to the right, and you'll see a storyteller performing on your way. That's where the Sleepless Earl is.
谢谢小哥！真是不好意思…我这是第一次来到别的文明世界……
Thanks, little bro! Really sorry for the trouble... It's my first time visiting another civilization...
远渡异乡，有些不适应是正常不过的事。有需要帮忙的尽管开口。对了，你从哪儿来呀？
It's normal to feel a little uncomfortable when you're so far from home. If you need any help, just ask. So where are you from?
我来自贝洛伯格。我们最近才和银河重新建立联系，小哥你可能没听说过。
I'm from Belobog. We've only recently re-established connections with the cosmos, so you might not have heard of it.
贝洛伯格！我听人说起过…难怪你这个铁臂看起来如此威风，老师也是来参加演武仪典的吧？
Belobog! I've heard of it from others... No wonder your metal arm looks so awesome. Master, you must be here to compete in the Wardance, right?
老师？可不敢当，我叫卢卡，是专程来参加演武仪典的，希望能成功挑战罗浮仙舟的守擂剑士，扬名立万，好让所有人都知道贝洛伯格的名字！

Master? You flatter me. My name is Luka. I'm here to compete in the Wardance. I hope to make a name for myself by successfully challenging the ringmaster of the Xianzhou Luofu so that everyone will know the name "Belobog"!
你…要挑战罗浮的守擂剑士？你要挑战…彦卿？这么看起来，咱们还挺有缘。
You... want to challenge the ringmaster of the Luofu? You want to challenge... Yanqing? It seems like our stars are aligned.
你…不会也是参加演武仪典的选手吧？你也是来挑战那位叫彦卿的选手吗？
You're... also here to compete in the Wardance? Are you also here to challenge the one named Yanqing?
算是吧，作为武者，总要不断挑战自我嘛。
I guess, as a warrior, I always have to keep challenging myself.
嗯，我同意！战士就是要不断挑战自己，挑战强敌。如果止步不前，被眼前的强敌吓住了，那过去的每一次战斗也就失去了意义。
Yeah, I agree! Warriors have to keep challenging themselves and strong enemies. If you stop moving forward and get scared by the enemy in front of you, all past battles become meaningless.
能代表罗浮仙舟守擂…彦卿想必是个身手了得的战士吧？这么一想，心里还真有些没底啊！
To be able to represent the Xianzhou Luofu... This Yanqing must truly be a legendary fighter. I'm not feeling so sure of myself now that I think about it.
我站上擂台时，心里和你一样，虽说对自己苦练多年的技艺抱有信心，但说到底，我也不知自己面对的对手到底会有怎样的实力，内心也怀着恐惧。

I feel the same as you whenever I stand in the ring. Although I am confident in the skills that I've honed over the years through my hard work, honestly speaking, there's always that nagging uncertainty about how good my opponents might be. It's like fear sneaks in and messes with my confidence.
哈哈，我倒是有一个诀窍，能帮你在赛前克服恐惧——
Haha, I've got a little trick that can help you conquer your pre-match anxiety—
找个空旷无人的地方，把对手的名字大声喊出来，直到发自内心地相信，自己能打赢那个让你恐惧的强敌为止。
Find an empty place and scream the name of your opponent until you truly believe that you can beat the enemy you fear.
哈哈，真是个有趣的法子，好，就这么办！
Haha, what an interesting trick! Okay, I'll give it a go!
我！一定会赢的！最后站在擂台之上的，一定是我！
I, will be victorious! The last one standing in that ring can only be me!
我！卢卡！一定会赢的！我一定会打败彦卿的！
I! Luka! Will definitely win! I will defeat Yanqing!
来，小哥，你也喊两嗓子～咱们给自己鼓鼓劲！
Come on, lemme hear you shout — Let's pump ourselves up!
彦卿绝对不是我的对手！
彦卿绝对不是我的对手！
你说的对，喊了这么几嗓子，我心里自信多了。
Hey, you're right! All that shouting made me feel much more confident.
没骗你吧！虽然我没见过什么世面，但关于战斗，我有不少丰富的经验，希望可以帮到你！
See? I wasn't lying! Although I haven't seen much of the world, I do have a lot of experience fighting. I hope this helps!
谢谢你，卢卡。时候不早了，我该去为擂赛做准备了。
Thank you, Luka. It's late. I have to go prepare for my match.
兄弟，你还没告诉我你的名字呢？
My friend, you haven't told me your name.
…你就叫我冷锋吧。在仙舟语中意为「寒冷的剑」。有缘再见了，卢卡。
...You can call me Lengfeng. In the Xianzhou language it means an icy blade. May fate bring us together again, Luka.
…冷锋，真是个有着冷酷名字的好人啊。
...Lengfeng, now that's a really cool name, for such a cool person!
数周前，贝洛伯格，磐岩镇。
Several weeks ago, Boulder Town, Belobog
娜塔莎大姐头…我，还剩下多长时间？
Nat... I... How long do I have left?
不多了，做好心理准备，卢卡。
Not long, Luka. Best brace yourself.
那，我还有什么能做的吗？
Is... Is there anything else I can do?
都到这个份上了…想吃点什么就吃点什么吧。
You're already at this stage... Just eat whatever you like.
那怎么行！在这种紧要关头乱吃东西，体脂率不就完蛋了吗！
That won't do! I can't be gorging on garbage at this pivotal moment. It'll ruin my energy levels!
我明白，你现在迫不及待想去参加贝城代表预选赛的决赛。不过，杰帕德可不好对付。
I know. You can't wait to join the finals of the Belobog Representative Qualifiers. But Gepard isn't a pushover either.
我可是仔细研究过杰帕德先生的招式的！
I've been hard at work studying how Mr. Gepard moves!
大姐头，你就等着瞧吧，我一定会战胜杰帕德先生，成为咱们贝洛伯格七百年来第一个有资格去星空中打比赛的格斗家！
Just wait and see. I'll defeat Mr. Gepard and be the first Belobog fighter in seven hundred years to qualify for a competition in space!
Two weeks later at the arena
接下来，在大守护者与贝洛伯格民众的见证下，我们将迎来一场历史性的对决。银鬃铁卫戍卫官杰帕德•朗道将应战「熔锤的勇士」铁臂卢卡。

Next up, with the Supreme Guardian and Belobog's people as witnesses, let us now unveil the curtains to a historical final: Silvermane Captain Gepard Landau will face off against the "The Moltammerville Warrior" — Luka "Strongarm"!
Both contenders, step onto the stage please!
卢卡，你一直有个坏习惯，喜欢硬吃人一招然后找破绽。但杰帕德力量比你大太多了，记住喽，不要硬扛他的拳头。
Luka, you've always had this bad habit of taking a hit to exploit a weakness, but Gepard's much stronger than you, so remember, stay away from his punches.
师父，你都说一路了，我耳朵都听出茧子了。
Master, you've been telling me that the entire trip. My ears are about to fall off...
行了，我不唠叨了…你也别把胜负看得太重了。你能打进决赛和杰帕德对一局，就算去不成那个「咸粥萝卜」也够光荣了！

Fine, enough prattle... But don't let the need to win weigh too heavily on you either. Even if you don't make it to that Sianjo Lowfoo, you've made it to the final to fight against Gepard, that's enough to make anyone proud!
那可不行！卢卡哥哥答应虎克了，要赢得决赛，把虎克也带上，去外面的世界看看！
That won't do! Luka promised Hook that he has to win the final and take Hook up there to see the stars beyond!
Ya sure got some daydreams on ya, little one.
放心吧，奥列格师父、漆黑的虎克大人，我一定会赢的。
Don't worry. Master Oleg and Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, I'll win this for sure.
卢卡哥哥，绝对不可以输哦！你说好要带虎克去「咸粥萝卜」上面玩的！
Luka, you absolutely cannot lose! You promised to take me up to visit the Sianjo Lowfoo!
你小子，不要随便承诺小孩子啊…没事，输了就让他去当铺把铁臂当掉，自掏腰包带你去。
Kid, you've really gotta stop making promises to children... Never mind. He'll just pawn his iron arm if he loses, and take you up there out of his own pocket.
杰帕德先生，我一直都很期待与你交手。整个上层区，应该没有人比你更值得我挑战了。
Mr. Gepard, I've always been hoping to fight you. There's no one in the Overworld more worth challenging than you.
很荣幸。我也一直很想看看，传说中的「铁臂卢卡」到底有多厉害。
I'm honored. I've also been raring to witness the strength of the legendary Luka "Strongarm."
我不是很擅长聊天，不过好在咱们都是战士，不必用语言交心。
I'm not great at conversation, so it's a good thing we're both warriors — we don't have to use words to understand each other.
说的没错。卢卡，就把你渴望胜利的决心，用拳头告诉我吧！
Well said, Luka. Let your determined desire for victory speak through your fists!
我输了…杰帕德先生，是您技高一筹。
I've lost... Mr. Gepard, you were better than me.
卢卡，无论技术还是力量你都无可挑剔。但你，太在意胜负了。这反而让你没办法发挥全力。
Luka, there wasn't ever any doubt in your technique and strength. But you were too concerned with winning, and that prevented you from unleashing your utmost.
可是如果不关心胜负，我站在这里做什么？
...Uh, then what am I doing here, if not to attain victory?
这就是你要自己想明白的问题了。
That's a question you need to ask yourself.
从我个人的经验来讲…人内心的声音特别嘈杂，在安全舒适的地方尤其如此。有些你心中极为重要的声音，反而只有在那些痛苦、不安、危险的时候才能被你听清楚。

From my experience... a person's inner voices make far too much noise, especially so during safe and quiet moments. Ironically, the voices that truly matter often become audible only in moments of pain, discomfort, and peril.
所以也许等你离开熟悉的家乡，去往陌生的「罗浮」以后，就会明白答案了。
When perhaps you leave your cozy hometown and head to the unfamiliar Luofu, you will find your answer.
等等，我到「罗浮」以后？赢了的人是你啊？
Hold on. When I reach the Luofu? But you won?
和你说实话吧，我不可能抛下手头的工作离开贝洛伯格。
Truth be told, I can't just drop my work and leave Belobog.
我这次来，是为了确认你在这场比武盛会中是否有实力去面对来自不同世界的选手。而现在，我认可你的实力。
My reason for coming to this martial tournament was to verify if you were good enough to contend against competitors from other worlds. And now I see you're good enough.
你比我年轻，比我阳光，也比我更能代表贝洛伯格的形象——别忘了，我们参加演武仪典，也是为了向银河各方宣传雅利洛-Ⅵ。

You're younger and more upbeat than I am, a far more appropriate image for Belobog. Don't forget that the reason we're participating in the Wardance is also to promote Jarilo-VI to the rest of the cosmos.
卢卡，我将前往仙舟「罗浮」参加演武仪典的机会交给你。
Luka, I'm entrusting the chance of attending the Wardance on the Xianzhou Luofu to you.
杰帕德先生，请不要施舍我。机会要靠自己用实力堂堂正正地赢来！
Mr. Gepard, please don't pity me. Chances must be earned fairly through our own strength!
你误会了，卢卡，这不是「施舍」。这场胜利是我借给你的，你要用演武仪典上的胜利来还给我。
You are mistaken, Luka. It's not pity. I am lending you this victory, and you will repay me by winning the Wardance.
我宣布，有资格代表贝洛伯格，前往「仙舟联盟•罗浮」参加演武仪典的选手是——卢卡！
I hereby announce that the contender who has earned the right to represent Belobog in the Wardance is — Luka!
别难受了，走吧，我们该去克里珀堡和大守护者见面了。
Chin up. Let's go. We should head to Qlipoth Fort and meet with the Supreme Guardian.
布洛妮娅大人…您好？不好意思，我是在下层区长大的，不懂什么礼仪……
Lady Bronya... Hi? Sorry, I grew up in the Underworld, so I'm not versed in etiquette of any sort...
不必拘礼。我想，对于你要去的「罗浮」，你一定还一无所知吧？趁这个机会，我们可以聊聊。
No need for formalities. You probably know nothing about the Luofu, the place you're heading to, correct? Let us take this opportunity to discuss it.
我一直有些好奇…虽然雅利洛-Ⅵ恢复了和外界的联系，但咱们一直都是和公司打交道，为什么突然要去参加这个叫「罗浮」的地方的格斗大赛？

I've always been a little curious... Though Jarilo-VI has restored contact with the outside worlds, we've always just been communicating with the IPC. Why are we suddenly participating in this fighters' tournament in this Luofu place?
前不久，贝洛伯格的星际通讯基站恢复了运作。在一个月前，我们收到了一封讯号失真有些严重的「邀请函」——
Not long ago, Belobog's interstellar comms base resumed operations. A month ago, we received an invitation with a highly distorted signal...
「仙舟『罗浮』诚邀雅利洛-Ⅵ的战士们莅临，参加演武仪典。」
"The Xianzhou Luofu cordially invites Jarilo-VI's warriors to join the Wardance."
我们才刚恢复对外联系，按公司的说法，银河早就忘了咱们。为什么仙舟在第一时间向咱们这样默默无闻的地方发来信函？
We've just resumed outside contact, and the way the IPC describes it, the cosmos has long forgotten us. Why would the Xianzhou so eagerly send an invitation to a city that has been buried in time?
我猜，是因为在寒潮降临前，我们与很多世界有过联系。卢卡，你听说过「伊戈尔•哈夫特」的故事吗？
My guess is that it's because we had communications with many worlds before the Eternal Freeze. Luka, have you heard of the story of Igor Haft?
你是说那位传奇战士？我当然知道！他率领第八铁军与{RUBY_B#反物质军团}天外的入侵者们{RUBY_E#}奋勇战斗的故事我从来听不厌！

You mean the legendary warrior? 'Course I have! I'll never tire of the story where he led the Eighth Iron Legion and engaged in a furious battle against {RUBY_B#Antimatter Legion}the invaders from beyond the sky{RUBY_E#}!
就是他。趁着寒潮消退，玲宝…咳咳，玲可一直在探索古代城市「马斯列尼察」的遗址。几个月前，她在那儿找到了一座独立于公共墓园之外的坟墓。

That's him. When the Eternal Freeze subsided, Lynxy... Ahem, Lynx took the opportunity to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Maslenitsa. A few months ago, she found a lone grave outside the public graveyard.
坟墓中没有遗体，只有一条机械臂和一块破损的宝石挂坠。公司的人说，那条机械臂是旧世界时代的科技了，至于宝石，则是一种被称为玉兆的仙舟器物。

The grave had no body, just a robot arm and a cracked pendant with an embedded gemstone. An IPC worker said that the arm was tech from the Old World. As for the stone, it's a Xianzhou implement called a jade abacus.
我听说了！玲可小姐认为那是伊戈尔的衣冠冢！
I've heard about that! Miss Lynx thinks it's Igor's grave!
没错。墓志铭的生平里明确了，拳击手伊戈尔•哈夫特曾在军团入侵前离开过雅利洛-Ⅵ，但后来他回到了家园，参加抵抗军团入侵的战争。

That's right. The epitaph on the tombstone confirms that hypothesis — the fighter Igor Haft once left Jarilo-VI before the invasion, and then he returned home to join the resistance against the aggressors.
没有人知道他离开雅利洛-Ⅵ之后去做了什么，又为什么会选择回来。
No one knows what he did after he left Jarilo-VI, and why he decided to come back.
…也许伊戈尔抵达过仙舟？所以他们才给咱发了邀请函？
...Maybe Igor had been to the Xianzhou? That's why they sent us an invitation?
伊戈尔甚至有可能参加过演武仪典。仙舟人的寿命很长，那对他们而言并不算太久以前的事。
Maybe Igor even attended the Wardance. The Xianzhou people have long lives, so it wouldn't be something that happened long ago for them.
长话短说。无论仙舟联盟为何邀请我们，参加这次「演武仪典」，都对贝洛伯格意义重大。
Long story short, regardless of why the Xianzhou Alliance invited us, joining this Wardance is of august meaning to Belobog.
它蕴含着一个机会，让整个银河再一次认识我们——一个从军团与寒潮中坚强幸存的英雄国度。
It symbolizes a chance to introduce ourselves to the cosmos once again — a heroic kingdom that survived both the Legion and the Eternal Freeze with tenacity.
另外，如果能借此机会与仙舟联盟建立简单的往来，也可以让我们在面对公司时多一些筹码。
Also, if we can leverage this opportunity to establish an amicable exchange with the Xianzhou Alliance, it may provide us with more bargaining power when dealing with the IPC.
布洛妮娅大人，我没怎么上过学，不太懂这些伟大的事情……
Lady Bronya, I'm not well-educated, so I don't really know such matters of grandiosity...
我只明白，我要为贝洛伯格赢得荣誉！
All I know is that I must achieve glory for Belobog!
说得好！差点忘了！希儿今天有事，没办法参加这次会面，但她托我给你留了个言，咳咳——
Well said! Oh, I almost forgot! Seele had other matters today, and couldn't attend today's meeting. But she entrusted me to deliver a message, ahem...
「杰帕德那家伙在搞什么鬼？卢卡你给我好好打，要是输了，我就狠狠揍你！」
"What's that dolt Gepard up to now? Luka, you'd better fight like your life is on the line! If you lose, I'll make sure you wish you were really dead!"
第二天，我搭乘着星际和平公司的运输舰来到了罗浮仙舟。
The next day, I hitched a ride with an IPC transport vessel and arrived on the Xianzhou Luofu.
大守护者希望年轻一代能见见世面，于是安排玲可与虎克跟我一起旅行。考虑到咱们仨都不知怎么和银河文明打交道，她甚至指示史瓦罗大佬作为我们的知识向导跟来了。

The Supreme Guardian hopes that the younger generation can go out and see other worlds, so she arranged for Lynx and Hook to accompany me. On account of the fact that the three of us know next to nothing about interacting with other cosmic civilizations, she even instructed Svarog to tag along and be our guide.
没想到，在天舶司办理入境手续的时候，我们又遇到了意料之外的情况……
I never thought that, while we were processing our entry papers at the Sky-Faring Commission, we would run into another surprise...
我们仔细核对过了。这封通讯邀请函它确实来自罗浮，但比对了一下它的印戳……
We've double-checked. This invitation did indeed come from the Luofu, but after checking the stamp...
…这已经是四百多年前的邀请函了。
...This invitation was dated four hundred years ago.
四百年前？！这怎么可能？这封邀请函，分明是我们不久前刚收到的啊……
Four hundred years ago!? How is that possible? We just received this invite not too long ago...
暂时假定结果为——这封邀请函在传输过程中被积压延迟，近期恢复通讯后才成功送达我们手中。
We can assume that this invite was delayed in transmission and only reached us after the restoration of communications.
恐怕这位金人先生是对的，你们收到了一封迟到四百年的邀请函。
I'm afraid this aurumaton is right. You received an invitation that is four hundred years late.
原来我们没被邀请啊？完了，这下白跑一趟了。该怎么和布洛妮娅大人和杰帕德先生解释呢？他们可是对我寄予厚望……
So... We weren't invited? Oh no, this trip has all been for nothing then. How am I going to explain this to Lady Bronya and Mr. Gepard? They have high hopes for me...
根据计算，我们首先应当考虑的问题并非情绪，而是——
According to calculations, the thing that we should be considering first is not emotions, but...
如果我们并非受邀贵宾，那么则需要自行负担滞留当地产生的一切费用。计算结果——我们负担不起。
If we are not invited guests, then we will be responsible for all costs incurred while staying here. Conclusion: We cannot afford it.
几位误会了！罗浮仙舟的确正在进行名为「演武仪典」的比武庆典。
You all misunderstand! The Xianzhou Luofu is indeed hosting a martial arts competition called the Wardance.
无论是否收到邀请函，只要想报名参赛，都能参加演武仪典的比试。唯一的区别是，受邀贵宾在通过测试后能参与最隆重的「竞锋守擂」，挑战罗浮仙舟的守擂剑士。

Whether you receive an invitation or not, anyone who wants to can register to compete in the Wardance. The sole distinction is that invited guests, upon qualifying through a test, get to partake in the prestigious "Ringmaster's Challenge," facing off against the Xianzhou Luofu's ringmaster.
而普通参赛者，则需要参加叩关赛，不断过关斩将，才能抵达「竞锋守擂」的擂台。
As for ordinary contestants, they will have to participate in knockout stages and rise through the ranks to reach the ultimate stage of the "Ringmaster's Challenge."
罗浮的守擂剑士，也就是参赛选手要挑战的终极目标？
To challenge the Luofu's ringmaster, that's the ultimate goal for all the contestants?
没错。虽然您没有邀请函，但同样可以参加演武仪典，也有机会赢得胜利和荣誉。
That's right. Although you didn't receive an invitation, you can still participate in the Wardance. You'll definitely have a chance to win and gain honor.
但是，史瓦罗先生说得有道理——根据计算，我们没钱。
But, Mr. Svarog has a point — according to calculations, we can't afford this.
哈哈，有钱难买真交情！几位手上这封「迟到四百年的邀请函」想必是一桩奇妙的因缘。各位有缘来到罗浮，我们可不能失了礼数。

Haha, money can't buy relationships! This invitation that's been delayed for four hundred years must be a marvelous twist of fate. And since fate has brought you all here to the Luofu, we will not fail in our hospitality.
我会上报，以受邀贵宾的标准，为贝洛伯格的代表队安排食宿，请放心。
Please be assured that I will report this incident and ensure that the Belobog representative team receives the same accommodation and treatment as all other esteemed invited guests!
不过，卢卡先生还是要从叩关赛开始，一步步冲击最后的擂台。
However, Mr. Luka, you will still have to participate in all the knockout stages and work your way up to the final stage.
「演武仪典」是为了彰显武德，以武会友。朋友来了，岂有让他们发愁食宿的道理。
The heart of the Wardance is all about celebrating martial arts and fostering friendships. My friends, how could we possibly allow you to fret over food and lodging?
谢谢你，夕葵小姐！我会珍惜这个机会的！
Thank you, Miss Xikui! I'll treasure this opportunity!
就这样，在夕葵小姐的善意之下，我总算没有出师未捷身先死——这句仙舟古话是这几天刚学会的——成功登记成为了演武仪典的参赛选手。

And just like that, by the grace of Miss Xikui, I didn't "die before achieving success" — I just learned this old Xianzhou saying a few days ago. I've successfully become a competing fighter in the Wardance!
卢卡选手，接下来这场比赛的对手，波提欧…你可一定要小心。这是个极度狂躁的危险分子！
Luka, your next opponent is Boothill... You have to be careful. He's a dangerous maniac!
确实，光看照片就觉得是个不好惹的角色……
Indeed, by the looks of his photo he really looks like a formidable character...
他只是和公司有私仇罢了。
He's just got a grudge against the IPC, that's all.
在对公司心怀仇恨的人里，他也算是格外危险的那一类。
Among those who harbor plenty of hatred against IPC, he's probably one of the more dangerous ones.
我听说他是个「巡海游侠」？这是什么组织啊？
I heard he's a Galaxy Ranger? What type of organization is that?
巡海游侠是一群各自为战的「巡猎」信徒，里面什么人都有。有相对比较好说话的，也有波提欧这种血债累累的通缉犯。
The Galaxy Rangers are a diverse group of individualistic warriors that are disciples of The Hunt. Some are pretty easy-going, but there's also bloodthirsty wanted criminals like Boothill.
「巡猎」信徒？那不是和仙舟人一样吗？就算他再怎么危险，也不会在信众兄弟的地盘上做坏事吧？
Disciples of The Hunt? So isn't he the same as Xianzhou folks? No matter how dangerous he is, he won't be causing trouble in the land of his fellow disciples, right?
在匹诺康尼接触过，人还不错。
I met him on Penacony. He's a pretty decent guy.
「还不错」的人会上公司的通缉名单吗？我可不信。
Would a "decent guy" be on the IPC's wanted list? I don't think so.
公司和贝洛伯格都信「存护」…
Both the IPC and Belobogians believe in the Preservation...
对啊…不对！公司也没对贝洛伯格做什么坏事啊！
Yeah... Wait, no! The IPC didn't do anything bad to Belobog!
总之你要当心，卢卡选手。公司的通缉要犯，可真不是闹着玩的。
You just have to be cautious, Luka. A wanted criminal on the IPC's list is really no joke.
哈哈，怕什么！我跟着师父维护下层区治安的时候，遇到的凶恶罪犯也不少啊！「磐岩镇黑鳏夫」还是我亲手抓获的呢！

Haha, what's there to be afraid of! When I was defending the Underworld with my master, I also met many hardened criminals! I even personally apprehended the Dark Widower of Boulder Town with my own two hands!
（波提欧…公司通缉重犯…当着卡美丽小姐的面我有点不好意思说，但…感觉「公司通缉重犯」还真不一定是坏人。）
(Boothill... a fugitive wanted by the IPC... I'd hate to say it in front of Miss Carmella, but... I have a feeling this "wanted criminal" might not actually be such a bad guy.)
（毕竟仙舟联盟也没通缉他，还允许他参加演武仪典呢。）
(After all, the Xianzhou Alliance didn't arrest him, and they even allowed him to participate in the Wardance.)
（当然了，是坏人我也不怕。我这铁拳就是为了痛揍坏人才造出来的！）
(Of course, I'm not afraid of criminals. My Iron Fist is made to punish bad guys!)
卢卡，准备好对付波提欧了吗？
Luka, are you ready to go up against Boothill?
该去会会公司通缉重犯了！
It's time to go see what the IPC's wanted criminal is made of!
该去会会这位公司通缉重犯了！
It's time to go see what this criminal the IPC wants so bad is made of!
万众瞩目的卢卡选手，又要面临一场恶战了！
All eyes are on Luka as he prepares for yet another fierce battle!
蓝方选手是万众瞩目的贝洛伯格拳王——「铁臂」卢卡！
In the blue corner, the highly anticipated boxing champion from Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!
而红方选手竟然是，星际和平公司记录在案的通缉重犯——「巡海游侠」波提欧！
Fighting out of the red corner, it's none other than the notorious felon wanted by the IPC, the Galaxy Ranger — Boothill!
加油啊卢卡选手！打败波提欧然后交给我，赏金咱俩对半分！
Go for it Luka! Defeat Boothill and hand him over to me. We'll split the bounty in half!
你个小可爱！我早晚给你炖了！
You lil' fudgehead! I'll have you stewin' in a pot sooner or later!
{NICKNAME}，宝了个贝的！竟然在这里见到你了！你也是来参赛的？
Butter my fudge and call me a biscuit! Can't believe I'm seeing you here, {NICKNAME}! You competin' too?
噢～我说参赛者名单上怎么没你呢。我还以为你他宝贝的在这儿埋伏我呢！
Oh! No wonder I didn't see your name on the list. I thought you were gonna fudgin' ambush me here!
我不参赛，怕失手打死你。
I'm not fighting. I might accidentally kill you.
哈哈哈哈，喵你宝贝！我看你是怕我一枪爱死你！
Hahahaha, you lil' cutie fudgepie! I think you're actually afraid that I might dog your cats in one shot!
不算很熟，也就是过命的交情罢了。但我可不会对你手下留情。
We ain't exactly best buddies — our lives were just raveled in the tangles of destiny. But that don't mean I'll be showin' any mercy.
我也不会对你手下留情的。
小子，我认真劝你一句，退赛吧。你不是我的对手。
Lemme give you some real advice kid — drop out now. You ain't in my league.
比赛还没开始呢，你怎么就知道我打不过你？我的铁拳未必比你的子弹慢哦。
The match hasn't started. How do you know I can't defeat you? My fist might not be slower than your bullet.
因为咱俩他呜呜伯的不是一路人啊！你为胜利而来，我为仇恨而来。你为荣誉而来，但荣誉对我一文不值。
Diggity Wubbaboo, cause we ain't on the same path, pardner! You're here to win, I'm here for payback. You want honor, but honor ain't worth squat to me.
我想让全银河的新闻都登着——公司的通缉犯成为了演武仪典上最耀眼的明星，他大爱特爱，把来仙舟谈生意的公司狗们喵得灰头土脸——

I wanna see every news outlet in the cosmos buzzin' with the headline "The IPC's most wanted man stole the spotlight at the Wardance. He came out with the fudge blazin' and sure made them IPC shirtbags choke on the humble pie."
波提欧先生，我不知道你与公司之间有什么恩怨…但我觉得我们没什么不同，不都是想要全银河的瞩目嘛！
Mr. Boothill, I don't know what kind of grudge you hold against the IPC... But I don't think we're too different. We both want the whole cosmos' eyes on us!
行行行，老子不跟你抬杠。既然你这么想要我的子弹，那我也不好推辞，是吧？呵，来这里之前，我在鉴爻轩向帝弓司命求了六个吉签。

Alright, alright, I ain't gonna argue with ya. If you want my bullets that bad, who am I to refuse, right? Well, before I came here, I drew six lucky Weals at The Looking Bronze in front of the Reignbow Arbiter.
这样吧…如果接下来我的六发子弹都卡壳，就算你赢。但若是子弹没卡壳…啧啧，这擂台的地板可就不好收拾咯～
Tell you what... if my next six shots jam, you win. But if they don't... well, this ring's floor is gonna be a real mess, ain't it?
呃，波提欧先生，我们只是切磋而已，点到为止就好，倒也不必以命相搏……
Uh, Mr. Boothill, we're just sparring, that's all. Let's not risk our lives.
他呜呜伯的，有人跟你闹着玩，我可不跟你闹着玩！我偏要跟你以命相搏，你没这个胆子，上这儿来干嘛？
Dadgum Wubbaboo! Others might play games with you, but I ain't playing! I'm putting my life on the line here, but if you don't even have the guts to do the same, then what are you here for?
来，看着我的枪口。走过来，揍我一拳。你敢吗？
Come on, look down the barrel of my gun. Walk over here and take a swing at me. You got the guts?

哈哈哈哈！不行，卢卡哥哥！那是打败坏人时的台词！

真希望有一天，我也能变得和卢卡哥哥一样强大……

Her name's Margie, a fan of mine. She always came to watch all my matches. We got to know each other later, and started chatting. But in the end, I still didn't really understand her situation.
很久以后我才知道，那时的她已经生了重病，在和病痛搏斗。下层区实在太穷了，医生就算尽了最大努力，也还是治不好她……

有些人死于怪物，有些人死于匪徒…我见过很多很多死亡。那时候我觉得，是我们太弱了。只要我变得强一点，再强一点，只要强一点，我们就能战胜对手，继续活下去。

Some died to monsters, others to bandits... I've seen so much death. Back then, I thought we were just too weak. If I could get just a little stronger, even just a little, we could vanquish our foes, and keep on living.
后来我的确变强了，成了打遍下层区的拳王。那时我觉得，只要挥动拳头，没有谁是我的对手。我可以成为下层区所有孩子们的榜样！

I did get stronger later on, and became the boxing champion who trounced the entire Underworld. At that time, I believed that as long as I swung my fists, no one could defeat me. I could be a role model for all the kids in the Underworld.

I could tell them that no matter how scary the opponent was, as long as we kept on fighting, we would win out. We would definitely win!

But, when I wanted to tell Margie the news about my victory, her father told me she was gone.
玛吉…拖着这么小小的身子，一直在和病魔战斗。她一直在战斗，她必须赢下这一场啊！
Margie... She was battling the demons of her sickness with that frail, tiny body of hers. She was always battling — she must win the next round!
到头来，我终于明白了，人生到处都是打不赢的仗，有些战斗即使不得不赢，也还是会输。
In the end, I finally understood that there are always unwinnable battles in life. Some fights, no matter how much you need to win, you still lose.
就像面对波提欧先生的时候那样。我骗了那些孩子…我也骗了我自己。我无法面对他们。

Ugh... He is avoiding the problem. Let's catch up and see how it goes.
他呜呜伯的，有人跟你闹着玩，我可不跟你闹着玩！我偏要跟你以命相搏，你没这个胆子，上这儿来干嘛？
Dadgum Wubbaboo! Others might play games with you, but I ain't playing! I'm putting my life on the line here, but if you don't even have the guts to do the same, then what are you here for?
来，看着我的枪口。走过来，揍我一拳。你敢吗？
Come on, look down the barrel of my gun. Walk over here and take a swing at me. You got the guts?
卢卡！走过来！揍我一拳！你敢吗！
Luka! C'mon! Get over here and take a swing at me! You got the guts?
…来吧，波提欧先生。我会打败你的。
...Bring it on, Boothill. I'll make you eat your own words!
哈哈哈哈哈！他呜呜伯的，有点胆色！枪弹无眼，你别怪我心狠啊！
Hahahaha! Screwubbaboo, you've got some guts! Bullets don't have eyes, so don't blame me for bein' ruthless!
老子觉得你败得很体面。不是人人都有胆识，面对黑洞洞的枪口，还冲上去给他一拳的。
I thought your defeat was graceful. Not everyone has the guts to charge at a loaded gun and land a punch.
我转身离去？我认输？这与我冲上去拼一把有什么本质区别吗？因为无论怎么选，当时我的命都不在我自己手里。
Turn around and leave? Accept defeat? How is that any different than taking a desperate stand? No matter what I chose, my life wasn't in my own hands.
你明白吗？只要他想干掉我，我一丁点反抗的余地都没有。归根结底，是波提欧先生饶了我一命。
Don't you get it? If he wanted me dead, I wouldn't have had the chance to even muster an ounce of resistance. In short, it was Mr. Boothill who spared my life.
我讨厌这种感觉…我觉得自己无能为力，被人家拿捏在手心里，无论怎么反抗都像笑话似的。
I hate this feeling... It makes me feel powerless, like my life is within the palm of their hand, and all my efforts to fight back seem like a joke.
玛吉那孩子，在面对病魔的时候，一定也是这种感觉吧？
That girl Margie, when she confronted the demons of her sickness, she must've felt this way too, no?
白痴，这世上有什么东西是不被宇宙「拿捏在手心里」的吗？连咱们岁阳的老祖宗都被困在了炉子里，连星神也必须走在命途上。自由？自由很重要吗？

You idiot, is there anything in this world that isn't "in the palm of the universe?" Even our heliobi ancestors were trapped in the furnace. Even the Aeons must walk their Path. Freedom? Is freedom really that important?
你不明白，尾巴大爷，我只是不想输。
You don't get it, Mr. Tail. I just don't want to lose.
怎么又跑了？算了，也快进入他内心深处了…那里应该就藏着让他失去信心的梦魇。
Why'd he run off again? Forget it. We're almost in the depths of his inner world... The nightmare causing his loss of faith should be hiding there.
快跑、快跑！快跑啊蠢货！你赢不了的！你会死的！
Run, run! Run, you fool! You can't win! You'll die!
快跑啊！快跑！逃命吧，你赢不了的！
Run away, quickly! Flee! You can't win!
回贝洛伯格吧，你的水平差得太多了！你会死的！
Run back to Belobog. The skill gap is too much! You'll die!
你还想荣归故里，扬名立万？做梦吧！你根本就赢不了！快跑！你难道不怕死吗！
You're still thinking of bringing glory back home, to have your name exalted? Dream on! You absolutely can't win! Run! Are you not afraid of death!?
喂！你们这些鬼东西，别在这儿废话了！赶紧给我滚蛋！
Hey! You pieces of trash! Stop spewing nonsense here! Scram!
你是谁？你不属于这里！你不该在这里！你是…异物！
Who are you? You don't belong here! You should not be here! You are... invaders!
笑死，还想清除老子？真是倒反天罡！
You're kidding. You're trying to get rid of me? This is outrageous!
卢卡，那些扰乱你内心的杂音已经被我清除干净了，你给老子振作点！
Luka, I've cleared out that noise messing with your head. You better get it together!
「杂音」？杰帕德先生——他是贝洛伯格的一位军官——和我说过类似的话。
Noise? Mr. Gepard... uh, an officer in Belobog... He said something like that too....
「人内心的声音特别嘈杂，在安全舒适的地方尤其如此。有些你心中极为重要的声音，反而只有在那些痛苦、不安、危险的时候才能被你听清楚。」

"A person's inner voices make far too much noise, especially so during safe and quiet moments. Ironically, the voices that truly matter often become audible only in moments of pain, discomfort, and peril."
当面对波提欧黑洞洞的枪口时，我发现杰帕德先生是对的。我的内心充满了平静，只剩下一个声音在不断呐喊，那声音越来越大，直到盖过了周遭的一切……

When I was staring down the barrel of Boothill's gun, I realized Mr. Gepard was right. My inner heart was at peace, there was only one sound that was yelling non-stop. It got louder and louder, till it just overwhelmed everything around me...
那声音说：「快跑！快跑！快跑！再不跑你就死了！」
That voice said: "Run! Run! Run away quickly! You'll die if you don't!"
那就是深陷危险时，我心中的最真实的声音。我想这也许意味着，我并不像自己以为的那样强大……
That was the truest voice in my heart when I stared danger in the face. I guess it means I'm not as strong as I thought I was...
那你的内心让你快跑，你为什么还是冲上去了？
Your inner voice told you to run, so why did you still charge towards him?
因为那时还有另一个更微弱的声音，微弱到我几乎听不见，但它还是真切地传到了我的耳朵里…那个声音说：「如果现在逃跑，你还不如就这么死了。」
Because there was another weaker voice, so weak that I could barely hear it. But it still managed to reach my ears... It said: "If you run now, you might as well just die here."
所以你做得很好，你冲上去了。
So you did well — you charged forth.
可是我输了啊，尾巴大爷。我听从了那个「极为重要的声音」，然后输得一塌糊涂。
But I lost, Mr. Tail. I listened to that very important voice, and I lost terribly.
就算再复活，我也还是会输。今天不输，明天也会输。我变得再怎么强，也还是早晚会输。
Even if I were to be revived, I would still lose. If not today, then tomorrow. No matter how strong I become, I would still eventually lose.
笑死老子，你说的这不是废话吗？
My sides! You're killing me here. You're a real comedian. Isn't that just common sense?
你们人类是很脆弱的——当然岁阳也是，但这不是重点，重点是…
You humans are very fragile. Heliobi are too, of course, but that's not the point. The point is...
人生就是一场必败的擂台啊。衰老病痛，求之不得，嘿嘿，每一样都能把你干趴下。死亡再来给你补上最后一拳，叫你…呃不是，叫你的亲朋好友哭唧唧。
Life is a fight in a ring you're bound to lose. Aging, disease, unattainable desires — each one will knock you out. Death just lands the final blow, making your friends and family cry.
可如果无论如何都只有「惨败」这一条路可走，那到底怎么才算「赢」呢？
If there is nothing but a path of complete and utter defeat to walk, what exactly can be considered "winning?"
笨蛋！这种事问别人有屁用？那不应该是你自己说了算吗？
Fool! What's the point of asking someone else this question? Isn't that something that only you can define?
笨死你算了！老子问你一个问题，你好好回答——
You might as well be a single-celled organism! Let me ask you a question, and answer it properly...
你那个小粉丝——玛吉，她和病痛斗了一辈子，最后也没斗过。你说说看，她输了吗？
That young fan of yours, Margie. She fought with her illness her entire life, and she didn't make it through in the end. Tell me, did she lose?
但她很努力地做了一切该做的事情，她一直在向病魔挥拳…一拳接着一拳，她才是最棒的拳手！在我心里，玛吉赢了！她赢得很漂亮。

But she tried her best in everything she did, and she was always putting up a fight against her sickness... One punch after the next, she was the greatest boxer there ever was! In my heart? Margie won. And she won in style.
你这不是明白得很吗？擂台上有输赢的标准。但评判这条命，我们自己才最有资格。
See, you fully understand, don't you? There are rules to victory and defeat in the ring. But with our lives, only we get to dictate the rules.
卢卡，重要的永远是挥下一拳！
Luka, the most important thing is to always throw the next punch!
重要的…永远是挥下一拳！谢谢你，尾巴大爷——
Most important... is to always throw the next punch! Thank you, Mr. Tail!
停停停，我受不了别人谢我。你既然振作起来，就好好打你的复活赛！
Stop, stop, stop it! I can't stand people's gratitude. Now that you've gotten yourself together, it's time to give it your all in your repechage!
（藿藿和尾巴已经回家了。我也该回休息室准备复活赛了。）
(Huohuo and Tail have gone home. I should also head back to the lounge to prepare for the repechage.)
既然获得了参加复活赛的机会，那我就必须好好把握这次机会，不能辜负大家的支持！
Since I've been given the chance to participate in the repechage, I have to make the most of it and not disappoint everyone who's been cheering me on!
有你这样尽心尽力的教练，我当然会赢啦！
With a dedicated coach like you, of course, I'm going to win!
Make sure you don't lose again, okay?
对我有点信心嘛！况且就算输，我也要输得风风光光，绝不会像上次那样两腿发软被你们抬回来了！
Have some faith in me, please! Even if I lose, I'll go down with dignity. You guys won't have to carry me home like last time because my legs turned into jelly!
不过我还不太清楚，这人气复活赛是什么赛制啊？
But I'm still not quite clear, what are the rules for this popularity revival match?
据说前几届演武仪典，复活赛就是让高人气的淘汰者彼此混战，决选出唯一一个胜利者重归叩关赛。
According to the previous Wardances, the repechage is a free-for-all among popular contestants that have been eliminated. There's only one winner, and only the winner can rejoin the knockout stage.
不过景元将军修改了赛制，希望能给选手们更多机会，体现武者双方对决的美感。
But General Jing Yuan has amended the rules, hoping to give more opportunities for the contestants to showcase the beauty of duels.
听说罗浮请来了一位颇有声誉，以美德著称的战士作为评判复活挑战者的「裁判」。你们知道「纯美骑士」吗？
It is said that the Luofu has invited a highly reputable warrior known for his virtue to serve as the referee for the repechage. Have you guys heard of the Knight of Beauty?
He's an old pal of mine.
星穹列车的社交圈也太广了吧！我参加个演武仪典都能碰到一堆和你称兄道弟的好朋友……
The Astral Express is so well-connected! I've run into so many friends of yours already while participating in the Wardance...
听起来更像是为了增加收视率。
Sounds more like a gimmick for publicity to me.
我也这么觉得。毕竟这一次演武仪典向许多世界都发出了邀请函。罗浮仙舟显然是想借此对外展示自己的繁荣。

I feel the same way. After all, many worlds are invited to participate in the Wardance this time. It's clear that the Xianzhou Luofu intends to showcase its prosperity to everyone through this tournament.
卢卡先生，您奋勇挥拳的英姿，一定能让这位骑士感受到您的美。我衷心祝愿您能获得胜利！
Mr. Luka, I'm sure the knight will see the beauty in your powerful punches. I truly hope you win!
谢谢你，卡美丽小姐。我一定会成功的！
Thanks, Miss Carmella. I will succeed!
这样一来，我也不用担心转正的问题了。
That way, I won't have to worry about getting a permanent role anymore.
（我挥拳的样子，美吗？唔…自己哪能看得到自己挥拳的样子啊。）
(Do I look impressive when I punch? Hmm... it's not like I can see myself in action.)
（那位纯美骑士会认可我吗？「纯美骑士团」听起来是个对美学很严格的组织……）
(Will I impress the Knight of Beauty? The Knights of Beauty sounds like an organization with high aesthetic standards...)
（别想那么多了，卢卡！想想玛吉，重要的，永远是挥下一拳！）
(Don't overthink, Luka! Think about Margie and always focus on your next punch!)
怎么样，准备好去展示你的美学了吗？
Are you ready to showcase your style?
准备好了，我一定会顺利复活的。
I'm all set. I'm going to win this.
接下来，挑战「纯美骑士」银枝的选手是，人气爆棚的少年英雄——「铁臂」卢卡！
The next contestant to challenge Argenti, the Knight of Beauty, is a super popular young hero — Luka "Strongarm"!
卢卡选手！全银河都在等待你重归赛场！我们爱你！
Luka, the entire cosmos has been waiting for your return! We all love ya!
As expected, it is you, Argenti.
又见面了，{NICKNAME}。你的姿态还是那样令人着迷。
Good to see you again, {NICKNAME}. Your demeanor is still as captivating as ever.
怎么哪都有你，你跟踪我？
Wherever I go, I see you. Are you stalking me?
我也感到惊奇…为何总会在不同世界的不同事件中与你相遇？我猜想，大约是因为我们践行的道路殊途同归，因而免不了彼此交汇吧。

I'm surprised too... Why do I keep running into you in different events across different worlds? If I may venture a guess, it's probably because the paths we tread lead to the same destination, so they're bound to converge.
尽管我还想多和你聊聊天，{NICKNAME}，但请你原谅我的冷落，因为今天的主角并不是你。而是卢卡。
As much as I want to keep chatting with you, {NICKNAME}, please forgive me for not giving you as much attention today. You're not the star of the day. It's Luka.
啊…初次见面，银枝先生，久仰大名…听说你特别厉害…我也很厉害！哈哈！
Um... it's a pleasure to meet you, Mr. Argenti. I've heard a lot about you... They say you're really great... I'm pretty good myself too! Haha!
我不是第一次见到你。你与波提欧对决的那场比赛，我在现场。
This isn't my first time seeing you. I was there when you had the duel with Boothill.
银枝先生，让您看笑话了。但可别因此小瞧我啊！
Mr. Argenti, I'm sorry you had to see that spectacle, but please don't underestimate me because of that!
不，不不不。你向前踏出一步，无畏地向恐怖的对手挥出拳头…那一幕真的很美，让我忍泪回味了许久。

No, not at all. When you stepped forward and swung your fist at a formidable opponent fearlessly, the beauty of that moment struck me. I've been replaying it in my mind for some time, and it always brings tears to my eyes.
你说的我都害羞了…输得那么惨，一点都不「美」吧。
You're making me blush... I lost so badly... It didn't really seem "beautiful" at all.
