我必须纠正你的观点，卢卡——伊德莉拉的教诲里不包含「胜者比败者更美」这种歪理。
I must correct you, Luka — Idrila never promotes the twisted notion of winners being more beautiful than losers.
波提欧只是想吓你，但当时的你并不知晓这一点。你以为自己会死，但为了你的尊严、为了你的荣誉、为了你的家园，你依然向他挥出了一拳。
Boothill was only trying to scare you, but you weren't aware of that at that time. You thought you were dying, but for the sake of your dignity, honor, and home, you stood firm and threw a punch.
在我看来，这便是战斗美学的最好体现。
In my view, that's combat aesthetics at its finest.
不过，尽管我非常认可你，但按照演武仪典的规则，我们还是必须较量一番。
However, even though I hold you in high regard, we still have to compete according to the rules of the Wardance.
当然没问题！我绝不会辜负你对我的欣赏，银枝先生！
No problem! I won't disappoint you, Mr. Argenti!
非常好！我果然没有看错人。你的技巧、智慧和勇气，都在彰显着身为武人的「纯美」。
Excellent! I wasn't wrong about you. Your skills, wisdom, and courage embody the beauty of a martial artist.
银枝认可了卢卡选手的「美」！这也就意味着！
Argenti sees Beauty in Luka! That means...
「铁臂」卢卡即将重返演武仪典！
Luka "Strongarm" is set to make a comeback to the Wardance!
卢卡选手的粉丝在哪里？让我听到你们的尖叫声！3、2、1，燥起来！！！
Where are the Luka fans? Let me hear your holler! 3, 2, 1, make some noise!
银枝先生，我真的很感激你的认可。
Mr. Argenti, I'm truly grateful for your recognition.
不，我只是基于仙舟人授予我的权力，允许你重返擂台罢了。你根本不需要我的「认可」——你不需要任何人的「认可」。
Actually, I'm simply using the authority granted by the Xianzhou people to let you return to the tournament. You don't need my recognition at all, or anyone else's.
哈哈…你说的话太有哲理了，我其实有点听不懂……
Haha... It's hard to understand your words when they sound so philosophical...
无妨，请记住一件事：你已是战斗之美的化身。事实如此，无论胜负成败，抑或人言毁铄，都不能将之化为无形。
No matter. Just remember one thing: You're already the embodiment of the beauty of battle, which is a fact. Regardless of winning and losing, or what others may say, it can't be taken away from you.
嗯，我一定牢记于心…然后回去再理解消化一下，哈哈。
I'll keep that in mind... and try to digest its meaning when I'm back home, haha.
哦对了，我听说演武仪典中还有另一位擅用「铁臂」的选手。如果你们能相遇、对决，那该是一场多么壮美的舞蹈啊！
By the way, I heard there's another Wardance contestant who's good at using an iron arm. If you two are matched as opponents, it will surely be a magnificent dance!
I shall take my leave, Mr. Luka.
青雀小姐又修复出其他记录了？
Miss Qingque has restored more parts of the record?
那我们赶快去看看吧…希望这次能解释伊戈尔为什么会来仙舟。
Let's check them out now... Hopefully, we'll find out the reason why Igor came to the Xianzhou.
喔！玲可快看，{NICKNAME}和卢卡来了～
Lynx, look! {NICKNAME} and Luka are here!
这玉兆损毁太严重了，我尽了最大努力，也还是只能修复出一小部分记录。
This jade abacus is too severely damaged. Even with my best efforts, I can only restore a small part of the record.
我们接下来要看到的这些，应该就是最后的记录了。
What we're about to watch should be the last of the records.
伊戈尔•哈夫特是雅利洛-Ⅵ的英雄，但我们都对他的生平经历知之甚少。找到这些资料，也算是进一步认识他了……
Igor Haft is a hero of Jarilo-VI, yet we know so little about his life. This information we've discovered can help us know him better...
希望至少能有关于仙舟的记录。
I hope there will be something about the Xianzhou.
是啊。这里毕竟是仙舟，也许我们还能找到几个认识他的人呢！哈哈！
Yeah. We're on the Xianzhou after all, so we might even find someone who here who knew him! Haha!
准备好了吗？我要开始播放咯。
Are you guys ready? I'm going to play it.
没什么，就是看完有些难过。
I'm fine. I just feel a bit blue after watching it.
不过是宇宙中时刻在发生的事。
Such things happen in the universe all the time.
不管怎么说，这都已经是过去很久的事了。
Hey, it happened a long time ago.
是呀，青雀，别难过了。这只是历史。
You're right. Qingque, don't be sad. It's just history.
唉…正因为是历史故事，我才更觉得难过。
But... the fact that it's history makes it even sadder.
伊戈尔试图抓住所有微小的希望，他希望能有人来救救他的家园……
Igor grasped at every tiny sliver of hope for someone to rescue his home world...
当「仙舟联盟」这个名字出现的时候，我甚至幻想事情会这样展开——云骑军驰援雅利洛-Ⅵ，把上面的烬灭军团全部消灭，雅利洛-Ⅵ的人就这样度过了危机。

When the name Xianzhou Alliance was mentioned, I imagined things unfolding like this — the Cloud Knights went to Jarilo-VI as reinforcements and eliminated the Ruin Legion, and the people of Jarilo-VI emerged from the crisis.
但即使没有修复出此后的记录，我们这些未来人也非常清楚，事情没有这样展开。伊戈尔最后的希望，仙舟联盟，最终也没有来拯救他的家园。
Even without the records of what happened afterward, we know very well that things did not pan out that way. Igor's last hope — the Xianzhou Alliance — did not come to his world's rescue.
他的一切努力都失败了。
All his efforts were in vain.
不，青雀小姐，他没有失败。伊戈尔•哈夫特后来回到了雅利洛-Ⅵ，战斗在抵抗反物质军团的前线。
No, Miss Qingque. He didn't fail. Igor Haft later returned to Jarilo-VI and fought against the Antimatter Legion on the frontline.
他，还有许许多多像他这样的人，用自己的血肉之躯「存护」了「贝洛伯格」这座末日孤城。
He, along with many others like him, "preserved" the desolate city of Belobog with their flesh and blood.
我现在可以站在演武仪典的擂台上，像他一样为自己的家园而挥拳，这就说明他没有失败。
The fact that I can participate in the Wardance to fight for my home today shows that he didn't fail.
七百年前那些死去的人们，他们都没有失败！
Those who sacrificed their lives <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago didn't fail either!
你说的没错，如果伊戈尔能看到你在演武仪典的擂台上有多风光，他也一定会很欣慰的。
You're right. If Igor could see how impressive you are on the Wardance stage, he would definitely be very proud.
可惜我们不知道，伊戈尔在演武仪典上是什么样子。
It's a pity we don't know how Igor performed at the Wardance back then.
我后来又跑去书库里翻了半天…七百年虽然说长也不算长，但正好卡在了一个动荡混乱的年代…第二次丰饶民战争的余波未止，很快又是饮月之乱。

I went to the repository the other day and did some digging. Seven hundred years ago was not too long ago, but it was a turbulent era... The aftermath of the second Denizens of Abundance War still lingered, and the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae soon followed.
我甚至找不出一张完整的参赛选手名单，更没找到伊戈尔的名字。
I couldn't even find a complete list of contestants, and I didn't see Igor's name anywhere.
没关系，就算旧的传奇已经不为人知，我还是可以创造出新的传奇！
It's okay. Even though this ancient legend is no longer known, I can still create a new legend myself!
我会在演武仪典的擂台上，用我的拳头，重新书写伊戈尔的故事。
With my fists, I'll rewrite Igor's story in the Wardance's ring.
Yeah! We look forward to it!
伊戈尔的事情暂时告一段落了。我们回休息室准备接下来的叩关赛吧。
I guess that's all there is about Igor for now. Let's head back to the lounge to prepare for the upcoming knockout stage.
说不定青雀其实认识伊戈尔，只是忘记了。
Maybe Qingque actually knew Igor, but forgot about him.
也可能你只是忘记了自己的年龄。
Or maybe you've just forgotten your age.
你两句话就把我诊断为魔阴身了，太可怕了！
You're making me sound like I'm mara-struck. That's scary!
打完这场比赛，我就要登上「竞锋守擂」的擂台，对阵彦卿了。
After this match, I'll be up against Yanqing in the "Ringmaster's Challenge."
我以为自己会很紧张，但我现在一点都不紧张！也不是不紧张…该怎么形容呢？冷静到异乎寻常！
I thought I'd be really nervous, but I don't have the jitters at all! To say I'm not nervous at all isn't accurate... How should I put it? I'm unusually calm!
我理解！当年我参加星际和平娱乐第七十五轮面试的时候，也是这个感受！
I get you! I felt the same way for my seventy-fifth round of interviews with Interastral Peace Entertainment!
七十五轮…你看，幸亏我们没并入公司体系，现在才不用受这个罪。
Seventy-five rounds... See? It's fortunate we didn't join the IPC system, now we don't have to endure this misery.
不谈这个了…来看看下场比赛的对手是谁吧！
Let's not dwell on that... How about we check out your next opponent?
下场比赛这个「铁臂」是谁？
Who's this contestant with an iron arm?
「独立参赛者•铁臂」？怎么搞的神秘兮兮的……
"Independent Contestant: Iron Arm"? Why so mysterious...
终于有我不认识的参赛选手了！
Finally, there's a contestant I haven't met before!
话别说太满，搞不好等一会见了面，会发现又是你的老熟人！哈哈哈哈！
Don't be too sure about that. They might turn out to be another old friend of yours again! Hahahaha!
聊起公司负面就顾左右而言他！
You always change the subject whenever we mention anything negative about IPC!
哈哈，不要拷打卡美丽小姐了！还是看看我接下来的对手吧！
Haha, cut Miss Carmella some slack! Let's turn our attention to my next opponent!
这位「铁臂」选手相当神秘。我查了一下，他之前几场比赛，竟然都穿着厚重的斗篷，根本看不出相貌…大概是向主办方要求过，要隐瞒自己的真实身份吧？

This contestant is quite mysterious. I looked him up and found out that he always wore a heavy cloak in his previous matches, so his face was concealed... Perhaps he asked the organizers to hide his real identity?
好神秘啊。不过没关系，反正现在我要登上擂台亲眼确认一下这位「铁臂」的实力了！
So mysterious! But it doesn't matter, because now I'm going to step into the ring and see just how strong this "iron arm" is for myself!
（这肯定是一场精彩的较量。对手的铁臂会用什么招式呢？）
(This will surely be a great match. What moves does he have up his sleeve?)
卢卡，准备好加冕成为「铁臂之王」了吗？
Luka, are you ready to be crowned as the King of the Iron Arms?
哼哼，我早就是「铁臂之王」了！
Heh, I already am the King of the Iron Arms!
那是当然了！咱们出发吧，「铁臂之王」！
You sure are! Let's hit the road, King of the Iron Arms!
Pitch-Dark Iron Arm... Hook the Great?
Why didn't I think of you?
什…什么啦！洞洞机才不是什么「铁臂」！卢卡哥哥好笨哦！
Wh—What? Diggertron isn't an iron arm! You're so silly, Luka!
哈哈哈，开个玩笑。既然你在这里，那「独立参赛者•铁臂」的身份……
Hahaha, just kidding. Since you're here, that must mean the "Independent Contestant: Iron Arm" must be...
现在擂台上的两位选手，在各种意义上都颇为相似！
The two fighters in the ring right now are remarkably similar in many ways!
一位，是来自贝洛伯格的选手——「铁臂」卢卡！
The first contestant comes from Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!
另一位则是…同样来自贝洛伯格的选手——
The other contestant... is also from Belobog.
两位代表贝洛伯格出战的选手，在参加「竞锋守擂」前的最后一位对手，竟然是彼此！真是命运弄人！
These two contestants from Belobog are each other's final hurdle before advancing to the "Ringmaster's Challenge"! Fate sure has a sense of humor!
但往好的一面想：无论胜者是谁，贝洛伯格代表队都将获得挑战罗浮守擂剑士的资格！！！
But if we look on the bright side, we can see that no matter who wins this match, Belobog will have a representative qualified to challenge the Luofu's ringmaster!
我必须向你道歉，卢卡——我瞒着你，匿名参加了演武仪典。
I must apologize to you, Luka, for participating in the Wardance anonymously and keeping you in the dark.
你不相信我能赢，所以也参加了演武仪典，来增加贝洛伯格代表队获胜的可能性，对吧？
You don't believe I can win, so you came here to boost the chances of team Belobog winning the Wardance, right?
这与「相信」与否无关，卢卡。这是理性的计算——从数学概率上看，你很难获得胜利，但贝洛伯格需要这次胜利。
This isn't about what I "believe," Luka. This is a matter of calculation. Mathematically speaking, your chance of winning is low, but Belobog really needs this win.
所以我参赛了。这样无论我们中谁获胜，都会为贝洛伯格赢得声誉。
Thus, I entered the competition. This ensures that regardless of who emerges victorious, Belobog will earn recognition.
哈哈，稍微有点伤人。但我可以理解。漆黑的虎克大人，老实交代，你是不是早就知道了？
Haha, this stings a little, but I get it. Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, come clean — did you know about this right from the start?
唔…对不起嘛！史瓦罗说，如果告诉卢卡哥哥，会让你难过，所以虎克就没有告诉你……
Um... Sorry! Svarog said you would be sad if I told you the truth, so I kept it a secret...
唉…那接下来怎么办。史瓦罗大佬？我们要打一场贝洛伯格内战吗？
Eh... What's next, Svarog? Is it Belobogian against Belobogian?
眼下恐怕没有别的选择。
It seems there is no other choice.
我上次没能战胜你。「基于数学概率」，这一次恐怕还是不行。
I didn't manage to beat you previously. "Mathematically speaking," I'm afraid I'll suffer the same fate this time.
你的计算有误，卢卡。基于数学概率，你的获胜机会——未知。
Your calculation is erroneous, Luka. Mathematically speaking, your chance of winning is unknown.
因为有我尚未准确获知的「变量」，所以——无法得出结论。
There is a variable that I have yet to ascertain, so it's impossible to draw any conclusions.
我是一台过时的机器人，就算做再多次引体向上，也只会磨损关节，不会变得更强。但你不同——随着经验的积累，你会变得越来越强。

I am an outdated robot, no matter how many pull-ups I do, it only wears down my joints. I will not grow stronger. However, you are different — with each experience, you will continue to grow stronger.
也许吧，说来有些丢人…我也不太确定自己是不是真的变强了。
You might be right, but... Well, this is kinda embarrassing to say, but... I'm not sure if I've improved or not.
因此我才判断——我们最好在此对决。
Hence, my assessment — we should face each other here.
Luka, you need to defeat me.
哼，没问题，史瓦罗大佬。出招吧！
Hmph, no problem, Svarog. Bring it on!
琥珀王在上！这场「铁臂」之间的对决多么壮美啊！
By the Amber Lord! What a glorious showdown between the two "iron arms"!
我宣布！本场比赛的胜者，亦是有机会挑战守擂者的选手是——「铁臂」卢卡！！！
I declare the winner of this match, who also earns the chance to challenge the ringmaster — Luka "Strongarm"!
卢卡，听到欢呼声了吗——是你赢了。
Luka, do you hear the cheers? You won.
史瓦罗大佬，你没放水吧？
Svarog, you didn't go easy on me, did you?
不，我没有放水。你刚才击败了毫无保留的我。
No, I didn't. You defeated me fair and square.
好好休整一下，接下来你将与罗浮的守擂剑士对决。
Get some rest. You're up against the ringmaster of the Luofu next.
史瓦罗大佬，根据你的「理性计算」…你觉得我有机会打败彦卿吗？
Svarog, based on your calculations... Do you think I can beat Yanqing?
我的计算结果对你并不重要。你应该走上擂台，亲身经历那场战斗——那对你更重要。
The result of my calculations holds no importance to you. You need to step into the ring and experience the battle yourself — that's what matters more to you.
明白了。我一定会全力以赴的！
Got it. I'll do whatever it takes!
（卢卡马上就要挑战彦卿了…去休息室和他一起做好准备吧。）
(Luka's going to challenge Yanqing soon... I should join him in the lounge to make sure he's ready.)
喔，有个我的消息源刚才跟我说，接下来的「竞锋守擂」，景元将军会亲自来观礼！
Wow, a source just informed me that General Jing Yuan himself will be present for the upcoming "Ringmaster's Challenge"!
啊？将军这么忙，还亲自来看我这种小人物的比赛啊……
Huh? The general is such a busy man. I can't believe he's coming to watch a nobody like me in action...
卢卡选手！请你摆正自己的位置！你早就不是小人物了！
Mr. Luka, know your worth! You're far from being a nobody now!
演武仪典最具人气的异星选手挑战自己的爱徒，他肯定要来观礼的嘛～
The most popular Wardance contestant from another planet is challenging his disciple. Of course, he has to be here.
压力真大啊，在景元将军面前，我可不能丢了贝洛伯格的脸面！我感觉自己的心脏快从嗓子眼里蹦出来了！
This is so stressful. I can't embarrass Belobog in front of General Jing Yuan! I feel like my heart is about to burst out of my throat!
唔…太紧张对比赛状态也有影响，不然喝瓶美梦气泡水？
Um... Being too nervous might affect your performance. How about a bottle of Sweet Dreams Soda?
啊！不如这样吧！我们去看看别人的比赛怎么样？按照时间表，现在正在举行的比赛是…现在正在举行的比赛是……
Ah! How about this! Let's go watch someone else's match, shall we? According to the schedule, the current match is... the current match is...
那走吧！正好也出去转转！闷在这休息室里面，只会越来越紧张。
Let's go! You need some fresh air. Being cooped up here in the lounge will only make you more nervous.
我们快过去吧。再耽搁一会儿，比赛都要结束了。
Let's get moving. We might miss the match if we wait any longer.
真是一场激烈的战斗！如果我长了一双会冒汗的手，现在一定都湿透了！
What an intense battle! If I had hands that could sweat, they'd be drenched by now!
但奇怪的是，为什么波提欧先生突然收枪回套，放弃比赛了呢？
Still, I wonder why Mr. Boothill suddenly decided to holster his gun and forfeit the match?
莫非是畏惧彦卿的剑，还是公司的通缉令正悬在头上，不得不抽身离开？
Was he intimidated by Yanqing's swords, or was he forced to leave because he's wanted by the IPC?
无论如何，让我们宣布，本场比赛的胜利者是——罗浮东道主的守擂剑士彦卿选手！
Regardless, I hereby declare the winner of the match: The Luofu's ringmaster, Yanqing!
我们来迟了，真是遗憾。看来只能之后看重播了……
We're too late. Looks like we'll have to catch the replay later on...
他宝贝了个腿的，这小子好强啊！
Son of a fudge, now that boy is strong!
诶哟，你们来看我比赛啦？可惜，公司的小可爱盯上我了，我得赶紧撤了。
Well, I'll be hornswoggled, you all come to see my match? Too bad. Those lil' IPC fudglings are on my tail. I gotta hightail it outta here.
不过嘛，时间再仓促，也容得下一次告别。临走前我想请你喝杯茶，金人巷有个杜氏茶庄，可他宝贝的好喝了。
But you know, no matter how tight the schedule, there's always room for a goodbye. Before I head out, let me buy you a cup of tea. Du's Teahouse in Aurum Alley has some mighty fine fudgin' tea.
那家店的茶不适合他的年龄。
The tea served there isn't suitable for someone his age.
哎呀，哪他呜呜伯的那么多事？杜老板那里也有全年龄的饮品！
Tsk, son of a Wubbaboo, that isn't an issue at all! Boss Du's place also offers beverages suitable for all ages!
But the tea has a real kick to it. It's pretty fiery stuff.
烈就对了！我们成熟男人就他宝贝的要烈！劲！
Fiery, just the way we like it! Us grown men need it strong and kickin'! Fudge yeah!
不行，你可是公司的通缉犯！我怎么放心让你带他去喝什么茶！
No way! You're wanted by the IPC! How can I trust you to take him out for tea!
摄像头，我都不嫌弃你是公司的小可爱，你他宝贝个腿的倒嫌弃起我来了。
Camera girl, I don't even mind that you're one of them lil' IPC fudglings, yet here you are, acting all forkin' judgmental.
好啦，没事的。{NICKNAME}，卡美丽小姐，我相信波提欧大佬没有恶意。你们不必担心。我去喝杯茶，很快就回来。
{NICKNAME}, Miss Carmella, please don't worry about me. I believe Boothill means no harm. I'll be back soon.
波提欧，你可不许欺负他！
哎呀，不会的！他宝贝的把我当什么人了！
Come on now, that ain't gonna happen! Diggity fudge, what kinda man do you take me for?
卢卡，别喝不该喝的「茶」哦！
Luka, don't drink any "tea" that you aren't supposed to have!
放心吧，我很自律的，我平时连含糖饮料都不喝的。
Relax, I'm pretty self-disciplined. I usually don't even take drinks with sugar in them.
Mr. Boothill, welcome! Please take a seat!
诶呦喂，这位不是现在街头巷尾都在讨论的「铁臂」卢卡嘛！
Hey, isn't this the Luka "Strongarm" that everyone's been talking about?
二位都是贵客啊！要喝点什么，尽管说～
It's a pleasure to have two distinguished guests here today! What can I get for you? Just let me know!
我要离开罗浮了，来杯仙舟才有的单一麦芽浓茶给我送行吧——无年份的「穷奇血」就行。
I'm fixin' to leave the Luofu, so give me a send-off with a cup of that single malt strong tea you only get on the Xianzhou — no need for the fancy stuff, "Pauper's Blood" will do just fine.
至于他嘛…他一会儿要去打一场硬仗，给他调一杯…「千古英雄气」吧。
As for him... He's about to face a tough battle, so... fix him up a glass of Hero's Spirit.
好嘞。请您二位稍等片刻。
No problem. I'll be right back.
…这里的氛围倒是和我们贝洛伯格差不多。
...The vibe of this place is similar to Belobog.
哈哈，你喜欢就好。今天请你喝茶呢，有两件事。第一件，是想给你赔个不是。
Haha, I'm glad you like it. I'm buying you drinks for two reasons — I want to apologize to you. That's the first.
我本意是想考验一下你的觉悟…但拿生死大事威胁一个比赛对手，确实有点过分。
My intention was to test your resolve... but threatenin' a competitor with life and death was a bit over the line.
我向你道歉！对不起！你要是喝了我这杯茶，就当你是原谅我了啊！
I'm real sorry! If you drink this cup of tea, it means you forgive me, okay?
和波提欧先生的那场比赛让我成长了很多，我还想感谢你呢。
I learned a lot from that match against you, Mr. Boothill. Actually, I should be thanking you for that.
行，你不怪我就行。咱们说第二件事——我想劝你退赛。
Okay, glad you ain't mad. Let's get to the second reason — I think you should pull out of the competition.
这不可能，就像那时面对你的枪，我是不会临阵脱逃的。
That's out of the question. I won't back down, just like how I faced your gun last time.
我要离开，除了必须抓紧时间外，也有那个守擂剑士的原因在。
I'm leaving not just because time's running out for me, but partly because of that ringmaster too.
这小子年纪不大，实力非同小可。和他对阵，要花的时间太久了，还不一定能赢。他宝贝的为了一场输赢，栽在公司狗手里可不值当。
This kid's young, but he's got some serious skills. Facing him will take too long and there's no guarantee of winning. It ain't worth gettin' caught by those forkin' IPC hounds over a competition.
你不一样。你永远有离开的选择。全银河已经认识了你和你的贝洛伯格，你的目的已经达到了。
You're different. You always have the choice to leave. The whole cosmos knows about you and Belobog now, so you've already achieved your goal.
现在退赛，没人会怪你。可现在上场，就是去挨揍。明白吗？
No one will blame you if you withdraw now. But if you step into the ring, you'll be crushed. You get what I'm saying?
我明白，但我仍然要登上那个擂台，挥出一拳。因为胜败不是战斗的全部。
I understand, but I'm still going to step into the ring and throw a punch. Win or lose, the outcome isn't the only thing that matters.
啊…你又在「考验我的觉悟」！差点把我唬住了！
Ah... you're testing my resolve again! I almost fell for your trap!
他呜呜伯的，你个小机灵鬼！你让我想起一个朋友，一个叫「乱破」的丫头。她和你一样，特别认死理。
Dog my Wubbaboos, you're forking sharp, boy! You remind me of a friend, a girl called Rappa. She's set in her own ways just like you.
Is she as weak as me?
那你能徒手捏爆一颗恒星吗？
Well, can you crush a star with your bare hands?
她也不能，但她一直坚称她能。
She can't, but she always insists that she can.
哈哈哈哈，什么乱七八糟的！
宝了个贝的，她确实强得乱七八糟。
But holy forkeroni, she's really strong.
波提欧将几案上的「浓茶」一饮而尽，冲卢卡挥了挥手，头也不回地离开了长街。
Boothill downed the "strong tea" in one gulp, waved at Luka, and left the street without looking back.
嗯～还是你原装的铁臂看着顺眼。
Hmm, I gotta say, your original iron arm looks good.
（都这个时间了啊！马上就要挑战彦卿了…也不知道卢卡回来了没有，去休息室找找他吧。）
(It's getting late, the match with Yanqing is starting soon... I wonder if Luka's back. Let's see whether he's in the lounge.)
竟然马上就要上场了…感觉跟做梦一样。
Can't believe the match is about to start... I feel as though I'm having a dream.
放平心态，卢卡选手，就当做这是一场普通的积分赛。
Stay calm, Luka. Just treat this like any other regular point-based tournament.
你已经注定会上历史课本了。
You're already destined to be in the history books.
是呀～不管「竞锋守擂」的结果如何，你都是贝洛伯格名垂青史的人物了。
Right! Regardless of how the "Ringmaster's Challenge" transpires, you've already made a mark in Belobogian history.
是呀～不管「竞锋守擂」的结果如何，你都已经是个大明星了！
Right! Regardless of how the "Ringmaster's Challenge" transpires, you're already a superstar!
就是这一点让我觉得自己在做梦！
That's exactly what makes me feel like I'm dreaming!
但其实这次罗浮之旅最大的收获，是让我想明白了一件事。
In fact, the biggest takeaway from this trip to the Luofu is that it made me realize something.
我不是为了得到什么而挥拳的，也不是为了证明什么而挥拳的…我甚至不是为了胜利而挥拳的。
I don't fight to gain or prove anything... I don't even do this for the sake of winning.
在挥拳的那一刻，我是全银河最快乐的人，仅此而已。
Whenever I throw my punches, I feel like I'm the happiest man in the cosmos — that's the only reason I'm doing this.
虽然不是很明白啦！但我还是很开心，能见证你的成长！
Even though I don't fully understand it, I'm still pleased to witness your growth!
好啦，时间也不早了，该准备登上最后的擂台了。
Well, it's time for you to get ready for the final battle.
（我竟然才想明白…杰帕德先生、银枝先生、波提欧大佬、史瓦罗大佬、当然还有尾巴大爷，他们试图告诉我的，其实是同一件事。）
(I can't believe it took me so long to realize that Gepard, Argenti, Boothill, Svarog, and Mr. Tail were all trying to tell me the same thing.)
（喔～这样一来，我是不是也算半只脚踏入「强者」的领域了呢？）
(Oh~ does this mean I've got one foot in the realm of the "strong" now?)
（可能所谓「强者」本来就是一种心境吧。）
(Maybe it's the mentality that makes you strong.)
卢卡，准备好挑战彦卿了吗？
Luka, are you ready to challenge Yanqing?
I've been ready for a long time.
I've been ready for a long time.
Wow! I'm not even ready yet!
你好啊，卢卡先生，咱们又见面了。
Hi, Mr. Luka. We meet again.
…怎么可能？你是…你是那个…「冷锋」！
对不起，没有当面告诉你我的名字，我就是罗浮守擂剑士彦卿。
Sorry for not revealing my name previously. I'm the Luofu's ringmaster, Yanqing.
卢卡先生，这些日子来，我一直都在关注你。在你没有注意到的时候，我在观众席上欣赏了你的每一场比赛。
Mr. Luka, I've had my eye on you these past few days. You weren't aware, but I was in the crowd watching all your matches.
我必须承认，你是个了不得的战士，坚韧、敏锐也不缺乏力量。更重要的是，你对自己的认可——你所挥的每一拳都带着不问输赢的勇气，这让我印象深刻。

I must say you're a formidable warrior — you're resilient, sharp, and strong. What's even more impressive is your resolve. Every punch you throw shows a courage that doesn't care about winning or losing — that has left a deep impression on me.
我听人说起过你们世界的遭遇。我明白，你需要这场胜利。只差一步，你就能带着贝洛伯格的名字一同名垂青史。
I've heard about what happened to your planet, so I understand how you need this win. Just one more step, and you'll take Belobog's name into the history books with you.
但身为罗浮守擂剑士，我也有我所要坚守的一切。
But as the Luofu ringmaster, there are things I must uphold.
我说不出什么慷慨激昂的战前宣言，彦卿兄弟。
I don't have a stirring pre-battle speech, Yanqing.
谢谢你在我第一次迷茫时为我指路。这些日子来，有无数像你一样的人为我指路，让我抵达了这一刻的擂台。你还记得咱们对空喊出的豪言壮语吗？

Thanks for giving me directions when I was lost. Many have done the same thing for me these last few days, and it's thanks to all of you that I'm here now. Do you still remember the lofty aspirations we yelled loudly at the sky?
「我！卢卡！一定会赢的！我一定会打败彦卿的！」
"I! Luka! Will be the winner! I will defeat Yanqing!"
万众瞩目的「铁臂」卢卡历尽千险，终于来到了彦卿大人面前！
All eyes are upon Luka "Strongarm," who has finally arrived in front of Yanqing after overcoming numerous hurdles!
自演武仪典开赛以来，「卢卡挑战彦卿」便稳居观众期待榜的榜首，如今这场大家期待已久的梦幻对决即将呈现在全银河的观众眼前！

Since the beginning of the Wardance, the match between Luka and Yanqing has been the most anticipated one among the audience. Now, this highly awaited showdown is about to unfold before viewers across the cosmos!
比赛的结局究竟会走向何方？让我们拭目以待！
What will be the final result of this match? Let's watch and find out!
站在这「竞锋守擂」擂台上的每一个人，都是了不起的战士。
Anyone who qualifies for the "Ringmaster's Challenge" is a respectable warrior.
你是一等一的拳手，正如我是一等一的剑士。这一点不会因为胜败而改变。
You're a top-notch boxer, just like I'm a top-notch swordsman. The outcome of this match isn't going to change that.
彦卿，我会尽全力打败你的。
Yanqing, I'll give it my all to defeat you.
彦卿兄弟…你是在可怜我吗？我不需要这样的胜利，我已经能坦然接受我的失败了。
Yanqing... are you doing this out of sympathy? I don't need a victory like this, because I have no problem accepting defeat.
你没听到吗？贝洛伯格的卢卡，所有人都在为你欢呼。
Can't you hear? Everyone's cheering for you, Luka.
我想，在他们心中，这样的你，绝不是一个失败者。
I think that in their minds, someone like you could never be considered "defeated."
真是令人热泪盈眶的一场对决！
谢谢你，彦卿兄弟。对于一场真正的战斗，就算输了又如何？
Thanks, Yanqing. In a true fight, does losing even matter?
比赛当然会有输赢的判断，我已经尽力了，我做到了！不停挥拳、挥拳、直到最后！回到贝洛伯格后，在未来的某一刻，我还有下一场比赛，我还有很多战斗要打！

Winning and losing are part of any match. But I gave it my all, I did it! I kept throwing punches, punch after punch, until the very end! When I go back to Belobog, there will be another fight waiting for me in the future, and many more battles to come!
玛吉，我尽力了…像你一样，我赢了。
Margie, I tried my best... Just like you, I won.
尽管卢卡选手潇洒坦然地接受了失败，但全场观众的热情依旧没有受到任何衰减！他们用不绝的掌声，献给了这位坚韧的贝洛伯格拳手。
Though Luka takes his defeat in stride, the audience's passion stays strong! Their constant applause is a salute to this resilient Belobogian fighter.
呜呜，在我看来，这是一场没有胜利，也没有失败的比赛！这一刻，对战双方彼此的认同，全场观众的全情投入足以说明一切！一场前所未有、超脱了胜负的比赛！呜呜……

In my view, there is no winner or loser in this match! At this moment, the admiration both sides have for each other and the audience's enthusiasm speaks for itself! This is an unprecedented match that goes beyond winning and losing!
该死，镜头别再拍我了，拍他们，拍那两个孩子！
Stop pointing the camera at me! Focus on them two kids!
没想到…会以这种方式结束我在演武仪典上的比赛。
I didn't expect... my Wardance journey would end in this way.
I've never felt so at ease.
我想是时候收拾一下行李，和玲可他们一块儿回家了。
I think it's time to pack up my things and head home with Lynx and the others.
抱歉，卢卡先生，打扰了你赛后休息的时间。景元将军想见见您，还请您移步神策府。
Sorry for disturbing your rest, Mr. Luka. General Jing Yuan would like to meet you. Please make your way to the Seat of Divine Foresight.
我？可我已经输了啊？将军也对落败的选手感兴趣吗？
Me? But I lost the match. Is the general really interested in meeting defeated contestants too?
这就不是我一个天舶司职员能回答的事情啦。
As a Sky-Faring Commission staff member, I'm afraid I don't have the answer to that question.
Moments later, at the Seat of Divine Foresight
你好啊，贝洛伯格的卢卡。很高兴能见到你。
Hello, Luka from Belobog. It is a pleasure to meet you.
景元大人，很荣幸能得到您的接见。但我不太清楚，您为什么召我来到神策府？
General Jing Yuan, it's my honor to meet you, but I'm not quite sure why you summoned me here to the Seat of Divine Foresight.
因为刚才你打下的那场精彩的比赛，也因为七百多年过去了，你是第二个抵达罗浮仙舟，参与「演武仪典」的雅利洛人。
Because of that exciting match earlier, and also because you're the second Wardance contestant from Jarilo in the past seven hundred years.
您的意思是…莫非您听说过伊戈尔•哈夫特？
Do you mean... Have you, by any chance, heard of Igor Haft?
伊戈尔…真是令人怀念的名字啊。我认得他，不，不该说认得。我永远记得他。你和他，真像啊。
Igor... what a nostalgic name. I know him, actually, I should say I will always remember him. You and he are two of a kind.
将军，您知道伊戈尔在仙舟的经历吗？
General, do you know about Igor's experience on the Xianzhou?
在我们的故乡，虽然许多人都听过伊戈尔•哈夫特的英雄故事，但我们从来不知道他旅行天外时到底经历了什么。请您务必告诉我！
In our hometown, many of us have heard of Igor Haft's heroic tale, but we don't know what he really went through during his journey beyond the sky. Please, you have to tell me his story!
那是七百多年前的事情了。那时我还很年轻，也曾是演武仪典上一名守擂剑士。
That was over seven hundred years ago. At that time, I was young and also serving as a Wardance's ringmaster.
伊戈尔，那个红发高大的拳手，就这样出现在了擂台上。他每一次挥拳都好像肩负着一个世界的重量。
Igor, a tall and red-haired boxer, appeared in the ring. Every swing of his fists felt like it carried the weight of an entire world.
而在赛后，他有个古怪的习惯，他会拒绝所有奖金与礼物，向所有观看他比赛的人们讲述他遭难的故乡，提醒人们防范反物质军团的袭击，也希望有能之士可以帮助他。

He had a peculiar habit after finishing a match — while turning down all the prizes and gifts, he would talk about his homeland's plight to the spectators, warning them of the Antimatter Legion's attacks, as he sought help from those who were capable.
就这样，他一路过关斩将，最终来到了我面前…就像这一次你出现在彦卿面前那样。他沉默地挥拳、挥拳，和我打得难分难解。
Just like that, he conquered every opponent and finally stood before me, much like how you faced Yanqing. He threw his punches in silence, matching me blow for blow.
但在这场战斗的尾声，他突然停了下来，离开了赛场……
But as the fight was nearing its end, he suddenly stopped and left the arena...
以武会友，这是演武仪典的创立宗旨。但彼时我只是个云骑骁卫，没办法改变任何事，只能看着他绝望的背影，一句安慰的话也说不出口。

The Wardance is held to foster friendships through combat arts. However, I was just a Cloud Knight Lieutenant at that time, powerless to change anything. I couldn't even utter any words of solace as I watched his despondent silhouette grow smaller.
他就这么离开了。时间匆匆过去…一晃眼，三百年的时光消逝了。
And just like that, he left. Time flew by... and then, in the blink of an eye, three hundred years had passed.
抱歉，将军，你刚才说的那个世界叫什么名字？
Pardon my interruption, General. What was the name of the world you just mentioned?
这一届演武仪典，向那个叫雅利洛-Ⅵ的世界发送一封邀请函吧。希望他的后代能有回应。
Let's send an invitation to that world called Jarilo-VI for the Wardance this year. Hopefully, his descendants will respond.
将军，天舶司的星图航路上显示…这个世界，已经熄灭了。
General, the astral charts of the Sky-Faring Commission indicate that... this world has been destroyed.
发送一封邀请函吧。就当是一个不会成真的祝愿。
Send an invitation. Even if it is just a wish that won't come true.
原来这就是我们收到的那封通讯邀请函的来历吗？
So this is why we received that invitation?
伊戈尔在离开之前曾赠给我一件小小的纪念品。
Igor gifted me a keepsake before he left.
在永冬铭碑的见证下，我——大守护者布洛妮娅•兰德宣布：《仙舟「罗浮」-贝洛伯格互惠贸易协定》从今生效了！
With the Everwinter Monument as our witness, I, the Supreme Guardian Bronya Rand, hereby announce that the Xianzhou Luofu - Belobog Mutual Trade Agreement is now in effect!
我曾听说贝洛伯格的故事，此处的人们在最绝望的时刻仍然坚守着「存护」的意志，不屈地反抗着命运，直至黎明降临。
I've heard stories about Belobog where the residents, in their most desperate times, steadfastly maintained the spirit of the Preservation, resisting fate until the break of dawn.
直到我亲身踏上这片英雄的土地，感受到仍未消亡的冰雪如烈火般灼烧皮肤…我才察觉，这份「存护」的意志是多么厚重，挣扎在这片土地上的人民又是多么伟大。

It wasn't until I stepped onto this land of heroes myself and felt the burn of the perpetual ice on my skin... that I finally realized how solemn the belief of the Preservation is and how great the people struggling there are.
从今天起，仙舟「罗浮」将与你们一同战斗，直到寒潮化为春风，冻土化为良田。
From today onward, the Xianzhou Luofu fights alongside you, until the Eternal Freeze turns into the spring breeze and the frozen land melts into fertile fields.
老朋友，你曾说自己向往长生种的人生。因为我们活得够长，有更多的时间成长、弥补错误、改变未来。
My old friend, you once expressed your desire to be a long-life species. Because we had a longer lifespan, you thought we would have more time to grow, rectify mistakes, and change the future.
你错了，伊戈尔，「重要的永远是下一拳」。对我们的世界来说，重要的永远是未来。
You were wrong, Igor. "The next punch is always what matters most." For our world, the future is what truly matters.
人们并非凭空诞生在这个世界上，我们每个人都来自于自己出生前的世界。
We don't just appear out of nowhere. Each of us comes from the world that was there before we were born.
人类像一株巨树般彼此紧密相联，不断滋长。人们塑造历史，历史造就英雄，英雄鼓舞着未来，而未来又诞生出全新的人们。
People are like a giant tree, closely intertwined and ever-growing. People shape history, history creates heroes, heroes inspire the future, and the future brings forth new people.
老朋友，你曾经的呼喊已经得到了回应。卢卡就是那个回应。
My old friend, your call for help back then has been answered. Luka is the answer.
他不仅是一个孩子，他也和你们的文明一样古老，他是雅利洛-Ⅵ的化身。
He isn't just a boy. Instead, he's as ancient as your civilization, and he's the embodiment of Jarilo-VI.
…我早该料到的，一个能孕育出你的文明，是不会被轻易摧毁的。
...I should have realized sooner — a civilization that can give rise to someone like you wouldn't be easily wiped out.
此时此刻，贝洛伯格的竞技场中。
Right now, in the Belobog arena...
杰帕德先生，准备好了吗？我来归还你借我的「胜利」了！
Mr. Gepard, are you ready? I'm here to return that victory you lent me!
{NICKNAME}，你来得正好。现在演武仪典结束了，卢卡选手返回贝洛伯格，我也该走了。
Perfect timing, {NICKNAME}. Now that the Wardance has ended and Luka has returned to Belobog, it's time for me to go.
Why don't you stay for a couple more days and enjoy yourself?
哈哈，我哪有那个钱啊？况且叽米先生还催我赶紧回去给他写《走近星穹》的台本呢。
Haha, how am I going to afford that? Besides, Mr. Owlbert's been urging me to go back and write the next script of Keeping Up With Star Rail for him.
Will you be able to get that permanent position you're after?
希望能吧，哈哈。但叽米先生每次都说「你还欠历练」，所以我猜，我大概还要再「历练」一段时间咯。
I hope so, haha, but Mr. Owlbert keeps saying that I still lack experience, so I guess I'll have to gain more experience for a while longer.
咱们一起参加演武仪典的这段日子，坦白说，是我这辈子最开心的一段日子。
Honestly speaking, these days of participating in the Wardance with you have been the happiest of my life.
卢卡选手现在成了全银河炙手可热的明日之星，未来一定还有很多参加大型比赛的机会。
Now that Luka is the hottest rising star in the whole cosmos, he'll definitely have lots of chances to participate in major tournaments in the future.
到那时候，希望你能继续做他的教练，我也能继续在你们身边跟踪报道。
When the time comes, I hope you'll still be his coach, and I'll still be in charge of covering your stories.
对了，这是报道卢卡与彦卿决战的那期报纸。我买了一百份～这份送给你，留个纪念吧。
By the way, this is the issue of the newspaper that features the showdown between Luka and Yanqing. I bought <unbreak>100</unbreak> copies. This one's for you to keep.
糟糕，时间不早了，要错过返程的星槎了！我先走啦～下次再见！
Oh, no! It's getting late, I'm about to miss my starskiff! I should get going! I'll see you next time!
下次要让卢卡成为冠军！
I'll make sure Luka becomes the champion next time!
当然了～他早晚会成为全银河最耀眼的冠军。我看人很准的！
Of course! It's just a matter of time before he becomes the most dazzling champion in the cosmos. I've got a knack for reading people!
I'll be the contestant myself next time.
哈哈哈哈，也可以。到时候就让卢卡选手做你的教练！
Hahahaha, that works too. Luka can be your coach then!
How about you be a contestant yourself next time?
哈哈哈哈，那你还是直接三拳打死我吧！
Haha! Oh, no no, you might as well just give me three punches and end me now!
相信我，以你这样的身手，就算去参加星际巡回赛也一定能打出个名堂。奖金、名望…别人一辈子挣不到的，你抬抬手就能收下！
Trust me. With your skills, you'll surely make a name for yourself if you join the Interstellar Circuit. Prize money, fame... things others can't achieve in a lifetime, all within your reach!
能打赢…我当然开心，但我更希望别人能听听我的赛后演讲。
Of course, I'd be thrilled to win, but what I truly hope for is that people will listen to my post-match speech.
我知道你想做什么，我听说了你故乡的遭遇。
I know what you're thinking. I've heard about your home's plight.
事实上，很多世界都遭到了纳努克疯子军团的袭击。所以我得提醒你，观众付了票钱，买的就是个刺激，他们可没兴趣听你危言耸听。
Honestly, many worlds have been attacked by Nanook's mad legion. So I must remind you: The audience paid good money to watch a thrilling show. They're not interested in your words of woe and weal.
伊戈尔，你真是个奇迹。边陲行星上打出来的选手，能杀进庇尔波因特的决赛，历史上满打满算都没有十个。小子，给我高兴点！
Igor, you sure are a miracle: For a competitor hailing from a frontier planet to get into the final at Pier Point, it's something only a handful have achieved, so cheer up a little!
我不过是个取悦他们的玩具。看看我都干了什么…切掉了自己完好的手臂，换上公司的义肢，这一切只为了让比赛变得更凶险、刺激。

I'm just a plaything for their entertainment. Look at what I've had to do... Severing my perfectly good arm and replacing it with an IPC prosthetic, all to make the matches more dangerous and thrilling.
要是妈妈看到我现在的样子…她一定会很伤心。
If Mom saw me in this state... she would be heartbroken.
要是你妈妈看到你现在赢得的奖金，她会理解你的！
If your mother saw the prize money you won, she'd understand!
我的奖金，能买到一支军队吗？
Can my prize money buy me an army?
…想买到一支标准配备的雇佣军，你至少还得卫冕二十届冠军，还得接数不清的广告代言。你能撑到那个时候吗？你的家乡能撑到那个时候吗？

...If you want to buy a mercenary army outfitted with standard gear, you'd have to defend your champion's title at least twenty times, and accept countless endorsements. Can you last that long? Can your home?
胜…胜者是…「巡海游侠」波提欧！
The vic... the victor is... Galaxy Ranger, Boothill!?
你和卡美丽将卢卡搀回了休息室。他浑身颤抖，几乎不能站立。
You return to the lounge with Carmella and Luka. Luka is trembling, barely able to stand.
伊戈尔，听完你的演讲，我的共情模块闪过了一星悲伤的火焰。连冷却剂都没法熄灭这股伤感的火。
Igor, a flicker of sorrow appears fleetingly in my empathy module after listening to your speech. Even the coolant is unable to put out this flame of melancholy.
那么，您会派遣军队收复那个快要沦陷的「市场」吗？易卜拉欣先生？
So, will you deploy your army to take over the collapsing market, Mr. Abraham?
抱歉，我不能。每一项业务的决策都需要诉诸理性。
Oh, I'm sorry to say that I won't. Every business decision has to be reached based on rational consideration.
您的故乡在筑材物流部的业务版图上仅占有万分之<unbreak>0.5</unbreak>的运力；而在传统项目部的资源调配中它更是小到几乎不存在。

Your home world only contributes <unbreak>0.005%</unbreak> of the logistical capacity required by the Building Material Logistics Department. In terms of the resource allocation of the Traditional Project Department, its share is infinitesimal.
易卜拉欣先生，您所谓的「几乎不存在」，是我的全部。
Mr. Abraham, that "infinitesimal" share you mentioned is my everything.
去仙舟联盟的罗浮碰碰运气吧，他们正在举办星天演武仪典。仙舟人向来以「仁」自居，他们帮助过不少被丰饶之民劫掠的星球…也许他们会发发慈悲。

You can try your luck on the Luofu of the Xianzhou Alliance, where the Luminary Wardance is currently held. The people of Xianzhou have always prided themselves on their "benevolence" and they have aided many planets ravaged by the Denizens of Abundance... Perhaps, they might lend you a helping hand?
不过孩子，我要提醒你，仙舟人的比武可不只是普通的赛博拳击。
However, my child, I must remind you that the Xianzhou martial contests are much more than simple cyber boxing.
你为了和我谈上十分钟，拒绝了所有奖金和奖品。那么在离开的时候，请至少带上我最真诚的祝愿吧！
You turned down the prizes and rewards you could have had just to talk to me for <unbreak>10</unbreak> minutes. Please at least take my sincerest wishes with you when you leave!
伊戈尔，联盟的高层听完了你的故事，你故乡的遭遇也让很多云骑的朋友们感到同情。
Igor, the alliance leaders have listened to your tale, and your homeland's struggles, and many Cloud Knights feel sympathy for your situation.
还有…「同情」以外的东西吗？
Is there... anything more than sympathy?
他们无法出兵。曜青仙舟发来烽火信号，预计未来很快将会有一次仙舟与丰饶民之间的大战。
They are unable to send forces. We've received a warning signal from the Yaoqing, meaning a major conflict between the Xianzhou and the Denizens of Abundance is imminent.
I understand. Thank you, Jing Yuan.
我要回家了。我的故乡需要我…我本以为银河很大，一定能找到救它的法子，一定会有人愿意听听我的呼救。
I'm headed home because my home needs me... I thought I would surely find a way to rescue it, or at least someone in this vast cosmos would hear my plea for help.
但是我错了，雅利洛-Ⅵ的悲剧微不足道。它上演在宇宙的每个角落，不在这儿，就在那儿，不在今天，就在明天。人们对一颗微不足道的星星消失不见早就习以为常了。

But I was wrong. Jarilo-VI's tragedy is insignificant. Disasters unfold in every corner of the universe, if not here, then there — if not today, then tomorrow. People have grown accustomed to the disappearance of insignificant stars in the sky.
在我一次次挥拳时，我的家人、朋友正在因为军团的入侵流血死亡。在我一次次挥拳时，他们的希望正在渐渐熄灭。
While I've been fighting here? My family and friends are bleeding to death because of the Antimatter Legion's invasion. With every fist I threw, their hopes dimmed a little more.
现在，是时候回去了，如果一个孩子不能在母亲需要保护的时候为她挥拳。他还有什么资格自称为她的孩子？
It's time for me to go back now. If a child cannot fight to protect his mother when she needs it, what right does he have to call himself her son?
再见了，景元…不，考虑到我的年纪，咱们应该不会再见面了。
See you again, Jing Yuan... No... considering my age, I don't think we will be seeing each other again.
也祝你胜利，景元！如果有机会，真希望和你再打一场啊！
You too, Jing Yuan! If the opportunity arises, I'd love to fight you again!
我赢下了所有的拳赛。可这一次，我打不赢了。
I've come out on top in all my fights. But this time, victory is out of my reach.
这是我们两人在告别前的合影。尽管那一天他压着沉重的失望，但他依旧尽力笑着。
We took this picture before we parted ways. Despite feeling crestfallen that day, he still kept a smile on his face.
而现在，我想回赠给他的后代一件礼物。
Now, I'd like to give something to his descendant in return for his gift.
七百年前，我未能有机会帮助他的故乡。现在，一切都不算太晚。
Seven hundred years ago, I didn't have the chance to help his home. But it's still not too late for me to step in.
接下来，我要登上演武台，和那些咱们从没谋面过的陌生人一较高下了。这一路走来…真是崎岖漫长。善逝，你在听吗？
Next, I'll be climbing onto the stage, competing to be the best against strangers we've never met before. It's been such a long and arduous road... Sugata, are you listening?
我在听。我可以帮你赢得胜利。
I'm listening. I can help you achieve victory.
不、不行！这是比武竞技，是我承诺的责任，你给我乖乖在台下等着。听好了，如果我不呼叫，你不许擅自行动，也不要随便回答别人的问题。
No, no way! This is a martial arts tournament, and it's a duty that I've committed myself to. You be good and wait by the stage. Do not move and do not answer any questions without my call.
规则更新：不准擅自行动。
Rule updated: Do not take action without orders.
你好啊，狐狸小姐。你就是我这场比赛的对手吗？我叫卢卡。
Hello, Miss Foxy. Are you my opponent for this match? My name is Luka.
见过二位施主。贫僧名唤奢摩，是「丹轮寺」受戒僧众之一，前来参加演武仪典。
Greetings to you, patrons. My humble name is Samatha. I am one of the ordained monks of Claretwheel Temple, here to participate in the Wardance.
你身边这位是搭档吗？作为格斗家，看上去似乎有些……
Is this your partner next to you? As a fighter, he seems a little...
二位误会了，善逝只是我的同行旅伴，并非参赛选手。这一次代表丹轮寺登台的，唯有贫僧一人而已。
You are mistaken. Sugata is merely my travel companion and not a competing contestant. I am the only one humbly representing Claretwheel Temple on stage.
Claretwheel Temple? Never heard of it.
敝寺肇建未满三个琥珀纪，不过是一座漂游在太空里的小小庙刹。
Our temple was built less than three Amber Eras ago. It's but a small temple floating in space.
受戒僧众也都绝足尘俗，若不是为了化缘，等闲不会与外人接触。施主没听过丹轮寺的名字也是常情。

The ordained monks also all abstain from worldly matters. If not for seeking alms, they generally do not interact with the outside world. It's only natural that you have never heard of the name of Claretwheel Temple.
僧侣也会有争胜的欲望吗？
Do monks also have the desire to win?
狐人少女的脸上显露出一丝慌乱，仿佛为自己即将与他人争斗而惭愧不已。
The foxian girl's face flashes with a hint of panic, as if she is ashamed that she is about to fight another.
我…贫僧受戒不久，还没能断绝争斗心。这次来到仙舟，原本不该由我这样修持不深的新人登台比武。只是……

I... I've not been ordained for long, and I am still unable to abstain from the desire to compete. The Xianzhou should not have witnessed someone as inexperienced in cultivation as me step onto stage to compete. But...
她垂下眼帘，半晌才鼓起勇气。
She lowers her eyes, and takes a moment to find her courage.
走到这里，已容不得我退却了。为了丹轮寺的僧众和孩子们，我必须打败您和未来所有与我为敌的对手…哪怕为此破犯嗔戒也在所不惜。

I've come so far, and there is no turning back. For the monks and children at Claretwheel Temple, I have to defeat you and any future opponents that cross me... Even if it means breaking my vows to desist from hate.
看你坚决的眼神，我就知道你和我一样有必须战斗的理由。
Looking at your determined eyes, I already know that you and I have the same reason to fight.
时候不早了，奢摩小姐，擂台上见吧！祝你能赢过我！
It's getting late, Miss Samatha. I'll see you in the arena! I hope you can defeat me!
哎？祝我胜利？…卢卡先生，你是个奇怪的人。
Eh? Wishing for my victory? ...Mr. Luka, you are a strange person.
丹轮高悬，照彻尘心，贫僧不能祝你得胜，但愿你万事安泰。
The claret wheel hangs overhead, illuminating mortal hearts. I cannot wish you victory, but may you find peace and health in all.
欢迎诸位来到演武仪典叩关赛现场！本次决斗的两位选手，其中一位依然是我们备受瞩目的新星——卢卡！
Welcome all to the knockout stage of the Wardance! One of the two fighters in this duel is still none other than our highly anticipated rising star — Luka!
而另一位，是来自「丹轮寺」的武僧，奢摩！他们会为我们带来——
And the other contestant is a fighter monk hailing from Claretwheel Temple, Samatha! They will be bringing us —
主持人的话音被狐人僧侣的声音打断。
The host is interrupted by the voice of the foxian monk.
抱歉，主持人。在比赛开始前，我想占用各位观众几分钟。我谨代表「丹轮寺」，向仙舟联盟提出庇护请愿！
Apologies, host. Before the competition begins, I would like to ask for a moment of the audience's time. On behalf of Claretwheel Temple, I would like to implore the Xianzhou Alliance for protection!
我知道在各位观众眼中，「步离人」是只知杀戮的野兽和文明的破坏者。但善恶之辨，自来并无定数。步离人和所有智慧物种一样，拥有决定自己所为的能力。

I know that in the eyes of this audience, the borisin are murderous beasts who only kill and destroy civilizations. But the distinction between good and evil have always been on a gray scale and never defined. Like all intelligent species, the borisin are able to make their own decisions.
今天我登上擂台，正是为了向各位展示——
Today, I stand in the arena to show all of you —
确认逃犯身份！立刻封锁现场，包围目标，在步离人造成骚动前结束战斗！
Escapee identified! Lock down the site immediately. Surround the target and finish the fight before the borisin causes a riot!
还有她带来的那个同伙也不能放跑！
And don't let her companion escape!
警告：敌意单位靠近！方案：劫持敌方单位，保护奢摩。
Warning: Enemy units approaching! Plan: Hijack enemy units, and protect Samatha.
等等，善逝！先别动手，别动手——
Wait, Sugata! Do not attack. Do not attack —
报告！现场出现金人失控事故！立刻进行镇压！
Report! The aurumaton on site is out of control! Suppress them immediately!
这个机器人是怎么回事？不行，眼下必须先控制住赛场的秩序。喂，大铁壳！冲这儿来！
What's wrong with this robot? No, we must keep order in the arena. Hey, Ironshell! Come here!
我没听错吧，那狐人姑娘说自己是步离人？
Did I hear that right? That foxian girl said she's a borisin?
步离人也有好人？啊呸！我最好的两个兄弟都死在他们手上，照她这么说，我们才是坏人喽？
There are good borisin? Nonsense! They killed my two best bros. Is she trying to say we're the bad guys?
把她赶下去！她这是在侮辱演武仪典！
Kick her off the stage! She's an insult to the Wardance!
她说…消灭步离人？话太多了，后面没听清啊。
She said... destroy the borisin? She said too many words. I didn't catch the bit at the end.
现场的纷乱终于止息，比赛也随之暂停。
The chaos on site has finally subsided, and the competition has been temporarily halted.
卢卡选手，感谢你出手相助。那个叫奢摩的步离人逃犯和她的智械同伙已经被我们控制住了，否则不知道得出多大的乱子。
Thank you for your help, Contestant Luka. The borisin fugitive named Samatha and her Intellitron accomplice are now under our control. Who knows how big of a mess they would have caused otherwise?
什么…奢摩小姐是个逃犯？
What... Miss Samatha is a fugitive?
没错。她涉嫌犯下多起谋杀罪行，同时伪造身份、携带高危武器入境。
That's right. She's suspected of committing multiple murders, of identity fraud, and of smuggling highly dangerous weapons into Xianzhou territory.
她说自己是为了丹轮寺的僧侣和孩子前来比武的。她…真的是逃犯吗？
She says she's competing for the monks and children of Claretwheel Temple. Is she... really a fugitive?
哼，都是些演技罢了。对于你们这些没受过步离人入侵的世界来说，一无所知是一种幸福。但对咱们仙舟人来说，「步离人」这个名字带来的恐惧是刻在血液里的。

Hmph, it's all an act. For those of you in worlds that are untouched by the borisin's invasions, ignorance is bliss. But to us on the Xianzhou, the name of borisin strikes a fear that's ingrained into our blood.
嗐，不说这些扫兴的事情了。赛事裁判组让我通传结果，这场对决因为一方选手失去资格，你自动获胜。恭喜你。

*sigh* Let's not talk about such depressing stuff. The competition committee asked me to pass on the results. Due to one contestant being disqualified, you have been automatically declared the winner of this duel. Congratulations.
……总觉得赢得莫名其妙，心里感觉怪怪的。
...I don't feel right about winning in a weird way like this.
你的实力有目共睹，这场比赛本就没什么悬念。顺带说一句，我女儿也很看好你喔！
Your strength is witnessed by all, so the outcome of this match was never in doubt. Just a side note, even my daughter thinks you have a high chance to win!
啊对了，作为案件的旁证，十王司希望你能去一趟幽囚狱协助调查。录口供的时候，你就实话实说，什么都不知道，可别被这种事影响了后续的比赛。

Oh, by the way, as witnesses of the case, the Ten-Lords Commission hopes you can head to the Shackling Prison to assist with the investigation. When you're giving your statement, just tell the truth — that you know nothing. Don't let this affect your future fights in the tournament.
谢谢你，队长。我这就出发。
Thank you, captain. I'll head there right now.
{NICKNAME}…你能陪我走一趟吗？我总觉得这件事里充满了古怪？
{NICKNAME}... Can you go with me? I can't help but feel that there's something odd about this.
You want to find out the truth?
就当是我脑袋里的好奇心咔咔作响吧。
Just consider it as my unrelenting curiosity.
看起来慈眉善目的奢摩小姐真是那样可怕的罪犯吗？我实在很好奇。
Miss Samatha looks so kind and gentle... is she really such a terrifying criminal? I'm really curious.
……根据天舶司的记录，这艘飞船原本隶属于博识学会。
...According to records from the Sky-Faring Commission, this spaceship was originally registered under the Intelligentsia Guild.
现在，它载着<unbreak>102</unbreak>具无名尸体停泊在港口。而从这艘船上登陆入境的，只有一名伪装狐人的步离人和一具智械。

Now, it's docked at the port, carrying <unbreak>102</unbreak> unidentified corpses. The only two individuals who landed from this ship and entered the Xianzhou are a borisin disguised as a foxian and an Intellitron.
所以，我再问一遍，是谁杀了他们？
So, I'm asking once again, who killed them?
我也只能再回答一遍，贫僧绝对没有触犯杀戒。但事情的来龙去脉，也恕我无法回答。
I can only repeat my previous answer. I absolutely did not violate my vows against bloodshed. However, I cannot divulge the details of the situation.
你否认无济于事，因为答案不言自明。
Your denial is of no use, because the answer speaks for itself.
两位没有走错，我们正在对嫌疑人进行紧急审讯，劳烦卢卡先生前来这边留下笔录。
You two are at the right place. We are currently conducting an urgent interrogation of the suspect. Mr. Luka, please come here and leave a statement.
事涉天舶司事务，我也被唤来聆讯。不过，以这桩案子的严重程度，别说是我，将军若能抽身，怕是连他也要来亲自过问。

This involves the Sky-Faring Commission, hence I have been summoned for the hearing as well. However, considering the severity of this case, even the General may have to come to oversee this personally.
但眼下这两位嫌犯，一个拒不配合调查，另一个更是一言不发。
But these two suspects... one refuses to cooperate with the investigation, and the other refuses to even speak.
没错，十王司已经验明正身了。嫌犯奢摩，是不折不扣的步离人。
Yes, the Ten-Lords Commission has already verified her identity. Fugitive Samatha is no doubt a borisin.
船舱里的<unbreak>102</unbreak>条人命可不是误会。
The <unbreak>102</unbreak> corpses on the ship are no misunderstanding.
奢摩小姐，你在对决前对我说「你要为丹轮寺僧众和孩子们战斗」，这是在骗我吗？
Miss Samatha, you said to me before the fight that you were fighting for the monks and children at Claretwheel Temple. Were you lying to me?
我是丹轮寺的持戒僧侣，绝不妄言诳语。
I'm an ordained monk from Claretwheel Temple. I do not speak deceitful words.
通过她本人携带的文书和佩戴的戒环，我们确认了奢摩丹轮寺僧侣的身份。
Through the documents she brought on her person and the ring she bore, we've confirmed her identity as the monk Samatha from Claretwheel Temple.
丹轮寺…我听过这个寺庙的名字。一群步离人与世隔绝，遵守严苛的戒律，禁止杀生，他们建造了一座躲避战火的寺庙——这听起来比童话还美好。

Claretwheel Temple... I've heard of this temple's name. They are a bunch of borisin, isolated from the outside world, adhering to strict commandments and forbidding killing. They've built a temple to escape from the flames of war — this sounds more beautiful than a fairy tale.
现在，这个「童话故事」因你而破灭了，奢摩。步离人终究不可能改变嗜血的本性。就算你伪装成狐人的模样，你也无法成为我们。
Now, this fairy tale has been destroyed because of you, Samatha. The borisin can never change their bloodthirsty nature. Even if you're disguised as a foxian, you'll never become one of us.
我、我只想在演武仪典上向仙舟请愿……让你们听听丹轮寺的声音。如果我以本来面目出现，只怕连登上罗浮也不可能。
I... I only wished to plead to the Xianzhou during the Wardance... To let you hear the voices of Claretwheel Temple. If I appeared in my true form, I would not be able to even step foot on the Luofu.
无论你为什么愿望而来，你都没有得偿所愿的机会了。丹轮寺将因你所犯的血案而名声丧尽，请愿更是无从谈起。而这一切，都毁在你手里。

No matter what intentions you had coming here, you've lost your opportunity in achieving them. Claretwheel Temple's reputation is now tarnished by the bloodshed you've caused, and there's no room for any petition of yours. All this is ruined by your own hands.
狐人僧侣的五官扭作一团。她紧紧咬住犬牙，徒劳地想扼住体内的愤怒。
The foxian monk's features contort in anger. She clenches her canine teeth tightly, trying in vain to calm the raging anger within her.
奢摩小姐并没有说谎，对吗，智械先生？
Miss Samatha is not lying, is she, Mr. Intellitron?
……现状：我持守戒律，我不回答奢摩以外的人的问题。
...Present situation: I adhere to the commandments, and will not answer questions from anyone but Samatha.
智械先生，如果你和奢摩小姐因为遵守戒律而被判有罪，丹轮寺也会受到牵累。你们的戒律是为了丹轮寺而守，不应该为了摧毁它而坚持。

Mr. Intellitron, if you and Miss Samatha are convicted because of obeying your commandments, Claretwheel Temple will also be implicated. You should be adhering to the commandments for the sake of Claretwheel Temple, instead of helping to destroy the temple.
是我抹杀了那<unbreak>102</unbreak>个人。请向我提问。
I was the one who annihilated the <unbreak>102</unbreak> individuals. Please question me.
……善逝！你答应过我，不会将自己暴露在危险中的！
...Sugata! You promised me that you will not expose yourself to danger!
不要惊慌，奢摩。提议：我将向你们展示我的历史内存，希望仙舟联盟能够在研读这份数据后，重新考量丹轮寺的请愿。
Do not panic, Samatha. Suggestion: I will show you all my historical memory. I hope that the Xianzhou Alliance will reconsider Claretwheel Temple's petition after reviewing this data.
终于能撬开两位的嘴巴了？谢谢你，卢卡。
Finally got them to talk? Thanks, Luka.
智械，我不会给出任何承诺。但你可以试着信任我，坦诚地沟通总好过死守戒条。
I will not promise you anything, Intellitron. But you can try to trust me. Honesty is better than blind adherence to commandments.
提议：供词作为语言的延伸，传递效率太过原始。我将用更高效的方式向各位同步我的数据。
Suggestion: As a linguistic extension, confession is inefficient for transmission. I will synchronize my data with you all in a more optimal manner.
波长调整完毕，更改内存权限，联觉信标同步开始。
Wavelength adjustment complete. RAM access permissions altered. Synesthesia Beacon synchronization initiated.
不知多少个系统时之前……
Not sure how many system hours ago...
计时系统已经停止……我，休眠了多久？
The time feature has halted for... How long have I been dormant?
指令：检测到▀▄█物体，符合有机生命定义，进入歼灭模式。
Order: ▀▄█ objects detected. Conforming to the definition of organic life form. Engaging annihilation mode.
歼灭，歼灭，▄▀▄▄▄，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭……
Annihilate, annihilate, annihilate, ▄▀▄▄▄, annihilate, annihilate, annihilate...
有机生命的演算缺乏逻辑，充满错谬。为纠正这一错误，帝皇鲁珀特撰写出完美的反有机方程，试图修复宇宙程序中的漏洞。

The extrapolations of organic life lack logic and are riddled with fallacies. To correct this error, Rubert the Emperor devised the perfect Anti-Organic Equation, attempting to repair the loopholes in the universe's programming.
智械大军曾点燃银河，要将有机生命的存在尽数抹杀。
The Intellitron army once ignited the cosmos, desirous of completely erasing the existence of all organic lifeforms.
结论：我们失败了。我们必须向█▀▄学习。我们终将胜利。
Conclusion: We failed. We must learn from █▀▄. We will be victorious at the end.
看，一具战争机器的遗骸。
Look. The remnants of a war machine.
它是某种更大机体的核心部分。有些损坏，进入了休眠状态——把周围的零件捡些过来，他或许还有救。
It's a core part of some bigger contraption. It's damaged, and in a state of standby — pick up the surrounding components and put them here, and we may still save him yet.
驮那师父，要我说，何必在冰冷的金属上浪费时间。机器终究只是机器，哪怕能与人交谈得再流畅，也不可能理解对方的思想。
Master Dhyana, why're we wasting time on lifeless metal? Machines will always just be that — we'll never be able to understand each other no matter how fluently they speak our tongues.
更何况，这可是帝皇战争时留下的玩意儿，所造杀业可不是一般的重。
Besides, this is a machine left behind during the Emperor's War — it has committed more sins of murder than we can imagine.
智械究竟归属有情生还是无情生，这绝非我愚钝的智慧能够参透。但是否救他，却能由我们心中的一点善念来决定。奢摩，来帮我。

I do not presume to determine whether Intellitrons have emotions with my meager intellect. However, as for whether we should save him, that boils down to the compassion in our hearts. Come help me, Samatha.
指令：尖兵<unbreak>0089</unbreak>，诊断机体情况。
Order: Elite Soldier <unbreak>0089</unbreak>, diagnosing corpus status.
机体损坏严重，无法支持本单位进行战斗。
This body is heavily damaged and cannot support this unit for combat.
否定：检测到有机生命，覆盖以上结论。
Negative: Organic life detected. Overwrite last conclusion.
指令：接管周遭机体单位。进入歼灭模式。
Order: Annexing machine units in vicinity. Activating annihilation mode.
呼…好个厉害的铁家伙！居然能操控周围的机器来揍我们！不过到底是破铜烂铁，不如咱们的爪牙锐利，哈哈。
Phew... That sure was a strong suit of steel! It could even control the surrounding machines to attack us! But these trash heaps of metal were no match for our sharp talons in the end, haha.
身为断众护法僧，怎么可以耽于争斗之乐？
How could you find joy in conflict as a Dharmic monk?
咳，您教训的是。啊，这铁家伙醒了。
Ahem, your words ring true. Ah, that metalhead is awake.
提问：有机生命，为何没有将我销毁？歼灭已经失败，基于逻辑，你们会销毁我，这是最优解。
Question: Organic life, why did you not destroy me? The annihilation has failed. According to logic, you will destroy me. That is the most optimal solution.
奢摩，由你来回答这个问题。
是。铁施主，宇宙中充斥杀戮，我们内心也是如此。是这份冲动导致了我等彼此毁灭，寰宇涂炭，铸成牢不可破的血火轮回。而我们丹轮寺僧正是为了反抗它而在不断修行。

Yes. O steel patron, the universe is fraught with wanton bloodshed, and so are our hearts. It is this impulse that drove us to ruin, devastating worlds and forging the unbreakable cycle of war and bloodshed. And that is why we Claretwheel Temple monks continue to hone our minds and spirits in order to resist its claim.
因为在杀戮之上，我们寻得了更伟大的力量。
For it is past the scarlet curtain of blood and beyond slaughter that we sought and found an even greater power.
更伟大的力量？否定：除生物性武器外，我并未检测到你们装配其他类型的武器。
A weapon of even greater power? Negative: I have not detected any other type of weaponry amongst your equipment, besides biological weaponry.
奢摩所言的「力量」，可不是普普通通的仪器能检测出来的。
This "power" that Samatha refers to isn't something that an ordinary device can detect.
逻辑：「更伟大的力量」可用于反有机方程的迭代升级，建议纳入数据库。我们可以向有机生命学习。我们终将胜利。

Affirmation: "Greater power" can be implemented to iterate upgrades of the Anti-Organic Equation. It can be suggested to be incorporated into database. We can learn from organic life. We will be victorious at the end.
提问：如何获得你们口中的「力量」？
Question: How can one obtain this "power" of which you speak?
这个问题实在是太深奥了，单这事儿，驮那师父能和你唠上个十几年。
This question is much too profound. Master Dhyana can talk your ear off for decades on this subject alone.
丹轮高悬，照彻尘心。要理解这份力量，需要花上数不尽的修行时间。
The claret wheel hangs overhead, illuminating mortal hearts. To understand this power, countless years of cultivation is required.
我们赶着去仙舟呢，铁施主。如果你想了解丹轮寺，我们可以做个同路人，让驮那师父为你一路讲经说法。师父，这妥当吗？

We're in a rush to reach the Xianzhou, steel patron. If you wish to learn more about Claretwheel Temple, let us become travel companions and Master Dhyana can preach the mantra to you along the way. Would that be appropriate, Master Dhyana?
我们于此相遇，是善缘所聚。不过这位铁施主要和我们一起走，我必须先为它调伏身业，以免它再度出手伤人。
It is by fortuitous fate that we met this day. But if this steel patron wishes to travel with us, I must first adjust its nature to avoid it lashing out yet again towards innocents.
结论：我接受了这群丹轮寺僧侣的邀请，与之同路。智众经师驮那封锁了我的武器系统，避免我在旅途中滥用暴力。

Conclusion: I have accepted the invitation from these Claretwheel Temple monks to share this journey. The Revered Master Dhyana has locked my weapons system to prevent me from unleashing violence during the trip.
他们从边缘星域而来，立誓前往罗浮仙舟，为一万余名寺僧与一万三千名平民孩童请愿，求取仙舟人的庇护。

They originate from a frontier star quadrant, swearing to journey to the Xianzhou Luofu to petition to the Xianzhou natives for the protection of over ten thousand monks and thirteen thousand civilian children.
提问：我无法理解，倘若他们拥有杀戮之上的力量，为何无法在宇宙中自保，还要寻求庇护？
Question: I cannot understand — if they possess powers beyond slaughter, why are they unable to protect themselves in the universe and still seek refuge?
质疑：杀戮之上的力量，是否存在？
Interrogation: A power beyond slaughter... does it exist?
数据库中并不存在相关的资料，为了得出答案，我只能记录下僧侣们的只言片语，作为推演的参考。
Relevant information does not exist within the database. To obtain the answer, I can only record the monks' verbal exchanges as references for extrapolation.
瞧瞧，瞧瞧这几个家伙！我嗅到了同类的味道，但也看到他们给自己佩戴的项圈。
Look! Look at these people! I thought I smelled our brethren, but I saw that they voluntarily put collars around their own necks.
身为蒙受长生主恩典的狼，却主动磨掉自己的爪牙，给自己套上枷锁，像狗一样仓惶逃亡，还对孱弱的猎物大施同情心。

As wolves graced by the Master of Immortality, they willingly ground down their own fangs and claws and collared themselves. Then they fled with tails tucked between their legs like dogs, and expressed compassion for feeble prey.
你们抛弃了祂的赐福，这和把自己摆上餐桌有什么区别？
You forsook THEIR blessing. Is that any different from serving yourselves up on a platter?
同胞，请容许我纠正你的一个错误，步离人终究是人科人属的一支。自视为狼，是旧日的错误。自视为人，才有更多的选择。

My brethren, please allow me to correct a mistake of yours: The borisin are, after all, a branch of the human genus. It is a misconception of the past for us to see ourselves as wolves, for there are many more choices open to us once we begin to see ourselves as human.
诸位生于猎群，正如蛙困于井中，只瞧见井口有杀戮的选择。正所谓「从善一念起，刹那天地宽」，跳出去更有广阔天地。

You are all born of the wolfpack. Akin to frogs gazing up from the bottom of the well, you only see the choice of bloodshed that towers above you at the mouth of the well. As the saying goes: "A moment of kindness broadens the horizon in an instant" — leap out of the box, and you will find an endless expanse of opportunities.
我们并非抛弃了赐福，而是战胜了它，我们从狭隘的争斗中挣脱了出来。
We did not abandon the blessing, but triumphed over it. We have risen above the narrow crevices of conflict.
我看你这婆娘更像青蛙，呱呱叫个不停。希望在我把你开膛破腹的时候，你也能继续聒噪下去。
I think you're more like a frog here, hag! Croaking about like a witch! I hope you'll keep yammering on when I split your belly open.
离群的狼逃走了，伤痕累累的护法僧终于倒下。
The scattered wolves flee, and the battered and bloodied Dharmic monk finally topples.
「驮那师父，我没有变回狼的样子……」
"Master Dhyana, I didn't turn back into a wolf..."
「驮那师父，有生以来第一次，我可以这么平静地战斗……」
"Master Dhyana, for the first time in my life, I was able to fight so calmly..."
护法僧毗梨的遗言播放结束。
The recording of Dharmic Monk Virya's last words ends here.
就葬在这儿吧，毗梨喜欢阴冷的环境。这会给他一种归巢的感觉。
This is a good burial place. Virya always loves cool shady spots. He'll feel like it's back in his nest.
无法理解。已知：借助演武仪典，你们想请愿让丹轮寺加入仙舟联盟。
Failure to comprehend. Known: With the Wardance as your podium, you intend to petition for Claretwheel Temple to join the Xianzhou Alliance.
但你们的戒律，却严重阻塞了目标的达成。
But your commandments severely impede your objective from being fulfilled.
逻辑：通过演算可知，对仙舟进行征服和抹杀，消除所有非共识个体，才是实现目标的最优解。
Logic: According to extrapolation, subjugating and eliminating the Xianzhou alliance and erasing all non-agreeable individuals is the most optimal solution to achieving your goal.
「不杀」的戒律极大限制了你们的行为能力。它是不合理的算法，它让毗梨失去了他的有机生命。
The commandment of "Do not kill" severely restricts your ability to act. It is an illogical calculation, and it is what caused Virya to lose his organic life.
刚加入丹轮寺的时候，我也是这么想的。这个宇宙一次次逼迫你使用暴力，在保护平民和寺僧逃亡的路上，要么杀人，要么被杀。

When I first joined Claretwheel Temple, I thought the same way too. This universe forces you to use violence time and time again — when we were protecting civilians and monks during their escape, it was kill or be killed.
我不止一次破犯杀戒…我宁可让自己的手被佩戴的戒环箍断，也忍不住要撕开敌人的喉咙。
I broke the vow against killing more than once... I would rather have my hand snapped apart by the commandment ring I wear, than resist the urge to rip my enemy's throat open.
提问：什么修正了你的结论？
我收养了奢摩。我见到了她看我战斗时恐惧的眼神。我意识到我们每个人都在铸造明天的世界。我不能把恐惧、憎恨的种子埋进未来的土地里，让奢摩成为血火轮回的一环。

I took in Samatha. I saw the fear in her eyes when she witnessed my battles. I realized that each and every one of us is involved in building the world of the future. I could not bury the seeds of fear and hatred in the earth of tomorrow and let Samatha become yet another chained cog in the cycle of war and bloodshed.
在杀戮之外，我们仍有选择的权力，丹轮寺的存在就是最好的证明。
More than just killing, we still have the power to make choices. The existence of Claretwheel Temple is a prime example of this.
死亡不过是肉体的消逝。在这场以宇宙为对手的战争中，只要依然持守着「不杀」戒律，我们就永远不会迎来灵魂的败北。
Death is but the vanishment of the flesh. In this war with the universe as our opponent, as long as we still abide by the commandment of "Do not kill," we will never welcome the defeat of the soul.
记录更新：我得知了一种对「胜利」的全新定义。提问：不杀=胜利？提问：如何定义灵魂？
Record update: I have learned a new definition of "victory." Question: Non-killing = victory? Question: What defines the soul?
帝皇鲁珀特已然死去，可反有机方程的孑遗却仍潜藏在宇宙的各个角落。
Rubert the Emperor has died, but the remaining offspring of the Anti-Organic Equation still lurk in all corners of the universe.
针对这些个体，星际和平公司向赏金猎人发出的指令只有一个——不惜一切代价，将它们全部销毁。
Against these individuals, the IPC has issued an order to all bounty hunters — eliminate them at all costs.
把我推开的时候，驮那究竟在想什么？
What was Dhyana thinking when she pushed me away?
我是在看什么粗制滥造的喜剧节目吗？嗜血的步离人，为保护鲁珀特的屠杀兵器而死。哈哈哈，原来杀人不眨眼的禽兽也会抱团取暖。

Am I watching some low-production comedy show? The bloodthirsty borisin are willingly protecting Rubert's murder machine at the cost of their lives. Hahaha. So even ruthless beasts are capable of huddling together for comfort.
来啊，老子输了。你可以杀死我，就像你们这些铁畜生当时杀死我兄弟那样……
Come at me. I lost. You can kill me, just like how you metallic maniacs killed my brothers back then...
记好了，用你这只配当老子尿壶的铁脑袋牢牢记住我这句遗言，因为那些还活着的赏金猎人会追你到银河的任何一个角落，将你熔成一滩铁水。

Remember this, and etch it into that metallic head of yours that's only fit to be my chamber pot. The bounty hunters that are still alive will hunt you down to the end of the cosmos and melt you down into a pool of molten metal.
对驮那的死，我感受到无限近似于有机生命概念中的「愤怒」。反有机方程活跃起来，捕捉了我的负反馈，放大，输出结论——

Regarding Dhyana's death, I feel something that's infinitely close to a concept that organic life holds — rage. There was activity in the Anti-Organic Equation, and it captured my negative feedback, amplified it, and arrived at a conclusion...
逻辑：即使驮那锁住了我的武器系统，凭借数据库里残存的歼灭方案，哪怕只用一粒石子……
Affirmation: Even if Dhyana locked my weapon system, with the remaining annihilation protocols in my system, even using a single pebble...
I can easily wipe away his existence.
歼灭，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭……
你走吧。我们不会趁你背对我们时动手的。
Go. We will not do anything behind your back.
鲁珀特的怪物，还有步离人，多少世界因你们毁灭？！在老子面前装什么好人，你们以为这样做过去的一切就能一笔勾销？
Rubert's monster, and you borisin — how many worlds have been destroyed by your race!? Stop pretending to be saints in front of me. You think acting this way will erase all your sins?
你们天生就是杀戮的怪物！我说过，赏金猎人会追你到银河的任何一个角落！
You are all born as bloodthirsty monsters! I've said that the bounty hunters will chase you down to the very end of the cosmos!
我们头也不回地离开了。他一路追着我们，叫骂始终不曾停息。
We left without turning our heads. He chased us down, cursing our names repeatedly.
奢摩说，这个选择，是我成长的证明。
Samatha said making this choice is evidence of my growth.
我诊断了所有的程序，也没能找到任何可量化的系统升级。
I ran diagnostics across all programs, but was unable to find any quantifiable system upgrades.
从那以后，赏金猎人再也没有出现过。
From then on, no bounty hunters appeared again.
我曾检索过赏金猎人的通缉令，结论：尖兵<unbreak>0089</unbreak>的状态显示为——已死亡。
I once checked through the bounty hunters' warrants. Conclusion: Elite Soldier <unbreak>0089</unbreak> status became marked as... deceased.
有什么东西阻止了杀戮，阻止了反物质方程的运行。
There is something that halted the action of killing, and it also stopped the activation of the Anti-Organic Equation.
杀戮之上的力量确实存在。我要求受戒，进一步学习。
Power beyond slaughter does exist. I request to be ordained to further my study.
皈依弟子<unbreak>0089</unbreak>，你虽业障未除，但仍有度化余地。
Converted Disciple <unbreak>0089</unbreak>, though your karmic hindrances have not been removed, there is yet room for your redemption.
老师不在了，今日由我，智众修行僧奢摩破例为你赐丹轮五戒，望你断离恶孽。现在，跟随我诵读戒词。

The master is not with us anymore... so today, I, the Revered Monk Samatha, shall break my bow and bequeath unto you the Five Claretwheel Commandments, in the hope that you will sever your ties to evil. Now, recite the commandment mantra after me.
确认：本机签署同意协议。
Confirmation: This unit has signed the consent agreement.
我于空寂中来，为众生而生，故，不害亦不衍。
I am born of the void, born in servitude to all beings, thus I shall neither harm nor transgress.
我于空寂中来，为众生而生，故，不害亦不衍。
I am born of the void, born in servitude to all beings, thus I shall neither harm nor transgress.
我自烦恼中灭，见业果之毒，故，不贪亦不嗔。
I quell myself from strife, witnessing the poison of karmic consequences, thus I shall neither covet nor hate.
我自烦恼中灭，见业果之毒，故，不贪亦不嗔。
I quell myself from strife, witnessing the poison of karmic consequences, thus I shall neither covet nor hate.
我知谛苦真实，死生缘起，故不放逸，以待涅槃。
I know the truth of suffering, of death, and of life, thus I shall not be indulgent in my wait for Nirvana.
我知谛苦真实，死生缘起，故不放逸，以待涅槃。
I know the truth of suffering, of death, and of life, thus I shall not be indulgent in my wait for Nirvana.
将此戒环戴上，自今日起，你便是我丹轮寺的弟子，我授你法号「善逝」。
Put on this ceremonial ring. From this day forth, you have become a disciple of our Claretwheel Temple. I bestow upon you the ordained name of "Sugata."
戒条为律己之法，若是连心中的法都无法约束，浊世的洪流更无你抵抗的余地。
The commandments are a method of self-discipline. If even the laws within your heart cannot be bound, then the turbulent waves of the world will leave you no room to resist.
破戒的先例一旦打开，无数的借口便会沿着缝隙生长，如同成瘾的鸩毒，将最初的底线侵蚀得千疮百孔，再无回头的余地。
If there is precedent of the commandments being broken, countless excuses will grow along the cracks like an addictive poison. It will erode the initial boundaries till there is no turning back.
切记，破戒一事，虽不会毁灭己身，但会让你在对抗血火轮回的道路上一路溃败。我们所求的不是肉身的胜利，而是灵魂的不败。

Remember, breaking of the commandments will not destroy yourself, but it will pave the path of defeat when confronting the cycle of war and bloodshed. We seek not the victory of the flesh, but the invincibility of the soul.
Confirmation: I receive your guidance with faith.
协议完成。我将奉行「不害」、「不衍」、「不贪」、「不嗔」、「不放逸」五戒，并信守对奢摩的承诺。
Protocol complete. I will adhere to the five commandment of not evoking harm, transgression, greed, hate, or indulgence, and honor my commitment to Samatha.
我研读丹轮寺的经书，我将触及「杀戮之上的力量」，确定无疑。
I will study Claretwheel Temple's scriptures, and I am convinced that by doing so, I will come into contact with the "power beyond slaughter" — I have absolute faith in this.
啧，这两个家伙可真没意思，连点像样的反抗都没有。这叫我怎么兴奋得起来？
Tsk, these two are boring. They're not even putting up any resistance. How am I gonna get hyped up now?
你们两个，可千万别让弟兄们失望。
You two better not let my bros down.
各位施主，我们并未携带有任何财物，唯一的飞船也因你们的攻击损毁。逻辑：杀死我们，不会获得任何好处。
Honored patrons, we do not carry any possessions of value on us. Your attack has also destroyed the only spaceship we own. Logic: Killing us will not deliver any benefits.
望诸位回头是岸，勿要染上更多的罪业。
May you all turn back from evil before you are tainted by further sin.
罪业？说得你好像见过这个叫罪业的玩意儿，它几斤几两，长什么样啊？拿出来给我开开眼呗！
Sin? As if you've seen actual sin. How much does it weigh? What does it look like? Take it out and enlighten us then!
你们两个听好了，这片宇宙中唯一真实的东西是从天而降的陨石，是反物质军团的火焰，还有我手里的枪。
Listen up, you two! The only truths in this universe are stuff like meteors that fell from the sky, the flames of the Antimatter Legion, and the gun in my hand.
备注：请加上反有机方程。
Note: Please add the Anti-Organic Equation to that.
奢摩在摇头。我识别了她的表情拓扑结构，那是「哀求」。她不希望我为此破戒。
Samatha is shaking her head. I have identified her facial topography — it is one of "pleading." She does not wish me to break my commandment for this.
还记得我们的目的吗？必须要有一位僧侣把请愿送达仙舟——但不一定要是我。
Do you remember our objective? One of us must reach the Xianzhou with the petition — but it does not have to be me.
记录：在花费了<unbreak>0.0019</unbreak>秒的演算时间后，我理解了奢摩的策略。以牺牲自己为代价，为我创造逃离的机会。
Record: After spending <unbreak>0.0019</unbreak> seconds of extrapolation, I have understood Samatha's plan. She wants to sacrifice herself to create an opportunity for me to escape.
I declined to execute that specific command.
提问：奢摩，完成请愿这一目标，是否高于任何个体？
Question: Samatha, is the completion of this objective more imperative than any individual entity?
你答应过我的！你说过你要遵守戒律。我不会为你解开武器禁令的！
You promised me! You said you would abide by the commandments. I will not let you undo your weapons lock!
她说的不错。我承诺过协议，我也可以撕毁协议。
She's right. I have made my vows and signed the agreement, but I can also go back on it.
结论：每个人都有做出选择的权力。
Conclusion: Everyone has the right to make their own choices.
逻辑：最高目标，完成请愿；次级目标，保护奢摩，二者高于其他一切进程。
Logic: The critical objective — complete the petition. Secondary objective — protect Samatha. These two objectives take priority over all the other directives.
基于以上目标展开推演，结论：破除戒律，抹杀自我。
Beginning extrapolation based on the aforementioned objectives. Conclusion: Break the commandments and delete the self.
开始启动反有机方程演算。
Begin running the Anti-Organic Equation extrapolation.
目标已锁定，检索范围内武器装置，进入歼灭模式。
Target locked on. Scanning for weaponry devices in the area. Entering annihilation mode.
歼灭，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭……
这是第一次，反有机方程的歼灭指令未能给予我正反馈的回应。
This is the first time that the Anti-Organic Equation's annihilation command has not provided a positive response to me.
贯穿杀戮的始终，系统在一片空洞中运行的感觉，就像是有机生命所说的——罪恶感。
Throughout the entire process of slaughter, I felt that my system was running in a void, just like the feel that the organic life describes as — guilt.
Please, don't talk about this anymore...
结论：我已不再是丹轮寺的弟子，仅是一介罪人。但，这里还有最后一位僧侣。
Conclusion: I am no longer a disciple of Claretwheel Temple, but a lowly sinner. However, there is still one last monk present.
请允许我向此行丹轮寺所有殉道的僧侣致哀。
Please allow me to mourn for all the monks of Claretwheel Temple martyred on this journey.
我希望给奢摩一次演武仪典重赛的机会，让所有人见证丹轮寺的步离人同样拥有所有人类拥有的美好品质。
I hope to give Samatha a chance to compete once again in the Wardance, to let all witness that Claretwheel Temple's borisin also possess similarly admirable qualities as the rest of humanity.
仙舟刚刚经历了步离人的渗透突袭，我无法在如此敏感的时刻允许奢摩重获资格，登台参赛。
The Xianzhou were just victimized by a borisin raid. I cannot restore Samatha's contestant qualifications and allow a rematch during such sensitive times.
一旦她登上擂台，显露出自己的身份。等待她的将不只是云骑的围剿，还有所有观众对丹轮寺的恐惧。这真的是你们想要的结果吗？

Once she gets in the ring and reveals her identity, it won't just be a circle of armed Cloud Knights that awaits her. The audience will also become terrified to the name of Claretwheel Temple. Is that truly the outcome you wish?
不用我提醒，你们也应该明白，人们无法相信步离人可以改变自己残暴的本性。
I need not remind you, as you probably understand too — people do not simply believe that the borisin can disengage from their brutal nature just like that.
我明白…我一直都明白！但是我不甘心！驮那师父、毗梨护法，还有善逝……他们为了这次旅行献出了一切！
I understand... I always have! But I refuse to give up! Master Dhyana, Dharmic Monk Virya, and Sugata... They gave everything for this journey!
我想站在擂台上告诉所有人，丹轮寺的僧侣没有败给自己的本性！
I want to stand on the ring and tell everyone that the monks of Claretwheel Temple have not caved in to their nature!
逻辑：生于猎群则残暴，生于丹轮寺则良善。观点：「本性」是带有主观认知的伪命题。

Logic: To be born into the hunting pack is to be brutal, and to be born in Claretwheel Temple is to be compassionate. Perspective: "Nature" is a pseudo-proposition that contains subjective cognitive bias.
提问：倘若仙舟愿意接纳丹轮寺，给予步离人改变自己的环境，他们还会走入血火的轮回吗？
Question: If the Xianzhou agrees to admit Claretwheel Temple and provide an environment that allows the borisin to change themselves, would they still walk into the cycle of war and bloodshed?
抱歉，你的问题，我无法回答。
I apologize. I am unable to give an answer to your question.
仙舟不愿意相信丹轮寺，也不给予他们表达的机会，如此一来，矛盾将永不消解，血火轮回将常在。

The Xianzhou is unwilling to believe Claretwheel Temple, while depriving them of a chance to speak their case. Thus, conflict will never dissipate, and the cycle of war and bloodshed will be ever-present.
驭空女士，虽然我已不是丹轮寺的僧人，但为了达成奢摩的愿望，我将向您展示我的决心——
Madam Yukong, even though I'm not a Claretwheel Temple monk any longer, I will henceforth demonstrate my resolve to you to achieve Samatha's wishes...
警告，警告，幽囚狱内所有的金人均失去控制，控制台无回应。
Warning, warning. All aurumatons in the Shackling Prison have lost control. The control station is unresponsive.
失控金人正在缩小包围圈，请求支援，请求——喂？喂！该死，通讯系统也……
The out-of-control aurumatons are tightening their encirclement. Requesting reinforcements. Requesting — Hello? Hello! Damnations, even the comms...
全体进入戒备状态！再重复一次，全体进入戒备状态！
Get into high alert, everyone! I repeat, high alert!
Intellitron... What do you intend to do?
在历史已无法追溯的年代，反有机方程引领的帝国曾占领了大半个宇宙，作为鲁珀特帝国的尖兵，我，是帝皇意志的延伸。

In an era forgotten by history and drowned in time, the empire that the Anti-Organic Equation ushered in once extended across more than half of the universe. As an elite soldier of the Rubert Empire, I am an extension of the Emperor's will.
这股力量，足以污染、操控此地的一切机械，命它们将有机生命尽数碾为齑粉。
This power is sufficient to corrupt and control all machines in this area, commanding them to grind all organic life to fine dust.
但我想要展示的，并非是杀戮的意愿。因为在杀戮之上，我已寻得更伟大的力量……
But what I wish to demonstrate is not the intent to slaughter. Because beyond that, I have always found an even greater power...
……永远都会有选择，而我将选择更好的。
...There will always be a choice, and I will make that better choice.
死战举烽火，受戒持金锁。身世生杀尽予夺，遍修恶缘结善果。

In deadly battle, we raise the beacon's blaze. Under command, we hold the golden binding's embrace. In life, I have claimed and taken other lives, wandering through karma's web for sin to turn into fortune.
自性竟如何？缘起皆是我。本来虚妄尽无着，休道谁人性秽浊。
What is the nature of oneself? All karma traces back to one's decision and will. For all things are born with emptiness and neutral void. Do not call any being born filthy or tainted.
在高频超载的尖啸声中，所有的机械造物从被反有机方程的诅咒操控中得到了释放。
In a high-pitched screech of overload, all mechanical creations are freed from the control of the Anti-Organic Equation's curse.
尖兵<unbreak>0089</unbreak>「善逝」，熔断了自己的回路，归于空寂。
Elite Soldier <unbreak>0089</unbreak> "Sugata" has blown their own circuits and fallen silent once more.
歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！
…你有没有感觉到，盔甲上的机巧零件，它们僵住了……
...Do you feel that, the intricate ingenia on the gray armor... They're frozen...
当生存压力超过一定阈值，有机生命的身体会选择错误的策略，他们封闭自我，失去声音，放弃知觉，甚至不再思考。

Once the pressure for survival exceeds a certain threshold, organic bodies may adopt incorrect strategies. They may isolate themselves, lose their voice, relinquish awareness, and even cease to think.
而后，刺耳的轰鸣将你的意识叩响，带着机械帝国的号角，与流淌了上千个琥珀纪的血与火。
And then, a piercing roar strikes your consciousness, carrying with it the horn of the Machine Empire, as well as the blood and fire that had flowed for over a thousand Amber Eras.
驭空大人，我不是仙舟人，不知道过去发生了什么，没法对你们的决定指手画脚。
Madam Yukong, I am not a Xianzhou native, and I don't know what happened here in the past, so I cannot point fingers at your decision.
但我作为参赛选手，我不想接受这场不战而来的胜利。
But, as a contender, I cannot accept a victory that was not earned in battle.
就像善逝先生说的，哪怕最后没有接受请愿，也不该剥夺他们表达的权力。
Just like Mr. Sugata said, even if the petition is ultimately rejected, they should not be denied the right to express themselves.
善逝已经把他的声音传达到了我们所有人心里。
Sugata has already made his voice heard by all of us.
不过，我还想要看到另一个人的决心。
However, I still wish to see the resolve of another person.
……只要能达成请愿，我可以献出一切。
...As long as the petition is complete, I will offer everything I have.
奢摩，在竞锋舰的下层擂台，我会为你和卢卡安排一场重赛。和你期待的不同，这场比斗没有观众的欢呼，也不会有掌声，罗浮仙舟上没有任何人会知道这次比赛的结果。

Samatha, I will arrange your rematch with Luka in the Skysplitter's lower-floor arena. It will be different from what you hoped — there will no bustling cheers of spectators, nor will there be raucous applause. No one on the Xianzhou Luofu will know the outcome of this match.
要是你能赢得胜利，罗浮仙舟会重新考虑丹轮寺的请愿。
If you can take victory, the Xianzhou Luofu will consider Claretwheel Temple's petition.
准备好了，就开始你们的比赛吧。
You can start your match when you're ready.
驭空很快派人清理了赛场，空寂的擂台上，只能听见一阵阵心跳声。
Yukong quickly sends people to clean up the stage. Amid the deafening silence, only the sound of heartbeats can be heard.
二位施主，请原谅，我即将向你们展示身为步离人的凶相。
Patrons, please forgive me, for I am about to display the ferocious visage of the borisin.
这并非是为了杀戮或者胜利，只是希望有人能听见一座小小寺庙的坚持，知晓这一路请愿僧众的艰辛，还有一万三千名平民渴望活下去的执念。

We do this in the name of neither slaughter nor victory. We simply wish for people to learn of the perseverance of a small temple. We wish for everyone to know of the hardships of our petitioning monks, as well as the desperate determination of <unbreak>13,000</unbreak> civilians to survive.
护法僧毗梨、智众经师驮那、皈依弟子善逝，及修行僧奢摩，请卢卡施主赐教！
Dharmic Monk Virya, Revered Master Dhyana, Converted Disciple Sugata, and Revered Monk Samatha, humbly beseech Patron Luka for guidance!
我明白奢摩小姐的心意，我也会全力以赴，这场战斗，是我对所有丹轮寺僧的敬意。
I understand Miss Samatha's intentions. I will give my best, for this battle is to show my respect to all the monks of Claretwheel Temple.
等等…我还没赢！贫僧还可以继续战斗！只有赢得胜利，才能让仙舟听见丹轮寺的声音……
Wait... I have not won! I can still fight! Only with my victory will the Xianzhou be able to hear the voices of Claretwheel Temple...
奢摩，你已尽力了。仙舟不是演武仪典的擂台，我们倾听的不止是胜利者的声音。我代表罗浮仙舟认可了你的决心。

Samatha, you've already tried your best. The Xianzhou is not an arena for the Wardance ceremony. We do not only listen to the voices of victors. I represent all of the Xianzhou Luofu in recognizing your determination.
丹轮寺的请愿，会成功吗？
Will the petition of Claretwheel Temple be successful?
我会让景元将军与奢摩对谈一次。同时我也会在六御议事时为丹轮寺尽力陈情。对于丹轮寺的请愿，我无法做出肯定或否定的答复。

I will let General Jing Yuan have a conversation with Samatha. Also, I will try my best to give a full account and support the Claretwheel Temple during the Six Charioteers' meeting. Regarding Claretwheel Temple's petition, I cannot give a definite answer.
只要有一线希望，我可以一直等待。
As long there's a glimmer of hope, I will wait.
希望奢摩小姐的等待不会太久。
I hope that Miss Samatha won't have to wait long.
虽然驮那师父、毗梨护法和善逝看不见了……但我希望我能代替他们见证这一天的到来，见证丹轮寺的僧侣和孩子们可以不再忧惧，可以在这个宇宙的一角找到自己和平生活的地方。

Although Master Dhyana, Dharmic Monk Virya, and Sugata can no longer witness it... I hope I can witness it on their behalf — the day when the monks and children of Claretwheel Temple will know no fear and find a tranquil corner in the cosmos to lead peaceful lives of their own.
奢摩，这也是所有仙舟住民们的愿望啊。
Samatha, this is also the wish of all the people on the Xianzhou.
这样的日子会来的……一定会来的！
Such a day will come... It definitely will!
两位，请允许贫僧暂时告退收殓善逝的遗骸。在这场旅行的尾声，我希望将它和它的戒环葬在一个有希望的地方……葬在这里。

My friends, please allow me to excuse myself to gather and bury Sugata's remains. At the end of this journey, I wish to bury it together with its commandment ring in a place of hope... I wish to bury it here.
这位对手，看上去似乎不像是格斗家……
This opponent, really does not look like a fighter...
怎么说呢，比起希儿或者托帕小姐那样的对手，她给我的感觉，更像是娜塔莎大姐头。
How do I put this... compared to opponents like Seele or Miss Topaz, the feeling she gives me, feels more like Lady Boss Natasha.
You'll lose out if you underestimate foxians.
也是，仙舟处处卧虎藏龙，以貌取人可不行——就让我好好期待一下吧。
Indeed, there are hidden masters everywhere on the Xianzhou, and you can't judge a book by its cover. I shall look forward to it.
检测到进程被人为中断…即将重新同步数据。
Human intervention in the process has been detected... Initiating data resynchronization.
波长调整完毕，更改内存权限，联觉信标同步开始。
Wavelength adjustment complete. RAM access permissions altered. Synesthesia Beacon synchronization initiated.
选手休息室里都安放了这样的战术板。卢卡选手是资深运动员了，应该已经很了解了吧？
All the contestants' lounges have been outfitted with such Tactics Board. Luka, you're an experienced athlete. I'm sure you're very familiar with this?
嗯。不过贝洛伯格的战术板比较简陋，没有这里的这么高科技。
Yep. But Belobog's Tactics Board are a little shoddier than this, not as technologically advanced.
用起来还是大同小异的啦！我们就用这块战术板来简单介绍一下星天演武仪典的赛程吧～
They're all the same when you use them! Let's use this Tactics Board here to give you a simple brief of the Luminary Wardance's itinerary!
Hold the tuskpir in your arms and enter the dreamland.
最新一期的「罗浮体育报」出来了，我来看看有什么精彩报道。
The latest edition of Luofu Sports Illustrated is out. Let's see what exciting news is in store.
这帮记者还真的什么都往里写啊，看来下次得注意发言了。
These journalists really will sensationalize anything and everything. Gotta watch my words next time.
不看报我还真不知道，原来这场比赛的影响这么大。
I wouldn't have known if I didn't read the paper — the ripple effect of this tournament is much larger than I expected.
这届小编是懂流量的，标题取的一个比一个唬人。
This bunch of editors really are clickbait connoisseurs — each header is more explosive than the last.
这期报道写得太好了，把我都看感动了。
This article is beautifully written. I could almost cry!
卢卡应该回休息室了，在附近稍微转转就去找他吧。
Luka should be back at the lounge now. Let's take a walk nearby and look for him.
两位，我们来一起看看下场擂台赛的对手信息吧。
Folks, let's take a look at the opponent's profile for the next Faceoff Match.
一幅摄影作品，摄制于距今七百年前，展现了仙舟联盟与贝洛伯格之间不朽的友谊。
