A photograph taken seven hundred years ago, depicting the enduring friendship between the Xianzhou Alliance and Belobog.
人类像一株巨树般彼此紧密相联，不断滋长。人们塑造历史，历史造就英雄，英雄鼓舞着未来，而未来又诞生出全新的人们。
People are like a giant tree, closely intertwined and ever-growing. People shape history, history creates heroes, heroes inspire the future, and the future brings forth new people.
第一场叩关赛大获成功！卢卡选手觉得怎么样？
The first knockout match comes to a triumphant close! How do you feel, Luka?
还不错！逐渐找到感觉了！
Not bad! I'm starting to get into my groove!
{NICKNAME}, how does it feel, being the coach?
真不愧是传说中的银河球棒侠！
Spoken like the legendary Galactic Baseballer!
哈哈，真是辛苦你啦，教练！
It feels no different from fighting in the ring myself.
是呀！这可不是一个轻松的差事～
That's right! It's not some walk in the park!
接下来可以稍微休整一下。然后咱们就回休息室，在战术板那里讨论一下，接下来该打哪位对手吧～
We have time to take a short break. Let's return to the lounge and decide which opponent to fight next at the Tactics Board!
嗯！现在状态正好，我要趁热打铁，赢得更多胜利！
Yeah! I'm on a roll, so I've gotta keep my momentum going and score more wins!
首场擂台赛就拿下了开门红，应该能给卢卡增强信心。
Getting off to such a great start in his first Faceoff Match should give Luka a confidence boost.
不过卢卡的幻觉越来越严重了，得想个办法解决……
Although, Luka's hallucinations have been getting more and more intense. I have to think of a way to stop them...
卢卡也有支持者了，真是件好事。
Luka has his own supporters now, and this is wonderful news.
不妙啊不妙，波提欧直接把卢卡信心打没了。
Ah, this is bad! Boothill just completely shattered Luka's confidence!
现在只能寄希望于复活赛，但愿一切顺利吧。
Now we'll just have to place our hopes on the repechage and pray everything goes well.
观众们好像对这场比赛的评价还挺高的，卢卡的人气又上涨了。
It looks like the spectators enjoyed this match. Luka's popularity is on the rise again.
为了不让支持我们的人失望，卢卡，一定要振作起来啊。
You have to get it together, Luka. Do it for everyone supporting us!
真好呀，卢卡重新振作起来了！
之后得好好感谢一下尾巴大爷和藿藿！
I'll have to thank Mr. Tail and Huohuo properly for their help!
我们居然有这么多粉丝了，这下真成大名人了。
I can't believe we have so many fans. We're a big deal now!
卢卡这一场打得真漂亮，连我都对他的成长感到惊讶。
Luka handled that round beautifully. Even I'm shocked at his growth!
无论最后的结果怎样，卢卡都让整个银河认识了贝洛伯格。
No matter what final result he ends up with, Luka has made everyone in the cosmos aware of the name "Belobog."
看来大家都很关注卢卡的决赛，我们一定要拿出最好的状态。
It looks like there are a lot of people keeping an eye out for Luka's final. We have to make sure he's in top condition!
作为教练，这次我要把压箱底的战术拿出来了。
As his coach, I'm going to pull out some of my secret tactics for this match.
小东西，你竟然还有这神奇的本领…仙舟可真不可思议啊！
Such a little thing bursting with so much wondrous ability... The Xianzhou is certainly full of surprises!
It's more amazing than I thought!
我刚才抱着这只梦貘小睡了一会儿，竟然在睡梦中打了一场极其逼真的战斗！对付一只三米长的大蟑螂！
I hugged this tuskpir and took a nap just now, and I dreamt I was fighting a battle that felt super real! It was against a giant cockroach three meters long!
难道这梦貘，还能用来进行战斗训练？
Could this tuskpir be used for combat training?
唔…搞不好是因为我有病在身，才触发了梦貘的特殊习性？也许对你无效？我也不知道啦，你自己试试看好了。
Hmm... Maybe it's because I'm sick, and that triggered the tuskpir's special trait? Maybe it doesn't work on you? I don't know. You should give it a shot.
梦貘呆呆地看着你，看起来快要睡着了。
The tuskpir stares at you blankly, looking like it's about to doze off.
只要抱着它睡觉，就能在梦中体验真实的战斗？这是什么匹诺康尼青春版？
One can experience hyperrealistic battles in a dream just by hugging it when falling asleep? What kind of Penaconian daydream is this?
Hold the tuskpir in your arms and enter the dreamland.
你抱起梦貘，席地而坐，闭上双眼，准备体验一下这传说中的「梦境战斗训练」。
You pick up the tuskpir, sit on the floor, and close your eyes — you are ready to experience this fabled Dreamscape Combat Training.
但有个问题…你现在一点都不困。况且就算再怎么困，也不太可能在朋友（卢卡）期待的注视中安然睡着吧？
A slight problem though... You aren't sleepy at all right now. And even if you are, you can't possibly go to sleep under the eager gaze of your friend Luka, can you?
不对劲…一阵困意突然袭来，你的意识缓缓远去。梦貘…真是神奇的动物啊……
Something's off... A sudden wave of drowsiness hits you, and your consciousness starts drifting away. The tuskpir... sure is a wondrous creature...
你刚才一瞬间就睡着了！怎么样？体验到逼真的战斗了吗？
You dozed off immediately! How was it? Did you get to see any hyper-realistic battles?
这是便携式匹诺康尼啊！
This is practically a portable Penacony!
最近一直听人提到这个地名，看来等以后我也要去一次了～
I keep hearing the name of that place. Looks like I'll have to go visit it too!
The Xianzhou Alliance... Is truly amazing...
Mehr! Mehr mehr mehr, mehr mehr!
看来之后，我确实可以用这只可爱的小梦貘来完成一些危险系数高的训练。
Seems like I can definitely use this cute little tuskpir to complete some danger-zone training.
不止卢卡，你也可以利用这只可爱又无私的小动物，来在梦中完成一些高难度的战斗。梦貘是很温柔的动物，非常喜欢帮助人类。

It's not just Luka, even you can use this adorable benevolent critter to simulate really challenging combat scenarios while dreaming. The tuskpir is an exceptionally gentle animal that loves helping humans out.
恭喜卢卡选手获得比赛的胜利，感谢卢卡选手的教练{NICKNAME}接受记者提问。
Congratulations to Luka for winning this match! And thank you to his coach, {NICKNAME}, for accepting this interview.
到场的各位记者朋友请在会场中找到合适位置，保持距离，并请按照流程准备好提问。
To the journalists who have arrived at the site, please situate yourselves appropriately, maintain your distance, and get your questions ready according to procedure.
现在开始由{NICKNAME}教练选择记者提问，请注意控制发言时长。
We're now ready for Coach {NICKNAME} to answer some questions from journalists. Please keep your responses brief.
Front row, first from the left.
我是来自星际和平娱乐的实习记者卡美丽。{NICKNAME}教练，首先祝贺你和卢卡选手，真是一场精彩的比赛！
Carmella, Interastral Peace Entertainment. Firstly, congrats to both you and Luka, Coach {NICKNAME}. It was a thrilling fight!
我注意到「铁臂」卢卡选手的状态火热，最后也是靠着火热的状态战胜了对手。不过，我们发现卢卡选手比赛中途好像是些神情恍惚，据说是看到了幻觉……

I've noticed that Luka "Strongarm" is on a hot streak — something he eventually used to gain the upper hand and oust his opponent. But, we've noticed that midway through the match, Luka appeared somewhat dazed, like he is experiencing hallucination...
对于「幻觉」一事，不知道{NICKNAME}教练是如何看待这件事的？
Regarding this hallucination, I wonder if Coach {NICKNAME} has any comments?
嗐，看到幻觉不全是坏事…
Eh, hallucinations aren't all that bad...
运动员在训练过程中常常会有那种「假想敌训练」。据我所知，有人通过幻想与等身高的螳螂格斗锻炼自己，所以，卢卡在比赛之中看到幻觉不全是坏事。

Athletes do plenty of image training in their regiments. As far as I know, some even train by visualizing themselves to fight mantises that are as tall as them. So it's not entirely a bad thing for Luka to see hallucinations during fights.
想象不同的对手，对手如何出招，以及自己如何应对，都是经常有的事。卢卡早已习惯如此，请各位朋友们不必担心。
Imagining different opponents, how they will strike, and how you will counter them — these are all common occurrences. Luka has long been accustomed to such situations, so everyone need not worry.
似乎是他压力过大的原因…
It appears to be because he's under a lot of stress...
大家都知道卢卡选手是第一次离开自己的母星「雅利洛•Ⅵ」，到仙舟来参加比赛，难免会有些精神紧张，在这个状态下看到幻觉也不意外。

Everyone knows that this is Luka's first time leaving his home planet, Jarilo-VI, to participate in the tournament on the Xianzhou. It's normal for his nerves to get to him, and not surprising for him to be seeing things under duress.
接下来他会接受丹鼎司全面的检查，并调整状态，请各位朋友不必担心。
He will be undergoing a full medical inspection at the Alchemy Commission to attune his mental state, so everyone need not worry.
据我所知，卢卡没有幻觉…
From what I know, Luka does not hallucinate...
据我所知，卢卡选手并没有产生幻觉。这是谣言，请大家放心。
From what I know, Luka has not been hallucinating. That's just a rumor, so please be at ease.
原来如此——感谢你的回答！
I see... Thank you for your answer!
那么，后来我注意{NICKNAME}教练及时作出了战术调整，最后正是因为这次调整，卢卡选手一举获胜，请问教练有什么可以分享的吗？
Later on, I noticed Coach {NICKNAME} making a tactical change, and it is because of this change that Luka won. Is there anything you can share regarding this?
我其实什么也没有做，这就是卢卡选手的实力。
I actually didn't do anything. That was all Luka.
It's all about opportunity when you revise your strategy...
合理的战术调整是需要看准时机的，这就是教练之间的博弈。
It's all about precise timing when it comes to tactical adjustments. This is the clash between coaches.
I think it's the opponent who was too weak...
有这样的事情吗？我只是正常比赛而已，可能是对手变弱了吧。
Oh? I did such a thing? I was just competing like I always do. Maybe it was the opponent who was too weak.
好了，这次提问就到这里了。
All right. That's it for your questions.
Front row, second from the left.
{NICKNAME}教练，我是仙舟精武新闻网特邀记者桂乃芬。首先要恭喜你啊！
Coach {NICKNAME}, Xianzhou Martial Elite Network special correspondent, Guinaifen here. First off, congrats on the win!
人家给我发记者证，你就别问那么细了。
Someone gave me a journalist pass, so just take it and run, alright?
赛前很多人预测卢卡会输掉这场比赛，没想到最后卢卡选手作为大黑马赢下了比赛。对于那些赛前没有看好你们的媒体，{NICKNAME}教练，有什么话要说吗？

Many predicted that Luka would lose the match, yet Luka clinched the win in the end as the underdog. To those media outlets that didn't favor your odds, Coach {NICKNAME}, do you have anything to say to them?
I'd suggest you all quit the media industry...
就他们这种预测水平，我建议还是不要做媒体了。
With such amateur forecast analysis like theirs, I think they should just quit the industry.
说实话那也不怪他们呀…
倒是不能怪他们，只怪咱们的卢卡选手隐藏了实力。
Can't say I blame them. Our Luka just hid his prowess really well.
还要说什么吗？我觉得不用说什么，大家心里都清楚。
What else is there to say? I don't think there's a need. It's quite clear in everyone's minds.
真不愧是我认识的{NICKNAME}教练，说话就是有水平！
That's the Coach {NICKNAME} I know. Such poise!
不过我看网上不少网友评论，就卢卡选手赛程前半段和后半段的表现来看，就像是两个人一样…甚至有人提出应该严查卢卡选手是否使用违禁药物。

But many netizens have commented that Luka seemed like two different people, from his performance in the first and second halves... There are some who even suggest that Luka should be subjected to a doping test.
关于这点，{NICKNAME}教练有什么需要澄清的吗？
Regarding this point, would Coach {NICKNAME} like to clarify?
He'll do it! We're not afraid of the truth!
赛前赛后卢卡选手都是接受过药物检查的，还用得着他们提出？卢卡选手是名值得尊敬的参赛选手，我只能说「事实胜于雄辩」。

Luka was subjected to drug tests both before and after the competition, is there any need to have it done again? Luka is a respectable contestant, and all I can say is, "facts speak louder than words."
赛场上的成长不可估量…
Potential growth in a fight is immeasurable...
网友们的惊讶是可以理解的。不过对于处在成长期的卢卡选手来说，赛场是最适合突破自己的舞台，他在激烈的交锋中再次实现了进化！

The surprise is understandable. But to Luka, who is constantly growing as a fighter, the ring is the perfect stage for him to surpass his own limits. He spontaneously evolved right in the middle of his intense clash!
我没有什么要澄清的，这就是「卢卡式胜利」。我不过是做了些微不足道的工作罢了。
I have nothing to clarify. That was a victory in Luka's image. All I did was menial work.
好了，这次提问就到这里了。
All right. That's it for your questions.
Front row, third from the left.
我是来自《周刊闻椿》的记者，我司奉行保护个人隐私的原则…所以我也就不方便透露自己的名字了，各位请称呼我为「八卦记者」就好。

I'm a journalist from Weekly Wenchun. Our company adheres to the principle of protecting our personal privacy, which is why I can't reveal my name. Feel free to just call me "that Tabloid Journalist."
首先恭喜卢卡选手获得胜利，我早就是卢卡选手的粉丝了！
First off, congratulations to Luka on the win. I'm an OG Luka fan!
...You're not going to congratulate me too?
恭喜你，有这么厉害的选手，肯定什么也不用做吧。
Congrats, you probably don't even have to lift a finger with such a strong fighter under you.
其实我对比赛的事情不太感兴趣啦，主要是对卢卡选手比较在意…据说在「雅利洛•Ⅵ」时，卢卡选手和托帕女士就打过照面，两人渊源颇深……
I'm actually less interested in the tournament than I am in Luka... I hear that Luka and Lady Topaz met before on Jarilo-VI, and share some history...
请问{NICKNAME}教练，你如何评价这两人的私交？
I'd like to ask Coach {NICKNAME}: How do you see their relationship?
我必须要澄清一点，这俩人根本就没有私交。
I feel the need to clarify that they do not share any relationship.
真的吗？其实你是知道故意不说吧。
Really? Are you sure you're just trying to not out them?
It's not my place to comment.
这种事情与比赛无关，我只是教练，不方便评价。
This matter has nothing to do with the fight. I'm just here to coach. No comment beyond that.
Oh, that means there's really a problem.
这种事情你问我怎么评价？我不知道，你去问他们。
You're asking me about it? I don't know. Go ask them yourself.
Tch, but they're not even here!
Please remove yourself from the premises.
Please remove yourself from the premises immediately!
请这位「八卦记者」注意提问礼仪。
Might I remind the Tabloid Journalist to pay attention to your interview etiquette.
别急，我还有一个问题！有人目击到卢卡选手与一位自称「鼹鼠队老大」的女士共处一室，请问{NICKNAME}教练如何评价？
Calm down. I have another question! Someone saw Luka and a lady who calls herself "boss of the Moles" share a room. How does Coach {NICKNAME} see this?
She's just here to support him!
你说的是虎克吧，那不是卢卡的「雅利洛•Ⅵ」亲友团吗？
You mean Hook? Isn't she a friend of Luka's from Jarilo-VI?
你说的是虎克吧，那不就是个乳臭未干的小屁孩吗？
You mean Hook? You mean that brat who still reeks of mother's milk?
选手休息室也叫共处一室？
Sharing a room? You mean the lounge for contestants, right?
在选手休息室，也算是共处一室，你们还有没有底线了？
Insinuating the lounge like it was a bedroom, have you no morals?
选手休息室那个？哦，小孩姐啊，没劲。
It's the contestants' lounge? Oh, and it's a kid too. How boring.
Please remove yourself from the premises.
Please remove yourself from the premises immediately!
Your chance for any more questions is over.
现在请{NICKNAME}教练再选一个记者提问。
Front row, first from the left.
Front row, second from the left.
Front row, third from the left.
感谢{NICKNAME}教练的精彩答复，今天的采访环节到此结束，请各位来场的媒体朋友有序离场。
Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for your insightful answers. Today's Q&A ends here. Media personnel, please leave the area in an orderly and civil fashion.
例行的采访环节已经结束，接下来该去办正事了。
Now that the routine interview is over, it's time to get down to business.
下一场比赛的对手是…让我看看……
The next opponent is... Let's see...
星核猎手？？？而且是那个传说中最暴力、最凶残、最冷酷的萨姆？？？
A Stellaron Hunter??? And it's SAM, said to be the most violent, brutal and the cruelest of them all???
走，卢卡选手，我们去办退赛手续。这场绝对不能打。
Come on, Luka, time to fill out the tournament forfeiture form. You absolutely cannot fight in the next round.
等等，卡美丽小姐…这萨姆是什么来路？怎么突然要拉着我退赛了？
Hang on, Miss Carmella... Who is this SAM? And why are you suddenly pulling me out?
这人可能是最有名的通缉犯…细节等有机会再给你科普吧！现在的当务之急是退赛！这绝对不是开玩笑的事！

This guy could be the most wanted criminal of them all... I'll fill you in on the details later when we get the chance! It's imperative that we pull out of the tournament now! And I'm not in the least bit joking!
萨姆可能是来找我玩的。
SAM might be here to hang out with me.
找你玩…{NICKNAME}教练，你怎么跟谁都那么熟？
Hang out with... Coach {NICKNAME}, why do you know everyone?
你误会了，萨姆不是那种人。
You're mistaken. SAM isn't like that at all.
这还能有误会？我可看过不少公司针对星核猎手的安全培训视频，跟恐怖片似的，可吓人了！
Mistaken!? I've watched plenty of IPC safety training videos on Stellaron Hunters — they're no different from horror flicks! Terrifying!
你清醒点，这根本就不是萨姆。
Look closely, this isn't SAM at all.
身着钢铁盔甲、身形高大健壮、浑身散发着难以接近的强者气息…感觉基本上就是萨姆啊？
Clad in steel armor, towering and burly, bursting with an aura of absolute domination... That looks exactly like SAM?
我直接发短信问问萨姆吧。
I'll just send SAM a message to ask.
直接问…你们那么熟的吗？
Ask... Are you guys buddies or something?
教练，下次记得教教我，如何拥有横跨黑白两道的广阔人脉……
Coach, you've got to teach me your rizz with both the good and bad guys...
原来只是冒充星核猎手的笨蛋……
So it's just a fool impersonating a Stellaron Hunter...
幸好他们遇到的是卢卡选手，而不是真正的星核猎手，不然恐怕就不是「教训一下」那么简单了。
Luckily the one they met was Luka and not a real Stellaron Hunter. Otherwise, they probably wouldn't have gotten away with just a "lesson."
好啦！我要准备上场了！我们得好好教教他们——冒充别人是不对的！
All right! I'm gonna get ready to step into the arena! We need to teach them a good lesson — identity theft is not a joke!
好啦！我要准备上场了！我们得好好教教他们——冒充别人是不对的！
All right! I'm gonna get ready to step into the arena! We need to teach them a good lesson — identity theft is not a joke!
亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!
本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是风头正劲的明日之星——「铁臂」卢卡！
In this match, the two opposing sides are, the rising star — Luka "Strongarm"!
以及来自星核猎手的——「萨姆」！天啊，竟然是凶狠残暴的星核猎手！怎么办？卢卡选手！真的要面对如此恐怖的敌人吗？

And SAM — from the Stellaron Hunters! My goodness, I can't believe it's actually the savage and ruthless Stellaron Hunter! What are you gonna do, Luka? Are you going to face this terrifying opponent head on?
我听人说「萨姆」是一个人，但我对面怎么有三个「萨姆」？
I hear that SAM is only an individual, but why do I see three SAMs in front of me?
我们是「萨姆-量产型」。我是「初号机」。
We are the SAM Mass Production Models. I am Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>.
我们仨就是大名鼎鼎的星核猎手！平时最大的爱好就是战斗、毁灭、吃小孩！
The three of us are the infamous Stellaron Hunters! Our favorite hobbies include fighting, destruction, and devouring children.
Hahaha! The question is, are you afraid?
You've still got time to surrender!
感觉配合你们的对话，有点太侮辱智商了…咱们还是少说两句，用拳头来决胜负吧。
I feel like I'm losing brain cells just by talking to you... Let's cut to the chase and settle this with our fists.
哥哥哥，哥！别打了！我们认输！
Brother, bro—brother! Please stop hitting us! We surrender!
我们根本不是什么星核猎手，承受不住您这铁拳啊哥！
We aren't the Stellaron Hunters. We can't withstand your punches!
这身装备也是租来的，打坏了我们实在赔不起啊哥！
Our equipment is rented too. If it's damaged, we really can't afford to pay for it, bro!
你看看你们…为什么非要冒充别人呢？
Look at you guys... Why are you impersonating other people?
其实是我们直播间的粉丝说，我们三个身手很好，如果表演「萨姆模仿秀」，一定能成为「先天萨姆圣体」，赚到很多钱……

Actually, it was a fan in our live stream who said the three of us have great skills. If we perform a "SAM Impersonation Show," we'll definitely become the innate talent to become SAM and make bank...
直播模仿？先天圣体？尽是些我这种乡下人搞不懂的事……
Live stream impersonations? Innate talent? I'm from the boonies, and I don't really understand these...
总而言之，我的教练去问了萨姆本人，人家不喜欢被你们冒充。不要这么做了。你们总不想被星核猎手找上门吧？
Anyways, my coach has spoken to SAM. They don't like being impersonated by you guys. Please stop doing this. You don't want the real Stellaron Hunters to come knocking on your door, right?
一定一定！我们回去就换个直播赛道，再也不玩抽象了！
For real, definitely! We'll switch to another live-streaming track when we get back, no more playing with abstract stuff!
看起来大局已定～那么我宣布，本场比赛的胜利者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
Looks like the outcome is clear! Then allow me to declare, the winner of this match is Luka "Strongarm"!
…总感觉直播网站上未来会冒出不少「先天卢卡圣体」。
...I feel like the live stream platforms will have a lot more "innate talent" for Luka.
下场比赛的对手叫做…顿…顿派…菲昌英？这听着也太不像人名了。
The next opponent is called... Giga... Gigantus... Shieldus? That doesn't sound like a person's name at all.
也许来自我们不熟悉的文明圈。
Maybe they are from a civilization that we are not familiar with.
银河这么广阔，大概叫什么怪名字的都有。
The cosmos is so vast that it probably has all sorts of strange names.
有可能哦。贝洛伯格也有很多格斗家会给自己起一个特别怪异的假名。
Maybe! In Belobog, there are many fighters that will give themselves weird names as well.
不过就算名字再怎么花哨，到了擂台上还是实力见真章。
No matter how flashy their names are, only true strength matters when you step into the arena.
让我来鉴定一下吧！是他的「铁盾」硬，还是我的「铁臂」更硬！
Then let's see if his "iron shield" is tougher than my "iron arm"!
让我来鉴定一下吧！是他的「铁盾」硬，还是我的「铁臂」更硬！
Then let's see if his "iron shield" is tougher than my "iron arm"!
亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!
本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和「铁盾」…顿派…顿派菲昌英！
The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" and the Iron Shield... Gigantus... Gigantus Shieldus!
是我出现幻觉了，还是你真的拿着银鬃铁卫的盾牌？
Am I hallucinating, or are you really carrying a shield from the Silvermane Guards?
这是我在跳蚤市场买回来的，感觉非常适合打造我的个人品牌。
I bought this from a flea market, and felt like it was suitable for creating my personal brand.
「『铁盾』顿派菲昌英！他的盾牌非常硬！」
"Ironshield" Gigantus Shieldus! His shield is gigantic!
原来你的名字是谐音梗啊…好尴尬。
So your name is actually a pun... That's awkward.
呃…我们还是直接开打吧！
「顿派菲昌英」这个个人品牌，我构思了整整一年，连训练都荒废了！没想到…还是敌不过你的铁臂！
I spent one whole year conceptualizing my personal branding "Gigantus Shieldus," and I even sacrificed my training! I can't believe... I still lost to your Iron Arm!
如果你把构思你那个破谐音梗的时间花在训练上，搞不好就打得赢了。
If you spent the time you used on conceptualizing those lame puns on training instead, you might actually have won.
可是，那样我就创造不出来现在这样具有记忆点的个人品牌了啊！如果不能成功炒作，能力再强又有什么用？
But if I do that, then I wouldn't be able to create an impactful personal branding that sticks! If I cannot successfully promote myself, what good is my strength?
唉…我感觉你们发达地区的媒体还是太厉害了，让很多人都产生了像你这样的错误认知。
*sigh* Personally, I think the media in developed regions like yours wield too much influence, so many people develop misconceptions similar to yours.
别整天惦记着什么破谐音梗、炒作、记忆点、个人品牌了！好好练武、好好打比赛，人们自然就会记住你的名字！
Stop obsessing over lame puns, hype, catchphrases, and personal branding! Train hard and fight harder, and people will naturally remember your name!
我在老家也算是个明星，你可以相信我，哥们——靠炒作成名的东西，最多只会火几个月。靠双拳打出来的声名，才是永远不会朽坏的。
I'm considered a star back in my home world. Trust me, buddy — things that rely on hype only stay popular for a few months. Fame earned through one's fists lasts forever.
真是精彩的演说！我宣布，本场比赛的胜利者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
What an exciting speech! I declare the winner of this match to be Luka "Strongarm"!
下场比赛的对手是——「扑满战线」。这队名还挺有画面感，怪可爱的。
Our next opponent is... the Trotter Battlefront. This team name certainly does evoke an image, pretty cute.
扑满…听起来战斗力不是很强。
Trotter... They don't sound very strong.
确实，不管对手是谁，都不应该轻敌。
That's right. Never underestimate your opponent, no matter who they are.
Trotters are hardest to deal with.
确实，主要是跑得太快了，很难追得上。
Mainly because they're slippery and hard to catch.
以前师父训练我的时候，有一个项目就是在院子里徒手抓扑满…哈哈，没想到还真有能用上的一天！
Back when my master used to train me, one of the exercises was catching Trotters with my bare hands in the backyard... Haha, I never thought it would come in handy!
都说「人不该跟扑满一般见识」，但今天不得不破例了。上场吧！
They say, "one shouldn't stoop to the level of a Trotter." But today I'll have to make an exception! Let's go!
都说「人不该跟扑满一般见识」，但今天不得不破例了。上场吧！
They say, "one shouldn't stoop to the level of a Trotter." But today I'll have to make an exception! Let's go!
亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!
本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和——「扑满战线」！
In this match, the two opposing sides are, Luka "Strongarm" and the Trotter Battlefront!
你为什么要带着这么多扑满参加比赛？我印象里，扑满并不是一种战斗力很强的生物。
Why do you need to bring so many Trotters to compete? My impression was that Trotters aren't really built for battle.
哼哼，因为我比扑满还要弱！
Heh-heh, because I'm weaker than Trotters!
扑满训练师用非常自豪的语气说出了莫名其妙的话！
Such confidence for such a strange confession, Trotter trainer!
Er... Right... Then let's begin our battle?
扑满兄弟们！上吧！去吞噬卢卡吧！
Trotter brothers! Go forth! Swallow up Luka!
对不起，扑满们，我没能带你们赢得胜利……
Sorry, my Trotters. I was unable to bring you guys a win...
扑满们围绕着训练师，似乎在说「没关系，你已经尽力了。」
The Trotters surround the Trotter trainer, as if saying, "It's okay. You've done your best."
带上我和扑满们的份，继续前进吧，卢卡。
Carry on our hopes with you and keep moving forward, Luka.
扑满们看着卢卡，眼神中充满了沉重的嘱托。
The Trotters look at Luka with doe-eyed expressions, their gaze full of heavy responsibility.
「扑满战线」突然开始煽情了！这剧情展开我怎么看不懂？是我错过了哪一集吗？
The Trotter Battlefront is suddenly trying to get everyone to catch some feels! How did the plot suddenly take a twist like this? Did I miss an episode?
嗯！谢谢你们！我一定会继续前进，不会让扑满们失望的！
Yes! Thank you all! I'll definitely keep advancing, and I won't disappoint the Trotters!
啊不是，你怎么还真跟着热血起来了？算了…总而言之！本场比赛的胜利者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
Wait what, why are you suddenly getting fired up? Never mind... In conclusion, the winner of this match is — Luka "Strongarm"!
这场比赛的对手叫做…「朱明三不」。听名字感觉是什么大人物的绰号。你们了解这个对手吗？
The name of the next opponent is... the Tri-Dis of Zhuming. Just from the name, it seems like a nickname of some big shots. Do you guys know anything about the opponent?
我有所耳闻，「朱明三不」是朱明的三个民间武术家。这三个人虽然算不上绝顶高手，但也不可小觑。
I heard through the grapevine that the Tri-Dis of Zhuming comprise a trio of civilian martial artists from the Zhuming. Although these three might not be top-tier masters, do not underestimate them.
应该打不过吧？你还是有点太强了。
Probably not? You're kind of overpowered.
我的机械零件可承受不住太暴力的事！
My mechanical parts can't take too much of a beating!
Haha, we'll find out in a bit!
「朱明三不」…仔细品了品，这名字还挺帅气的。该去擂台上会会他们了！
The Tri-Dis of Zhuming... After some appreciation, this name sounds quite impressive. It's time to go meet them in the arena!
「朱明三不」…仔细品了品，这名字还挺帅气的。该去擂台上会会他们了！
The Tri-Dis of Zhuming... After some appreciation, this name sounds quite impressive. It's time to go meet them in the arena!
亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!
本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和「朱明三不」——颓不流、贤不肖、何不乐！
The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" against the Tri-Dis of Zhuming — D. Celerate, D. Valieu, and D. Lite!
卢卡，我们三个都很欣赏你的战斗意志。
Luka, all three of us admire your fighting spirit.
可惜，今天你注定要止步于此了。
Unfortunately, this is as far as you'll go.
何不乐！你别乐了！你搞得我们像反派似的！
D. Lite! Stop laughing! You're making us look like villains!
抱歉，我没绷住，哈哈哈哈哈哈！
Sorry, I just can't hold back, hahahahahaha!
卢卡，你别在意，这家伙没有嘲笑你的意思，他只是天生就爱笑。
Please don't mind him, Luka. He is not mocking you. He just naturally likes to cackle.
哼哼，别担心，他马上就乐不出来了！
Heh-heh, don't worry. He won't be cackling much after this!
我们就是欣赏你这一点。上吧！
This is what we admire about you. Bring it!
真是酣畅淋漓的对决！是我们输了！
This is one thrilling and fulfilling duel! We've lost!
三位真是好身手！我也从这场战斗中学到了很多，感谢你们。
You three really have great moves! I've learned a lot from this battle as well. Thank you.
哪里哪里！我们才是受益良多。等我们三人的武功更精进一些后，万望能再度与你交手。
No no, the pleasure was ours! We've learned a lot from this. We hope to be able to spar with you again once we've improved our skills.
颓不流给了何不乐一记手刀，后者的笑声戛然而止，晕倒在地。
D. Celerate delivers a karate chop to D. Lite, whose laughter abruptly ceases as he faints to the ground.
抱歉，我们回去会教育他的。
Sorry, we'll teach him a lesson once we get back.
哈哈！没什么啦！比武本就是开心的事，笑一笑也正常。
Haha! No biggie! Exchanging moves is a happy occasion. It's normal to have a laugh.
经过一场「欢声笑语」的对决，本场比赛的胜利者终于诞生！让我们恭喜——「铁臂」卢卡！
After a lively and cheerful duel, the winner of this match has finally emerged! Let us congratulate Luka "Strongarm"!
尾巴大爷？他怎么也来参加演武仪典了？
Mr. Tail? Why is he here participating in the Wardance?
还给自己取了一个很奇怪的队伍名…「负业磷火」，听起来像仙舟幻想小说里的大妖魔……
Gave himself a very strange team name... Karmic Hinkypunk, sounds like a demon from a Xianzhou fantasy novel...
Life is hard. Tail has to hustle.
不至于吧？十王司薪资待遇应该还可以。
Really? The salary at the Ten-Lords Commission shouldn't be too shabby.
Maybe he also has a warrior's dream.
岁阳也会有这样的梦想吗？倒是也能理解啦。
Do heliobi have such dreams too? I can get behind that.
尾巴大爷对我有恩。不管他为何而参赛，我都会全力以赴——这是我对他的回报。我准备上场了！
I am indebted to Mr. Tail. No matter the reason for his participation, I will give my best too. This is my way of repaying him. I'm ready to step onto the arena!
尾巴大爷对我有恩。不管他为何而参赛，我都会全力以赴——这是我对他的回报。我准备上场了！
I am indebted to Mr. Tail. No matter the reason for his participation, I will give my best too. This is my way of repaying him. I'm ready to step onto the arena!
亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!
本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和「负业磷火」——尾巴——大爷！
The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" and Karmic Hinkypunk — Misterrrrr Tail!
尾巴大爷，你怎么也来参加演武仪典了？
Mr. Tail, why are you participating in the Wardance?
当然是来看看你的状态啊。你们人类管这叫什么来着？「诊后随访」，对吧？
I'm here to check on your condition of course. You humans call this "post-visit follow-up," right?
看你现在这生龙活虎的劲儿，本大爷的治疗应该还算成功。
Looking at how energetic you are, it seems like my treatment is working well.
嗯，我现在已经完全恢复状态了。真的很感谢你，尾巴大爷。
Yes, I've fully recovered. I'm truly grateful towards you, Mr. Tail.
停停停！都说了，本大爷最受不了别人谢我……
Stop stop stop! I already said, I can't stand people thanking me...
你恢复的怎么样，就让老子亲自复诊一下吧！准备好接招了吗？
I'll personally check on your recovery! Are you ready to catch these blows?
打得相当不错嘛！看来本大爷的治疗很成功嘛～
Your moves are pretty impressive! Looks like my treatment is very successful.
那当然，毕竟你可是天下无敌的尾巴大爷！
Of course! After all, you are the invincible Mr. Tail!
行了，老子溜了。你好好打比赛，我和藿藿都等着你杀入「竞锋守擂」的好消息呢。
Okay, I gotta go. You focus on your matches. Huohuo and I are both waiting for the good news of you making it to the "Ringmaster's Challenge."
这就走了？我们下场以后再聊聊天呗？
You're leaving so soon? Can we have a chat after we get off the arena?
不了。女鬼判官只允许我离开藿藿独自出来一个时辰，再不回去她要生气了。下次再约吧。
Nah. The Ghosty only allows me to leave Huohuo and come out alone for a dual-hour. If I don't go back soon, she's gonna flip. We'll meet again next time.
真是一场鬼气森森却气氛融洽的战斗啊…让我们恭喜「铁臂」卢卡，再次赢得了比赛的胜利！
What an eerie yet harmonious battle... Let us congratulate Luka "Strongarm" for winning the match once again!
接下来的对手叫做…「神奇植物在哪里」。听起来又是个很奇妙的对手呢。
The next opponent is called... Fantastic Botany and Where to Find Them. Sounds like quite the character we have here.
说起来，我们老家那边基本没什么植物。来到罗浮以后，确实感觉到处都是「神奇植物」。
Come to think of it, our hometown doesn't have many plants. But after coming to the Luofu, it seems like there are fantastic botany everywhere.
但选手照片上的这些植物，是不是过于神奇了？
But aren't the plants in the competitor's photo a bit too fantastical?
别担心，你看，组委会特意帮他们标注了一下——
Don't worry. Look, the organizing committee has specially marked them...
「经检测，该队伍并未使用任何寿瘟祸祖之力量。一切安全合法，符合参赛规范。」
"After inspection, the team did not use any Plagues Author's powers. Everything is safe, legal, and compliant with competition regulations."
我确实没什么对付「植物」的经验…只希望这场比赛能顺利吧！
I honestly don't have much experience dealing with plants... Let's hope this match goes smoothly!
我确实没什么对付「植物」的经验…只希望这场比赛能顺利吧！
I honestly don't have much experience dealing with plants... Let's hope this match goes smoothly!
亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!
本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和——「神奇植物在哪里」！
The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" and — Fantastic Botany and Where to Find Them!
组委会提示，「神奇植物在哪里」并未使用任何寿瘟祸祖的力量，也没有深陷魔阴——只是单纯长得比较「丰饶」而已！请放心观赛！

The organizing committee assures that "Fantastic Botany and Where to Find Them" is not at all utilizing any Plagues Author's powers, nor are they direly afflicted with mara — they just look a bit "Abundant." Please watch this exciting bout without fear!
嗨，你好！你养的这些植物都挺好看的。
Hi, hello! These plants of yours are pretty.
我以前都不知道，植物竟然也能用来战斗，哈哈。大概因为我老家那边没什么像样的植物吧！
I never knew that botany could be used for combat, haha. Probably because there isn't much flora around where I live!
…朋友，赛前稍微寒暄两句嘛。就算是对手，也没必要把气氛搞得那么僵硬吧？
...Hey, it's just friendly banter before the match. Even if we're opponents, you don't have to be this wound up, do you?
你为什么，执着于，和植物对话？
Why. Are you. So. Insistent. On talking. To the plants?
呃…你是植物吗？我看你不是和我一样的人类吗？
Err... You're a plant? I thought you were human, just like me?
算了，咱们还是用拳头来交流吧！
Never mind, let's have a dialogue with our fists!
这场比赛真让我长见识啊！没想到植物也能有这么强的战斗力！
This match has certainly taught me something new! To think a plant would wreak so much havoc!
...You're going to completely ignore me, eh?
抱歉，身为植物，不能说话。这是我的信念。
Apologies. I can't be talking, as a plant. This is my belief.
行吧…祝你早日如愿成为植物吧……
All right... I hope you'll get your wish and grow up to be a plant soon...
观众朋友们！快用欢呼和掌声掩盖住擂台上尴尬的气氛吧！你们的小叽米要受不了了！
My spectating friends! Quickly, use your cheers and applause to overwhelm the awkward air in the ring right now! I just can't take it any longer!
然后，把欢呼和掌声献给我们了不起的战士——「铁臂」卢卡！
And then, offer your cheers and applause to our most excellent fighter — Luka "Strongarm"!
很遗憾，卢卡选手在本场比赛中惜败给巡海游侠波提欧。接下来的新闻发布会，将由卢卡的教练{NICKNAME}接受记者提问。
Very sadly, Luka has been defeated by the Galaxy Ranger Boothill in this match. In the next press conference, Luka's coach {NICKNAME} will be accepting journalist questions.
被{NICKNAME}教练选到的记者将获得提问机会，请注意控制提问的时长。
Journalists selected by Coach {NICKNAME} will be given the chance to ask questions. Please keep your words brief.
Front row, first from the left.
{NICKNAME}教练你好，我是来自星际和平娱乐的实习记者卡美丽。虽然比赛结果令人遗憾，但是总体来说这仍是一场精彩的比赛。
Hello Coach {NICKNAME}, Carmella from Interastral Peace Entertainment. While the match result was regrettable, overall it was still an exhilarating match.
赛前许多分析师预测本场比赛会打得旗鼓相当，但出人意料的是，波提欧选手仅用六发子弹便结束了比赛。
Before the match, many analysts predicted that this could go either way. But what was surprising that Boothill ended the match with only six bullets.
请问{NICKNAME}教练，卢卡选手如此快速丢掉比赛的原因是什么？
Coach {NICKNAME}, what was the reason Luka lost this match so quickly?
我们不想为自己找借口，如果实在要找一个理由，那就是我们还不够强。
We won't find excuses for ourselves. If I really had to find a reason, it was because we weren't strong enough.
怪我，我没管理好卢卡选手的饮食，让他吃了不干净的训练餐。
I am to blame. I didn't watch Luka's diet properly, and he ate some bad food during training.
比赛前我看到他脸色发青，扶着墙从卫生间里走出来，人都快虚脱了。如果他的状态更好一些，区区几枚子弹，他徒手就能接下。

I saw that his face was sickly before the match. He was leaned against the wall when he came out from the toilet, like he was dehydrated. If he were in a better state, he would've easily countered those few measly bullets.
我也感觉卢卡选手没有发挥全部实力。
I also thought that Luka wasn't exerting his full power.
Luka got careless, and he didn't dodge...
波提欧选手不讲武德，一开场就使出了奥义。卢卡选手大意了，没有闪。
Boothill lacks martial ethics, using an esoteric move right out the gate. Luka got careless and didn't manage to dodge in time.
噢，原来是卢卡选手没有准备好…那么请问卢卡选手有准备什么奥义吗？
Oh, so Luka wasn't prepared... May I ask then, did Luka prepare any esoteric moves?
Wait and see, is all I can say.
Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for your answer.
目前很多观众都非常关心卢卡选手是否会参加接下来的复活赛，教练能透露一些相关消息吗？
Many spectators are very concerned if Luka will participate in the repechage. Can you give us a little insight on this?
取决于卢卡选手的状态…
目前我们还无法确定是否会参加复活赛，最终会取决于卢卡选手的状态。
We're still not sure if we will participate in the repechage. Ultimately, it boils down to Luka's condition.
不过请大家放心，我们一定会尽力重返赛场。
But everyone shouldn't worry. We will do our best to return to the ring.
那祝愿卢卡选手早日重返赛场。
I wish Luka a swift return to the tournament then.
We are already busy with the prep...
那当然啦。赛场上失去的东西，只能重新在赛场上夺回来。请大家期待我们在复活赛上的表现吧。
Of course. What was lost in the ring can only be regained by re-entering it. Please look forward to our performance in the repechage.
那祝卢卡选手能够成功「复活」。
I wish Luka a successful resurrection, then.
回家的船票已经买好了…
The ticket home has already been bought...
很遗憾，虽然我们都希望卢卡选手能够重新站上赛场。但事实上，这次失败对他的打击很大，他给我发消息说，他已经买好了返程的船票。

It's a pity, since we all hoped that Luka would be able to get another chance in the ring. Honestly though, this defeat was too much of a blow to him. He sent me a message saying that he has already bought the return ticket home.
不过我觉得事情还有转机，正在尽力对卢卡选手进行心理建设，希望他能及时振作起来。
But I think there's still a chance to flip this around. We are doing our best to provide psychological support for Luka — we hope he'll be able to recover in time.
辛苦{NICKNAME}教练，祝卢卡选手振作起来。
Please keep it up, Coach {NICKNAME}. We hope Luka will make it in time.
好了，这次提问就到这里了。
All right. That's it for your questions.
Front row, second from the left.
可能是视角原因，你应该没有注意到这位记者。不过，可能是出于好奇，可能是出于疲倦，你仍然选择了这位*空气记者*进行提问。

It could have been a problem with your line of sight, and you might not have noticed this journalist. But, perhaps out of curiosity, perhaps due to fatigue, you still point to this "invisible journalist" to ask their question.
人呢？没来就请下一位了！
Who's supposed to be here? I'll skip to the next one if there's no one here!
虎克似乎站得有些太过靠前，以至于除了记者那一侧的视角，根本没人看到她。
Hook seems to be standing a little too far in front, which explains why no one can see her from that angle, apart from the journalists' seat.
我、我代表贝洛伯格的《水晶日报》向你提问！
I—I have a question on behalf of Belobog's Crystal Daily!
(Tear up and wipe at your non-existent glasses...)
虎克懂事了啊，我好感动，费斯曼大叔你有看到吗？呜呜呜……
Hook is finally growing up. I'm so touched. Can you see this, Uncle Fersman? *sob*...
喂！别说的就像老爹不在了一样啊！
Hey! Stop talking like the old man's left this world!
没有人雇佣我，这算是我的假期作业，给《水晶日报》投稿。
No one hired me. This is my summer assignment: To submit articles for the Crystal Daily.
网上说「演武仪典都快成兵器展了，再这样下去歼星炮都要用上了」。
The internet says that "the Wardance is fast becoming an arms exhibition. At this rate, even star-destroyer cannons will get used."
请问{NICKNAME}教练如何评价网上的这种观点？
Might I ask what Coach {NICKNAME} has to say about such opinions on the internet?
演武仪典也要与时俱进…
The Wardance also has to change with the times...
演武仪典也要与时俱进嘛，不管用什么武器，比赛打得精彩最重要。
The Wardance also has to keep up with the times. The array of arsenal used doesn't matter. What matters is that the matches are exciting.
如果完全遵循原教旨主义，那参赛选手要被筛掉一大半喽。
If we completely stick to the fundamentals, half the contestants would be deemed ineligible.
你看，网友都明白的道理，组委会那帮家伙怎么就不明白呢。
Look, the netizens understand what's going on. Why those committee folks don't understand is beyond me.
如果演武仪典真有公平公正的精神，选手们应当禁止使用武器，完全依靠拳头进行战斗。
If the Wardance truly upheld the spirit of fair competition, contestants should be forbidden from using weapons, and rely solely on their fists to fight.
No comment on the tournament rules...
作为参赛方，我认为我们不适宜对比赛规则进行评价。我只能表示，比赛结果就是这样，而且我们接受它。
As a participant, I don't think it is appropriate for us to comment on the tournament's regulations. I can only say that this is the outcome of the match, and we accept the outcome.
{NICKNAME}教练的见解，很有道理，但希望下次能让我也听明白！
Coach {NICKNAME}'s understanding is very rational, but I hope I can also understand your words next time!
卢卡选手虽然输掉了比赛，但贝洛伯格会继续支持他，更多的朋友还会继续支持他。请{NICKNAME}教练为卢卡选手的粉丝说两句吧。
Luka may have lost the match, but Belobog will continue to cheer for him, and even more so his friends. Coach {NICKNAME}, please say something to Luka's fans on his behalf.
虽然卢卡选手遇到了一点小小的挫折，但我相信只要有大家的支持，他一定能及时走出阴霾，谢谢大家，你们永远是卢卡最坚强的后盾！
Luka may have run into a small hiccup, but I believe that with everyone's support, he will surely bounce back. Thank you, everyone. You will forever be Luka's strongest support!
Waaa... You're too good with words.
请粉丝们放心，卢卡选手正在积极训练努力恢复，我们教练组也在总结复盘。我们会抓住复活赛的机会，各位等待我们王者归来吧！

The fans needn't worry. Luka is already training hard to get back into form, and our coaching team is reflecting on our past missteps. We will treasure the chance in the repechage, so everyone, please wait patiently for the return of our champion!

请这位记者朋友注意分辨信息来源。

喂！你到底会不会开发布会啊！
Hey! Do you know how to conduct a press conference or not!
好了，这次提问就到这里了。

Front row, third from the left.
{NICKNAME}教练你好，我是来自《武林风云》的记者。我们是一档专业武术点评栏目，我的名字不重要，您可以叫我「专业记者」。
Hello, Coach {NICKNAME}. I'm from the Martial Herald. We are a professional martial arts commentary column. My name isn't important, and you can just call me "Professional Journalist."
比起卢卡选手本人的临场发挥，我更关心教练您的战术安排。
Luka's performance in the ring aside, I'm more concerned about your tactical measures.
涉及机密部分我会拒绝回答。
I'll have to refrain from revealing any classified information.
放心，我是专业的，规矩我都懂。
Don't worry. I'm a professional, and I know the rules.
等的就是你这样的专业记者。
I've been waiting for a professional individual such as yourself.
我反复观看了比赛回放，有一个惊人发现——卢卡选手在面对枪口时，并没有采用常规的快速躲闪方式应对，而是一动不动地站在原地。

I watched the match replay back to back multiple times, and made an astounding discovery — when Luka was facing the gun chamber, he didn't employ any common tactics to quickly dodge away, but stood rooted on the spot.
很多人误以为这是卢卡选手的失误，但是我相信这是您布置的战术。以不动的方式应对对手的敏捷，让波提欧选手产生疑惑，获得心理博弈上的优势！

Many mistook this for Luka's error, but I'm willing to believe this was a tactic that you planned. Deploying a method of immobility against the opponent's agility, to sow the seed of doubt in Boothill, and to gain the upper hand in the psychological battle!
对对对！我就是这么想的…
Yes, yes, absolutely! That was my plan exactly...
什么叫专业？这个就叫专业！和我安排的战术一模一样。
What is professionalism? This is professionalism! As professional as my planned tactic.
唉…可惜卢卡没沉住气，浪费了绝好的机会。
But... it was a pity Luka couldn't stand his ground at the end and squandered this golden opportunity.
I knew I was right on the money!
我怎么没想到你这个战术…
Why didn't I think of that...?
说实话，我没有想到这样的战术。也许你应该加入我们的教练组……
Truth be told, I hadn't thought of such a thing. Maybe you should join our coaching team...
哈？{NICKNAME}教练，这个时候真的就不要演了吧。
Eh? Coach {NICKNAME}, this isn't the time to play dumb.
I... really didn't think of that.
我明白了，比赛还没有彻底结束，还不能透露你的战术目的。
I get it. You can't reveal your tactical objectives before the tournament truly ends.
You sure are agile with your mental gymnastics...
你脑补的也太多了，其实我也没想明白卢卡为什么不躲一躲。
You're overthinking it. I've never really understood why Luka didn't evade.
不过躲也没用吧，毕竟那是枪……
Though there probably wasn't much point in dodging. I mean, it was a gun after all...
你是在质疑我的专业能力吗？
我是专业的，我明白教练此刻还在隐藏战术意图，具体的我就不问了。
I'm a professional, and I understand that you wish to keep your tactics under wraps. I won't delve into details then.
感谢{NICKNAME}教练解答我的疑惑。
Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for resolving my uncertainties.
其实卢卡选手想要战胜波提欧也并非完全不可能，我有一计，请教练细品。
Actually, it's not impossible that Luka could defeat Boothill. I have a plan, so please bear with me.
所谓「七步以外枪快，七步以内拳快」，若是一开局卢卡选手能快速缩近双方距离，然后贴脸出拳，请问波提欧选手又该如何应对？

As the saying goes: The gun is faster outside of seven strides, and the fist is quicker within seven. If Luka could rapidly close the distance once the match started, then strike a punch at point-blank range, how would Boothill respond to that?
The fist isn't all that fast within seven strides, either...
七步之外枪快，七步之内枪又准又快。
The gun may be quicker outside of seven strides, but it's also quick AND precise within seven...
我建议你少看幻戏，多看实战。
I'd suggest you lay off the immersia and pay attention to actual fights.
你是在质疑我的专业能力吗？
那么要怎么缩进距离呢…
How would you close the distance then...
那么，开局之后卢卡选手要如何快速缩近双方的距离呢？
Then, how would Luka be able to close the distance quickly after the match starts?
只要全力奔跑一定可以做到的。
As long as he sprints forth with all his being, he'll surely be able to make it.
几乎是所有人都被专业记者的想法震住了。
It appears that everyone in the room is dumbfounded by the professional journalist's plan.
怎么，你们是在质疑我的专业能力吗？
What, you all doubting my professionalism?
You fight Boothill in the next match then...
我很看好你的战术，下场你来打波提欧。
I've got my money on your strat. You go fight Boothill in the next match.
Me? Fight Boothill? You've gotta be kidding!
好了，这次提问就到这里了。
All right. That's it for your questions.
现在请{NICKNAME}教练再选一个记者提问。
Front row, first from the left.
Front row, second from the left.
Front row, third from the left.
感谢{NICKNAME}教练的精彩答复，今天的采访环节到此结束，请各位来场的媒体朋友有序离场。
Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for your insightful answers. Today's Q&A ends here. Media personnel, please leave the area in an orderly and civil fashion.
例行的采访环节已经结束，接下来该去办正事了。
Now that the routine interview is over, it's time to get down to business.
首先恭喜卢卡选手获得复活赛胜利，关于这场比赛，我们再次邀请到了{NICKNAME}教练接受记者提问。
First off, congrats to Luka for winning the repechage. We have once again invited Coach {NICKNAME} to answer journalist questions about this match.
到场的各位记者朋友请在会场中找到合适位置，保持距离，并请按照流程准备好提问。
To the journalists who have arrived at the site, please situate yourselves appropriately, maintain your distance, and get your questions ready according to procedure.
相信记者朋友们一定准备了很多问题，那我们抓紧时间让{NICKNAME}教练选择记者提问，请注意控制发言时长，现在开始。
I trust you all must have prepared many questions. Let's not waste time and have Coach {NICKNAME} pick the journalist. Please pay attention to time. We're starting now.
Front row, first from the left.
我是来自星际和平娱乐的实习记者卡美丽，{NICKNAME}教练，首先恭喜你和卢卡选手打赢复活赛。
I'm Carmella from Interastral Peace Entertainment. Coach {NICKNAME}, firstly, congratulations on your and Luka's repechage win.
众所周知，银枝先生身为纯美骑士，对挑战复活赛的选手考核十分严格，听说他不仅要求选手具备强大的实力，还需要展现足够的「纯美」。

It's common knowledge that as a Knight of Beauty, Mr. Argenti's evaluation of those in the repechage is highly stringent. I heard he not only requests that his opponents possess great strength, but they also have to exhibit sufficient Beauty.

What is Coach {NICKNAME}'s understanding of Luka's Beauty?
他长得那么帅就挺美的…
He's pretty beautiful with how handsome he is...
请允许我用一些*比较通俗的标准*来看待这个问题——仅从外貌体格上来看，卢卡选手毫无疑问是一名帅哥，他已经足够「纯美」了。
Let me put it in "more crass" terms: just based on looks and physique, Luka is undeniably handsome and already very "Beautiful."
即便是见多识广的纯美骑士银枝，也应该承认卢卡选手通过「纯美」的考核绰绰有余。

心地善良的就是纯美的…

I think that compassion and kindness should be the foremost benchmark of Beauty. I know of the story between Luka and Margie, a little girl he once met. Just off that incident alone, Luka is indeed a compassionate fellow.
就算是颇为苛刻的纯美骑士，肯定也会承认卢卡的纯美之心！
Even the most rigorous of the Knights of Beauty would recognize that Luka has a heart fitting for Beauty!
Beauty lies in generosity and confidence...

虽然卢卡选手成功返回赛场，但接下来的对手全是个顶个的强者，不知道{NICKNAME}教练对后面的比赛是否有信心获取胜利？

Just fight and don't think of anything else...
我们现在状态火热，信心十足，谁遇到我们谁倒霉。不管对手是人是鬼，全都一样，干就完事了！

Honestly, I'm not totally confident. The previous matches were already difficult, and the upcoming opponents will only get stronger. All I can hope for is that our opponents don't hit too hard.
看来比赛前景不容乐观啊，加油{NICKNAME}教练，加油卢卡！

能走到这里已经超越我的预期了，接下来走一步看一步吧，享受比赛的过程更重要。

好了，这次提问就到这里了。
All right. That's it for your questions.

My first question is about the rumored match forfeiture. There's been a lot of buzz that Contestant Luka sank into a depressive state after losing to Boothill, and that he was prepared to forfeit the repechage, but fortunately still completed in the end.

确实有这回事。幸亏卢卡及时从低谷中走了出来，现在想来有点后怕。

每个人都会想要放弃的时候，有这样的想法是人之常情。但真正的英雄从来都是那些能正视自身弱小的人——毫无疑问，卢卡就是这样的人。
Everyone experiences moments when they feel like giving up. Such thoughts are only human. But real heroes are those who confront their own weaknesses — without a doubt, Luka is one of them.
不存在这回事，是大家多虑了。

一点小小的挫折根本无法打倒卢卡选手，他可是熔锤出身的勇士，无敌的磐岩冠军！
A minor setback won't defeat Contestant Luka. He's a warrior forged by the hammer, the invincible Boulder Champion!
The one who wanted to forfeit was me...
其实意志消沉的是我，想弃赛的也是我。我好想永远待在没人的角落里。
Actually, I was the one who was feeling down, and it was also me who wanted to forfeit the match. I just want to stay in a corner where no one can ever find me.
不过请大家放心，卢卡选手非常积极，而我也已经从阴霾中走了出来……
But everyone can rest assured. Luka is very positive, and I've already stepped away from the gloom...
原来「弃赛风波」真相是这样的……
So this is the truth behind the match-forfeiting drama...

We are thankful for the support from all the brands. However, for Luka, his highest priority now is winning the match. For the time being, we will not be considering other matters.

你怎么只关心吃的，你到底是做什么的？

呃…其实我本职工作是美食栏目主持人。

我是教练，不是厨师，请注意你的问题。

对不起，职业病犯了，总以为自己在主持美食栏目。

体育采访真的不适合我，我还是安心主持美食栏目吧，
Sports interviews really don't suit me. I think I should stick with hosting food shows.
美食栏目主持人也不这样工作啊！喂——
Even food show hosts don't work like this! Hey...

例行的采访环节已经结束，接下来该去办正事了。
Now that the routine interview is over, it's time to get down to business.
感谢卢卡选手再次给我们带来一场精彩的比赛！
Thank you, Contestant Luka, for bringing us yet another exciting match!
由于卢卡选手已经获得参加「竞锋守擂」的机会，所以这是{NICKNAME}教练最后一次接受采访，请记者朋友们珍惜提问机会。

As Luka has already obtained the opportunity to participate in the "Ringmaster's Challenge," this will be the last time Coach {NICKNAME} will be accepting interviews. Please cherish this opportunity to ask questions.
接下来开始由{NICKNAME}教练选择记者提问。
Next, Coach {NICKNAME} will be selecting journalists for questions.
Front row, first from the left.
{NICKNAME}教练你好，我是来自星际和平娱乐的实习记者卡美丽。你已经听过很多遍了——祝贺您和卢卡选手挺进守擂赛。

Hello, Coach {NICKNAME}, I am Carmella, and I am a journalist intern for Interastral Peace Entertainment. I'm sure you have heard this many times already, but congratulations to you and Luka on making the defending match!
本场雅利洛-Ⅵ内战比赛打得异常艰难，双方选手可谓是旗鼓相当，直到最后一刻才分出胜负。{NICKNAME}教练能评价下史瓦罗选手么？

The battle between Jarilo-VI's best was exceptionally tough, with both contestants evenly matched, and the outcome was not decided till the end. Coach {NICKNAME}, how would you evaluate Svarog's performance?
He's an opponent that deserves our respect.
卢卡和史瓦罗在贝洛伯格时本就是宿命的对手，彼此之间知根知底。
Luka and Svarog have been destined rivals in Belobog, and they have complete understanding of each other.
尽管史瓦罗选手给我们晋级之路造成了很大的麻烦，但不得不承认他实力强大，是值得尊敬的对手。
Even though Svarog gave us a hard time on our path to advancement, we have to admit that he is formidable in strength and is a respectable opponent.
I feel regret for this match between kinsmen...
我们都是代表贝洛伯格参赛的，如果可以的话，我希望我们不用在守擂赛之前遭遇，但是现实就是如此遗憾，只有其中一方能够挑战守擂者。
We are all representing Belobog. If possible, we wish not to encounter each other before the final match. But the fact is as it is. Regrettably, there can only be one to challenge the ringmaster.
我们击败了史瓦罗选手，会带着他的遗憾一起，继续前进的。
We defeated Contestant Svarog and we will carry his regrets as we continue forward.
谁会不喜欢大机器人呢？
说实话，刚到雅利洛-Ⅵ时，我就意识到了，大机器人就是帅啊！
Honestly, when I first arrived in Jarilo-VI, I realized that big robots are really cool!
现在我也是这样的评价！
原来如此——感谢你的回答！
I see... Thank you for your answer!
下一个问题。听说您是第一次担当教练，没想到已经取得了如此辉煌的战绩。请问您今后有打算担任全职教练吗？
Next question. I hear that this is your first time being a coach. It's extraordinary that you've achieved such stellar results. Do you intend to convert into a full-time coach in future?
我也没想到自己有当教练的天赋，如果有选手信任我，我当然乐意帮助。
I also never thought I'd have the talent for coaching. If a fighter trusts me, I'd of course be more than willing to assist.
只不过我相信，比我更专业的教练随处可见，最重要的还是自己的实力！
But I believe that there are many coaches who are more professional than me out there. What's crucial is your own ability!
不好意思，我只是个无名客。
当教练只是我一时兴起，全职工作并不适合我，我还是更喜欢做无名客。
I just became a coach on a whim. A full-time job isn't suited for me, and I much prefer being a Nameless still.
我的教学方法并不适合每个人…
My teaching methods aren't suited to everyone...
我的教学方法并不适合每个人。换句话说，卢卡与我相性比较好，也许换作其他人，我们就早早出局了。
My coaching methodology isn't for everyone. In other words, Luka and I are quite compatible. We might've been knocked out of the tournament if I had been with anyone else.
好了，这次提问就到这里了。
All right. That's it for your questions.
Front row, second from the left.
{NICKNAME}教练好啊，我是仙舟那啥啥网站特邀记者桂乃芬。我完全不知道你和卢卡选手真能闯进守擂赛啊！出乎我的意料！

Hello, Coach {NICKNAME}. I'm Guinaifen, special correspondent from that Xianzhou website, you know? I totally didn't know that you and Luka would really advance to the final stage! I'm completely floored!
Thank you. Now you know, don't you?
知道啦知道啦，看把你得意的。
Yes yes, I got it. Look at you all smug.
Did you have that little faith in us?
赖我赖我，是我看走眼了。
That's my bad. I misjudged you guys.
其实我关注到近期网络上的一些言论说两位选手都来自贝洛伯格，并且关系不错，有没有可能是史瓦罗选手故意放水…{NICKNAME}教练对此有何解释？

Reading recent comments on the net, they're saying that both contestants are from Belobog, and enjoy a cordial relationship. Is there a possibility that Svarog may have pulled his punches...? What does Coach {NICKNAME} have to say?
史瓦罗选手是瞒着我们报名的，赛前我都不知道对手是他……
Svarog registered for this tournament behind our backs. We didn't even know he was our next opponent...
你这个问题还是问史瓦罗吧，不过我相信他尊重比赛，不会放水的。
You're better off asking Svarog instead, but I trust he did honor the tournament and gave it his all.
Do the netizens think that the judges' panel is window dressing, or what?
网友当裁判组是摆设？要是史瓦罗选手真的放水，裁判组能看不出来？
They think the judges are window dressing? If Svarog were really trying to throw the match, you think the judges wouldn't notice?
网友们只是喜欢热门话题罢了，不会在意真相是什么。
Netizens just like to engage in rumor-mongering. They don't care about facts.
我没什么要解释的，清者自清，卢卡选手的实力有目共睹。
There's nothing to explain. Our consciences are clear as day, and Luka's prowess is evident to all.
{NICKNAME}的教练的回答越来越有水平了！
Coach {NICKNAME}'s replies are getting more eloquent!
自从卢卡选手获得守擂赛资格后，网络上一些自称仙舟传统武术爱好者声称，卢卡选手不是仙舟人，按照传统根本没有资格参加守擂赛。

Ever since Luka attained the right to challenge the ringmaster, some self-proclaimed traditional Xianzhou martial artist hobbyists on the internet have claimed that Luka isn't from the Xianzhou, and according to tradition, shouldn't be allowed to participate in the final defending match.
我也不是本地人，觉得这些声音太刺耳了。请问{NICKNAME}教练有什么想说的吗？
I'm not local either, and I think these opinions are quite distasteful. Does coach {NICKNAME} have anything to say?
They're just a bunch of sore losers.
不过是卢卡选手的手下败将，心有不甘却胆小如鼠，有本事在网上发发脾气，没有本事上擂台耍耍把式。
They are nothing more than fighters who lost to Luka — sore about their defeat but too cowardly to admit it. All they can do is vent their frustrations online since they lack the caliber in the ring.
其实卢卡也是仙舟传统武术…
Luka also practices traditional Xianzhou martial arts...
其实卢卡选手用的是仙舟传统拳法，没有想到吧？
Actually, Luka is using traditional Xianzhou martial arts. Bet you're surprised?
Go complain to the committee then!
规则是组委会制定的，有本事去找组委会评理啊。
It was the committee that drew up the regulations. Go complain to the committee if they're up to it.
就是就是，还是{NICKNAME}说话有水平。
That's right. Coach {NICKNAME}'s response is eloquent as usual.
好了，这次提问就到这里了。
All right. That's it for your questions.
Front row, third from the left.
你知道我是谁，我就不介绍了哦。
You know who I am, so I'll skip the introduction.
我记得，卢卡之前是打不过史瓦罗大佬的，{NICKNAME}，他到底是为什么打赢的？
I remember that Luka couldn't defeat Boss Svarog before. So, {NICKNAME}, how exactly did he do it?
史瓦罗大佬固然很强，但他在雅利洛-Ⅵ星核之灾出现前就存在了，岁数有点太大了。反观卢卡选手还是个小伙子，正值当打之年。
Boss Svarog is very strong, but he's an antique who existed before the Jarilo-VI's Stellaron Disaster even appeared. Conversely, Luka's still young and vibrant, a fighter in his prime.
俗话说「拳怕少壮」，所以不是卢卡变强了，而是史瓦罗大佬变弱了。
As the saying goes: The fist fears the strength of youth. It's not that Luka got stronger, but Svarog became weaker.
This is the power of growth.
卢卡选手一路走来遇到不少强敌，所谓「打不倒你的会使你更强大」，在一系列的比赛历练之后，他的肉体和精神都得到了强化。
Luka has encountered many powerful opponents along the way. "What doesn't kill you makes you stronger" — after a series of fights, his physique and spirit have been strengthened.
现在的卢卡与过去的卢卡已经不一样了，这就是成长的力量。
Luka as he is now is different from that Luka of past. This is the power of growth.
That's what a coach is for.
竞技体育与他们俩之前的交手都不太一样。选手自身实力固然重要，合适的战术也会起到举足轻重的作用。

Competitive fighting is quite different from the fights they got into against each other before. While the opponent's strength is an important consideration, the right tactics are also crucial in turning the tide.
史瓦罗选手的力量、技巧、速度都不比卢卡选手差，只是缺个好教练。
Svarog's strength, skill, and speed are not inferior to Luka's. He's only missing a good coach.
原来如此，虎克根本没有听懂。
I see. Hook didn't understand a word you said.
我听说下一场卢卡要打彦卿，据说是比虎克还要天才的剑士，{NICKNAME}怎么办？
I hear that Luka has to fight Yanqing in his next match. They say he's an even more talented swordmaster than Hook! What are you going to do, {NICKNAME}?
卢卡有没有换个功率加倍的机械臂呢？或者有没有做过「空手夺白刃」的训练呢？你的战术准备好了吗？
Did Luka change to a more powerful robot arm? Or does he have prior training to catch blades with his bare hands? Have you prepared your battle tactics?
虎克，不许透露我的笔记！
Hey, Hook, don't leak my notes like that!
虎克，你是不是偷看了我的笔记？怎么把我的战术全都说出来了，彦卿要是全知道了，我岂不是白准备了。
Did you sneak a peek at my notes, Hook? How could you reveal all my tactics? If Yanqing knows everything, my preparation will go up in smoke!
接下来的比赛只与实力有关。
The upcoming matches will only be about their skill.
守擂赛可不是小打小闹，说实话，战术能起的作用有限。卢卡能走多远，完全得看他个人实力了。
There's no fooling around in the final defending match. To be honest, there's a limit to how effective tactics can be. How far Luka can go completely depends on his own individual skill.
I've already used up all my tactics...
前面的比赛早就把我准备的战术用完了，接下来听天由命吧。
I've already exhausted all my tactics in the previous matches. Now I can only leave it up to fate.
好了，这次提问就到这里了。
All right. That's it for your questions.
现在请{NICKNAME}教练再选一个记者提问。

例行的采访环节已经结束，接下来该去办正事了。
Now that the routine interview is over, it's time to get down to business.
休赛期结束啦，卢卡选手，做好继续比赛的准备了吗？
The break is over. Contestant Luka, are you ready to keep competing?
早就等不及了，赶紧开始吧。
I can't wait. Let's get this started.
先别急，我们来一起看看下场擂台赛的对手信息。
Hold on. Let's look at the opponent information for the next Faceoff Match first.
一段时间后，贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆……
After a while, at the Belobog History and Culture Museum...
与此同时，竞锋舰甲板上。
At the same time, on the Skysplitter's deck...
有机生命，歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！
反有机方程的残存么，还是第一次见…罢了，倒也并非不可度化。
Remnants of the anti-organic equation, huh? This is the first time I've seen one... Never mind, it's not that it cannot be delivered to salvation.
坏劫星群，距演武仪典开始还有<unbreak>51</unbreak>个系统日。
Destroyed Star Cluster, <unbreak>51</unbreak> System Days before the start of the Wardance.
飞船拘禁区，距演武仪典开始还有3个系统日。
Spaceship's Restricted Zone, 3 System Days before the start of the Wardance.
护法僧毗梨、智众经师驮那，为一万三千人请愿，于星辰间圆寂。愿您勿遗忘他们的名字。
Dharmic Monk Virya and Revered Master Dhyana left this world on their journey across the stars to petition for thirteen thousand living beings. Please, do not forget their names.
皈依弟子善逝，断离恶业，为生民静默，于此地长眠。愿您能记得它最后的选择。
The converted disciple, Sugata, severed evil karma and kept silence for the sake of the people, and now rests here for all eternity. May you remember their final choice.
杰帕德先生比我预想中还要强得多…不行，决不能输。
Mr. Gepard is much stronger than I expected... No, I can't lose.
整个贝洛伯格都在看着我，我不能输！
All of Belobog is watching me! I can't lose!
体力耗尽了，我恐怕撑不了太久了…
I'm out of stamina. I don't think I can hold out much longer...
不行，整个贝城的人都看着我呢，我不能输！
No, all of Belobog is watching me! I can't lose!
每个人都在为卢卡选手而尖叫！
卢卡选手点燃了全场的热情！
Luka has set the arena ablaze with excitement!
卢卡选手化解了对手的攻势！
Luka efficiently neutralizes his opponent's attack!
卢卡选手！创造奇迹的男人！
卢卡选手扭转了战局！太强了！
Luka has turned the tables! Legendary!
卢卡选手再度创造了奇迹！不愧是卢卡选手！
Luka pulls off another miracle with his bare hands! What a man!
No doubt about it, Luka is the real deal!
永不言败的卢卡选手！继续战斗！
The indomitable Luka never gives up! The fight continues!
卢卡选手能再度逆转战局吗？
Can Luka turn the tides again?
卢卡选手被压制住了！这下他该怎么办！
Luka is on the defensive! What will he do?
对手加强了攻势！大概是急着下班收工吧！
The opponent has stepped up their offense! They are probably trying to end it quickly so they can get off work early!
对手再次袭来！卢卡选手，你要如何应对！
The opponent strikes again! How will Luka react?
对手来势汹汹！不要输啊卢卡选手！
The opponent is coming in hot! Hang in there, Luka!
对手不打算给卢卡选手任何机会！
The opponent is not leaving any openings for Luka!
卢卡，快用那招！他们猜不到的！
Luka, quickly use that move! They'll never see it coming!
Luka, get it together! Throw a punch!
卢卡，从那个角度出拳吧！
Luka, change your angle, and punch!
为了我，对对手使用铁拳吧！
Keep calm, and use your iron fist against your opponent! Do it for me!
Use this move against your opponent!
不要怕，用这招一定能赢！
Never fear. You'll definitely win against your opponent with this move!
先给你们科普一下～在「演武仪典」的擂台上，观众的氛围可是很重要的哦！
Lemme remind you! On the Wardance stage, the atmosphere of the spectators is very important!
展现出你华丽的招式，让观众为你尖叫吧！
Show off your flashy moves and make the audience cheer for you!
兄弟姐妹们，该我们表演了！
Brothers and sisters, it's time for us to show off our stuff!
仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！
Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars!...
卢卡选手似乎难以构成有效的反击！该怎么办呢？卢卡选手！
Luka seems to be struggling to land a counter! What is Luka going to do?
卢卡选手化解了云骑军的攻势，逆转了战局！
Luka deflects the Cloud Knights' attack and turns the tide of the battle!
卢卡选手没能化解云骑军的攻势！再次被压制！
Luka isn't able to deflect the Cloud Knights' attack! He's pinned down once again!
兄弟姐妹们，快振作起来！小桂子还在看着呢！
Brothers and sisters, get it together! Lil Gui is watching!
这上来的…怎么是裂界造物？我这是…出现幻觉了？
This... Why is there a Fragmentum creation? Am I... hallucinating?
来吧，让我们制胜一击！兄弟姐妹们！不要给他第二次机会！
Come, let's deal the winning blow! Don't give him another chance!
「桂宝应援会」似乎做好了准备，要彻底终结比赛！
Looks like Lil Gui's Support Association is ready to end this match once and for all!
Oh no... How can it be...
卢卡选手被击倒了！他是否还能重新站起来，创造奇迹呢？
Luka has been knocked down! Can he rise again and produce another miracle?
喂！{NICKNAME}教练，你可不能光看着啊！
Hey! Coach {NICKNAME}, don't just stand there staring!
Then... should I go up there myself and defeat you guys for him?
哎呀！当然不是了！来，我来教你～
Ugh! Of course not! Come, let me show you how it's done!
卢卡！他们人多势众，但个体能力不如你，尝试各个击破他们！
Luka! They have the numbers, but their abilities are not on par with yours. So try and take them down one by one!
虽然不至于借用琥珀王的伟力，但我们还是不会留情的哦。
We may not call upon the Amber Lord's might, but that doesn't mean we'll go easy on you.
能击倒卢卡的员工！我会在绩效总评中给你打高分！
Those who can knock down Luka! I'll be sure to give you an excellent score in your performance evaluation!
Let's roll, people! For our performance evaluation!
手下员工尽数倒下！托帕选手似乎准备亲自上场了！
Her subordinate forces have almost been whittled down! It looks like Topaz is preparing to take to the field herself!
没办法，有些事还是要亲力亲为才行。
Not like I have a choice. If you want something done properly, do it yourself.
Huh? What did you just call me?
喔？卢卡选手怎么突然愣住了？
Oh? It appears Luka is dazed all of a sudden.
不…没什么…来吧！托帕小姐！
No... It's nothing... Come at me, Miss Topaz!
（糟糕，我的幻觉似乎更严重了。）
(Oh no, my hallucinations are getting worse.)
看来是时候稍微认真一点了。
Looks like it's time to get serious.
你打得很漂亮，卢卡先生。
过家家的游戏，该结束了！
But it's time to end this game of playing house!
好强…她之前果然没有用全力……
So strong... She wasn't even using her full power just now...
卢卡选手完全被托帕选手压制住了！这束手无策的局面，是否还能挽回！
Luka has been completely cornered by Topaz! Will he be able to turn the tide on his precarious predicament?
动起来啊！卢卡！磐岩镇的拳王可不能在这里倒下！
Keep moving, Luka! The boxing champ of Boulder Town can't fall here!
抱歉，但看来属于你的比赛，就要到此结束了。
Apologies, but it looks like this match that should've been yours will end here.
两位选手一动不动，在擂台两边对峙！
Our two contestants haven't moved a muscle, as they face each other on opposite sides of the ring!
面对波提欧选手的枪口，卢卡选手要做何选择！
Just what will Luka do in the face of Boothill's muzzle?
比赛双方还没有动作！全场观众的神经都快要绷断了！
No action yet from either side! All the spectators are on the edge of their seats, their nerves on the brink of snapping!
快逃吧卢卡，别过去，你会死的。
Run away, now, Luka. Don't go over there, you'll die!
哦？你连走上前来的勇气都没有吗？
Oh? Don't even have the courage to step closer...
你不该与他对阵的，卢卡！他会杀了你！
You shouldn't be fighting him, Luka! He'll kill you!
一个真正的拳手，绝不会屈服于恐惧。
A true boxer doesn't succumb to fear!
我不能死在这里，我还不想死…我还不想死！
I can't die here. I don't want to die... I don't want to die yet!
I'll say this one last time...
要么转身离开，要么过来揍我。
Either turn around and leave, or get over here and hit me.
卢卡！子弹不长眼啊！难道你真的想死吗！
Luka! Bullets don't have eyes! Do you really want to die?
现在只要转身离开，就什么都不会发生，快逃吧！
Just turn around and leave! Nothing will happen! Run!
小子，这样犹豫不决吗？我他呜呜伯的对你很失望。
What's with the indecisiveness, kid? Diggity Wubbaboo, I'm so disappointed in you.
卢卡选手，请做好准备吧。
卢卡选手，邀你与我共舞一曲——
Mr. Luka, you're invited to perform...
卢卡选手究竟能否通过银枝的考验呢！好紧张啊！
Can Luka pass Argenti's trial? I'm so nervous!
银枝先生，这几招怎么样？

我的妈呀！这不是大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}吗！好巧啊，没想到会在这里遇见你！

求你了，别玩这比我都老的梗好吗？好的。

你累吗？要不要找个椅子坐一会？你渴了吗？红茶绿茶花草茶这里都有。

召夏转身就要离开，似乎准备找地方给你煮一碗牛肉面。

你的精神状态真的还正常吗？

看到你没有吃面的兴致，召夏似乎突然恢复了理智，深深叹了一口气。

唉…抱歉，我是不是吓到你了？

对不起，其实我算不上你的粉丝…我是说，我的确很欣赏你啦！但还没到粉丝那个地步……

只是，你是这场「庙会」的第二个客人…保不齐也就是最后一个了，我实在是怕你跑了。

是一位年轻的女孩子。没想到这个时代，还有年轻人对我们的「庙会」感兴趣！而且她还玩得特别开心，实在是令我感动！
The first one was a young lady. Who knew that there are still youngsters interested in our temple fair in this era! She looked like she had fun, I was very touched!
地衡司分拨给「庙会」的预算越来越少，对年轻人越来越缺乏吸引力……
The budget allocated for temple fairs by the Realm-Keeping Commission is dwindling, making it less appealing to youngsters year after year...
今年又撞上演武仪典的档期，更没人来参加什么「庙会」了，说实话，有两个客人已经远超预期了！
The temple fair even coincides with the Wardance this year, so even fewer people attended. Honestly, having two guests already exceeds my expectations!
「庙会」这东西其实是古国时代就有的风俗。过节的时候大家聚集在寺庙附近，进行酬神的表演。后来就演变成了大家一起过节玩乐的集市。

The temple fair is actually a tradition from the Primeval Imperium Era. During festivals, everyone will gather near temples to perform rituals for the gods. Later, it evolved into a market where people would gather to play games together.
以前「寺庙」是大家生活中特别重要的一部分，所以才有「庙会」。

但请你放心！只要你参加了咱们的「庙会游戏」，一定会发自内心地大喊一句——「妙啊！」
But don't you worry! As long as you join our temple fair games, your heart will surely be shouting: Fair-bulous!

"How was the Luofu Temple Fair? It was fair-bulous!"

呃…另一位客人听完就沉默了…这广告词那么烂吗？我构思了一星期呢！

真的吗？你喜欢就好！另一位客人听完就沉默了，搞得我差点就失去自信了！

其实就是以前那些传统庙会游戏的交感幻戏升级版～以前你要亲自到线下去体验的那些经典仙舟游戏，现在可以在庙会上一站式体验了！是不是很有趣？

It's actually an improved Empathic Immersia of those traditional temple fair games you used to know! The traditional Xianzhou games you had to be there personally to experience are now all available at this temple fair! Isn't it amazing?

太好了！我就知道你会感兴趣的！

好嘞！忙完了随时来找我！反正我这也没别的客人……

{NICKNAME}, do you want to take a tour of the temple fair?
I'm gonna take a tour of the temple fair.
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
好嘞！忙完了随时来找我！反正我这也没别的客人……

捉鬼小队！捉鬼小队集结！

I've transferred my image rights to the Luofu Temple Fair Preparatory Group, so they can use my virtual emulation as a temple fair guide.
别担心，我还没死。我只是将自己的形象授权给了「罗浮庙会筹备组」，所以他们可以让虚拟大毫担任庙会引导员。
Don't worry. I'm not dead. I've just transferred my image rights to the Luofu Temple Fair Preparatory Group so they can use my virtual emulation as a temple fair guide.
你说话实在不像真的大毫。
You don't sound like the real Dahao at all.

The budget was severely slashed, and we couldn't hire a professional writer. We called in a lot of favors to hire a borisin called Arma from the Shackling Prison to write the dialogue script for the virtual NPCs.

"The Arma Correctional Group is sincerely at your service! Snacks and drinks, daily necessities, service with a smile, medicine for our guests! We aim for your every need at Arma Correctional Group!"

曾经地衡司最为头疼的游戏产品，如今竟登陆地衡司庙会交感幻戏平台！真是梦幻联动呀！

啊，这段对话已经快<unbreak>800</unbreak>字了。超过<unbreak>1000</unbreak>字，「虚拟陪玩」就要加收服务器运营费了。
Ah, this conversation has almost reached <unbreak>800</unbreak> words. The virtual NPC is going to start charging additional server operational fees if you exceed <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> words.

欢迎，{NICKNAME}。要不要来一局紧张刺激的「大衍万象」？

鹤运物流也给形象授权了？

大衍万象不是太卜司的游戏吗？

Oh, it is. The original plan was to have someone from the Divination Commission be a guide. We even had just the right person in mind — the delightful Miss Qingque, beloved by all. Do you know her?
但那个符太卜死活不肯放人，原话是…「请回吧！我们丢不起这个人！」
But that stick-in-the-mud Diviner Fu just wouldn't lend her to us. In her own words... "No way! We simply can't afford to lose face with her!"
你说说，哪有这样独断专行的？多过分啊？
You tell me, how could someone act so arbitrarily? That's going too far!
There's no denying that, that's for sure.
不过嘛，虽然她不肯授权引导员的形象，但大衍万象这个玩法的版权不在她手里！所以，嘿嘿，咱们还是可以尽情地玩！
But, even if she's unwilling to provide an image for our guides, she doesn't own the gameplay rights for Mutare Magnus! Heh-heh, we can still play to our hearts' content!

Okay. It's pretty simple actually. Connect the dots to make a line, connect the lines to make a web, and weave a majestic drawing across the land!
比如这个点和这个点连结，就成了这个线。然后这个线和那个线交错一下，你看图案就对上了！
Like, you connect this dot to this dot, and it turns into a line. Then you interlink this line with that line, and ta-da, you've got the picture all matched up!
Easy enough, eh? You got all that?
不愧是你！真是天赋异禀的无名客！

那太好了。教学太浪费字数了，我们的预算不太付得起服务器运营费。
Fantastic. Tutorials use up too many words, and we can't afford the server costs on our budget.
是呀，虚拟陪玩会确保自己和你的对话不超过<unbreak>1000</unbreak>字。你肯定很好奇原因吧？
Yep. Virtual NPCs will ensure that the exchange between you and them won't exceed <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> words. I bet you're curious as to why?
答案很简单。因为我们预算有限，虚拟陪玩服务器只用得起免费体验版。
The answer's simple. We've got a tight budget. We've only managed to use the free trial version for the virtual NPC servers.
和你的对话超过<unbreak>1000</unbreak>字，那就要付费了。
It'll cost us if our conversation exceeds <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> words.
所以我们特意找人写了个对话逻辑——只要对话超过<unbreak>800</unbreak>字，虚拟陪玩就会尽快结束对话，确保不会不小心超过付费线。

So we specially got someone to write our conversation logic — once a conversation exceeds <unbreak>800</unbreak> words, the virtual NPC will end the conversation as soon as possible to avoid having to pay for excess fees.
糟糕，又超<unbreak>800</unbreak>字了！你自己慢慢玩吧，我先撤了！
Damn, more than <unbreak>800</unbreak> words again! You have fun on your own, I'm off!
{NICKNAME}祖宗，您来玩摆货游戏了吗？您里面请，玩法入口在里面，祖宗。
Top dog {NICKNAME}, here to play the goods stacking game? Come in, the game entrance is right inside, top dog.

Doesn't matter. I'm a virtual NPC in this Empathic Immersia. I'm still at your beck and call regardless of my attitude. This whole affair is so annoying!

In the deep night, Scarlett and Vernon were going home together. When they walked into a deserted narrow alley, Vernon suddenly yelped in surprise, dragging Scarlett with him out of the alley.

小红恐惧地问道：「刚才到底发生什么了？」
Terrified, Scarlett asked: "What happened back there?"
小绿指着两人刚刚跑过的那条窄巷，用颤抖的声音说……
Vernon pointed to that narrow alley they just ran past, and in a quivering tone, he said...

This is a most momentous event in our school celebrations. Students from different schools will present an exciting performance during the party, to exhibit Paperfold University's vigor through music.

有空的话，我陪你在学校里到处看看吧。派对会用到的设施都还在搭建中，但气氛已经相当热闹了，和你刚到时候的感受肯定完全不一样。

这种忍术是初代兼永世社长在课堂上教给我们的，相当好用，好多人争抢着想要入社，我们都没答应呢。
This ninjutsu was taught to us by our first generation and eternal society chief. Many are clamoring to gain admission into the society, but none have been approved by us.
可惜，社长在教学结束后就消失了，到现在都不知道她的名字。
Alas, our chief disappeared after the lesson ended, and to this day, no one knows her name.
你们社长，是不是粉色头发…

哇，这位猴友居然知道社长！看来我们的忍术流派正在发扬光大啊。

You whip out your phone and proudly show off LilGuiGuinevere to the two students — an account that bears many of your precious memories.
啊？你就是小桂子本人？可我听说小桂子是个活力四射的小姑娘啊？

Actually, Paperfold University considered stopping this event. The ruckus that Profnana caused has just been quelled, and it's also the pivotal moment immediately after Penacony became listed. No one really wants any more trouble to arise.
是学生们集体向家族递交申请，保证会办好音乐派对。经过多方协商和反复衡量，学院才勉强同意。因此，这场活动也受到了特别的关注。

It was the students who submitted their request to The Family, promising that the music party would be a success. It was after many rounds of negotiation and deliberation that the Academy finally acquiesced. This is also why this event is of particular attention.
What do you make of this?
Why are you telling me all this...
可能因为派对主题是音乐吧，我非常希望这场活动能正常举办。通过旋律来表达自我的愿望不应该被否定，更不应受到上层事务的影响。

Probably because the party's theme is tied to music, I really hope that this event will be organized uneventfully. The wish to express oneself through melody should not be denied, nor should it be deprived of by matters of the higher echelon.
音乐述说着最纯粹的梦，这才是匹诺康尼作为*梦想之地*的真实含义。
Music conveys the purest of dreams, and this is the true meaning of Penacony as the Land of the Dreams.
所以——你想加入这场音乐派对吗？

是时候展现我的音乐天赋了！

虽然很期待你的舞台表现，可惜，这次似乎没有机会呢。

就要登台了，记得各自检查乐器的状况。还觉得紧张，可以把眼睛闭起来，将动作完全交给音乐。弹错了也没关系，跟我的节奏就好。

别怕啊！你们的乐队经理正在热身，真出了什么问题，我来顶上！

唔。气氛炒得差不多，「{TEXTJOIN#120}」——准备登台了！

初次登台，闲话少说。请期待在下及诸音忍带来的，超•精彩绝伦的演出吧！
It is our first time on stage, so I'll keep it short. Please look forward to the super-excitingly fabulous show that the sound ninja and I are about to bring you!
感谢诸位！能收到如此多的赞美之词，在下非常开心！
Thank you everyone! I am jubilant to have received such thunderous praise!
…为何我等打扮成这般模样？角色扮演？非也！此乃在下精心设计的音忍•盛装是也！
...Why am I dressed like that? Roleplaying? Nay! This is my painstakingly designed Sound Ninja Fashion Garb!

高端乐队就是不一样！这个「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出确实啊，旋律正劲头足，听起来真爽！

演出的水准确实很高，即使像我这样专业的乐评人也挑不出什么毛病。
The show's caliber was outstanding. Even a seasoned music critic like me had nothing to nitpick.
真要说的话…那个打碟的姑娘也太有活力了……

你知道的，我从很早时候就开始看「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出了，一直是乐队的粉丝。
You already know I've been watching {TEXTJOIN#120}'s performances since they started. I've always been a fan of the band.
至于谐乐学院，我祝那群老顽固安好。这才是真正的音乐啊！
As for Charmony Academy, I wish that bunch of stubborn old coots well. THIS is what real music is!
（观众对乐队演出的评价都很高，看来可以放心了。）
(The band's reviews from the audience are very positive. Looks like I had nothing to worry about.)
你沉浸在现场的喧闹气氛中，度过了一段愉快的时光。
You bask in the venue's uproarious buzz, enjoying a pleasant time.
嗯…这么动听的配乐，如果用在我的影片里……
Hmm... Such an emotional underscore. If I used it in my film...
太好了，你还认得我，说明我给片场「善后」的时候没有拿错记忆。
Excellent. You still remember me. That means I didn't retrieve the wrong memory when I "redressed" the set.
是啊，片场的「善后」花了我不少时间。
Yes, the set's "redressing" took me some time.
Remember to foot the license fee.
哈哈，我不会忘的——但你们会不会忘，就不好说了。
Haha, I won't forget. But whether you remember is another story.
多亏了你们先前带来的演出，才能有令观众们满意的新作。
It's all thanks to the show you guys played that made the new piece such a favorite.
但没想到你们又准备了一场这么精彩的音乐片，早知道就晚些完成剪辑了。
But I never thought you would prepare yet another superb music set. I would've delayed the post-production if I knew.
不管怎么说，我的成片拍摄已经结束了，后面的花絮就全部留给你们的音乐吧。
Regardless, my film shooting has already wrapped. I'll leave the highlights at the back to your music.
So you're actually still attending school?
我等已摧毁邪祟们的诡计，「毗乃昆尼」的长夜也迎来破晓。在下滞留此地，只是为了收集关于御猿•邪忍的罪证。
I have shattered the fiendlings' conspiracy, and Pinecany's long night also welcomes daybreak. The reason I have remained here is merely to collect criminal evidence related to the Evil Ninja Osaru.
实不相瞒，在下本应于近日启程——但得知忍徒们的祭典陷入窘困之境，忍侠绝不能袖手旁观。
Truth be told, I was to depart soon, but when I learned that the ninja initiates' festival was in jeopardy, this Ninja Hero could not sit idly by.
唉，既然是知更鸟小姐推荐的人选，又是芮克先生看中的明星，那应该不会出什么问题。
*sigh* Since it's someone recommended by Miss Robin, and a superstar picked by Mr. Reca, that shouldn't be a problem.

听闻这位外校人士在表演方面颇有造诣，如此不失为种好的解题思路。

期待：预祝你们在音乐派对的演出能顺利进行。
Anticipation: I wish your music party performance smooth-sailing.

毫无疑问，大家都很喜欢「缭乱」的音乐！不仅新潮有趣，还很酷！我熟悉的朋友现在都是你们的粉丝，争着想要乱破大人的签名呢。

Without a doubt, everyone loves the music of the Dazzling! It's not just trendy and making waves, it's also really cool! All my friends are your fans now, and everyone is fighting for Rappa's autograph.
虽然…学校那边是有些反对的声音，但不用管他们。那群老师就是什么都看不惯，和他们想法不一样的就要批评。哎呀，谁叫这里是学校呢。

Although... there are some voices of objection from the school, but don't mind it. That bunch of teachers just cannot tolerate anything that's different, and they criticize anything that doesn't align with their views. Oh well, that's why it's a school.
真要给啊？！你可是盛会巨星诶，签名很值钱的，还是别轻易送吧。
You're really going to give me your autograph!? You're the Festive Superstar, and your autograph is very valuable. Don't give it away so easily.
…乱破大人倒是给过我她画的忍符，不过那是我的珍藏。嘿嘿。
...Though Lady Rappa gave me a ninja talisman she drew — that's my precious baby. Heh-heh.
什么着装不合规范啦，旋律不符合主流风格啦，开场白太长啦…只要想挑刺，总是能找到毛病的，别放在心上。

Stuff like not adhering to dress code, melodies that don't fit into mainstream music, opening speech being too long... As long as they want to nitpick, they will find that needle in the haystack, so don't take it to heart.
音乐派对是学生们的活动，至于那群老师，就让他们生闷气好啦！
The music party is an event for the students. Just let those teachers be upset all they want!
音乐派对是彩梦校庆最盛大的活动，也是学生们最期待的时候！
The music party is the grandest event of the Dreamlight Anniversary celebration. It's also a time that all students look forward to!
大家都忙着筹办庆典，校园里到处都是好玩的摊位和活动，光是闲逛都觉得眼花缭乱了。自由、欢快，这才是大学该有的氛围呀。

Everyone is busy preparing for the celebration, and the campus is filled with fun booths and activities. Just wandering around is enough to make you feel overwhelmed. Freedom and joy — this is what the atmosphere of a college should feel like.
更不用说…还有这么精彩的乐队演出！
Needless to say... there's also such an exciting performance!
How long will the music party last?
按以往的经验来看，音乐派对会和彩梦校庆同步结束。但要求延长举办时间的呼声也一直存在，所以这次究竟要办多久，谁都说不准。

According to past experience, the music party and the Dreamlight Anniversary celebration will end at the same time. But there are people who are constantly asking for the event time to be extended. No one really knows for sure how long this will last.
哎呀，对我们来说，当然是希望办得越久越好啦。
As for us, of course, we'd like it to last as long as possible.
音乐派对和三个学院的关系？
The music party is related to the three academies?
虽说音乐派对是由学生组织的活动，但还是会受到各个学院的影响。
Although the music party is a student initiative, it's still influenced by the various schools.
譬如…以前的乐队核心往往都由谐乐学院指定，财富学院则会对演出的规模和时长提出要求，筑梦学院倒是很简单啦，成员的绩点足够就好。

For example... back then, the band leader was often appointed by Charmony Academy, while Fortune Academy would set requirements for the scale and duration of the performance. As for Dreamweaver Academy, it was straightforward — members just needed to have a sufficient grade.
像这次，由学院外的同学…就是盛会巨星和乱破大人来主导乐队的情况还是头一回，所以才格外地有意思！
But this time, having students from outside the academies... having Rappa and the Festive Superstar directing the band is the first of its kind, so it's kinda special!
Is the music party very important?
学院代表会说什么…「音乐派对是对外展示折纸大学活力与创造性的窗口」，但学生们才不在乎这个，只要活动办得有意思就好。

What did the academy's representative say... "The music party is a showcase of the energy and creativity of Paperfold University." But the students don't care about this. They only want the event to be interesting.
所以盛会巨星不用有压力，按自己的想法尽情去演出就好啦！
So please don't be pressured, Festive Superstar! Just go with your gut and play your hearts out!
看到头顶那只金光灿灿的大鸟了吗？是不是特别地潮？！

This design is specifically created for this music party by Dreamweaver Academy. It's both trendy and cool, befitting the theme of the performance. Once it's set up, it'll become the highlight of the entire school.

最后那场闭幕演出，绝对是我见过的最精彩的舞台表演——没有之一！

Why didn't I receive this news?
可能是因为年鉴还在征集内容的阶段吧，你是盛会巨星，估计要等学校这边全都制作好了才会发到你手里，现在还早着呢。

啾？刚才是不是你在舞台旁边晃悠，原来是同行，你在乐队里担任哪个位置啾？
