啾！流行的乐队动画里主角都是吉他手，这样对其余成员很不公平啾！
Tweet! The protags in popular band manga are all guitarists. That's unfair to the rest of the band, tweet!
啾！最讨厌那些连贝斯和吉他都分不清的粉丝，贝斯手也要有存在感啾！
Tweet! I hate it when fans can't even tell the difference between bass and guitar! Bassists exist too, tweet!
啾！很多键盘手还要负责作曲工作，超辛苦的，大家都要好好对待键盘手啾！
Tweet! Many keyboardists also compose songs. It's super tiring! Everyone should treat keyboardists better, tweet!
啾！鼓手在合影时候手里只能拿着鼓槌，很可怜的啾！
Tweet! Drummers can only hold on to their sticks in group photos, poor things, tweet!
啾！原来是制作人，忙着给乐队准备演奏曲目和场地，你也很不容易啾！
Tweet! So you're the producer then, scurrying about preparing tracks and venues for the band. Your job's tough too, tweet!
既然是热爱音乐的同好，那就来和我们合奏，看看实力啾！
Since we're all mutual music enthusiasts, come play with us! Let's see what you got, tweet!
乐队正在演奏美梦小镇的庆典进行曲——好梦来啾，要努力跟上我们的节奏啾！
The band's playing the Dreamville's marching song — Good Dreams Come, tweet! Do your best to keep up with us, tweet!
啾！啾啾！你在与折纸小鸟的合奏训练中取得了非常优秀的好成绩，恭喜你啾！
Tweet! Tweet tweet! You scored really high in the origami birds' ensemble training! Congrats, tweet!
我得到了折纸小鸟的认可了！
I was acknowledged by the origami birds!
美梦小镇进行曲还有更困难的演出方式，欢迎随时来和我们合奏啾！
The Dreamville's marching song has even harder performance methods. You're welcome to play with us again, tweet!
音乐是世界的宝物，要用音乐让整个世界都变得热闹起来啾！
Music is the world's treasure. We must use music to turn the world into one huge concert, tweet!
（收集到了折纸小鸟的节奏记录，发给乱破听听吧。）
(I collected the origami birds' rhythm record. Better send it to Rappa for a listen.)
——盛会巨星！我提供的情报没错吧！有遇见什么好玩的事情嘛？
...Festive superstar! The info I got you was right on the money, wasn't it? Did you encounter anything fun?
I ran into a strange incident.
你将刚才见到的奇妙景象详细描述给了这位好奇的学生，还不忘添油加醋地宣称，自己发现了校园的第八大不可思议。
You vividly describe the wondrous scene you saw to this curious student, not forgetting to add your own spin on things, declaring that you discovered the eighth wonder on campus.
你将刚才见到的奇妙景象详细描述给了这位好奇的学生，还不忘添油加醋地宣称，折纸小鸟在学鸟叫大赛中仅仅获得了第二名。

You vividly describe the wondrous scene you saw to this curious student, not forgetting to add your own spin on things, declaring that the origami birds only came in second in the bird-calling contest.
哇！真的很好玩！既然能帮上忙，那我就拜托群友继续收集信息啦！
Woah! That sounded really fun! Since that helped, I'll continue asking my group to keep collecting info!
我正式封你为秘书•忍者！
I hereby dub you Secretary Ninja!
嘿嘿嘿，现在我也是忍者了。咳——在下必定完成任务，不辱使命！
Heehee, now I'm a ninja too. Ahem... I will surely complete the mission without fail!
关于<color=#dbc291ff>舞台的使用方式</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>灵感收集</color>方面有什么问题，可以随时来问我哦。
If you have any questions on <color=#dbc291ff>how to use the stage</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>inspiration collection</color>, don't hesitate to ask.
——让我和盛会巨星的乐队一起，尽情享受这场音乐派对吧！
...Let me fully enjoy this music party with the festive superstar's band!
咕咕——新来的同学，不要在走廊里乱跑，注意安全咕。
Hoot hoot. New student, you should be careful and not run in the hallway, hoot.
A new kind of origami bird?
咕咕咕，老鸟是「猫头鹰老师」，是钟表小子的好朋友——看看这片折纸树林里的小鸟们，它们都是我的学生。
Hoot hoothoot, I am Professor Owl, a good friend of Clockie's. See the birds in Paperfold Woods? They're all my students.
咕咕，你还年轻，时间多的是，凡事都能慢慢解决。
Hoot hoot. You're still young, with plenty of time. Everything should be resolved slowly.
哪怕是石头老板来了，都不用着急咕。
Even if Boss Stone were here, there's no need to rush, hoot.
咕咕，没事没事——真是个懂礼貌的学生咕。
Hoot hoot, it's all right. What a polite student, hoot.
咕咕，我知道你在急什么，是为了咱们折纸树林里的「啾啾晚会」吧？老鸟听说你在这次晚会中承担很重要的职责，真了不起。
Hoot hoot. I know why you're in a hurry: It's for our Paperfold Woods' Chirpy Banquet, isn't it? This old bird has heard that you have an important duty to perform this night. How admirable.
对了，有几只跟我学习的折纸小鸟在前面的小屋子里排练呢，如果你有空就去帮帮他们吧。
Oh yes, some origami birds that I teach are practicing in the hut up ahead. Please help them out if you have time.
咕咕，晚会可是美梦小镇的一件大事，老鸟很期待这次的演出，你可要加油咕。
Hoot hoot. The banquet is a major event in the Dreamville. I look forward to your performance. Do your best, hoot.
佩佩用好奇的眼神望着你，仿佛想问为何你会突然到访。
Peppy gazes at you with curious eyes, as if asking why you are suddenly visiting.
Actually, I have something to ask...
就是…佩佩，你会演奏音乐吗？正经的旋律，不是有节奏地叫这种。
So... Peppy, can you play music? Proper melodies, not just rhythmic howling.
Woof! Woof woof... Woof woof woof!
好吧，你很清楚自己不该，至少不能对一只小狗的音乐天赋抱有期待。那么，在这个离地面无比遥远的空间站中，究竟该去哪寻找所谓的灵感呢？

Okay, you're acutely aware that you can't, or at least, shouldn't expect a dog to have any sort of musical talent. Then, where in this space station, far away from any landfall, can you find this supposed inspiration?
你来得正好！最近空间站发生了不少怪事，我正愁找不到人商量呢。
You've come at the right time! Plenty of strange things have been happening in the space station recently. I was just dying to talk to someone about it.
虽然在网上发了求助帖，但都没得到什么有用的信息。唉，这个站长是越来越难当了。
Though I posted threads on the internet asking for help, none of the comments were remotely useful. Bah, this lead researcher gig is getting harder each day.
先给你讲讲究竟发生了什么事吧。从前段时间开始，我发现空间站的科员们经常围坐在一起，窃窃私语，不知道在讨论什么。只要我靠近，他们马上就安静了。

I'll tell you what exactly happened first. It started some time ago — I noticed the station researchers would usually gather around and whisper to one another, but I don't know what they are discussing. As soon as I get close, they shut their gabs right away.
然后呢，那群科员上班都没什么精神，黑眼圈很重，好像晚上完全没睡觉似的。
And then, those researchers are all listless when they're at work, with heavy dark circles, like they hadn't slept all night.
They were on their phones all night.
这还不是最吓人的！夜晚的空间站走廊，经常能听到铛…铛…铛…铛的声音，就好像有人在用金属敲舱门，偶尔还会有人的惨叫声！

This isn't even the scariest thing! At night, along the space station's hallways, you can frequently hear a ding... ding... ding... sound, like someone's rapping on cabin hatches with metal. Sometimes you can hear screaming!
你说，该不会是有什么太空生物偷偷混进来了吧？
You don't suppose some space creature managed to break in, do you?
是吧！后来我去问那些科员，他们都不愿意告诉我，遮遮掩掩的，肯定有秘密！
I know, right? Later on, when I asked those researchers, they wouldn't tell me anything. All that secrecy, they must definitely be hiding something!
Could you have been hearing things?
不可能吧。我问过那些科员，但他们都表示不知情，遮遮掩掩的，像是有秘密。
Impossible. I asked those researchers, but they all feigned ignorance. All that secrecy, they must definitely be hiding something.
啊，不会是…大家都被邪恶的怪物偷偷替换掉了，整个空间站只剩我一个活人了吧？！
Ah, could it be... everyone was replaced by some evil monster, and I'm the only one alive in this whole space station!?
黑塔女士最近在忙很重要的测试，不会管这种小事的。
Madam Herta's been busy with some important tests recently. She wouldn't bother with such trivialities.
唉，阿兰就是所有人中举止最可疑的那个，没有实际证据，我也不好当面去问。
*sigh* Arlan's the most suspicious of the lot. I can't ask about it either without solid proof.
咦，这倒是个好办法！佩佩在空间站的行踪很自由，谁都不会提防它。
Huh, that does sound like a good idea! Peppy's free to roam about in the space station, and no one would suspect it.
还记得你以前用过的特殊联觉信标吗，最近科员们对它做了些改造，并安装到了空间站的小机器人身上。我们可以用它来和佩佩交流！

Do you still remember that special Synesthesia Beacon you used before? The researchers recently made some modifications to it and installed it on the little robot in the station. We can use it to talk to Peppy!
稍等，我这就去把小机器人喊来。
Hold on, I'll get the little robot here.
先试试吧，我挺想知道佩佩说起话来是什么样的，是那种可爱的类型呢，还是超凶？
We have to give it a shot. I'm pretty curious what Peppy's voice sounds like — will it be adorable, or really gruff?
我来负责记录内容，等会就麻烦你实际操作小机器人了。
I'll be recording the content, so I'll trouble you to control the little robot.
都准备好了吗，我要启动翻译功能了哦。
Are you ready? I'm running the interpretation program.
需要再次进行翻译吗？嘶嘶。
Do you need another interpretation? Zzztzzt.
佩佩提到了相同的声音，也就是说，这条线索很重要，和事情的真相有关。
Peppy mentions a similar sound, which also means that this clue is highly crucial — it could be related to the truth.
Woof! Woof woof... Woof woof woof woof!
Zztzzt. I will, bring him here.
好久不见，我的朋友。你和站长找我过来，难道是我们的非人生物权益保护事业取得了重大进展，终于要在整个空间站推广开了吗？

Been a while, my friend. Seeing that you and the lead researcher invited me here, does that mean that our non-human rights protection initiative has seen progress? Are we finally going to promote this across the whole space station?
太感动了！我要代表世界上所有遭受压迫的非人生物向你表示谢意！
I'm so touched! I sincerely thank you on behalf of all non-human organisms who suffer persecution!
你提交的那些奇怪提案有空再说吧。有件事想要确认，就是——你知道什么是「铛…铛…铛…铛」吗？像这样，铛…铛…铛，非常有节奏的声音。

We'll talk about those strange requests that you submitted another time. There's something I need to confirm, which is... Do you know what "ding... ding... ding... ding" is? Just like that, ding... ding... ding, it's got a rhythm.
当然知道啊。噢？莫非…站长也沉迷打铁了？
Of course. Oh? Have... you've also gotten into perfect timing?
啊…呃，是的！我最近刚开始打…可有意思了！
Ah... Err, yes! I've only recently gotten into it... It's super interesting!
Yeah! We're really interested in that.
早说嘛，等会就把你们拉进游戏群！大家现在每个晚上都在打铁，有什么经验或者有用的攻略也会在群里交流，对你们这样的新人最有用了！

You should've said so! I'll pull you guys into a game group later on! Everyone's been working on their timing every night now. They share their experiences and strategies in the chat as well. These guides are just what newbies like you need to get started!
不知道那个策划脑子怎么想的，明明是个音乐游戏，非得做这么难，还设置了一堆恶意满满的陷阱，害得我们连觉都睡不好，天天熬夜想着怎么通关。

I've really got to hand it to the designer who came up with this. It's a rhythm game, but they had to make it so difficult. They even added a whole heap of nasty traps in it, forcing us to stay up all night wracking our brains to clear the levels.
原来…最近科员们是在沉迷游戏啊。所以才会白天没精神，夜晚发出奇怪的声响。
I see... Those researchers have been obsessed with a game lately. Which explains their listlessness in the day, and those weird sounds at night.
怪不得…上班摸鱼这种事，当然要瞒着我了。
Of course... they'd need to go behind my back to goof off at work.
也不知道这个出云忍者题材的游戏，是怎么突然流行起来的，回过神来的时候，身边所有人都在谈论了。难是难了点，不过…真好玩啊！
I also don't know how this Izumo ninja-themed game got so popular all of a sudden. Before I knew it, everyone around me was talking about it. It's pretty hard, but... it's really fun!
别看佩佩不会说话，在旁边看我们玩游戏的时候可来劲了，意外地是个节奏高手啊！
Don't scoff at Peppy's inability to talk. It gets really intense when it's by our side watching us play. An unexpected expert in rhythm games!
总感觉要是放任佩佩继续和他们呆在一起，迟早有天会学坏。
I can't help but feel that if I allow Peppy to hang out with them any longer, it'll eventually get led down some bad vices.
不过，弄清楚了空间站正在发生的怪事，终于能放心了。辛苦你陪我调查啦。
But I can finally be at ease, now that I know what's going on in the space station. Thank you for investigating with me.
咦，你在运营乐队？好有意思！
Huh? You're running a band? Interesting!
行呀，空间站正好需要点能让大家都嗨起来的活动。就算没法去现场，我也会收看你们的直播的！
Sure, the station needs some explosive event to get everyone hyped anyway. Even if we can't be there in person, I'll still tune in to your live stream!
（收集到了佩佩的节奏记录，发给乱破听听吧。）
(Collected Peppy's rhythm record. Should send it to Rappa for a listen.)
（咦，收到了新的消息。这次是…艾尔菲发来的？）
(Huh? Got a new message. It's... from Arfey this time?)
（越来越好奇了…乱破所谓的音忍特训到底是什么样的啊？）
(More and more curious... What exactly is this special sound ninja training that Rappa's conducting?)
（等收集完了灵感，就回排练室看看吧。）
(I'll head back to the rehearsal room for a gander when I'm done collecting inspiration.)
哟！稀客啊。让我瞧瞧…嗯，有段时间不见，你好像变得更摇滚了！
Yo! A rare visitor. Let's take a look... Mm, we haven't seen each other for some time. You look more rock 'n' roll now!
加把劲，你的摇滚程度快比得上机械屋的废弃引擎了。
Keep it up. Your rock 'n' roll vibe can almost rival the discarded engines of the workshop.
You can even tell when something's rock 'n' roll?
哈哈哈，那是当然！玩乐队的人身上都有股独特的气息，我一眼就能看出来。
Hahaha, of course! There's a unique aura on people who play in a band. I can tell in a glance.
虽然没希露瓦说得那么夸张，但我也看得出来，大概就是说话时候的神态、语调，平时的着装…还有奇怪的手势。
While it's not as exaggerated as Serval suggests, I can see it too. It's something about stance and inflection when you speak, and your everyday attire... and that strange gesture.
What sort of wonderful metaphor is that?
别太在意，这是希露瓦最近喜欢讲的冷笑话。她偶然在雪地里找到了一架坏掉的机兵，动轮摩擦履带的声音就像是在演奏吉他，还挺好听的。

Don't mind it. It's just a dad joke that Serval enjoys telling lately. She found a broken automaton in the snow — the noise it makes when its wheels are rubbing against the track sounds like a guitar playing, and pretty good too, I might add.
后来，她想出了用机械设备来形容别人的笑话…完全不好笑。
Later, she thought of a joke that uses machines to describe other people... It's not funny at all.
哈哈哈，谁叫那个坏掉的机兵，吉他弹得比我还好呢？大自然还真是神奇啊。
Hahaha, who knew that broken automation can play the guitar better than I do? Nature is truly wondrous.
所以，你是真的在从事音乐相关的工作吗？
So, are you really doing music-related work?
你向两位资深乐队成员讲述了在折纸大学的故事，还不忘反复强调经理的工作有多辛苦。
You elaborate on the incident at Paperfold University to the two seasoned musicians, and even make the effort to repeatedly emphasize the hardships of managerial work.
明白，不就是写不出歌嘛，这事我们可有经验了。演出临近，要演奏的曲子却还没有着落，是挺烦躁的。不过别急，总归会有办法。

Understood. It's just writer's block, isn't it? Not something new to us. When a show is looming, but the song that needs to be performed isn't finalized, it's pretty annoying. But don't rush it. There's always a way.
如果通宵作曲也算的话…唉，想起那段没日没夜为公演做准备的时间，我还心有余悸。
If you count staying up all night to write the song... *sigh* My trauma still lingers from the sheer thought of those endless days and nights preparing for a show.
但很开心啊！「机械热潮」就是要让这座城市燥起来——我们当然也包括在内！
But they were fun! The Mechanical fever is all about dialing this city up to eleven, and it's got to include us, obviously!
想要寻找灵感的话，我建议你可以在广场附近转转。贝洛伯格虽然不像大城市那样繁华，但我们上百年音乐底蕴可不会输给他们。
If you seek inspiration, I suggest you go walk around the plaza. Belobog may not be as prosperous as those big cities, but we won't lose out with our centuries of musical heritage.
啊，说到这个，我想起来了。前段时间从车站经过的时候，好像听到有演出的声音…水平不好说，但风格…很有特色！
Ah, speaking of which, that reminds me. When I was passing by the station a while back, I thought I could hear sounds of a performance... It wasn't all that great, but its style... was unique!
或许是某个外来的地下乐队吧，你可以去看看。
It could've been a foreign underground band. You can go take a look.
…是因为没人看演出，打算把票卖给熟人嘛？
...Is it because no one wants to see it, that you're selling the tickets to your friends?
这种心情我也能理解啦。新组建的乐队，名气小，原创曲也少，刚开始都很艰难的。
I understand where you're coming from. A newly formed band with little fame and few original songs — starting from scratch is always hard.
没关系，我们也是这么过来的。你还剩多少票，我帮你在贝洛伯格也宣传下~
It's okay. We all started from somewhere. How many tickets do you have left? I'll help you promote your show in Belobog!
I'm not selling them. I'm giving them to you!
对不起，最近有不少公务要处理，可能没法去匹诺康尼…但我和希露瓦会支持你的。
Sorry, I have a lot of official business to handle lately, so I might not make it to Penacony... But Serval and I will be supporting you.
加油！带着我们的摇滚精神一起演奏吧！
Go for it! Carry our rocker spirit along with you for the show of a lifetime!
（贝洛伯格的地下乐队…希望能从他们的演出中得到些灵感吧。）
(Belobog's underground band... I hope I can get some inspiration from their performances.)
就是…你好，请问你会演奏音乐吗？
Err... Hello, do you know how to play music?
——不对吧！！！我为什么在和垃圾桶讲话啊？！
...C'mon!!! Why am I talking to a trashcan!?
你来到希露瓦指示的地点，却没有见到任何与乐队有关的内容。最显眼的是摆在路旁的几个垃圾桶，它们的色泽光鲜，棱角分明。

You arrive at the location with Serval's directions, but don't see anything relevant to a band. The most conspicuous things are several trashcans lying by the roadside. Their luster is shiny, their angles crisp and clean.
好吧，谁说垃圾桶不算是一种重金属呢？
Okay, who can claim trashcans aren't a type of heavy metal?
Might as well give them a rummage!
不如做点更摇滚的事吧！
Why not do something even more rock!
你朝周围环视了圈，确定没有人注意到这边。于是，在强烈冲动的驱使下，你向桶盖伸出了手……
You look all around you to make sure no one's paying attention. Then, driven by some primal instinct, you reach for the trashcan lid...
人类！偷垃圾乃是犯罪，品尝禁忌的滋味，给你一个机会，现在赶紧撤退！
Human, stealing trash is a crime! Tasting the forbidden... you've crossed the line. I'll give you a chance, better take your shot, right now, step back, or you'll get caught!
什么东西我说，算盘打得不错，可惜实在太弱，模样显得做作，不如重开再次来过。
What did I just hear? Your plan was pretty neat, but too bad you're weak, and your style's obsolete. You're looking way too fake, better hit restart, come back stronger, and play it smart!
出去，出去，我有学过法律，特别会用比喻，休想偷偷摸摸再继续！
Get out, get out, I've studied the law. I'm sharp with metaphors, gonna leave you in awe. Don't think you can sneak around, not anymore!
Sorry, I've got the wrong place.
呃…误闯此地，向各位致意，希望争端就此平息，好让我安心逃离。
Uh... stumbled in by mistake, I greet you all, hoping this beef can end, so I can make my call. Let me leave in peace, no more trouble at all.
原来是同行，还好我没怯场，各位的表现确实很强，能否让我继续观赏？
Ah, you're from our profession. Good thing I didn't suffer from performance anxiety. All your performances were amazing. May I keep watching?
大哥！这个家伙挺不错的诶！

...Separation and reunion, becoming lost and found again. Sad songs need not be overwhelming. Watch as the sound ninjas defeat all enemies!

艾尔菲同学说是要回谐乐学院，邀请各位老师和同学来观看演出…然后就再没出现了。
Arfey said that she was going back to Charmony Academy to invite her teachers and classmates to watch the performance... I haven't seen her since then.
喂喂，那个吉他手该不会真跑了吧？仔细想想，她好像确实没说要参加这次演出啊。

先让我们以为演出可以正常进行，登台时候再玩消失。等观众彻底失去信心，乐队就真的要结束了！

虽然谐乐学院的那群人脑子都不好使，但临阵脱逃未免也太不讲乐队道德了吧？
I know the Charmony Academy students aren't the brightest, but abandoning us just before the contest is a violation of morals, surely?
完了！演出开场前，吉他手跑路了。难道要去现场观众里随便抓个人顶上吗？

不管她守不守信用，我们的信用是要掉没了！

We have no time, as the battle is about to begin. I fear we don't have time to go in search of Ninja Initiate Guitar's whereabouts.

我就说嘛，玩乐队哪有不解散的啊，迟早的事情啦。

世事•无常。由于突发状况，有位音忍没法参加此次作战了。然在下向各位承诺——
This world is unpredictable. Due to unforeseen circumstances, one of our sound ninja is not able to join us here. However, I vow to you...
即使战至最后一人，我等也绝不会撤离战场！
Even if we are reduced to our final man, we will never retreat!
乱破带领乐队完成了演出。
Rappa leads her band to complete the performance.
演出的水平很高啊，旋律也不错…纯路人，感觉把键盘换成吉他会不会更好一点？

哈哈哈，四个小天才，搁这凑羁绊呢？少一个就玩不下去了？
Hahaha, is this just four little geniuses grinding friendship points together? One of you is missing, and you just can't play anymore?
要我说啊，这种莫名其妙的乐队就该早点解散，别在这瞎闹腾，最后坏了折纸大学的名声！

哼，我不认识你！皮皮西人长得都差不多，你肯定是记错了！
Humph, I don't know you! Pepeshi all look alike. You must be thinking of someone else!

I'll have you know that the Dazzling Ninja I'm a fan of has always been a three-person band!
至于那个弹吉他的，只能说，最初的梦想，本就与你无关。

莫、莫要慌张，容在下先去探探虚实！
Th—There's no need to panic. I will get to the bottom of this!
危！何等的大危机！修行尚未结束，诸位音忍却都心生退意，形势不妙！
Crisis! We have a major crisis! The training hasn't even finished yet, and all the sound ninja are talking about quitting! We are in dire straits!
Why don't we make a run for it, too?
唔…不可！音律•忍者师承同一流派，共同修行了这么久，在下早已将各位视作足以托付生死的同伴。突然说要离开，在下实在难以释怀。

Uhh... No! All sound ninja came from the same school of thought. Having trained with them for so long, I came to trust them as people I could entrust my life to. Suddenly saying that they want to leave... I just cannot get over it!
经理阁下——请随在下去劝服诸位音忍，重振「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的旗鼓！
August Manager... please come with me to convince the other sound ninja and fly high the flag of {TEXTJOIN#120} once more!
我要成为乱破小姐的门徒，成为忍者！
I want to become Miss Rappa's disciple! I want to become a ninja!
话说…我和乱破小姐创办的忍者团体，该叫什么名字？要不就叫「乱波」吧！

Do you think... that me breaking the rules of Dreamweaver Academy like this is unfair against the other students?

而且每位学生都有属于自己的舞台——她也不例外。

With the Great Lan above, the atmosphere is solemn and quiet. The Dazzling Ninja's brow furrows tightly, her icy ninja power surging forth, condensing the air in the vicinity — even your breathing is starting to feel difficult...

啊？挺厉害嘛，这么快就投敌了，真不愧是理智的*智械*啊。大聪明！

听明白了吗？明白了就赶紧出去！这是乐队专用的排练室，闲杂人等不得入内！

听学院代表的意思，折纸大学似乎对我们的演出很不满，打算更换乐队。可是，从现场的反响来看…大家明明很喜欢才对啊？

忍者践行的「忍道」，只能由忍者自己决定。
The way of the ninja that we practice may only be decided by the ninja themselves.
诸位音忍！是否愿随在下——誓与校园的邪魔抗争，为此地受压迫的忍徒们取回公正！
Sound ninja, hear me! Will you be willing to join hands with me on a crusade to combat the evil that has befallen this school, to seize justice back from the oppressed ninja multitudes?

本人从未参与群内任何讨论。
I've never participated in this group's discussions before.
主公！吉他•忍徒始终未归，而敌方人数众多，在下迫切需要你的协助。
Sound Master! Ninja Initiate Guitar has not returned since, and the enemy number many. I am in dire need of your aid.
「缭乱」要在最终作战的演台登场，将我等演奏的超绝•音律传递给所有观众！

在下要让那群自称大师的乌合之众明白，我等的信念坚定，绝非旁人能轻易动摇——此乃音律•忍法的终极•狩猎！

并且…负责舞台工作的蒙塔娜同学也是熟人，应该会帮我们。

Third: Find Ninja Initiate Guitar and regroup {TEXTJOIN#120}.
呃…要是那个吉他手想主动退出呢？总不能这种关键时候还要去找她谈心吧？

我觉得…有点奇怪。艾尔菲同学在演出开场前突然失踪，而结束后立刻，学院代表们就在排练室了，感觉像是…故意等着看我们出糗。

I think... something's off. Arfey's sudden disappearance just before the show, and how the academy's reps were already in the rehearsal room right after the performance ended... It's almost as if... they were waiting for us to make a fool of ourselves.
如果决定离开乐队，艾尔菲同学就没必要浪费时间陪我们排练吧？
If she's decided to quit the band, why would Arfey have wasted her time practicing with us?
听你这么说，好像也有点道理。难道她是被关起来了？
It makes some sense when you put it like that. Could she be locked up somewhere?
哼哼。终于到在下大显身手的时候了——
Heh-heh. It's finally time for me to flaunt my expertise...
嗯…你们的幕后花絮完全撑得起一部新的影片了，我没能全程跟拍，还真是可惜。
Mm... there's enough of your behind-the-scenes footage to be edited into a whole new film. It's a real pity I wasn't able to follow you guys to film.
让我猜猜…你们的剧情临近高潮，但遇到了一些小小的阻碍？
Let me guess... Your plot is near approaching its climax, but you've suddenly run into a few speed bumps?
这套剧情结构都被拍烂了——如有需要，我不介意提供一点小小的推动，来帮你们摆脱这没有新意的剧本。
Such a plot structure is so yesterday's news. I wouldn't mind giving a little nudge if you need it and see if I can help you all breathe new life into this uninspiring script.
感谢虾蟇•忍者相助…我等的音忍流派有一位忍徒神隐，在下正在找寻她的踪迹。
Thank you, Ninja Gama, for your help... An initiate of our sound ninja school has gone missing. We're trying to find her whereabouts.
寻找失踪的演员啊…虽然不知道你们要找谁，但我发现校园里多出了一个奇怪的片场，或是说微缩梦境。
A missing cast member... I don't know who you're looking for, but I've noticed a strange set that popped up in the academy — or rather, a miniature dreamscape.
这枚忆泡记录了打开入口的方法——但这个梦境的具体构造未知，来源不明，搞不好是原始博士的人留下的东西。

The method to unlock the entrance is recorded in this memory bubble. However, the exact structure of this dreamscape is unknown, as is its origin. It could even have been left behind by one of Dr. Primitive's people.
Even so, we have to go!
Worst case, we'll just be turned into monkeys!
呵呵，这次就让我当回观众吧，祝你们能够带来精彩的故事。
Heh-heh, let me be a spectator this time. I hope you all can weave an exciting tale.
完了！没人说过闭幕演出会来这么多观众啊，要是乱破小姐没能及时回来，台上只有我们两个人，不就成了纯小丑吗！
This is bad! No one said the closing show would have such a large crowd. If Miss Rappa doesn't return in time, we'd be the laughingstock with just the two of us on stage!
冷静点…现在最重要的任务是争取到上台机会。
Calm down... What's most important is to gain a chance to get on stage.
你们好…呃，没认错的话，你们是「{TEXTJOIN#120}」乐队的成员吧？
Hello... Err, if I'm not mistaken, you guys are from the {TEXTJOIN#120} band?
Ooh, have we attained celebrity status?
太好了！我是你们的粉丝，「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的单推！
其实，有件事情…你们听了不要生气啊，就是…前几天，财富学院的代表突然找到我，让我组织一只新的乐队，替代你们完成演出。

Actually, there's this thing... Please don't be angry after hearing this. Um... A couple of days ago, the Fortune Academy's rep suddenly hit us up to have me form a new band and replace you guys in the show.
他的态度很强硬，还用学分来威胁我，所以就…答应了。
He was really insistent, and even used my credit hours to threaten me. So I had no choice but to... agree.
但我们根本不想出场！不属于「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的舞台没有意义，并且，你们那么受欢迎，要是踢掉你们，我以后都没法在学校里露面了。

But we never really wanted to perform! A stage that doesn't belong to {TEXTJOIN#120} is meaningless. And you're all so popular — I wouldn't be able to show my face on campus if I were responsible for replacing you guys.
所以，我想把登台演出的机会让给你们！
And so, I want to let you all have the stage instead!
…原来这么简单吗，跟我想的不太一样。
...That was too easy. Totally the opposite of what I had in mind.
看来先前的两场演出，帮我们在学生里积累了相当高的人气啊。
Looks like our previous two shows really garnered plenty of support among the students for us.
没有没有，「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的风格那么独特，乱破同学的舞台表现力也很强，正常乐队都不会想要和你们竞争的吧。哈哈。
You're too nice. {TEXTJOIN#120}'s style is really unique, and Miss Rappa has an excellent stage presence. Ordinary bands wouldn't dare think of trying to compete against you, haha.
At least you're being reasonable now.
毕竟「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的风格那么独特，乱破同学的舞台表现力也很强，正常乐队都不会想要和你们竞争的吧。哈哈。
I mean, {TEXTJOIN#120}'s style is super unique, and Miss Rappa's stage presence is mesmerizing. Ordinary bands wouldn't dare think of trying to compete against you, haha.
Why not you guys perform instead?
不不不！比起在台上让大家失望，我们更想再看一次「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出！
Never! Instead of disappointing everyone, we would rather watch one more show by {TEXTJOIN#120}!
就这么说定了！学校应该会派人过来巡视，我可以帮你们望风，但要是真追究起来，这件事和我没关系啊！
It's settled then! The school should be sending someone over to observe the show. I'll keep a lookout for you guys, but if word gets out, this has nothing to do with me!
明白！兄弟，你真的太好了。真的。
Got it! You're the best, bro, really.
这话怎么听着怪怪的…我就先走啦，期待「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出！我们会来应援的！
That sounded kinda awkward... I'm heading off now. I look forward to {TEXTJOIN#120}'s show! We'll be in the crowd cheering you guys on!
虽然轻松得到了演出的机会，但是……
Well, that went really smoothly, but...
完了！时间要到了，乱破小姐却还没有回来，怎么办？总不能去台上表演相声吧？
Oh no! Time's up, and Miss Rappa isn't back yet. What do we do? We can't possibly do a crosstalk routine on stage, can we?
——音乐派对的闭幕演出即将开始，请表演乐队登台。
...The music party's closing show is about to start. Performing band, to your positions please.
——重复。音乐派对的闭幕演出即将开始，请表演乐队登台。
...I repeat, the music party's closing show is about to start. Performing band, please get on stage.
How about... we give it a shot?
我这是什么乌鸦嘴啊！不管了，还好仙舟商会的朋友给我看过不少切片。走，我们上！
I wasn't being serious! Never mind. Good thing that the friend from the Xianzhou Merchant Guild showed me plenty of video clips. C'mon, let's go!
就算只剩最后一人，忍者也绝不会逃离战场！
Even if we're down to the last man, a ninja will never withdraw from the battle!
…不是，这个乐队最近是在裁员么，怎么每次出场都会少一个人？
...Hang on. Has this band been firing members recently? Why is it always missing a member when it goes on stage?
看来降本增效的风，还是吹到了匹诺康尼。
Looks like the cost reduction trend has blown its way to Penacony.
哎呀呀，今儿可真不巧，咱们乐队有两位成员呢，诶，都有事来不了。
Ahaha, how unfortunate! Two of our band members couldn't make it due to personal reasons.
不是来不了，是可能会迟到。
They're not absent. They're just going to be late.
对对，是会迟到。请各位等得莫心焦，且看我俩呢，来逗大家发发笑。
Yes yes, they'll be late. So don't fret, everyone. Wait till this dynamic duo turns those frowns upside down!
I'm Czipo, and I never back down from any challenge.
我叫达凡绮，人称小垃圾。
I am Dafanchy. They call me Lil' Trash.
各位观众有所不知，咱们乐队啊，惯例有三不唱。达凡绮，你可知道是哪三样？
This may not be common knowledge, but our band has a policy of not singing three things. Dafanchy, do you know what those are?
这还不简单——第一场不唱，第二场不唱，第三场还是不唱。
That's easy: We don't sing in the first, second, or third acts.
哈哈哈，因为「缭乱」根本就没有主唱！
Hahaha, because the Dazzling Ninja has no lead vocalist!
…我是来看乐队演出的吧，怎么开始说起相声了？
...I came to watch a band perform. Why're they starting a crosstalk show?
这个段子尬的…能听半分钟不走都是神人了。
This gag was mad awkward... Those who didn't leave after thirty seconds of this are really too easily amused.
（确实有点尬，但你们做得好啊，继续加油！）
(It really is mad awkward, but well done, you guys! Keep it up!)
（那个学院代表应该很快就会过来，得想办法为乱破多拖延些时间。）
(That academy's rep will probably show up soon. We have to find a way to buy time for Rappa.)
嗨！我们来看你的乐队演出了！听知更鸟小姐说，你现在是乐队经理？怎么样，组乐队是不是很好玩？
Yo-ho! We're here to watch your band perform! Miss Robin said you're a band manager now? How about it? Is it any fun forming a band?
听说音乐派对的闭幕演出是彩梦校庆最为隆重的节目，我们就从其他活动的地方赶过来了。
I heard that the music party's closing show is the most prestigious act of the Dreamlight Anniversary, so we hurried over from the other event venues.
话虽如此…呃，台上那两个学生是你们乐队的成员吧，为什么在说脱口秀啊？
That being said... Err, those two students are your band members, no? Why're they doing crosstalk?
啊…这么说的话，你们是偷偷上台的，随时会被赶走，乱破同学没回来，成员也不齐，没法开始正式演奏…还真是坎坷。

Ah... Which means, you're all on the stage without permission, and might be evicted anytime. Since Rappa's not back, your band isn't whole, and you can't start your actual performance... What a horrendous pickle.
等等。三月，你记不记得在访客认证的时候，有个皮皮西人反复询问过星穹列车的事？
Hang on, March. Do you remember that time during visitor verification, there was a Pepeshi who kept asking about the Astral Express?
记得啊。难道不是因为咱们现在是梦境里的大人物了嘛？
I do. Is it not because we're now famous in the dreamscapes?
刚才来舞台的路上，我还看到他带着好多人气势汹汹地朝这走，很恼火的样子呢。
On our way to this stage, I also saw that he was leading an angry bunch of people over here. They looked really mad.
Did we still get found out in the end?
如果那个皮皮西人就是你说的学院代表的话，他们恐怕是打算阻止乐队演出。
If that Pepeshi is the academy's rep you speak of, they're probably on their way to stop this band performance.
啊？这怎么行！走走，我陪你去跟他们论论理，本姑娘最瞧不起这种恃强凌弱的人了！
Hah? That won't do! Come on, I'll go with you to talk some sense into them. I'm not going to stand by and watch them bully the defenseless!
嗯，当务之急是保证演出正常进行。我就留在舞台附近，防止对方使用强硬手段。
Yes, it's imperative that the performance is successful. I will stand guard near the stage to prevent the aggressor from getting violent.
怎么回事？我新找来的乐队呢？保安呢，那两个学生是怎么跑台上去的？
What's going on? Where's my newfound band? And how did security let these two students get on stage?
还有谐乐学院的那个老东西，关键时候就没影了是吧？
And where'd that old coot from Charmony Academy disappear to at such a crucial moment?
——安保部门全体跟我走，把那几个学生从舞台上轰下来！
...The entire security team, follow me. We're getting those students off the stage with force!
哟，让我看看，挡在前面的人是谁啊，不就是那个违规演出的乐队的经理嘛？
Oh? And who's blocking our way? If it isn't the manager of the band that's performing without permission.
你的成员在学校里公然闹事，你是不是也参与了？
Are you also involved in your members making a public commotion in the school?
喂，作为学院代表，不想着好好教课，反而借着老师的身份欺负学生，你丢不丢人啊？
Hey, as the academy's rep, instead of intending to stick to your job and teach, you're abusing your seniority and bullying the students. Don't you find that shameful?
欺负？学生犯了错误，违反学校规定，当然要由老师来纠正。这叫尽职！
Bullying? When a student commits a mistake and flouts school regulations, it is naturally a teacher's duty to correct it. That is performing one's duty!
倒是你们乐队，在明令禁止的情况下擅自登台演出，对学校造成了极其恶劣的影响，要是真闹出什么事来，你承担得起这个责任吗？

I can't say the same for your band — barging onto the stage to perform despite being explicitly forbidden to do so, casting the school in a bad light. Are you going to bear this responsibility if something major happened?
Not a problem. I'll be responsible.
哼，你是抱着多大的觉悟说出这种话。匹诺康尼正值经济复苏的关键时期，任何差错都可能酿成大祸，你背负得起整个梦境的未来吗？

Hmph, do you have any understanding of what you've just said? Penacony is currently undergoing a critical economic recovery, and any mistake could be disastrous. Can you afford to be responsible for the future of the entire Dreamscape?
赶紧让开！再扰乱校园秩序，那几个学生就不只是被处分了！
Get out of the way! Any more disruptions, and those students won't just be disciplined!
哇，是舒翁姐姐！好久没见了，你是来参加舞台表演的嘛？
Wow, it's Siobhan! Long time no see. Are you here to participate in the performance?
酒吧里要处理的事多着呢，我哪有这个闲工夫。不过是偷个空，随便凑凑热闹而已。
I have a lot to do back at the lounge, so I don't have much time for this. I'm just taking a break to enjoy the vibes here.
前两场演出，我都远程观看了，很精彩。没想到你还挺有当乐队经理的天分嘛。
I watched the previous two performances remotely and they were fantastic. I didn't expect you to have the talent for being a band manager.
要是以后有机会，来做我的专属经纪人怎么样？
If there's a chance in the future, why not become my exclusive manager?
我已经是酒吧的专属调饮师了。
I'm already the lounge's exclusive drinksmith.
哈哈哈，这不是正好嘛，哪天要是酒吧开不下去了，咱们合伙办个怪物事务所也挺不错的。
Haha, isn't that just perfect? If there comes a day when the lounge closes its doors, we could partner up and run a monster agency.
你是…舒翁？鸢尾花家系的…那个躲在梦境酒店里和剧团玩过家家的人？
Are you... Siobhan? The one from the Iris Family... hiding in the hotel in the Dreamscape and playing house with the troupe?
没想到外面都传成了这样…随便吧。
I didn't expect that to be the version of the story you folks are spreading outside... whatever.
说回正题——我也算是受邀来参加音乐派对的嘉宾，很喜欢先前的演出，所以想问问，贵校决定替换表演乐队的理由是什么呢？
Back to the main point — I'm also a guest invited to the music party and I really enjoyed the previous performances. I'd like to ask why your school decided to replace the performing band.
乐队风格和本校所推崇的理念格格不入，并且与匹诺康尼的市场需求完全不符。不少原定来访问的贵宾，都因前两场演出过分怪异的气质而取消了行程。

The band's style does not align with the school's philosophy and is mismatched with Penacony's market needs. Many guests who were scheduled to visit canceled their trips due to the truly unconventional atmosphere of the first two shows.
音乐原本就是探索未知的过程，有不同的好恶很正常。但是将匹诺康尼的命运，压在几个学生的身上是否有些不妥？
Music is fundamentally about discovering the unknown, so it's natural to have diverse tastes. However, isn't it problematic to place the fate of Penacony on the shoulders of a few students?
换句话说…这样的想法，是否说明校方根本没尽到自身的责任呢？
In other words... Does this kind of thinking indicate that the school has not fulfilled its responsibilities?
责任的问题可以后面再讨论。但现在你也看到了，那只乐队根本没在演出，成员都凑不齐，要是放任他们继续丢人现眼，必然会成为折纸大学的丑闻！

We can discuss responsibility later. As you can see, that band isn't even performing! They don't have enough members, and if we allow them to continue making a fool of themselves, it'll turn into a scandal for Paperfold University!
音乐派对最重要的闭幕演出，台上的乐队却没法演奏，怎么都说不过去吧？
How is it possible that the band can't even perform at the most important closing show of the party?
明明是你把人给关起来了，现在反而怪罪我们，还讲不讲道理了啊！
You're the one who locked her up, and now you're blaming us. Can you start making some sense?
这位同学，你的老师难道没教过什么是举证责任吗？提出指控，就得有证据！
Dear student, did your teacher not teach you the burden of proof? To make an accusation, you need evidence!
唔…反正，乱破同学答应会赶回来，演出肯定能正常进行的！
Hmm... Anyways, Rappa promised to be back soon. The performance will definitely happen!
聪明人可不会相信承诺。要不这样，我从这里朝舞台走，如果这段时间里，乐队成员能聚齐，我就允许你们继续演出。够给面子了吧？

Smart people don't believe in promises. How about this: I'll walk from here towards the stage. If the band members can get together within this time, I'll allow you guys to continue performing. Is this enough respect?
否则，全员开除！敢和我打赌么，还是说——其实你也不相信她能及时赶到？
Otherwise, all members are expelled! Do you have the guts to make a bet with me? Or you don't believe she'll be able to make it back in time?
好，记住你的选择。我要开始走咯。
Okay, remember your decision. I'm going to start walking.
还在迟疑？哼，不说话就当你是默认了。我要开始走咯。
Still hesitant? Hmph, I'll take your silence as a yes. I'm going to start walking.
我这还是第一次…庆幸对手是个皮皮西人。
This is my first time... feeling glad that my opponent is a Pepeshi.
要是他走路速度跟史瓦罗一样快，咱们就输定啦。不过没事，乱破同学会遵守承诺的！
If his walking speed was as fast as Svarog's, we would definitely lose. But it's okay. Rappa will keep her promise!
没想到吧，我曾经是校运动会皮皮西分会男子组轻量级的竞走亚军！
Bet you weren't expecting that I was once the academy sport day's Pepeshi Division runner-up for the men's lightweight racewalking!
就算校方允许演出，只靠台上的那两个学生也撑不了多久。
Even if the school allows the performance, it won't last long just with those two students on stage.
别紧张，赶场迟到是常有的情况。实在没办法，我也可以临时加入你们乐队。
Don't be nervous. It's not uncommon to be late for a show. As a last resort, I can join your band temporarily.
虽然好长时间没上过舞台了，但随便打打碟还是没什么问题。
Although it's been some time since I've stepped on stage, it's still not a problem for me to spin some records.
想不出办法了？只能到处求人帮忙了？尽管去找，我倒要看看你们还能玩出什么花样来！
Can't think of a solution? You can only go around begging for help? Go ahead and beg. Let me see what other tricks you have up your sleeve!
抱歉。这项决议由另外两个学院联合做出，我没有否定的权限。
Sorry, this decision is made jointly by two other schools. I don't have the authority to overrule it.
能确定的是，禁闭那个学生的梦境相当复杂，从其中脱身并不容易。建议：你们该寻找其他的解法。
What is certain is that the dreamscape confining that student is highly complex, and escaping it will prove challenging. Suggestion: You should look for other solutions.
急了？现在带着检讨书来找我认错，也不是不能原谅你们。
Panicking? I might forgive you all if you come forth with an essay on self-reflection and apologize.
明白。要是学院那群人打算动粗，我会拦住他们。
Understood. If those people from the school decide to choose violence, I will hold them off.
那个巡海游侠虽然言行举止比较怪异，但是个重信用的人。或许，事情还会有转机。
That Galaxy Ranger might have a strange character, but she's a person of honor. Perhaps there's a way out of this.
时间差不多咯…哈哈，等着上开除名单吧！你们乐队里的谁都逃不掉！
Your time is almost up... Haha, prepare to have your names on the expulsion list! No one in your band can escape!
（怎么回事…现场突然开始欢呼起来了？）
(What's going on... Why is the crowd suddenly cheering?)
诸位——我等乃是「{TEXTJOIN#120}」！如华丽流星般撕裂夜空的音律忍者流派是也！
Everyone — We are the {TEXTJOIN#120}! A school of sound ninja that tears through the sky like magnificent shooting stars!
世事如银河忍法般多变，许多意外在下始料未及，耽误了诸位时间。实在抱歉。
Life is as unpredictable as Cosmic Ninjutsu. Many unforeseen circumstances have caught me off guard, causing delays for everyone. I apologize.
既然是终极•狩猎，机会难得，就请「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的诸音忍介绍自己吧。
Since it's the Ultimate Hunt, this is a golden opportunity. Sound ninja of {TEXTJOIN#120}, please introduce yourselves.
大家好！我是「缭乱」的键盘手，名字叫做契波，也可以叫我——键盘•忍徒！
Hello everyone! I am the Dazzling Ninja's keyboardist. My name is Czipo, and you can also call me — Ninja Initiate Keyboard!
相信你们已经对我很熟悉了，哈哈…呃，音乐万岁！我爱舞台！也爱现场的所有人！
I believe everyone is already familiar with me. Haha... Um, music for the win! I love the stage and everyone here!
我…的名字是达凡绮…忍号贝斯•忍徒，来自筑梦学院，在「缭乱」担任…贝斯手！
My... name is Dafanchy... Also known as the Ninja Initiate Bass. I'm from Dreamweaver Academy, currently a bassist at... the Dazzling Ninja!
我也爱音乐！也爱舞台！当然，最喜欢的还是…和乱破忍首，还有乐队所有成员，共同演奏的时光！我们要一直、一直演奏下去！
I also love music and performing on stage! Of course, what I love most is... making music with Head Ninja Rappa and the rest of the band members! We are going to keep on playing!
…说实话，我原本以为自己不会回到这个舞台了。这样的想法出现过两次。
...Honestly, I actually thought I would never return to this stage. This thought popped into my head twice.
第一次是因为，我无法接受「缭乱」的理念。这并非是谐乐学院所能认可的音乐范畴，也与传统的乐理教育大相径庭。

The first time was because I could not accept the Dazzling Ninja's philosophy. This is not a category of music that Charmony Academy approves of, and it significantly deviates from traditional music theory.
第二次则是因为…敬爱的学院代表以谈话为由，将我拘禁在了刻意制造的梦境中，责令我独处思过，希望借此来阻止「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出。

The second time was because... our respected representative of the academy detained me in a deliberately constructed Dreamscape under the pretense of a conversation. He ordered me to reflect alone, hoping this would stop {TEXTJOIN#120}'s performance.
但是，乱破同学两次都找到了我，将我从闭锁的世界中带了出来，所以——
However, Rappa found me both times and rescued me from that prison world, so...
我是「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的吉他手，名叫艾尔菲——「吉他•忍徒」是也！
I am the guitarist of {TEXTJOIN#120}. My name is Arfey — also Ninja Initiate Guitar!
我们在这里演奏，要让那些闭目塞听的人，那些高高在上的人，听到我们的声音！！！
Our performance here is for those who refuse to see or hear, and for those who are on their high horses — to hear our voices!
看来诸音忍经历此次修行，都大有长进啊。
Seems like all the sound ninjas have made significant progress through this training.
如此甚好。那么，便由在下宣布——「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的最终作战，于此时正式开启！
Very well. Then, I shall announce — the final show of {TEXTJOIN#120} will begin now!
请欣赏我等带来的，至为精彩的演出吧！
Please enjoy the spectacular performance we bring to you!
这就是我们「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的乐队精神啊，那些学院代表有没有这种精神啊？
This is the spirit of {TEXTJOIN#120}. Do those representatives of the academy have this spirit?
充分感受到了吗，何为「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的音乐魅力——
Can you fully feel the musical allure of {TEXTJOIN#120}!!!
只要乱破忍首一声令下，我们立刻拥护她为新的谐乐学院代表！
As long as Head Ninja Rappa gives the order, we will immediately support her as the new representative of Charmony Academy!
首先我不是学校的支持者，我看到这场演出的时候已经毕业很久了。但不得不说，老师对学生的教导真的很重要，其实我觉得演奏正常音乐也没有什么不好的。

Firstly, I am not a supporter of the school. I already graduated long before I saw this performance. But I must say that a teacher's instruction is of utmost importance for their students. In fact, I believe that there's no harm in playing conventional music.
不得不讲，老师的想法还是比学生要来得正确。但我遇到这种事也不会强求，只是觉得，他们要是能多听听学院的意见就好了。
I must say, a teacher's views are often more accurate than students'. But I wouldn't insist on this. I only feel that they should be more open to listening to the opinions of the school.
你还真是只想着自己呢。
You're really only thinking for yourself.
没有没有。我就是随便说说，随便说说而已……
No no. It was just a passing remark, just a passing remark...
（闭幕演出顺利完成，音乐派对也临近尾声了吧，莫名有点舍不得啊。）
(The closing act has been successfully completed, and the music party is nearing its end. There is an odd sense of reluctance to see it end.)
你沉浸在现场的喧闹气氛中，度过了一段难忘的时光。
You immerse yourself in the lively atmosphere of the event, spending an unforgettable time.
我打听到新乐队的消息了，他们也是临时组织起来的，还在手忙脚乱地为演出做准备。
I've heard some news about the new band. They were also assembled on short notice and are still scrambling to prepare for their performance.
要是好好交涉，把登台机会让给我们的概率很大！
If the negotiation goes well, there's a high chance that they'll give us the opportunity to perform!
筑梦学院不会干涉我们的行动，比较麻烦的…就是那两位学院代表。
Dreamweaver Academy won't interfere with our actions, but what's more troubling are... those two representatives of the academy.
感谢诸位倾力相助！如今主公归来，登台的时限又将至，我等「缭乱」不得不分兵作战，想办法将强敌逐个击破了。
Thank you, everyone, for all your help! Now that Sound Master has returned, and our time on stage is about to end, the Dazzling Ninja must split into groups and beat our rivals in the contest.
——键盘•忍徒，贝斯•忍徒，可否请二位继续研习音律•忍术，为后续作战做万全准备？
...Ninja Initiate Keyboard, Ninja Initiate Bass — will you keep studying Sound Ninjutsu, and organize full preparations for subsequent contests?
没问题！要是找不到排练的地方，可以来我家的地下室，都是顶级设备！
No problem! If we can't find a place to practice, you can all use my house's basement — it's all top-notch equipment!
嗯。编曲方面来不及的话，我也可以帮忙。
Yes, if there's not enough time for composition, I can help out too.
此外，既然得知吉他•忍徒是被贼人所困，作为忍首，在下绝不能置之不理。
Also, now that we've learned Ninja Initiate Guitar has been imprisoned by scoundrels, I cannot stand idle as Head Ninja.
「缭乱」的任何成员都不可或缺。在下这就出发，誓要将吉他•忍徒从邪魔手中救出，重返最终演台！
No one member of the Dazzling Ninja will be left behind. I will set off now — I swear to rescue Ninja Initiate Guitar from the clutches of evil, and return to partake in the final stage!
Will you be able to make it back in time?
梦土的道路曲折且长，踏上此行不知何时能复返，然无畏的忍侠决意要前往，只因过往的同伴正身陷苦难。若是在下未能归还——

The path of dreams is meandering. I know not when I shall return on my journey, but this ninja hero shall forge forth undaunted, unwavering — if for nothing more than the fact that my companion has been entrapped in danger. If I do not return...
就要烦请主公为我等争取更多时限了。
Please buy more time for me, Sound Master.
乱破无言地扶住了帽檐，你能预感到激烈的忍者•战斗即将在某处一触即发。
Rappa silently grasps the brim of her hat — you can foresee an intense Ninja Battle about to occur in some unknown time and place.
在下以「缭乱忍侠」之名承诺——演台开幕之际，在下必定携吉他•忍徒共同登场。
I vow on my name as a Dazzling Ninja — When the curtain raises over the stage, I will surely step forth with Ninja Initiate Guitar by my side.
闯荡忍界至今，在下从未有过食言。请阁下尽管放心。
I have never reneged on my word in all my ninja travels. Worry not, my lord.
等等——不是！小矮个，我可从来没让你开除艾尔菲啊！
Hang on, wait! Shortie, I never told you to expel Arfey!
虽然她是被那个外校生带坏了，但不管变成什么样，她都是我最自豪的学生！
She may have fallen under the delinquent influence of exchange students, but no matter what, she's my most prized pupil!
没有我的允许，谁敢动谐乐学院的学生！来，试试看啊！
Who dares take liberties with the Charmony Academy's students without my approval! Come on, just try it!
骂谁矮呢？你也配说这句话？…让开！别耽误我教育问题学生，整顿校风！
Who're you calling short? You think yourself fit to say that? ...Get away! Don't hinder me from educating difficult students and upholding school ethics!
感谢诸位为在下拖延时限！
Thank you all for helping me delay my deadline!
临时登台还请行个方便——
Hope you don't mind my last-minute appearance on stage...
（排练室里…怎么好像有说话的声音。）
(In the rehearsal room... I think I hear voices chatting.)
（闭幕演出就快开始了，时间确实很紧张。）
(The closing show is about to start. Time is definitely running short.)
（咦，乱破身边站着的是…芮克先生？）
(Huh? That person standing beside Rappa... Isn't that Mr. Reca?)
（乱破已经出发了，现在就去舞台附近看看吧。）
(Rappa has already left. Let's take a look around the stage.)
（契波和达凡绮都上台了，过去看看情况吧。）
(Czipo and Dafanchy have gone on stage. Let's head over and take a look.)
（时间所剩无几，乱破还没有回来，或许…得想想别的办法了。）
(There's not much time left, and Rappa's still not back. Maybe... we have to think of some other idea.)
Not long after Mr. Reca leaves...
就这样，你们被赶出了排练室……
Just like that, you were all kicked out of the rehearsal room...
我是被那个坏家伙给骗了…都是财富学院的错！我…我糊涂啊！
I was fooled by that scoundrel... It's all the Fortune Academy's fault! I... I was misled!
每个人都有被看见的渴望。听着乐队同伴们精彩的演奏，你的心中油然生出了闪亮登场的冲动。
Everyone yearns to be seen. Listening to the band's splendid performance, an impulse to light up the stage blooms in your heart.
喂，你想干什么？！干扰舞台演出是吧，再乱来的话我就要举报你了！
Hey, what're you doing!? Trying to disrupt the show, are you? I'll report you if you do anything funny again!
狂热也得有个限度吧！演出现场不是法外之地，注意点！
There's to be a limit to your enthusiasm! The stage isn't a lawless place! Watch yourself!
还来？…实在是忍无可忍了，朋友们，我们集体把这个不守规矩的家伙给轰出去！
Again? ...Absolutely incorrigible. Friends, let's work together and toss this unruly trespasser out!
还未等你采取行动，几位身形壮硕的观众已然站在了你身边，无形的压力仿佛是堵高墙，将你与近在咫尺的舞台隔绝开来。
Before you can even make a move, several burly members of the audience are standing beside you, their imposing auras looming over you, and completely zoning you out of the stage that is inches away.
看来你的演艺梦想终究是要止步于此了。
Looks like your dream of performing is about to be put to an end here.
艾尔菲，你听我说，当时我是被那个坏家伙给骗了啊…都是财富学院的错！
Arfey, listen to me, I was lied to by that scoundrel... It was all Fortune Academy's fault!
他告诉我说，学校领导对乐队的表现很不满，要是继续演出，就禁止你在匹诺康尼进行任何音乐活动。我也是为了你的前途着想啊！

He told me that the school's higher-ups were very displeased with the band's performance, and they would ban you from all music events in Penacony if they continued playing. I was just thinking about your future!
这是我专门为你们乐队手抄的乐谱。就当是给你赔罪了。
Here's the music score I copied for you by hand. Take it as compensation.
但事实上，财富学院的那位代表处处刁难乐队，不过是因为「晖长石号」上的几处店面是奥帝先生答应给他的生日礼物，却随飞艇一同被转赠给了星穹列车。

But honestly, the reason the Fortune Academy's representative has been haranguing us non-stop is only because Mr. Alfalfa promised to give him ownership of some stores aboard the Radiant Feldspar, which was instead gifted to the Astral Express, airship and all.
苜蓿草家系已经撤销他的学院代表职位，相信音乐派对的后续活动不会再受到干扰。
The Alfalfa Family has already rescinded his rep position in the academy. I trust any subsequent events in the music party will not be disrupted.
这就是和我作对的下场！
This is what you get for opposing me!
喔！这就是和我们音律忍者作对的下场！
Ho! This is what you get for opposing the sound ninja!
老奥帝的亲戚…是不是有点多？
Do you think... Old Oti has too many relatives?
与那位代表所说的情况恰好相反，「缭乱」在观众里的人气相当高，学校主办方收到了大量的粉丝来信，要求增加乐队的演出场次，并保留相关的场地布设。

The truth is the exact opposite of what that representative claimed — the Dazzling Ninja is a smash hit among the crowd. The school's organizer received loads of fan mail requesting encores of the band's performance and even keeping mementos from the venues.
匹诺康尼在此次活动期间的游客数量剧增，学生们展现出的自主精神和热情也打消了外界对秩序余波的担忧，为梦境在银河中重新赢得了赞誉。

Penacony's tourism has been on the rise during the event. The proactivity and passion of the students have also quelled the worries of the concerns other worlds had towards the remnants of Order, renewing the Dreamscape's repute among the galaxy.
因此，折纸大学决定——延长音乐派对的举办时间，属于学生们的舞台还会继续。
Thus, Paperfold University has decided to extend the music party's duration — the student's stage will remain open.
A music festival that never ends!
这样的话…即使成绩不好的同学，也能有自己的表现机会了。
If that's the case... even students with poor results will also have a chance to perform.
不过，乱破忍首在哪呢？演出结束后好像…就没看到她。
But where's Head Ninja Rappa? I... haven't seen her since the show ended.
乱破小姐先前曾拜托音乐派对的工作人员，把乐队使用的乐器都搬到排练室。现在过去的话，应该还能碰到她哦。
Miss Rappa asked a music party staff member to move the band's instruments to the rehearsal room. If you head there now, you might still be able to meet her.
You're not still trying to end with a bang, are you?
非也。在下只是突然有些伤感。
Nay. I am somewhat saddened, is all.
即便作战的盛况空前，诸位也将音律•忍法演绎得淋漓尽致，然…散场之时终至。
Even though the contest was unprecedentedly magnificent, every one of you played Sound Release ninjutsu with pitch-perfect brilliance. Alas... all shows must end.
「人世间，尘与风，去留无端，恍若梦中之梦。」
"All things in this world come and go with neither rhyme nor reason, as if in a dream of dreams."
喂喂，说好的要教我忍术呢。
Hey, you promised to teach me ninjutsu.
别把气氛闹得这么沉重，演出虽然结束了，但我们的乐队可没有解散啊。
Don't be such a Debbie Downer. The show may be over, but our band hasn't disbanded.
就算从学校毕业了，也还要一起演奏！
Even if we graduate, we still gotta jam together!
Eh? I'm ready to retire though.
诸位都找到了各自的忍道，便无需在下继续代为统率了。
Everyone has found their way of the ninja. There is no more need for me to continue leading it.
「缭乱」并非是因缘•聚散的团体，更应是我等的信念传承。音律终会停止，但音律•忍者的狩猎不会结束。往后的道路，只能由诸位自己决定。

The Dazzling Ninja is not a group bound or scattered by fate — it is a legacy of our beliefs. The music will inevitably cease, but the sound ninja's hunt will never end. It is up to everyone to decide the path forward.
乱破小姐…你真的打算离开吗？
Miss Rappa... Are you really thinking of leaving?
在下参加此次音律祭典，原本便是受阁下所托，协助诸位忍徒完成试炼。
I originally participated in this music festival at your behest, to assist you all in your trials.
原来是知更鸟小姐的委托吗？
So it was a request from Miss Robin?
So you weren't just messing around?
…是的，我发现了这次校庆中的部分校方人员在滥用职权，但碍于嘉宾的身份，没办法下场帮助这些学生。
...No. I noticed that some school authorities were abusing their power during the anniversary celebration, but as a guest-of-honor, I could not directly help these students.
所以才会拜托乱破小姐担任乐队核心，让音乐派对顺利举办下去。
Which is why I asked Miss Rappa to become the band leader and facilitated the success of the music party.
如今，藏在暗处的恶徒已经伏诛，音忍的修行完满结束，在下也该启程寻找新的去处。
And now, the evildoers lurking in darkness have been subjugated, and the sound ninja's training is complete. My journey must begin anew.
折纸大学的音乐派对还会持续很长时间，没有你们的演出，整场活动都会失去很多乐趣吧，学生们也会觉得无聊的。
Paperfold University's music party will continue for a very long time. Without your performances, the entire event would probably lose its luster aplenty, and the students would be bored too.
歌舞•忍者无须担心，在下早已准备妥当，曾修行过的虚偃•忍术，正好在此时派上用场。
Songstress Ninja, you need not be concerned. I have long since made preparations — the Void Ninjutsu that I once learned will come in very handy for such moments.
在下的忍•幻影将始终立于演台之上，以至为响亮的音律向所有来者宣告——
My Ninja Mirage will evermore remain on the stage, to proclaim unto all comers with a resounding melodious sound...
The story comes to a close, and the actors leave the set...
副导演，我们也该去寻找新的剧本了。
Assistant director, we should also go find a new script.
…{NICKNAME}演员，你为我带来的演出很有趣，期待下个片场还能与你合作——
...{NICKNAME}, you've given me a most interesting performance indeed. I look forward to working with you again in our next piece...
咕咕！你回来了，这次的晚会真好看咕！
Hoot hoot! You're back! The evening show was amazing!
咕咕，真有礼貌，就像镜子公主一样。
Hoot hoot, so polite, just like the Mirror Princess.
咕咕，真是自信，就像钟表小子一样。
Hoot hoot, so confident, just like Clockie.
I think there's room for improvement.
咕咕，真是谦虚，就像左轮队长一样。
Hoot hoot, so humble, just like Captain Revolver.
小鸟们追逐梦想的身影，不管看多少次，都还是很感动咕！
Birds chasing the shadows of their dreams — always so touching, no matter how many times I watch it!
咕咕，让我给你讲个故事吧——关于这片折纸树林的故事。
Hoot hoot, let me tell you a story — about Paperfold Woods.
很久很久以前，老鸟收到了一封恩人的邀请函。于是老鸟只身来到了美梦小镇，帮助这里的镇民修建房屋。
Once upon a time, an old bird received an invitation from a benefactor. So that bird came to the Dreamville, to help its residents build houses.
在这里，我认识了一群非常厉害的朋友：一把能打垮一百条鳄鱼的手枪，一面能掏出各种知识的镜子，一只让恶人闻风丧胆的野狼，还有那块无所不能的小钟表……

It was here that I befriended a group of amazing people: A revolver that could defeat a hundred crocodiles, a mirror that brimmed with knowledge, a wild wolf that made villains freeze in fear, and that little clock that could do just about anything...
老鸟以为，这座小镇有了他们的保护，不会被世界上的任何东西破坏，永远不会。
The old bird thought that with their protection, this town would never be destroyed by anything in the world, for ever more.
说到这里，猫头鹰老师的声音突然变了，他的声音变得沧桑、厚重，还有一丝…哀伤。
At this point, Professor Owl's voice suddenly changes — it becomes raspy, dignified, with a sliver of... sorrow.
——但我错了，世界太大，永远太长。在这两个无穷的尺度组成的坐标轴中，再伟大的英雄也显得微不足道。
...But I was wrong. The world is too vast and an eternity too long. Within the coordinates of these two fathomless dimensions, even the greatest heroes would appear insignificant.
于是，我选择建立这片树林，希望为小镇培养出一群厉害的折纸小鸟。当钟表小子和他的朋友们无法保护小镇时，这里的小鸟们团结一心，或许能抵御未来的风暴。

And so, I chose to erect this forest, hoping to raise a flock of strong origami birds. When Clockie and his friends could not protect the town, the birds here would be united in heart, perhaps able to weather any future storms.
即便不能…我也希望他们有能力在风暴过后的废墟中保护自己，有能力在一个荒芜的时代追逐自己的梦想。
Even if they could not... I still hoped that their abilities would allow them to protect themselves in the aftermath of the storm — the capability to pursue their own dreams in a barren era.
不好意思——咕咕咕！鸟上了年纪，就容易想起往事，老鸟太唠叨了吧！
Oh, my apologies — Hoot hoot! As we get on in age, we reminisce far too easily. This old bird is far too chatty!
新同学，你带来的演出很好看，让老鸟想起了当年的钟表小子！他也曾带着自己的伙伴们在晚会上起舞哦！
New student, your performance was very good — it made this old bird think back on Clockie in the younger days! He also once roped in his buddies to dance the evening away in the festival!
有这么多心怀梦想的折纸小鸟，美梦小镇的未来…一定会更好的。
So many origami birds bearing dreams — the future of the Dreamville... will surely be better.
咕咕咕，愿老鸟和钟表小子想出来的校训，能指引你们不惧前行——
Hoot hoot, may this old bird and Clockie's school mantra guide you all forward, steadfast and fearless...
来来。请选择你的苏乐达瓶，猜猜看，哪个瓶子里的汽水喷得最高？
Come, come. Pick your SoulGlad bottle and have a guess: Which soda will spray the highest?
答对有奖啊，奖品就是——之前风靡校园的「睡蕉小猴玩偶」！
You get a prize for the right answer! The prize is... a Slumbernana Monkey doll that once took the campus by storm!
喂，这些不会是你没卖完的存货吧，现在谁还粉这种傻傻的过气角色啊。
Hey, don't tell me these are left over from the stock you didn't manage to sell. Who'd stan such a dopey, outdated character?
我选第四个瓶子！是我的幸运数字！
I choose the fourth one! It's my lucky number!
What are you all looking at?
这不是我们的经理嘛！来，你也玩玩。几个苏乐达瓶不知道怎么回事，总在喷汽水。
If it isn't our manager! Come play a round too. No idea what's up with these SoulGlad bottles, apart from the fact that they're spraying soda all the time.
猜猜，哪个瓶子里的苏乐达会喷得最高？没有提示，全靠运气！
Take a guess. Which bottle's SoulGlad will spray the highest? No hints, all luck!
这就是大学生的日常吗？
This is what college students do all day?
是啊，课程轻松，生活不愁，时间太多，乐子不够。哪里好玩去哪里。
Yeah, classes are easy, life is cushy, we've got too much time, and we can't have enough fun. We go where the entertainment is.
学分拿满了，答辩没压力，毕业后的方向也定了…嗨，就等乱破小姐带我回家了。
Earning full credits, no stress in appraisals, where to go after graduation's set as well... *sigh* Just waiting for Ms. Rappa to take me home.
现在应该是排练时间吧？
Isn't it practice time right now?
嘘——我是偷偷溜出来的，借口说房间里太闷，想喝瓶苏乐达，就闲逛到这来了。
Shhh... I slipped out saying that the room was too stuffy as an excuse. Then I wanted to drink some SoulGlad, and that's how I ended up here.
别担心，虽说乐队只是个社团活动，来去自由，但我契波大人是最讲信用的财富学院学生，答应了你们，就会认真完成演出的！

Don't worry. The band may just be a club event, and we're free to come and go as we please, but I am the most trustworthy among all Fortune Academy students. Once I've made a promise, you bet I'll be sure to complete the performance!
正当你还在犹豫不决的时候，视角的余光中，你似乎瞥见队列最前端的那个苏乐达瓶…朝这边晃动了下瓶盖。
Just when you are on the fence, from the periphery of your vision, you seem to glimpse that SoulGlad bottle at the very front of the row... It just shook its bottle cap in your direction.
稍等，我先研究下这几个汽水瓶。
Hold on. I want to scrutinize these soda bottles first.
没问题，你是乐队经理，你说了算！
No problem. You're the band manager. Just say the word!
我记得你，就在海选的正赛现场。我们约好要在顶峰相见，最终却未能实现。
I remember you, at the qualifiers during the official competition. We promised to meet at the top, but none of it came true.
如今你是盛会巨星，我们仍旧无人问津。还好我很年轻，有颗不愿放弃的心。
Now you are a festive superstar, and we are still nobodies. Good thing I'm still young with a heart that never gives up.
现在，我们要向你发起挑战！苏乐达海选的复活赛，正式开始——
Now, we are issuing you a challenge! The SoulGlad auditions' repechage round has officially started!
Did I agree to your challenge?
咕。可恶，我们和你不是宿敌吗！
我们辛辛苦苦从入围赛打上来，却在第一关被你的得分碾压，我们没有气馁，从败者组突围出来。然后，再次被你在第二关淘汰……

We worked so hard to climb our way up the ranks from the qualifiers, but were mercilessly crushed by you in the first round. Yet we didn't give up, and emerged victorious from the loser's group. And then we got eliminated by you in the second stage...
但这次不一样了！我们完成了队伍的补强，我们——回来了！
But it's different this time! We've improved on our team, and we're back!
But I really don't remember you.
就这还好意思说是我的宿敌？
Are you not at all embarrassed to say you're my archrival?
舞台竞技，实力说话。我们在最近的训练赛中可是无人能敌，轻取所有对手，观众都说我们是见过的*最强天团*。

Ability speaks for itself when competing on the stage. We were undefeated in the recent training matches, easily beating all our opponents. Even the audience says we're the "strongest group" they've seen.
想证明你很强，就在这场竞赛中堂堂正正击败我们吧！
If you want to prove you're stronger, defeat us fair and square in this competition!
咕，怎么可能！我们练习了这么长时间的节奏舞步，你居然能够轻易跟上。
Ugh, how's that possible! We spent endless hours practicing our moves, but you were able to keep up so easily.
这就是天赋的差距吗…也许，我们就是无法成功？
Is this the gap in talent... Perhaps, we were never meant to succeed?
再多说点，我已经好久没听到训练赛无敌的故事了。
Keep talking. I haven't heard the story of being undefeated in the training matches for a long time.
别太灰心，毕竟折纸大学是我的主场，就当是专门给我定制的胜利吧。
Don't be too discouraged. Paperfold University is my home ground after all — my win is probably inevitable.
哼，等着！就算这次失败了，还有下次！苏乐达天团永远不认输！
Hmph, hold it! Even if we lost this time, there's still next time! The SoulGlad Idol Group will never admit defeat!
接受苏乐达天团永不言败的挑战吧！
Accept the SoulGlad Idol Group's never-say-die challenge!
喔！喷出来了！但怎么都是相同的高度？
Ohhh! It sprayed out! But why are they all at similar heights?
真遗憾，所有汽水瓶都喷得同样高。没有人猜对，奖品就只能继续留在我手里了。
How unfortunate. All the bottles are spraying at identical heights. No one got it right, and the prize regrettably remains in my hands.
都说那种过气的小猴玩偶，根本不会有人想要啦！
I told you no one wants such last-season merch!
哎，没劲。闲逛得差不多，该回去继续排练了。
Bah, no fun. We've spent enough time outside, and it's time to return to practice.
话说…刚才经理你没有下注，反而跑去跟那个广告牌聊了挺久，是不是早就预见到了这个结果啊。有什么经验诀窍，分享下呗。
Say... Manager, you didn't make a bet just now, but you talked to that billboard for a hot minute. Did you already predict such an outcome? How about sharing some of your tips and tricks?
想不到吧，我和那些汽水瓶在盛会海选上有点交情，愿意给我这个面子。
Unexpected, right? I made some connections with the soda bottles during the Festivity Auditions, and they were willing to do me this favor.
说实话吧，我和那些汽水瓶进行了场比赛，这就是获胜的奖励。
To be honest, I competed against the soda bottles, and this is my reward for winning.
只能说，懂的都懂，不懂的解释也没用，反正你知道我有办法就行了。
The only thing I can say is, "if you know, you know." There's no point explaining if you don't. Just know that I have a way.
厉害！不愧是我们的经理！选择跟你果然没错，以后要带我见识更好玩的事啊！
Awesome! No wonder you're our manager! I was right to follow you. Do bring us along to experience more things in the future!
我先走啦，再不回去就要被乱破小姐训了。再见再见。
I'm gonna make a move. If I don't head back soon, Miss Rappa will start lecturing. Bye bye!
经理！…乱破忍首嘱咐我多跟着您到处走走，所以…收集灵感的时候，能带我一起吗？
Manager! Head Ninja Rappa said I should follow you around more, so... could you please take me with you when you're collecting inspiration?
虽然不知道…究竟是有什么用意。
I don't really know... what's the point.
Okay. Then... I'll be troubling you.
我还从来没来过这种…像是培育舱的地方。这里…会有经理您想寻找的灵感吗？
I've never been to a place like this... it's like an incubator. Will you find the inspiration you're looking for in a place like this, Manager?
咦咦，那边的毛绒玩具好像在动！
Hey, hey, that stuffed toy over there seems to be moving!
呜呜呜。这里…已经不需要我了喵。
Boohoo. This place... doesn't need me anymore, meow.
明明是你自己的问题！和声都唱不整齐，还总是乱动，队形全散了！
It's clearly a you-problem! The harmonies are not in sync, and as you're constantly moving around, the formation is completely messed up!
再这么拖拉下去，害我们赶不上选拔时间就是你的错了哟。
If we keep dragging things out, it'll be your fault if we miss the selection time.
…虽然听不懂它们在说什么，但那只毛绒玩具好像被同伴嫌弃了，有点可怜。
...I don't understand what they are saying, but that stuffed toy looks like it's being rejected by its companion. I feel pity for it.
呜…都怪我喵。最近空间站的造物们想为阮•梅女士合唱一首赞歌，所以在进行发声训练，可是我…怎么都唱不好。

Boo... it's all my fault, meow. Recently, the creations on the space station want to sing a hymn of praise for Madam Ruan Mei, so we are going through vocal training. But I... just can't seem to sing well.
合唱赞歌，要的就是整齐、响亮、有气势！
For a choral hymn, what's required is unison, loudness, and impact!
哎，就别在这家伙身上费劲了，它在选拔时候肯定要被淘汰掉的。不如现在踢掉它，我们好好练习就行了。
*sigh* Stop wasting time on this guy. It'll definitely be disqualified at the selection phase. Why don't we just kick it out and practice on our own?
造物本身就是不平等的，就算再怎么努力，废物就是废物，没办法呢。
Not all creations are equal, no matter how hard one may work. Trash is still trash. Nothing we can do about it.
呜呜…我也想向阮•梅女士表达我对她的爱意。帮帮我吧，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！
Boohoo... I want to express my love to Madam Ruan Mei too. Please help me, {F#big sis}{M#big bro}!
哈？！唱不好是你自己的事，和别人有什么关系。
Huh!? It's your problem if you're bad at singing. Nothing to do with anyone else.
经理…您是能和这些小动物沟通吗？可以的话，请帮帮这个受排挤的孩子吧。
Manager... Can you communicate with these animals? If you can, please help that ostracized child.
看到它这个样子，不由得…就会想到自己。
Just looking at it, I can't help but... think of myself.
What's it got to do with me?
就是就是！唱不好是你自己的事，和别人有什么关系。
Exactly! It's your own problem if you can't sing, not anyone else's.
经理…您是能和这些小动物沟通吗？可以的话，请帮帮这个受排挤的孩子吧。
Manager... Can you communicate with these animals? If you can, please help that ostracized child.
看到它这个样子，不由得…就会想到自己。
Just looking at it, I can't help but... think of myself.
谢谢喵！我总算学会该怎么合唱了，以后肯定没问题的！
Thank you, meow! I've finally learned how to sing in a chorus. It won't be a problem later on!
选拔就要开始了，做好准备。
The selection is about to start. Get ready.
哎，都说了，我们在被制造出来的时候就有差距，改不了的啦。
*sigh* As I've said, there was already a difference in talent when we were first created. It can't be changed.
不多时，所有的「阮•梅」造物都挤在舱段中间，依次进行了发声表演。
Not long after, all of Ruan Mei's creations are all huddled in the middle of the cabin, taking turns to perform their vocals.
咳咳。现在我来公布选拔结果啊。
Ahem. I'll be announcing the selection results now.
经过对所有成员的全面考察，结合赞歌表演的实际需要，通过名单如下——
After comprehensive evaluation of all members, combined with the practical needs of the hymn performance, the roster is as follows...
不对！不公平！这家伙靠别人帮忙才能合格，根本不是它的真实水平！
That's not right! Unfair! This fellow had to rely on another one's help to qualify. That's not its true capability at all!
咳咳。但选拔确实是由它独立完成的，我只认可这次结果。
Ahem. But it did indeed finish the selection by itself, and I have no choice but to acknowledge the outcome.
太好了。看起来那只小动物被同伴接纳了，我们应该…是做了件好事吧？
That's fantastic. Looks like this little buddy has been accepted by its companions. We probably... have done a good thing, haven't we?
你详细向达凡绮讲述了刚才的见闻，包括那只造物是如何挤占了其余造物的名额。
You detail what you saw just now to Dafanchy, including the incident about how that creation wrested a slot from the other creations.
资质平平的人，靠着外界帮助，抢走原本属于别人的东西，经理觉得这样算是公平吗？
Someone of average talent, relying on external help, and robbing something that originally belonged to others. Manager, you think this is fair?
结果至上嘛，再说它也是靠自己的实力通过选拔，没什么好质疑的。
Results are results. Moreover, it also demonstrated its own ability to pass the selection. There's nothing suspicious about it.
…嗯，确实。只要努力提升自己的水平，就不用害怕任何议论。
...Yes, that's true. As long as you work hard to improve yourself, there's no need to fear any gossip.
有点难说，但本来就没有什么是绝对公平的，只能说对方的运气不好吧。
It's hard to say, but it wasn't objectively fair to begin with. All I can say is that it lucked out.
是吗…不过都说运气也是实力的一部分。我运气比较好，认识了你们…嗯。
Really... Though I guess being lucky is a skill too. My luck's pretty good to have known you all... Yes.
把想要的东西拿到手就好，纠结这种事没什么意义。别想太多了。
All that matters is getting what you want. There's no point to hesitation. Stop thinking so much.
也对…光是在这里烦恼，没法改变任何事，还是要积极行动才行。
That's true... Getting all indecisive over this won't change anything. Only positive action will move things forward.
明白了…既然乱破忍首和经理都愿意相信我，我…不会辜负你们的期待的。
Got it... Since Head Ninja Rappa and the manager believe in me, I... won't let you all down.
Are you here to listen to my performance, meow?
经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，请问…你在寻找作曲灵感的时候，能不能带上我？
{F#Miss}{M#Mister} Manager, when you're looking for inspiration for your music... can you please bring me along?
等等，你不是打算退出乐队吗？
Wait, didn't you decide to quit the band?
What's with the change of heart?
当然可以，就是你变得有点陌生。
Of course, it's just that you became a bit unfamiliar.
行，不过那个地方很冷，你多带点衣服吧。
Sure, but it's cold there, so bring extra clothes.
乱破同学反复向我强调，和你共同行动会有收获。如果是考察音乐的话，也不是不行。
Rappa has constantly emphasized to me that working together with you will be rewarding. If it's for assessing music, it should be okay.
别浪费时间了，快出发吧。
Let's not waste any more time and go.
姐姐和我说过乐队的事了，上次演出的直播我也有看，非常精彩。
Big Sis told me about the band. I also saw the last show's stream, and it was really good.
另类，不羁，充满激情，活力四射，像极了我年轻时候的样子啊。我喜欢你们的演奏！
Unique, unconventional, full of passion, bursting with energy, a spitting image of my younger days. I liked your performance plenty!
嗯…我是玲可，「机械热潮」乐队的键盘手…也是雪原科考队的队员。
Mm... I'm Lynx, the Mechanical Fever's keyboardist... and a member of the Belobog Snow Plains Research Team.
我叫邓恩，也是「机械热潮」的——前键盘手！现在已经退出了，哈哈。
I am Dunn, also the Mechanical Fever's... former keyboardist! I've left the band, haha.
艾尔菲。折纸大学谐乐学院的学生，目前…在经理的乐队里担任吉他手。
Arfey. A student from Paperfold University's Charmony Academy, currently... a guitarist in the manager's band.
好啊！既然是喜欢音乐的朋友，欢迎随时来贝洛伯格交流，音乐无边界！
All right! Since we're all music-loving friends here, you're more than welcome to come to Belobog for a chat anytime. Music has no boundaries!
你不用在铁卫禁区执勤么？
Aren't you on duty at the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone?
…咳。这片雪原虽然看起来没什么危险，但也还是要经常巡视，防患于未然。正好今天执勤的铁卫生病了，我就来临时顶个班。对，是这样。

...Ahem. These snow plains may look quite safe, but they still need to be patrolled, in case of any mishaps. The on-duty guard was sick today, so I'm here to fill in temporarily. Yeah, that's the gist of it.
明明刚才还在和我一起烤洞螈。
You were just roasting olms with me just now.
这种理由，我在向学院请假的时候用过好多次了。
I've used an excuse like this so many times at the academy.
有发生什么好玩的事吗？
听姐姐说，你们是想要寻找灵感吧。
Big Sis said you were looking for inspiration.
我的经验…在没什么想法的时候，就会坐在雪地里发呆。
From my experience... when I was stuck, I'd sit in the snow and zone out.
光是听篝火发出的噼里啪啦的声音，看锅里升起的白蒙蒙的蒸汽，都觉得很有意思。
Listening to the twigs crackling in the campfire, staring at the white steam rising from the pot — even the most humdrum occurrences were interesting.
只是发呆就有灵感吗？我都是得在教授的讲座和经典作品的拆解分析中寻找……
Can you really get inspired just from zoning out? I have to seek inspiration from the professor's lectures and analyzing classical works...
听起来很厉害…我没有学过这么复杂的知识，只是喜欢演奏而已。
Sounds really amazing... I've never learned any of that profound knowledge. I just like to play music.
哈哈，我也就大概是在士官学校里上过选修课的程度。
Haha, I just sort of winged it from elective courses in cadet school.
But your band is really successful.
Passion is the most important thing!
要说能带来灵感的趣事…对了，刚才过来的路上，有个白色的东西从我眼前一闪而过，还发着奇怪的光，搞不好是什么新物种！

If I had to recall something interesting that inspired me... Oh yeah, while I was on the way here, something white darted across my path. It was glowing in a strange light — might be some sort of new creature!
就在不远处的雪地里，有兴趣的话可以去看看。
It's not too far away. You can take a look if it piques your curiosity.
不知为何，白茫茫的雪原里有只扑满正在悠闲地踱步，对你的靠近没有表现出任何警惕。
For reasons unknown, there is a trotter sauntering about in the shimmering ivory snow. It does not seem alarmed as you get closer.
没见过的小动物！好可爱~
I've never seen such an animal before! It's so cute!
扑满反复扭动着身子，似乎很欢迎你们的到来。怎么办，要在这里玩一会吗？
The trotter wiggles and waggles about, as if welcoming your presence. Now what? Play with it for a while?
(Play with the trotter for a bit)
好呀好呀，我也想跟它玩。来~转个圈，握握手~
Yay! I want to play with it too. Spin around, and shake hands!
很明显，这只扑满相当喜欢你饱含爱意的抚摸，并热情地向你示好。
It's rather obvious that this trotter loves your affectionate caress. It enthusiastically reciprocates your warmth.
好吧，看来这只扑满并不介意你触碰它的鼻尖，甚至主动朝这边靠了靠。
Okay, seems like the trotter doesn't mind you touching its nose. It even presses its nose into your hand.
这只扑满缩起了身子，对你即将实施的行为表现出强烈的抵触，还是放弃吧。
This trotter curls up, showing great resistance to what you're about to do. Best give up.
好可爱的小家伙~嘿嘿，要不要跟我回学校呀~
What a cute lil fella! Heehee, how about coming back to school with me...
艾尔菲完全沉浸在和扑满嬉戏的氛围中了……
Arfey is totally immersed in the atmosphere of playing with the trotter...
就是…你好，请问你会演奏音乐吗？
Err... Hello, do you know how to play music?
艾尔菲用极其复杂的眼神望着你，仿佛在思考是否应该再离你远点。
Arfey stares at you with a very complicated expression, as if she is thinking about whether to back away from you.
好吧，我知道…就是开个玩笑，嗯。
Fine, got it... It was just a joke, yeah.
经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，能帮我个忙吗？
{F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, can you help me out?
我还是第一次见到这么有趣的动物，麻烦给它拍个照吧，我想带回去作为纪念。
It's my first time seeing such an interesting animal. Please take a picture of it — I wish to bring it back as a souvenir.
Do you not have a phone?
…我的手机，是家里特别定制的，只有最基础的通讯功能，没法拍照。
...My phone was custom-made by my family. It only has the most basic communication functions, and can't take photos.
哎，父母希望我把全部心思都放在学院的课业上，毕业后成为著名的音乐家。
*sigh* My parents hope that I would fully focus on my school work, and become a renowned musician after I graduate.
随他们怎么想吧。麻烦您了。
They can think what they want. Appreciate the help.
咦，突然冲出来了好几只！！赶快抓拍这个瞬间！
Hey, there's a bunch of them popping up out of thin air!!! Quickly, capture this moment!
拍到了好多照片~真可爱啊~
So many pictures shot! So cuuuute!
（收集得差不多，回去跟玲可和邓恩讲讲遇见的情况吧。）
(We should be about done with our collection. Let's tell Lynx and Dunn about what we saw.)
噢，原来是这样。那就没什么好担心的了，最近这种裂界生物活动得很频繁啊。
Oh, so that's how it was. Nothing to worry about, then. Fragmentum creatures such as these have been pretty lively recently.
所以，找到想要的灵感了吗？
So did you find the inspiration you wanted?
说实话，我先前从来没想过…这种毫无意义的记录，还能成为创作灵感。
Honestly, I never once thought that... such a meaningless record could be used to inspire creativity.
只要能让自己产生新的想法的东西，都算是灵感。
As long as it's something that can help you create new ideas, that counts as inspiration.
但是…如果不按标准的乐理规范来，难道不会写出很奇怪的曲子吗？
But... if we don't follow standard music theory, wouldn't we write really strange melodies?
唔，复杂的知识我也不是很懂。但姐姐说过，乐队最重要的还是要让观众感到开心。
Mm, I don't really know that complicated stuff. But Big Sis said that the most important thing about being in a band is that the audience is happy.
不止是这些！她说还要让乐队的成员，还有演奏的自己也开心！
Not just that! She also said that the band members and the one playing should be happy too!
...You sure remember my sister's words well.
哈、哈哈…当然了！她可是我们乐队的核心啊！
Ha, haha... Of course! She's the heart of our band!
经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们该返回学校了吧，有点事情…需要再想想。
{F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, we should be heading back to school. I have something... I need to think about.
这就要走了？我的洞螈还没有烤好啊。
Leaving so suddenly? My olms aren't done roasting yet.
好呀。我也想去那个庞大的梦境里探险，等会就去问姐姐的时间。
Sure. I was also thinking of exploring a vast dreamscape. I'll go ask Big Sis about the times later.
我应该是走不开了哈哈。再说我也只是个前任键盘手，好久没玩乐队了，这么青春的事，还是交给你们年轻人吧！
I probably can't leave, haha. And I'm just the former keyboardist — I haven't played in a band for a long time. Such youthful stuff should be left to you youngsters!
但我会为你们应援的！要加油啊！！
But I will cheer for you! You can do it!!!
(Snap the moment the trotter jumps up)
（艾尔菲打算和我一起出发…也不是不行吧。）
(Arfey intends to head out with me... Not that it's a problem.)
——尽管来自遥远的冰天雪地，严寒从未浇熄我对音乐的热情，如今到访未踏足过的梦境，只为寻找那位挚友的踪迹。
Though I hail from distant icy lands, the cold never extinguished my passion for rhymes. Now I visit uncharted dreamscapes, only to seek the trail of my dear friend.
请你立刻停止回避，别再让我们苦苦寻觅！
Please stop avoidin'. Don't make us keep searchin'!
大哥！唱了这么久都没有回应，我们该不会是来错地方了吧？
Big Bro! We've been singing for so long, and still no answer. Could we have the wrong place?
哼。这是在考验我们的诚意，不能轻易就这么放弃！
Hmph. This is a test of our sincerity. We mustn't give up so easily!
…没看错吧，这、这是垃圾桶组合？好有意思诶。
...Are my eyes deceiving me? Th—This is a trashcan group? How curious.
众所周知，朋友是最宝贵的财富，尤其是当你身处险境的时候。
Everyone knows that friends are wealth most precious, especially when you're in dire peril.
嗨——我亲爱的桶友，见到你们可太高兴了，最近过得还好吗？
Hiii! My dear trashfriends, it's a joy to see you. How have you been?
众所周知，每个人的行为都要符合身份，而你心里很清楚，无论如何，你都不想被人当成是垃圾桶的朋友。
Everyone knows that a person's actions must befit their status, and you should be well aware that you never want to be mistaken for a friend of trashcans, no matter what.
大哥！就在那边，我找到那位桶友了！嗨——
Big Bro! Over there, I found that trashfriend! Hiiii!
忘了吗？我们是共同演出的同伴，你的说唱技巧给我留下了很深的印象。
Did you forget? We're comrades who performed together, and your rapping left a deep impression on me.
路上经历了太多磨难，总算来到你生活的地方，别让我们白跑一趟！
We overcame so many hardships all this way, finally arriving at the place you're living in. Don't make us come all this way for nothing!
这不是表演乐队的经理吗，怎么还和这些垃圾桶有关系？
Isn't this the performing band's manager? How does the manager know these trashcans?
好吧，现在你知道全体目光向你看齐是什么样的感受了。
All right, now you know how it feels to have all eyes on you.
桶友哟，你们乐队的美名从贝洛伯格的广场到垃圾场，无人不知无人不晓。因此我们专程前来拜访，希望有幸得见演出的盛况。

Trashfriend, your band's grand reputation is known from the Belobog plaza all the way to the junkyard. That's why we have specially come all this way to pay a visit, hoping that we'll have the honor of watching your glorious performance.
And also to cheer you on!
呜呜，大哥…{F#她}{M#他}就在这里，我们终于到了啊！
Waaa, Big Bro... {F#She}{M#He} is right here. We've finally made it!
这份炙热的友情，不远万里来为同伴加油应援的精神…太、太让人感动了！
This burning friendship, this spirit of traveling so far just to cheer a peer on... It's... It's simply too touching!
你向贝洛伯格的垃圾桶组合讲述了最近发生的事，包括乐队究竟遭遇了怎样不公的对待。
You tell the Belobogian trashcan group about recent events, including the part where the band is treated unfairly.
...Then we have arrived at just the right time.
It's time for us to shine!
大哥！让我们向那群蛮不讲理的人示威，向所有观众发出正义的召唤吧！
Big Bro! Let us demonstrate a show of force to those ruffians and send out a call to the entire crowd for justice!
即便灯光熄灭，被赶下舞台，即便没有人喝彩，我们的音乐也不会停歇。
Even if all the lights are extinguished, and we're booted off the stage... Even if no one cheers for us, our music will never cease.
——来吧！加入我们，用最大的音量，最华丽的表演，最自信的姿态，让整个世界都记住你的存在！
...Come! Join us! Let the world remember your existence with the loudest volume, the most beautiful performance, and the most confident poise!
桶友别再犹豫，加入这段旋律！
Do not tarry, trashfriend! Join this rhythm!
——学院代表，学院代表，你们实在让人烦躁，模样装得清高，做得相当糟糕，嘴里说着尊师重道，心里想的都是圈套。可笑！

...Academy's reps, academy's reps, I hafta say you're all a huge pain, putting on a show of utter disdain. Spitting respect and morals out on your main, but traps and tricks are all you've got in yo brain! Refrain!
看见我们来到，转身撒腿就跑！
We're gonna come, come, come for your domain, till all you can do is cower in shame!
大哥！我们唱得再大声点，让那群躲起来的胆小鬼都听见！
Big Bro! We gotta turn up our noise and let those hiding cowards hear us!
刚才听垃圾桶说，学院打算换掉那只表演乐队，还要处分他们，不会是真的吧？
I heard from the trashcans that the academy is intending to replace that performing band, and even discipline them. You think it's true?
难说啊，就财富学院代表那个凶样，做出什么更离谱的事都不稀奇。
Hard to say. Look at how fierce that Fortune Academy's rep is. I wouldn't be surprised if he does something so outrageous.
啊，所以…乐队解散的消息是真的吗？
Ah, so... news of the band disbanding is true?
真的，学校很讨厌我们乐队。
Yeah, the school hates our band.
乐队的表现那么好，换掉你们实在太不合理了，明明大家都很喜欢……
The band's doing so well though. It makes no sense to replace you. Everyone obviously loves you...
倒不是不信吧，只是觉得…乐队的表现那么好，换掉你们实在太不合理了……
It's not that. I just think... with the band doing so well, it makes no sense to replace you...
如果学校打算更换乐队，不让你们上台…我、我会为你们声援的！
If the school intends to change bands and prevent you from performing... I—I will cheer you all on!
我也是！我喜欢你们的音乐，还想看「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出！别让那些坏人得逞啊！
Me too! I love your music, and I wanna see {TEXTJOIN#120} perform! Don't let those baddies get their way!
支持你们！要顶住压力，坚持自己的风格！
We support you! You've got to hang in there and stick to your guns!
嗯。观众们的呼声，永远是给演出者最好的回应。你们——非常受欢迎啊。
Good. The audience's cheers are always the best answer to a performance. You're all very popular.
Yeah! Just as popular as us!
大哥！这就是音乐的力量啊！
Big Bro! This is the power of music!
喂，那边的学生！不好好准备音乐派对，都聚在这是想干嘛？！
Hey, those students over there! What're you all doing here? You should be preparing for the music party!
垃圾桶？哪里跑来的脏东西，这不是你们该来的地方，滚出去！
Trashcans? Where did these dirty things come from? This is not a place you should be loitering in. Get lost!
实在太不讲理，立刻停止言语暴力，表示你的歉意，否则别怪我们生气！
Ain't so reasonable! Insult questionable! Say sorry and be amiable! Or we're gonna make you destructible!
也别想逃避我们的质疑！
And don't think of running away from fury justifiable!
大哥！和他正面对峙，我们不会退缩！
Big Bro! We won't back down from a showdown with him!
就在这里，我们兄弟三桶，对阵你们师徒三人，非得要分出个高低，为音乐正名！
Right here, right now, us three brothers will face off against you three. We will settle the score and restore rightful honor to music!
Is it a fight? Count me in!
We'll show you what we're made of!
什么乱七八糟的，还想打人，倒反天罡了是吧？清洁工呢，快收拾干净！
What's all this nonsense? And trying to pick a fight? Have you lost your mind? Where's the janitor? Get rid of these riff-raff quickly!
就算战胜了我们，也没法改变我们的信念。因为音乐——是杀不死的！
Even if you defeat us, you won't change our beliefs. Because music cannot be killed!
杀不死的只会变得更强大！
What can't be killed only gets stronger!
大哥！我终于找到了啊，属于我们要走的道路。加把劲，挚友！
Big Bro! I've finally found it! A path for us to walk on! Give it your all, my bosom friend!
——加油。记得要坚持自己的梦想啊。
...Do your best. Remember to hold on to your dreams.
很久以后，见到垃圾桶时，你还是会回想起和它们共同与学院代表对峙的时刻，这样最棒的时刻永远不会再有了。
Long after this, when you see a trashcan, you will still recall the time when you stood with them against the academy's representative. There will never be another moment as glorious as this.
看什么看，都散了！学生就要有学生的样子，别整天跟奇怪的人混在一起。
What're you lot looking at? Disperse! Students must act like it, and stop gallivanting with strange characters.
说的就是你！新乐队已经组好了，没你们的份！
I'm talking about you! The new band has been formed, and you're all not included!
行啊，坦然接受自己的失败也是种能力，等音乐派对结束，有你们好看！
Good, accepting your own failure is also a kind of strength. When the music party is over, you will learn what pain is!
《银河忍法帖•特别花絮•音律篇》
Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: Special Footage - Sound Chapter
——趁那群人不在，赶紧唱个痛快，表达你们的愤慨，顺便赞扬我们无畏的气概。
...When they ain't around, we gon' spit it loud. Let your anger out, we ain't backing down. Shout out to the fearless, we wearing the crown.
还要阻止他们继续使坏！
Stop 'em in their tracks, we shutting 'em down!
大哥！我好喜欢这个地方，这就是我们新的舞台啊！
Boss! I love this place, this is our new stage!
去完成你的使命吧。但要记好了——音乐，无法被任何东西击败！
Go complete your destiny. But remember... Our music ain't gonna be drowned!
——新游戏首次测试啊，走过路过不要错过啊。
...New game's first test! Don't miss out!
来试试吧，只需体验三分钟，相信你就会像我一样，爱上这款游戏！
Give it a try. Just three minutes and I'm sure you'll love this game just like I do!
最近测试的游戏有点多啊。
Feels like so many games have gone into beta testing recently.
嗨，还不是折纸大学要举办校庆，再不上线就赶不上咯。不是吹牛啊，我开发的这部作品，怎么都能拿个「最受学生喜爱的移动游戏」奖吧？

That's because it's almost time for the Paperfold University anniversary festival. They won't make it if they don't launch now. Not that I'm bragging, but this title I developed? I reckon it can probably clinch a "Most Beloved Mobile Game by Students" award.
我观察了下，根本没什么有竞争力的对手，同题材的游戏更是没有，应该是稳了。
I've noticed that there's no good competition at all in this category, and games with a similar theme are basically nowhere to be found. The prize is pretty much in the bag.
Are arcade games considered mobile games?
皮皮西商人向你展示了装在街机底部的滑轮，甚至还推着机器绕场地转了几圈。
The Pepeshi merchant shows you the wheels attached to the bottom of the arcade machine. He even pushes the machine around for a few rounds.
Actually, there is a game with a similar theme...
你将那位智械商人的事告诉了他，还不忘极力夸赞对方的游戏究竟有多好玩。
You tell him about that Intellitron merchant and emphasize how fun the other's game was.
…啊？除了我以外，还有人做哈努努题材的游戏？那是明晃晃的抄袭！
...Eh? Someone else made a Hanunue game besides me? That's just blatant copying!
我才是原创！不信给你看时间，文件夹老早就建好了。他就是个跟风的！
Mine's the original one! Look at the timestamp for my folder if you don't believe me — the folder was created a long time ago. He's just trying to jack the trend!
好嘞！看你的模样，就知道是个懂游戏的。要是有什么不足之处，欢迎批评，欢迎指正啊。要是很满意，就麻烦写个五星好评啦。
All right! You look like someone who knows games. Feel free to critique if you find anything lacking. I welcome all feedback. If you're satisfied, please write a five-star review for me.
准备好了吗？我要启动了——
You ready? I'm starting it up...
...How was the experience? Was it fun?
不不，那是你的操作太强了，普通玩家可达不到这水平。真的。
That's because you were too good at maneuvering. Average players wouldn't be able to hit such a level, really.
可以有，都可以有。只要玩得开心，所有需求都可以满足哈。我绝对听劝！
