I already said not to call me that...
有件事需要和你商量一下——今天星穹列车同时收到了两个派系的请托，希望我们提供护送和运载服务。
There's something I need to talk to you about: The Astral Express received two faction commissions at the same time today, hoping that we would provide escort and transport services.
那太好了。开支越来越大，正需要些*低风险*的工作来回回血。
That's fantastic. Our expenses are getting higher — we need some much needed low-risk jobs to pay the bills.
不过，这两份请托在排期上重叠了，我们大概只能选择其一。
But, the schedules on these two commissions overlap. We can probably only take one.
第一份请托，是「丹轮寺」请我们协助他们，与{RUBY_B#护教僧团}护法众{RUBY_E#}一起将一群可怜的战争孤儿护送到丹轮寺。

The first commission is from the Claretwheel Temple seeking our assistance, to escort a group of poor war orphans to the Claretwheel Temple with the {RUBY_B#Apologetic Sangha}Dharma Defenders{RUBY_E#}.
护送丰饶民战争的战争孤儿？这听起来可不是什么*低风险*的任务……
Escorting war orphans from the Denizens of Abundance Wars? This doesn't sound like a low-risk mission at all.
其实还好。整条航线基本上都在公司的核心疆域内，请我们护送无非是为了图个安心。
It's all right, actually. The entire route is practically within IPC's key domains. Hiring us as an escort is merely for a peace of mind.
另一份请托则来自「星空生态学派」，他们希望我们将<unbreak>70</unbreak>只鼻行兽运输到要塞都市「赛耶斯」。
The other one is from the Astral Ecology School: They hope that we can transport <unbreak>70</unbreak> Nosewalkers to the fortress city of Sayers.
但那可是会无限生长，甚至能在短时间内成长到比列车还大的可怕生物……
But those are monstrous creatures that can indeterminately grow, and even grow bigger than the Express in a short period of time...
看来这两份*低风险*的工作，都有些潜在的风险。是得好好斟酌一下…该接下哪一单呢？
Looks like these two low-risk jobs still have some element of risk to them. We'll have to consider carefully which one to take.
优先去护送「丹轮寺」救下的孩子们吧。毕竟都是些孩子，是战争中唯一天然且绝对的无辜者，他们需要尽快被转移到安全的地方。

Let's prioritize escorting the children the Claretwheel Temple rescued. They're just children, after all, and the only natural and absolute innocents of war. They need to be moved to a safe place quickly.
Yes, I agree. They are children after all.
真是惊险。我的确没想到，那兽舰真敢一路追到公司的疆域里来。还好他们刚一露头，就被巡逻的公司战舰歼灭了……
How harrowing. I definitely wasn't expecting that beast ship to pursue us into IPC's territory. Good thing they were shot down by a patrolling IPC cruiser once they revealed themselves...
好歹也算是一方天灾，却死得像路边的野狗一样。哼，看了感觉真可怜。
They were considered a force of nature, yet died like stray dogs by the roadside. Hmph, what a pitiful sight.
但我更没想到，「丹轮寺」的僧众会那么热情。为了感谢我们的帮助，竟然送给我们整整3吨新鲜蔬菜…真不知道我们几个要吃到什么时候去。

What's even more surprising to me is the passion of Claretwheel Temple's monks. They actually gave us three tons of fresh vegetables to thank us for our help... When will we ever be able to finish them all...
哈哈，搞不好这是「丹轮寺」的小心思——用巨量的新鲜蔬菜劝导我们多吃素。
Haha, it might just be subtle persuasion from the Claretwheel Temple — using a tsunami of fresh vegetables to guide us towards the vegetarian path.
运输鼻行兽的货船一旦出了什么差池，很可能会对临近的生态圈造成灾难性影响。
If anything goes wrong with the freight skiff that's transporting the Nosewalkers, it may have a catastrophic impact on the surrounding ecosystems.
的确。为了保护「星空生态」，我们还是得接下这一单。
That's true. We have to take this request to protect the Astral Ecology.
好久没这么紧张过了。每分每秒，货仓里那<unbreak>70</unbreak>个小家伙都在变得更大……
I haven't been so anxious in a long time. Every minute, every second, those <unbreak>70</unbreak> little fellows are growing non-stop...
好在有惊无险，任务平安完成。
At least nothing serious happened, and the mission was completed uneventfully.
这群「星空生态学派」的…坏人，绝对向我们隐瞒了货物的真实情况。这根本不可能是正常的鼻行兽。
These shady Astral Ecology School people definitely hid the true nature of their cargo from us. These aren't your ordinary Nosewalkers at all.
可惜在公司的地盘，就算起诉他们也占不到什么便宜。只能下次多留个心眼了。
We're in IPC's territory though. We wouldn't gain anything by indicting them here. Just have to be more prudent in the future.
但他们给的酬劳是真多啊…唉，原谅他们5秒钟吧。
But they were really generous with their payment... *sigh* I'll forgive them for five seconds.
Split the teams up and complete both.
不如这样如何——我们兵分两路，你带着{NICKNAME}和小三月去协助「丹轮寺」，我带着丹恒去运送鼻行兽。
How about this? We'll split up our forces — you take {NICKNAME} and March with you to assist the Claretwheel Temple. I'll transport the Nosewalkers with Dan Heng.
就这样办吧。但我们彼此都要注意安全。
Let's do that. But we'll have to take care.
姬子一行人决定采用最短路线前往「丹轮寺」，但却不得不穿过一片无主的星域。不巧，追兵在此处设伏，袭击了星穹列车。三人与护法众通力合作，成功击退了敌人。

Himeko's team decided to take the shortest route to the Claretwheel Temple, but had to traverse an unclaimed star sector. Unfortunately, pursuers had set up an ambush here and attacked the Astral Express. The trio and Dharma Defenders worked together to successfully repel the enemies.
值得庆幸的是，列车组、护法众和孩子们都毫发无伤。
Fortunately, the Express crew, Dharma Defenders and the children were all unharmed.
另一边，瓦尔特和丹恒放慢速度安全驾驶，却没发现货仓中的鼻行兽正在飞速成长。学士们隐瞒了信息：这是变异的鼻行兽。

On the other side, Welt and Dan Heng slowed down their speed for safe flight, but failed to notice that the Nosewalkers were rapidly growing. The scholars had hidden a crucial piece of information: That these were mutated Nosewalkers.
好在，他们成功在货船被撑爆前抵达了目的地。丹恒在港口对那位满脸堆笑的学士饱以老拳。
Luckily, they successfully reached their destination before the whole skiff came apart. When they docked, Dan Heng gave the grinning scholar a good beating.
唉，你们更有耐心，我们更追求效率。如果当初我们对调一下队伍划分就好了。
*sigh* You all had more patience, and we were more efficient. It would've ended up better if we had switched jobs.
幸好我们都没有受伤…说到受伤，那个被打掉了三颗牙的学士，没有向我们索赔吧？
Good thing we were unharmed... Speaking of which, that scholar who lost three teeth from the beating... he didn't seek compensation from us?
万幸，没有。唉，理解丹恒的心情，但还是有点太冲动了。
Luckily, he did not. *sigh* I understand how Dan Heng feels, but even that was a little overboard.
这不怪丹恒，我也趁乱踢了几脚。
That's not Dan Heng's fault. I also took the opportunity to get a few kicks in.
哈哈，瓦尔特先生也确实是…宝刀未老啊！
Haha, Mr. Yang... You've still got it!
啊啊啊！这机动球决赛也太焦灼了！我的心要跳到嗓子眼了！
Ahh! This Roboball final is too dang intense! My heart's gonna burst out through my throat!
「阿塔古丘铁砧队」不接受义体改造，竟然仅凭着纯粹的技巧就一路冲进了决赛！真是热血沸腾！一定要拿到冠军啊！铁砧队！
The Atakuch Anvil Team refuses artificial implant modifications, relying on sheer technique and skill to charge their way into the final! What an absolute thrill! They must win the final! Team Anvil!
我还是一如既往支持「埃凯科盾构机队」。想让所有智械队员配合无间可不是件容易事，需要极为精细地调试运动模块，个中心血非常人所能想象。

I'm still throwing my lot in for the Ekaker Shield Foundation Fleet. It's no easy feat for an all-Intellitron team to be in perfect sync — it requires peak precision to debug their motion modules. You can't imagine the amount of work that is needed.
哼哼，那就看看咱俩各自的主队，谁能笑到最后吧～
Heh-heh, let's see which of our teams will get the last laugh then!
支持「铁砧」，人类荣光永存！
当然是「铁砧队」！我最喜欢看技术党打败信用点战士了～
The Anvil of course! I love when exceptional technique overwhelms credit warriors!
好，有眼光～赢了请你吃炸鸡！
You've got a good eye! I'll treat you to fried chicken when we win!
The Shield Foundation. The flesh is weak!
「盾构机队」实在太帅了！在其他地方可看不到7个队员合体成机器人的大场面。
The Shield Foundation Fleet is too awesome! It's not every day you get to see a seven-member team combine into a robot.
工程学技术也绝对算是「纯粹的技巧」。
Engineering techniques are also definitely a form of "pure skill."
我支持机动球。天天被球员们驾驶着撞来撞去，实在是太可怜了。
I support the Roboball. Getting piloted and crashed around day in day out, it's such a poor thing.
哎，我一猜你就会用说怪话来打太极…你是懂端水的。
*sigh* I knew you'd come up with weird answers to deflect the question... you always know how to stay neutral.
别难为{NICKNAME}了，好好看比赛吧。
Don't give {NICKNAME} a hard time. Let's watch the match.
音乐声响起，「铁砧队」获得了胜利。
The music plays — the Anvil Team has won.
真不敢相信…「铁砧队」竟然偷偷植入了信号干扰芯片！用这种战术来击败对手，有点卑鄙！不行，脱粉了，还是「盾构机队」比较光明磊落。

I can't believe it... The Anvil Team secretly implanted a signal disruption chip! Defeating your opponents with such a tactic is simply despicable! They just lost a fan in me. At least the Shield Foundation Fleet doesn't play dirty.
我倒是觉得，「盾构机队」明明都是智械，却只会用蛮力。反倒不如「铁砧队」思维活跃，诡计多端。我现在有点喜欢「铁砧队」了。

I was surprised, though. They're all Intellitrons in the Fleet, but all they did was rely on brute force. In contrast, the Anvil Team employed their wits and had many tricks up their sleeves. I'm starting to like the Anvil a little more now.
You two are... strategically switching allegiances?
循着沿脊背攀爬而上的怪异感，你找到了异样气息的源头。
Following the strange feeling that is crawling up your back, you find the source of that unnatural presence.
一个诡异的「玩偶」正紧盯着你。
A creepy doll is staring at you.
人类曾有过这样的时代：笃信于自己的摹本，并将之奉上神坛。
Mankind once lived through such a time: Devoutly believing in their own imitations, and offering them to the divine altar.
诚然如此。但那样的日子都已远去。毕竟「始作俑者，其无后乎」。
It may be so, but those days are long gone. After all, "the originator shall bear no future."
不再倾听万人的夙愿，也不再代行神明的权柄——「造像」溃退为织物包裹的一团人造纤维，醒目的缝隙间布满细密的针脚。

No longer heeding the wishes of the masses, nor executing the authority of the gods — the sculpture has withered into a bundle of synthetic fibers wrapped in fabric, myriad stitches between its conspicuous cracks.
不过嘛，挣脱了神官与祭祀亿万年来强加于其身的香火与圣职，玩偶反倒能够腾出手来做些更有乐子的事。
But, having shrugged off the smoky incense and the sacred duties bequeathed upon it by priests and eons of offerings, the doll now has time for more entertaining matters.
也许是一场爆炸？一抹景观？又或者是…一次「值日」？
Maybe it was an explosion? A touch of scenery? Or is it... another "day's work"?
{NICKNAME}！是时候来一场紧张刺激的室内相扑了！你敢与我决战吗？
{NICKNAME}! It's time for a round of high-octane indoor sumo wrestling! Dare you fight me?
你竟然骂人！可恶，既然你如此嚣张，就别怪本姑娘下狠手了！
You're mocking me! The arrogance! Dang it, don't blame me for destroying you!
…不对，真有狗叫！而且这个口音，一听就是……
...No wait, it's really a dog! And this accent, it's probably...
佩佩！一听口音就知道是你～你怎么偷偷跑到列车上来啦？
Peppy! I know it was you after hearing your accent! What're you doing sneaking on the Express?
哦？原来你不是偷偷溜上来的啊。是艾丝妲和阿兰要出差，所以决定先把你寄养在列车上…原来如此。
Oh? So you weren't sneaking. Asta and Arlan are away on business, so they decided to leave you on the Express... I see.
你为什么能翻译它的话？
How are you able to translate its words?
它的叫声怎么有这么大信息量？
Its barks can convey that much information?
How many languages do you speak exactly?
为什么你还能听出它的口音？
Why can you even hear that it has an accent?
吐槽点太多，选项都写不下了。
There are too many complaints to fit into the choice options.
美少女的事，你不用搞得那么清楚。
There's no need for you to nose around in the affairs of pretty maidens.
看来佩佩要和我们一起生活一阵子啦。嘿嘿，可以一起玩抛接球咯～
Looks like Peppy's gonna be staying with us for a while. Heh-heh, we can play catch!
而且…佩佩，既然来咱们列车上做客，是不是也要帮咱们做一做值日呢？有你在，以后我干活就轻松啦～
And... Peppy, now that you're an Express guest, do you have to help us with Express duty too? Work will be much easier with you around!
汪汪汪，汪！呜呜呜！汪，呜汪呜汪！呜呜，汪，呜！汪汪汪汪汪，汪！呜，汪！
Woof woof woof, woof! Arooo! Woof, rrwoof! Arooo, woof, roo! Woof woof woof woof, woof! Rrr, woof!
That's definitely not what it said!
您好，「闭嘴」。订餐机器人「炒饭天才<unbreak>123</unbreak>号」很不高兴为您服务。
Hello, Shush. The Food Order Robot "Cooking Genius No. <unbreak>123</unbreak>" is very unhappy with your service.
敬爱的列车长，请问列车上为什么有一位锅盖头的…同行？难道大家已经吃腻了我做的饭吗！
Beloved conductor, may I ask why the Express has a... lid-headed comrade? Is it because everyone is tired of my offerings!?
列车长也很意外帕。是黑塔女士把它送来的，说要它在这里进行一段时间的「业务交流」，作为{NICKNAME}协助测试模拟宇宙的谢礼。

Pom-Pom is very surprised too. It was Madam Herta who gave it to us, saying that it was going to be here for a while for a "professional exchange." It's a gift for {NICKNAME} who helped out with the Simulated Universe tests.
播放：「快让你们那几十个琥珀纪历史的老旧餐饮机器人享受一下退休生活吧！不如试试空间站的家政机器人，如果好用就让艾丝妲送你们一台。」

Next transmission: "Hurry up and let your rundown catering robot enjoy the retired life! It's got to be dozens of Amber Eras old! Why not try the space station's housekeeping robot? Asta will give you one if it's useful."
黑塔小姐的好意，我心领了。但我可还远没到退休的年纪，还能继续为无名客们提供*优质的*餐饮服务。
I appreciate Madam Herta's intentions, but I am nowhere near retirement age, and can continue providing *quality* dining services to the Nameless.
正在启动「言外之意翻译器」：「老东西，该让位了。」
Activating implication translator: "It's time to make way, you old heap of scrap."
这肯定不是黑塔女士的「言外之意」吧！「炒饭天才<unbreak>123</unbreak>号」，禁止出言挑衅星穹列车的餐饮负责人！
This isn't what Madam Herta is implying, surely! Cooking Genius No. <unbreak>123</unbreak>, you're not allowed to taunt the Astral Express' catering head!
没关系，敬爱的列车长，我不会和无礼的锅盖头一般见识。
It is all right, beloved conductor. I will not stoop to the level of such an impolite lid-head.
我们都明白，真正宝贵的不是硬件设备，而是数十年如一日在工作中积累下的，肚子里的「油墨」，以及头脑中的「幽默」。
We all know that true value is not in hardware, but accumulated through decades of work, the juices in your stomachs, and the juices in your brains.
恰如此时此刻，「油墨」和「幽默」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
Coincidentally, that was a pun. I am a tin can of laughs.
爆笑：哈哈哈哈。哈哈哈哈。
「闭嘴」前辈，您的幽默，让我捧腹大笑！
Ol' Shush, your humor makes me roar with laughter!
啊？你们智械都喜欢这样的冷笑话吗……
Eh? Do all Intellitrons like dad jokes...
「闭嘴」前辈，您才是真正的「天才」！请允许我因之前的冒犯而向您道歉，是我「有眼不识金镶玉」——尽管身为一台餐饮机器人，我很可能「无眼」。
Shush, you are a true genius! Please allow me to apologize for my previous discourtesy. It was I who failed to have eyes for such talent. Even if I have no eyes as a catering robot.
这个笑话还差点火候，你要继续努力。
This joke lacks some fire. You should keep working on it.
You're even starting to critique the joke...
没问题，在「业务交流」期间，「炒饭<s>天才</s><unbreak>123</unbreak>号」将鞍前马后，追随「闭嘴」前辈，学习「幽默」的真意！
No problem. During this professional exchange, Cooking <s>Genius</s> No. <unbreak>123</unbreak> will be hot on Shush's heels to learn the true meaning of humor!
...Pom-Pom has much to rant about, but best to forget it, pom...
至少它们两个能和睦相处，这是件好事帕～
At least they're on good terms with each other, so that's good!
嗯？我垃圾呢？你们看到我的垃圾了吗？
Eh? Where is my trash? Did you all see my trash?
我刚刚放这的，这么大的一堆垃圾呢？谁拿走了！
I placed it here, and it's such a huge pile of trash. Who took it?
不是我，我在打扰丹恒看书。
It's not me. I'm disturbing Dan Heng while he reads.
不是，你为啥要把垃圾放到观景车厢？
Hang on. Why did you place the trash in the Parlor Car?
唉，摸遍了空间站的垃圾桶才凑够这堆易拉罐，刚准备拿来玩叠叠乐……
*sigh* I rummaged through all the trashcans around the space station just to gather those cans. I wanted to play Jenga with them...
咦？这空间站的小家伙怎么跑到列车上来了？过来，让三月姐姐抱抱～
Eh? When did this little one from the space station get into the Express? Come here. Let me give huggies!
就是它吃了我的易拉罐！它的嗝是易拉罐味的！给我吐出来！
It ate my cans! Its burp smells like trash! Spit it out now!
可能是它混在易拉罐里，被你一起带回来了。找个时间送它回去吧。
Maybe it was hiding among your cans and you brought it back. Find a time and take it home.
送回去？不可能！吃了我的易拉罐，就要付出代价，桀桀桀～
Take it home? No way! It owes me a blood-debt for gobbling my trash.
既然它爱吃垃圾，就让它也来帮忙值日吧！垃圾管饱！
Since it likes eating trash, then let's assign it a duty. It can eat all the trash it wants!
哎呀，你干嘛跟只垃圾糕一般见识？还是放人家回去吧。
Gosh, why are you stooping to the level of a trash-eating creature? Just let it go home.
你怎么知道它自己不想帮我们做值日呢？让我征求一下它的意见～
How do you know it doesn't want to help us with this glorious task? Let us ask its opinion...
小家伙，你是自愿帮我们做值日的吗？如果是，你就回答「喵喵」；如果不是，你就回答「况吾与子渔樵于江渚之上，侣鱼虾而友麋鹿，驾一叶之扁舟，举匏樽以相属」。

Little one, you're volunteering to help us out with Express duties, yes? If yes, reply with "meow meow." If not, reply with "The still, sad music of humanity, nor harsh nor grating, though of ample power to chasten and subdue."
你真是把心眼都用在这种事情上了……
You really poured your heart into this...
今天似乎要开始值日了，好懒，好想躺平…但要是再不参加值日，帕姆就要急眼了。还是乖乖参加值日吧。
Looks like today's my turn for duty. I'm feeling so lazy and just want to chill... But if I skip again, Pom-Pom's going to lose it. Better just suck it up and do my part.
拿好你桌上这份「星穹列车值日排班表」～接下来，{NICKNAME}乘客要认真检查排班表，好好<color=#dbc291ff>参加值日</color>。
Hold onto that "Astral Express Duty Roster" on your desk! Next up, Passenger {NICKNAME}, make sure to give it a good once-over and be all set to <color=#dbc291ff>be on duty</color>.
帕姆会根据你的值日成绩发放<color=#dbc291ff>列车基金</color>，然后用列车基金把这个<color=#dbc291ff>房间建造</color>成自己想要的样子吧！
Pom-Pom will hand out the <color=#dbc291ff>Express Fund</color> based on your duty performance. Use it to conduct <color=#dbc291ff>Room Construction</color> just the way you like it!
卧室建造完成了！终于不用睡纸箱子啦！唉？怎么还有点怀念纸箱子的触感？
The bedroom's finally finished! No more sleeping in a cardboard box! Ha, funny thing is, I kinda miss the feel of sleeping there!
那么接下来，就按照这个节奏建造完其他区域吧～
Alright, let's keep the ball rolling and finish building the other areas!
晚餐会议结束后\n\n列车某处
After the Dinner Meeting ends\n\nSomewhere on the Express
Huh? What's that on the table?
顺光更显气色，用来拍证件照再合适不过了。{NICKNAME}，这个角度怎么样？
The front light accentuates a person's complexion, and it's great for official ID photos. {NICKNAME}, how's this angle?
（打开相机，给三月拍一张证件照吧。）
(Use your camera to take an ID photo for March.)
「摄影课题将在每天早上公布，届时请关注摄影展线上页面。」
"Photography tasks will be announced every morning. Please take note of the photography exhibition's online page during that time."
{NICKNAME}，我已经有灵感了。咱们赶紧出发吧！
{NICKNAME}, I've got some inspiration already. Let's set off now!
This is where the car dealership is.
带你畅游寰宇，终抵群星！
Roam the cosmos, and reach the stars!
那座雕像的位置和打光都不错，我们过去拍拍看吧。
That statue's location and lighting are pretty good. Let's take some shots over there.
你耐心聆听了一会儿规律的啾啾声，最后确认这是折纸小鸟的呼噜。
You patiently listen to the rhythmic tweets, finally confirming that they are the snores of an Origami Bird.
你估摸了一下羽毛的高度…要堂堂无名客跳起来，也太不优雅了。
You gauge the height of the feathers... It would be unbecoming of a dignified Nameless to jump up.
这只折纸小鸟似乎不能以常理对待…就算揪出来，也不会增加地图完成度。
This Origami Bird apparently can't be handled in the normal way... Even if you yank it out, it would not contribute to map completion.
劝你别对其他折纸小鸟这样「啾啾」。
It's best if you don't tweet like that at other Origami Birds.
Yank is not the solution to all problems!
出发开拓前，先睡个回笼觉吧。
Let's have some more sleep before setting off on a trailblazing expedition.
靠近些试试…他应该就在雕像附近。
Go closer and try it... He should be near the statue.
跟着雕像的指引找找看吧。
Follow the statue's directions and look around.
Could it be behind the curtain...?
能请到芮克先生办摄影展，谐乐学院也是好起来了。
Charmony Academy's quite impressive now, to have invited Mr. Reca to organize the photography exhibition.
按照给定的课题摄影，还要把照片传到线上，接受大家的点评？也太丢人了！
The photography task states that we still have to upload the photo online for everyone to comment? That's so embarrassing!
面子值几个美育学分？影展评出的奖项才重要。
How many art credits is your shame worth? The exhibition's evaluation awards are what's imperative.
What do you need, Master March?
咳…{NICKNAME}同学，为师让你来当然是有要事嘱托。
Ahem... {NICKNAME}, I have important instructions for you, of course.
You want some school credits, too?
我们连学籍都没有，拿学分也没有用。这么有趣的活动，重在参与嘛。
We're not even enrolled students here. What's the point of credits? It's all about participation in such a fun event.
事情是这样——芮克先生作为知名导演，对摄影也颇有研究。可惜上回来折纸大学太匆忙，没来得及向他讨教讨教。
Here's the thing — Being a famous director, Mr. Reca also has deep knowledge of photography. It's a pity we had to leave Paperfold University in a hurry, so I didn't get to pick his brain.
这回他和谐乐学院合作开办了摄影展，我可不能错过！
Now that he's collaborating with Charmony Academy to organize a photography exhibition, I simply can't miss out!
「三月七小姐在摄影上颇有潜力，既然有心参加影展，我会不遗余力指点。」
"Miss March 7th, you have great potential in photography, and since you're enthused about joining the exhibition, I will spare no effort in guiding you."
When did the assistant director become such a nice person?
它学芮克先生说话还挺像。
It mimics Mr. Reca's speech rather well.
「呵呵，『盛会巨星』的即兴台词，总是那么出人意料。此刻与你对话的并非副导演，而是远在他处的导演本人。」
"Heh-heh, ad-libbed dialogue from the Festive Superstar never fails to surprise. It is not the assistant director who is talking to you now, but the director himself, who is in a distant place."
「谐乐学院的邀请实在盛情难却，可惜我排不开档期，只好委派副导演代为执导。」
"I could hardly refuse Charmony Academy's invitation, but I really couldn't get my schedule to work, so I had to ask the assistant director to manage it in my stead."
没错，这也就是我把你喊过来的原因了——报名需要提交「证件照」，{NICKNAME}，来帮我拍一张吧！
That's right, and this is the reason I called you here. We need an ID photo for registration. {NICKNAME}, help me take one!
那就交给你啦，拍好看一些哦！
I'm counting on you then! Take a good one!
Why can't you ask someone else?
「证件照」是世界上最危险的一类照片。看到成片前，你永远不会知道自己会被拍成什么样…所以，必须交给信任的人！
ID photos are the most dangerous photos in the world. You'll never know how you'll turn out before it is taken... which is why it must be left to someone you can trust!
不过，这儿光线不大好，咱们去演艺教室吧。
But the lighting's not great here. Let's head to the performing arts classroom.
三月七领着你，径直来到演艺教室。
March 7th leads you straight to the performing arts classroom.
别人加学分，就相当于我们扣分，求学如逆水行舟，不进则退！
Others earning credits means we lose them. Pursuing education is like rowing upstream: You snooze, you lose!
M—My face is getting numb from smiling too long...
Is there anything I should look out for?
用取景框对准摄影对象，等相机识别出拍摄目标，再按下快门就行啦。
Aim the aperture at the subject, wait for the camera to identify the photo subject, then just hit the shutter.
其他的就交给直觉吧。这就是本姑娘的摄影秘诀！
Go with your gut for the rest of it. That's my secret to great photos!
「报名资料准备就绪。最后一步，填写参赛名。」
"Registration information is ready. The last step is to fill in your name."
{NICKNAME}，你觉得用什么名字参赛比较好？
{NICKNAME}, what name do you think I should use to participate?
有道理！这么大规格的比赛，当然要用真名打响名头。
Sounds good! I should use my real name for recognition in such a major competition.
有道理！出名的摄影师，都会给自己起一个有趣的艺名。
You're right! A famous photographer should always have an interesting pseudonym.
那么——初出茅庐的摄影师「{TEXTJOIN#191}」，正式亮相啦！
Now then, the budding photographer {TEXTJOIN#191} is officially making her mark!
「恭喜{TEXTJOIN#191}小姐报名成功。接下来的一周里，每天都会公布一个<color=#dbc291ff>『摄影课题』</color>。」
"Congratulations, Miss {TEXTJOIN#191}, on your successful registration. In the next week, a <color=#dbc291ff>Photography Task</color> will be announced every day."

这些卷轴大概有一个你那么高。回收卷轴的时候你可能会听到一些声响，不过不用害怕，那都是属于过去的话语，并不危险。
These scrolls are probably about as tall as you. When you retrieve them, you may hear some sounds, but don't be scared — those are whispers of the past, and they're not dangerous at all.
Well, who went and put you in charge?
你话还没问出口，眨眼间，眼前的孩子已消失在了人潮中……
You haven't even gotten a chance to ask your question when, in the blink of an eye, the child before you disappears into the crowd...
（哎，这儿的小孩儿真没规矩——先看看她留下的线索吧。）
(Bah, children in these parts are so rude. Let's just take a look at the clue she left behind.)
他们说乌拉尼娅永远得不到他人的善意和爱，因为乌拉尼娅是个没爸没妈的孤儿……
They say I will never receive kindness and love from others, because I am an orphan with no parents...
卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...
晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...
…卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一场智慧花园的学术交流得以被闻见：
...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and an academic exchange in the Garden of Wisdom can be heard:
您这套兵法中所记载的战术，恕我直言有些过于理想……
The tactics recorded in this strategy of yours are a little too idealistic, if I may say...
不可能有比这更完美的作战理论！这可是我参悟瑟希斯的原始智慧，又经过重重计算得出的完美计划。
There is nothing more perfect than this battle theory! This was an epiphany comprehended from the primordial wisdom of Cerces, and a plan perfected after countless iterations.
很抱歉打扰两位的讨论，但依照我随尼卡多利大人四处征战所见，您的作战理论较为古典，如今运用于应对黑潮未必奏效。

I apologize for interrupting your discourse, but from my many expeditions accompanying Lord Nikador in their conquests, your tactical theory is a tad antiquated and poses little effect against the black tide right now.
您是…悬锋城最德高望重的大学者！
You are... the most prestigious scholar in Castrum Kremnos!
原来是您！大人今日到访讲学，实属智慧花园的荣幸！
It is you indeed! It is the Garden of Wisdom's utmost honor to be audience to Your Highness' lecture today!
战势千变万化，不可全依典籍记载。若二位不介意，可随我移步城外的空地，我愿在实战中向你们演示，只要此举能精进联盟的战术。

Battle situations are volatile and fluid. Strategic texts should not be wholly relied upon. If you two don't mind, walk with me to a field outside the city. I would be willing to demonstrate to you in actual combat, as long as my pointers will refine the alliance's tactics.
没想到，今天竟然有机会领教天谴之矛的战术，我要将其补充进我的理论中。请您多指点！
I never thought I would have the chance to receive battle guidance from the Lance of Fury. I shall hone my theories with your advice. We'll be in your care!
卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...
卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...
晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...
…卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一则泰坦们的捉贼轶事得以被闻见：
...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and a story of Titans apprehending a thief can be heard:
蛮王今日如此有雅致四处闲逛，难不成是又有心碎之事在外散心？
For the savage king to be strolling the streets so leisurely... mayhaps you're trying to take your mind off another heartbreaking issue?
拿我打趣就免了。您美丽的脸庞写满了忧虑，我们是否都因面前这只贼灵烦忧？
Dispense with your teasing. Your beautiful face is fraught with worry. Aren't we all vexed about this Spirithief before us?
我的神庙已久未供奉足以享用的秘酿，叫我险些以为我的孩子们已将我遗忘，原来都是被这小贼偷摸走了——
My temple has not been offered enough ambrosia for a long while, and I was worried my children might have forgotten me. Instead, it was this thief who took it all...
哎、哎哟！大人的丝线快要将我勒断气了…我从未见您饮用过那秘酿，您不如慷慨施舍给我嘛…才不算浪费嘛。
O—Ouch! You're suffocating me with your threads, Your Highness! I have never seen you imbibing the offered ambrosia, so why not grant those to me instead... At least it won't go to waste.
看来并非仅我一人被骚扰。这贼灵在我的军队四处煽风点火，致使我的要将在军营内颜面尽失，不可饶恕！
It appears I'm not the only one who has been harassed. This Spirithief has been sowing lies and discord amongst my army's ranks, causing my generals' honor to be sullied. Unforgivable!
我们怀疑这小贼与冥河中新升起的泰坦有关。
We suspect this thief is in cahoots with the Titan newly arisen from the River of Souls.
管它是谁的造物，敢扰乱我的军队，军规伺候，你将被我斩杀化作天谴之锋的战魂！
Who cares whose creation it is. Whoever dares disrupt my legion will be charged according to martial law. You will be executed by me and turned into a warring soul for my Blade of Fury!
桀桀桀！等你们有本事抓住我再说吧，溜了——
Tsk tsk! Only if you two can catch me! I'm off!
卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...
卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...
晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...
…卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一次赴死的和谈得以被闻见：
...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and a doomed parley for peace can be heard:
天谴之矛，尼卡多利！你的英勇举世无双，你的长矛直入天际。
Lance of Fury, Nikador! Your valor is rivaled by none, your lance thrusting through the clouds.
我的战友，是什么让你血液的奔腾冷却，只余一滩死水的沉寂？你的刀剑不再公正，你的目光日渐浑浊。
My comrade, what has caused your boiling blood to cool, leaving only a stagnant silence? Your blade is no longer just, and your gaze turns turbid with time.
我愿为你拭去心中的迷雾——请重拾你的神格，回归往昔的荣耀；从此黑潮便不再可畏，明日将照耀翁法罗斯的大地。

I am willing to disperse the fog in your heart. Please reclaim your divinity and return to the path of glory. The black tide will not be feared henceforth, and tomorrow will shine upon the great land of Amphoreus.
Uninvited visitors are not welcome here.
我们请求与天谴之矛对话，而非你，又或你那虚假的王。
We seek an audience with the Lance of Fury, not with you, nor your false king.
勇者不与弱者共舞，悬锋之伟大由鲜血浇灌。
The valiant does not consort with the weak. The majesty of Kremnos is nurtured by fresh blood.
笑话，小人难企英雄之境，你不够格替泰坦发言。
What a farce. The petty will never reach the greatness of heroes. You are unworthy to speak for a Titan.
卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...
卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...
晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...
…卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一群人无法逃离的命运得以被闻见：
...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and the fate of a group of people unable to flee can be heard:
现在的局势到底有多么糟糕，我们才会逃至这鬼怪多出的命运重渊啊……
How dire is the situation now that we had to flee to this haunted Abyss of Fate...
别说这种丧气话，无论何时都不要放弃希望，振作起来！
Stop the depressing talk. We mustn't give up hope no matter what. Keep your spirits up!
喂喂，前面那些穿着铠甲的…是奥赫玛的援兵吧！喂——我们在这里啊！！！
Hey look, those armored figures up ahead... They're Okheman reinforcements, aren't they! Heyyyy! We're over here!!!
等下…那是…新型号的悬锋战士？！
Wait... They're... the new Kremnos Warrior models!?
伟哉，吾主尼卡多利；壮哉，战争之魂不朽。
Great is our Lord Nikador. Glorious is the immortality of the soul of war.
为什么会追到这里？他们是疯了吗？
Why have they pursued us here? Have they gone mad?
为天谴之矛献上汝之战魂……
Relinquish your warring soul to the Lance of Fury...
还有作战能力的，统统上前迎战！掩护平民和伤员先走——
Those who can still fight, form up! Cover the civilians and wounded and let them escape first...
卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...
卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...
晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...
…卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一颗勇者心脏的跳动得以被闻见：
...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and the beating of a warrior's heart can be heard:
撩动万物的斗争者，庇护万邦的守护者啊——请让我族伴你征伐，随你撒下恐惧的种子，点燃战争的火光！
The fighter who provokes all life, the guardian who protects all states — please allow my clan to accompany you in conquest, to follow you in sowing seeds of fear, to light the torches of war!
泰坦的战场，无需孱弱的造物踏足。离开此处，或尽数投身冥河。
The Titans' battlefield has no need for mewling creations. Leave this place, or be tossed into the River of Souls like many before you.
若你愿向我们发起屠戮的「纷争」，那就请允许我们对你张弩竖剑，来换一份战死的荣耀。
If you declare the "Strife" of slaughter upon us, please allow us to draw our bows and unsheathe our swords against you, in exchange for a glorious death.
凡人莫要妄想染指神的显耀。
Mortals should not foolishly aspire to the lofty glories of gods.
神也莫要轻易卑视凡人的决心。
And gods should not take light of the resolution of mortals.
黑潮将生出可怖于纷争本身的绝望，汝等可敢直视这死渊中的黧黑之相？
The black tide will birth despair more terrifying than Strife itself. Dare you stay your gaze on the dark visages within this abyss of death?
死亡有何可怖？赴战场，垂英名，纵使葬于他乡，也胜过苟延残喘的安详。
What terror is there in death? Charging into battle to stake your heroic claim, falling in a land far from home — that is an ending that triumphs over a mundane existence in peace.
我们千百年来只是受你庇护的羔羊，但你需要一群狼与狮，成为你最勇猛的兵戈，令你的剑锋悬于万民之上！
We are but lambs sheltered by you for eons, but you need a pack of wolves, a pride of lions, to become your fiercest soldiers, to raise your blades above the masses!
好，那就让你的族人向我证明这份勇气吧——<color=#dbc291ff>歌耳戈</color>。
So be it. Your clan will prove your courage to me — <color=#dbc291ff>Gorgo</color>.
卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...
早些时候在市集消失的孩子，又突然出现在你的面前。
The child who disappeared into the bustling market earlier on suddenly appears before you again.
Your SPD is pretty maxed out.
抱歉，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，暂且听我一言——
Sorry, {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, please hear me out...
神的眼目总是孤独的，我们在岁月的洪流中不过一粒尘埃，随着欧洛尼斯呼出的流风而飘扬。
The gods' eyes are ever lonely. Our years in the flux of time are but a speck of dust, floating about in Oronyx's billows.
我们在昨日被吹到凡人的坟茔，来日又飘到神明的宫殿。我们看见正义、失心、荣耀、背叛、疯狂…但我们无权裁决。
We were blown to a mortal's grave yesterday, and drift to a godly palace today. We see justice, hysteria, glory, betrayal, madness... but we have no right to judge.
因为，眼目并无立场，更无目的，惟有观测的职责。
Because eyes have no stance nor purpose, only the duty of observance.
我如此耀眼，怎会是尘埃？
I'm mad bright. How can I be dust?
怎么路边小孩也在讲谜语？
So some weird kid is dishing out riddles now?
哎呀，只是家里长辈的告诫。
Ah, they're just warnings from elders at home.
「…晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远。」
"...The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome..."
我族是艾格勒在人间的眼睛，即便它已阖上百眼，我们依然坚守。
My clan is the eye of Aquila in the mortal realm. Even though they have closed their hundred eyes, we still persist in our duties.
本想向{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}传递这份神圣的职责，但看来我挑错了对象——你并非是一位沉默的「观众」。
I wanted to impart this sacred duty to {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, but it looks like I've picked the wrong person — you are not a silent "spectator."
Obviously not. I'm the main character.
Of course not. I'm not mute.
没交互的剧情已经过时了！
A narrative without interaction is so passé!
呵呵，你要是还有下次相遇，我希望你能让{RUBY_B#「晨昏之眼」}我的主人{RUBY_E#}看到更伟大的东西。
Heh heh, if we do meet again, I hope you will let {RUBY_B#Eye of Twilight}my master{RUBY_E#} see even greater things.
并不陌生的离场方式，你只是眨了下眼，眼前的孩子便消失得无影无踪，只留你一人在原地消化她的话语。
In a most familiar mode of departure, in the blink of an eye, the child before you has vanished yet again, leaving you standing alone to digest her words.
呀，灰宝，你来了！快看，这些小家伙好可爱，也很有精神，要是能带回庭院就好啦。
Hey, Grayie, you're here! Look, these little ones are so cute and energetic. Only if I can bring them back to the Grove.
听到你的夸奖，小奇美拉很开心呢。它说，虽然你个子高高的，但也很可爱！
Hearing your praise, the little chimera is delighted. It says, despite your tall height, you're still really cute!
啊，小奇美拉生气了！它说，虽然不知道帕姆是什么品种，但肯定不如它可爱！
Ah, the little chimera is angry! It says, although it doesn't know what breed Pom-Pom is, but it's definitely not as cute!
哈哈，在这些小家伙面前说话可得注意点哦，它们非常机灵，听得懂我们究竟在说什么。
Haha, you ought to be more careful when you're talking in front of these little ones. They're very bright, and they do understand what we're saying.
你…能听懂奇美拉的叫声？
You... can understand the howls of a chimera?
差点忘了，灰宝没有在树庭学习过，缺少这方面的知识……
I almost forgot, you never studied at the Grove, Grayie, hence you lack knowledge in this area...
不过没关系，我来给你施加一点{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福，这样就能解决啦。
But that's no matter. Allow me to cast the blessings of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, and this should solve it.
Come closer, and close your eyes...
恍惚间，你感到些微的暖意渗入身体，像是发丝的轻柔触感，又像是午后庭院里和煦的阳光，困倦连同着过往的美好记忆涌入脑海，编织出最深沉的梦境……

In a trance, you feel a slight warmth flow into your body, like a soft caress of a strand of hair, or the gentle embrace of the afternoon sunlight in a quiet garden. Drowsiness and fond memories of the past wash into your brain, weaving them into the fabric of your dreams...
…愿你的理性清晰。愿{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}捍卫你的思想。好啦~可以睁开眼睛了哦。
...May your reason remain clear. May {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} guard your thoughts. All done, you can open your eyes now!
感觉怎么样？再去和小奇美拉对话试试吧。
How do you feel? Try talking to the little chimera!
小奇美拉睁着大大的眼睛望着你，似乎很期待和你进行一番亲切友好的交流。
The little chimera gazes at you with its wide eyes, as if eager to engage in a warm and friendly exchange with you.
你好？我是来自星穹列车的无名客，名字是……
Hello? I'm a Nameless from the Astral Express, and my name is...
嗷呜！我听说过你，好早以前就想和你认识了！蹭蹭~蹭蹭~
Awoo! I've heard of you, and I've always wanted to get to know you! *nuzzle*
别当真，这家伙见谁都这么说。
Don't take it seriously. This fella says it to everyone.
先说清楚，我可是黄金裔的贵客，奥赫玛是我的地盘，都放尊重点！
First things first, I am an esteemed guest of the Chrysos Heirs, and Okhema is my turf, so pay your respects!
小点声，有意见也先忍着，万一这人成了我们的管理员呢？
Lower your voice, and hold your tongue. What if this one's our administrator?
哈哈哈哈。都说它们很聪明啦，就是偶尔有些调皮，别在意别在意。
Hahaha, I told you they were smart, just playful sometimes. Don't mind them.
并且，小奇美拉也很能干。最近奥赫玛不是遭到了袭击嘛，到处都乱糟糟的。多亏了这些小家伙帮大家工作，这才解决了人手不足的问题。该好好感谢它们才是呢。

And little chimeras are very capable. Okhema was under attack recently, so it's a mess everywhere. It's all thanks to these little ones that we managed to solve the labor issue. We should be grateful to them.
不用谢！反正我也不是自愿工作的！
No need! It's not like I volunteered for the job!
They're different than what I imagined.
这座生命花园是奇美拉的培育场所和栖息地，灰宝感兴趣的话，可以到处转转哦。
This Garden of Life is the chimeras' nurturing ground and dwelling. If you're interested, you can take a look around, Grayie.
小家伙们的外形特征和性格都各不相同，说不定会碰上你特别中意的！
They all look different with unique personalities. There just might be one you fancy!
起来！都起来！…允许你们休息了吗！快干活，我不是来看你们偷懒的！
Get up! All of you! ...Did I allow you all to take a break!? Get your feet moving. I didn't come here to watch you all slack off!
我就纳闷了，为什么别的小队都像模像样的，你们就是啥都干不好呢？没用，给人看笑话，还挂在我名下，丢我的脸！
I'm just vexed as to why you're all such slackers compared to other squads that're role models? Useless and making fools of yourselves, and dragging my good name through the mud too!
…咦？好像有人正在凶那些小奇美拉。灰宝，我们去看看吧！
...Eh? Looks like that person is being mean to those little chimeras. Grayie, let's go take a look!
我最瞧不起虐待动物的人了！
I utterly disdain those who abuse animals!
Is this something I should be involved in?
生命花园是奥赫玛重要的学术场所，当然不允许有人在这胡闹。快过去吧！
The Garden of Life is a key academic venue of Okhema. No nonsense is allowed here. Get over there quickly!
跟我没关系！是这家伙一点用都没有，只会在那哭，我不要和它一起！
This has nothing to do with me! It's this fella who's utterly useless — it only knows how to cry, so I don't want to be with it!
嗷呜…但工作真的很辛苦啊。嗷呜……
Awoo... But work is so hard... Awoo...
唉，就知道「嗷呜嗷呜」叫，跟谁扮可怜呢？我是来监督你们干活的…干活，明白？要的是你的剩余价值，不是情绪价值！
Bah, wailing is all you know. Who are you trying to fool? My job is to monitor your work... So work, got it? It's your surplus value that's needed, not your emotional value!
工作做不好，名次也提不上去。摊上你们这群没用的东西，算我倒霉！
Your ranking won't go up if you don't do a good job. Just my luck running into you useless lot!
你好…这位先生，小奇美拉已经道过歉，就请别训斥它们了。这种严苛的管教方式，是不会得到好结果的呀。
Hello sir... these little chimeras already apologized, so please stop berating them. Such harsh disciplinary treatment will never result in positive outcomes.
在和元老院议员说话前，是不是该先检查下自己的身份？
Shouldn't you be checking yourself before speaking to a Council Elder?
…不对，我见过你，想想…哟，这不是伟大的黄金裔嘛？对，你们是奥赫玛的领导者，高所有人一等，当然有资格教我做事。

...Hang on, I've seen you before. Wait... Oh, if it isn't a great Chrysos Heir? Ah yes, leaders of Okhema, and an echelon higher than the rest — of course you are qualified to tell me how to do my job.
那就敬请指点——这群毫无用处的奇美拉，到底该怎么管教？
Then please enlighten me: How would I discipline this group of utterly useless chimeras?
You should demonstrate a bad example first.
行啊，只要你别被它们干的蠢事吓到了就成！
Sure, as long as you don't regret witnessing their witless antics!
啊，不对不对。这个管理方式的问题也太大了，小奇美拉可比你以为的要能干得多。
Ah, no no. Such a management method presents too many problems. The little chimeras are far more capable than you think.
灰宝！正好你在，就麻烦演示给他看看啦！
Grayie! Good thing you're here. I'll have to trouble you to demonstrate to him!
我就是最友善的动物朋友！
I am the friendliest friend to animals!
原来灰宝很受小动物们欢迎嘛？那就方便多啦，来，我们现在就开始！
So you're very popular among little animals? That's much more convenient then. Come, let us begin!
I need to mimic the sound a chimera makes?
当然不用！在乱想些什么呢，别紧张，我会认真教你的！
Of course not! What is going through your mind? Don't get antsy. I will teach you in earnest!
没事，不是有我在吗。别紧张，我会认真教你的！
Don't worry. I'm here, aren't I? Don't be anxious. I'll teach you in earnest!
妙！太妙了！不愧是黄金裔，奥赫玛的大英雄！
Wonderful! Simply wonderful! That's a Chrysos Heir for you, Okhema's great heroes!
要是你们在对抗那个黑潮的时候，能这么厉害的话，城邦肯定就有救了吧？
If you're just as strong when the black tide comes, the city will surely be saved, no?
正好，我有个绝佳的提议——既然两位的管教如此出色，不妨…就从我这买走这支队伍的管理权如何？我天资愚钝，就是个普通人，可担不起这样的重任！

Perfect timing. I've got a most excellent proposal: Since your management skills are so superb, why not... buy this squad's rights from me? I'm but an ordinary person of mediocre talent unable to bear such heavy responsibility!
You handled them like trash, and you want me to pay!?
怎么不要？我可是费了好多心思，才弄来的这个管理员职位。再说了，奇美拉是帮人干活的劳动力，有产出的，转让当然要收费。
Why not? I went through a lot of trouble to get this administrator position. Also, chimeras are labor to help people's work. Since there's output, of course I must be paid for it.
工作，就得有回报。黄金裔不会是习惯了发号施令，连这个基本的道理都不懂吧？
Work must be compensated. You're telling me Chrysos Heirs are so used to everyone being at their beck and call, that they don't understand basic principles anymore?
你该不会是想转嫁责任吧。
You're not trying to absolve yourself of your burden, are you?
这叫能者多劳，黄金裔是救世主，理应帮我们这样的公民排忧解难。
The more capable often have to do more. Chrysos Heirs are saviors, so they naturally should help us common folk lighten our burdens.
要是继续跟着我，这群奇美拉不知道还要吃多少苦头，你们不是觉得心疼吗，那就发发善心，帮它们逃离苦痛的深渊呗。
If they continue to follow me, who knows how much more hardship these chimeras will suffer? Does your heart not bleed for them? Spare some benevolence and deliver them from the abyss of suffering.
想扮英雄，又不愿意花钱？奥赫玛哪有这么好的事。
You want to play hero and not pay a dime? There's never a free lunch in Okhema.
嘿，我要的不多，十万利衡币足矣。塔兰顿在上，自会见证这笔交易的公正！
Heh, I don't want much, just a hundred thousand Balance Coins for them. Talanton above will witness the fairness of this deal!
爽快！拿来吧，权利就得用东西来换。那边的小姑娘，你可要记好了！
You're a forthright one! Take them. Authority must be exchanged for something. That little lady over there, you best remember this scene!
灰宝，等等。别便宜了这种家伙。
Grayie, wait. Don't make it easy for this fellow.
I'm not paying you a single coin!
没问题。元老院向来尊崇民意，和那些自以为是的救世主不一样，你当然有拒绝的权利。
Of course. The Council of Elders has always respected the will of the people, unlike some arrogant saviors. You obviously have the right to refuse.
但同样的，只要这群奇美拉还归我负责，该如何管教就是我的权利，谁都没资格指手画脚。听到了吗，那边的小姑娘？
But similarly, as long as these chimeras are my responsibility, it is my just right to treat them as I see fit. No one else has the authority to interfere. Got that, little lady standing there?
灰宝，别和他急。我来处理。
Grayie, don't get riled up by him. I'll handle this.
这位先生，「天空」祭司间流传着一句谚语，叫做——等{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}睁开眼睛。意思就是：在天亮前，别轻易做出判断。
Sir, there is a saying passed down among the Sky Priests, which is... Wait for {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila {RUBY_E#} to open their eyes. It means: Don't make hasty judgments before the sun rises.
要是过早以为自己胜券在握，可是会难看的呀。
If you think you've already won, it could end up quite embarrassing for you.
…什么意思？这些奇美拉都挂在我的名下，你还能明着抢不成？
...What do you mean? These chimeras are under my management. What, you're going to rob me of them?
小奇美拉是很聪明的生物，听得懂我们的话语。它们有自己独特的想法，也能做出选择。
Chimeras are very smart creatures and understand our language. They have their own unique way of thinking and will make their own choices too.
——想跟随我和灰宝的小奇美拉，请站到这边来！
...The chimeras that wish to follow me and Grayie, stand over here!
嗷呜！我要来，我才不想继续跟着这种管理员！我要换队，我要辞职！
Awoo! I'm coming! I don't want to follow such a mean administrator! I'm switching squads. I'm resigning!
风堇的话音未落，所有奇美拉都齐刷刷地站在了你们身后。
Before Hyacine finishes her sentence, all the chimeras are lined up nicely in front of you both.
…不是。这群奇美拉怎么「嗷呜嗷呜」地全跑掉了？
喂，你们当着我的面挖我的墙脚，想拆队是吧，这就是黄金裔的手段吗？
Hey, poaching my property in my presence, you trying to cause trouble for me? Is this how a Chrysos Heir does things?
奇美拉当然有跳槽的权利。
The chimeras of course have the right to change jobs.
This is voting with your feet!
好啦。你仍然是管理员，但没有小奇美拉愿意继续待在你的队伍里。现在的结果，不是正符合你所坚持的*公正*嘛？
Pipe down. You may still be their administrator, but no chimeras are willing to stay on in your squad. From the looks of it, this is fitting of the "fairness" you so insist?
还是说，元老院只有在符合自身需要的时候，才会想要倾听大家的意愿？
Or does a Council Elder only listen to the will of the people when it suits his own needs?
这、这…我要去向花园投诉。你们滥用权势，欺压奥赫玛的公民！
Th—This... I'm lodging a complaint to the Garden. You're abusing your authority and oppressing the citizens of Okhema!
请吧。就是不清楚，在园丁们看来，与欺负小奇美拉相比，究竟谁的行为更过分呢？
Please do. I'm just not sure what could be worse than bullying the chimeras in the eyes of the Gardeners.
意思是，你连奇美拉都不如。
Which means, you're less than even a chimera.
我刚来就看见你在凶奇美拉！
I saw you being mean to the chimeras just now!
哎…行吧。我认了，是你们厉害，我斗不过。但别高兴得太早。
Bah... fine. I concede this round to you. But don't get all smug just yet.
我可以交出这群奇美拉的管理权，不过事情没这么简单。注意点，别把自己给赔进去了！
I can hand over the authority to these chimeras, but it won't be that simple. Just watch out before you end up losing everything!
呼…终于解决掉了。我算是明白阿格莱雅女士和元老院打交道时候的心情啦。
Phew... Finally settled. Now I know how it feels when Lady Aglaea interacts with the Council of Elders.
现在，这些小奇美拉就归我们管理了。至于后续安排，嗯…先去问问生命花园的园丁吧！
Now these little chimeras are ours to care for. As for later arrangements, hmm... Let's go ask the Gardeners in the Garden of Life!
我收到了权限转让的申请。所以，你们谁是这只奇美拉小队新的管理员？
I received a request to transfer authority. So who's the new administrator for this chimera squad?
That would be this person beside me.
啊，灰宝，我想了想，要不管理员的位置还是交给你吧。
Ah, Grayie, I gave it some thought — how about you be their administrator?
正值逐火之旅重启，昏光庭院的工作也很繁忙，要是被阿格莱雅女士知道我在外面还揽了这些杂事，指不定又得生气啦。
Since the restart of the Flame-Chase Journey, it's also been busy at the Twilight Courtyard. If Lady Aglaea knew about my mucking around outside, she'd be pretty upset.
好，就由我来当这个管理员。
All right, I'll be the administrator then.
决定了？行。虽然很感谢你们的帮忙，但不得不说…你确实接下了个超级大的烂摊子。
It's decided? All right. I really should thank you for your help, but truth be told... you've really taken on a huge mess.
你来奥赫玛的时间不久，我就先做个说明吧。<color=#dbc291ff>这些奇美拉受生命花园的统一管理，分成若干个小队，会帮城里的居民做些简单的工作。</color>

You haven't been in Okhema long, so I'll just give you a brief explanation: <color=#dbc291ff>These chimeras are managed by the Garden of Life, and divided into smaller squads that help out this city's residents with simple tasks.</color>
大部分奇美拉都聚集在附近，你们可以随便看看。
Most chimeras gather nearby, so you can take a look around.
没有困难的工作，只有勇敢的奇美拉。加油！你可以的！
There's no job too hard, only courageous chimeras. Keep it up! You can do it!
我很能坚持的，坚持每天偷懒。
I will! I will keep slacking off every day.
就算是累趴下的奇美拉，只要想到奥赫玛的繁荣，也会不由自主地高昂起头！
Even if we work ourselves to the bone, we will hold our heads up high when we think about Okhema's prosperity!
早起的园丁有饭吃，早起的奇美拉只有苦吃。
The early Gardener gets breakfast, but the early chimera only gets broken fast.
